感觉没有想象中那么吓人…
This isn't as scary as I imagined...
…这都已经是罗浮样板房了，能有多吓人啊。
...This is a Luofu model house. How scary can it be?
总之，我们先去找到房产证，顺便调查岁阳真相——两件事情一次解决，最后发布「探访凶宅」的帖子，肯定能涨不少粉丝数！

Either way, we need to find the deed and investigate the truth behind this heliobus while we're at it. Two birds, one stone. Then, we'll put up a "haunted house investigation" post and rake in the followers!
你真是想得太顺利了，我有些担心了…对了，你们不觉得那块广告板非常突兀吗？
You make it all sound so easy! I'm a little concerned... Come to think of it, don't you think that advertisement board over there is a little out of place?
这是民宅应该有的东西吗？
Is this something that should be in a civilian home?
Come on. Let's go take a look.
See what we can find out...
...No time to waste. Let's go now.
看上去有些突兀的广告板，没人会在家里放着这玩意儿。
An advertisement board that looks a little out of place. No one would have something like this in their house.
哇哦，竟然是卡芙卡的通缉令。
Woah, there's a wanted poster for Kafka!
随着「建木」事件过去了一段时日，罗浮仙舟也应早早撤下了对星核猎手的通缉令，但是基层工作总是有些延迟，你在街头上有时还能看到卡芙卡通缉令。

Given that some time passed since the "Ambrosial Arbor" incident, the Luofu should have already removed the wanted notice for the Stellaron Hunters. However, grassroots-level work can be slow, and you may still see Kafka's wanted poster on the streets.
不过，一张卡芙卡通缉令出现这里，在一个像是「鬼打墙」的民宅院里。你和小伙伴们都应该对它的突兀感有所警惕。
However, a wanted poster for Kafka appearing here, in the courtyard of an apparent haunted house, should raise some caution among you and your companions due to its unexpected nature.
但是它不该出现在这里，建议你凑近一些看看。
It shouldn't be here. You should probably get closer and take a look.
就在你凑近观察的时候，广告板突然活了过来一般，翻转了过来。
Just as you move closer to inspect, the advertisement board suddenly flips over, like it's come to life.
This must be a clue about the haunted house!
Sorry, not enough have been produced.
刃的通缉令是不是也可以？
What about a wanted poster for Blade?
I want to tear it down!
正确，但现在也许不是说这个的时候。
Correct, but now is not the time to be saying such things.
就像是有人注意到了你正盯着通缉令，一块异色的石头在你眼前掉在了地上。
A strangely-colored stone falls down before your eyes, as if someone has noticed you looking at the wanted poster.
四下没有旁人，它究竟是如何出现的？你将它捡起来，立刻意识到它可能是重要线索。
There is no one around. Just where did this come from? As you pick it up, you realize that this is probably an important clue.
随后，你听到背后传出了幽冥般的声音，它像是直接传入脑内的回响。
At that moment, you hear a ghostly voice coming from behind you, like an echo that directly imprints into your brain.
…这里…好黑，我…不想被关在这里……
...It's... so dark. I... I don't want to be trapped here...
请来找到我…这块磁铁石…是最初的线索……
Please find me... This magnetic stone... Is the first clue...
Bring it... Come and find me... Come and... save me...
The weakened voice comes to an abrupt halt.
...Did you hear that? It was a vengeful spirit!
我还以为只有我能听见…
I thought only I could hear it...
听到了，我有点不想救它了。
I heard it. I suddenly don't really want to rescue them.
什、什么冤魂啊，那是岁阳吧！
Wh—What do you mean by a vengeful spirit? That was obviously a heliobus, right?
哎，是是是。看来线索就藏在这座宅邸里，只要找到岁阳，一切问题就能迎刃而解。
Ah, yes, yes! It looks like all of the clues are hidden in this residence. All we need to do is find the heliobus, and all these problems will be solved.
这块磁石肯定是有什么用的，你先收好吧。
This magnetic stone must have some use. Take it for now.
（事不宜迟，现在就去找找这里有什么线索吧……）
(There's no time to waste. Let's take a look around for any clues around here...)
破损的箱子，因其沉重而难以移动。箱子锁眼已经锈蚀，上方有拳头大小的破洞，箱子内部似乎有什么金属物件。也许有什么办法能将箱子里的东西取出来……

A broken box that is hard to move due to its weight. The lock is corroded, and there is a hole the size of a fist on the topside. It looks like there is something metallic inside. Perhaps there is a way to get the item out from the box...
磁铁石靠近箱子底部后，你听到一声金属物件贴近箱子内壁的声音。你引导着箱子内部的物件，将它从箱子的缺口处取出。
With the magnetic stone placed near the base of the box, you heard the metallic item cling to the side of it. You guide the item to the missing hole in the top and extract it.
如果使用<color=#dbc291ff>强磁性的磁石</color>，也许能将箱子里的东西取出来……
If you use a strongly <color=#dbc291ff>magnetic stone</color>, you may be able to remove the item from the box...
紧闭的门，需要钥匙才能打开。
A door that is sealed shut, it requires a key to open.
院门被你轻松打开，钥匙也断在锁眼里…就让它待在里面吧。
You easily opened the courtyard door and the key broke off in the lock... Let's just leave that there.
断裂的云骑阵刀。很锋利，先拿走吧，也许能用得上。
It's a broken Cloud Knights' devastator glaive. It is extremely sharp, so you decide to take it with you in case it comes in handy.
古旧的铃铛。似乎是用于招来小动物的道具，先拿走吧，也许能用得上。
An old bell. It looks like an item used to call a small animal. Let's take it, it may come in handy later.
沉重的石砖。似乎刻印着什么文字，但难以阅读。要是能用<color=#dbc291ff>拓片纸</color>将它拓下来就能阅读了吧？

A heavy stone. It looks like it is engraved with some kind of script, but it is hard to make out. Maybe if you could use <color=#dbc291ff>rubbing paper</color>, you may be able to copy the inscription and read it?
你翻出几页未经使用的拓片纸，将它贴在石砖上，仔细拓下石砖上的内容。
You flick through a few pages of unused rubbing paper and place it on the stone, and carefully rub on the message on the stone.
奇异的手印在这里停留。你仔细观察，这里藏着废弃的拓片纸。
The strange hand prints remain. Upon closer inspection, there is scrapped rubbing paper hidden around here.
不知何时的食盒，装在其中的食物却像是刚做好不久。
A discarded food box. The food inside seems to have been prepared very recently.
你将食盒中小吃尽数取出，做成了一个「像是饭团」的东西，这院中会有饥饿的家伙需要它吗？
You remove all of the food items from within and make it into something that "looks like a rice ball." Is there a hungry someone in this courtyard in need of this?
一家三口的照片。上面写着「初到仙舟纪念。——雷诺」，署上的时间似乎是百年前……
A picture of a family of three. On it is written: "When we first arrived in Xianzhou — Renault." It seems to be dated about a hundred years ago...
这附近到处都调查看看，应该有我们漏掉的线索。
Let's investigate the area again. We must have missed some clues.
损坏的快递箱子。封箱胶带十分结实，有没有什么办法能打开箱子呢？
A broken courier package. The sealing tape seems very strong. Wonder if there's a way to open it?
断裂的云骑阵刀轻松裁开了封箱胶带，你从箱子里杂物中找到了一把钥匙。
The broken Cloud Knights' devastator glaive easily tears through the packing tape, and you obtain a key from the various items inside.
这块磁铁石是用来做什么的呀？
What is this magnet used for?
应该能找到隐藏起来的金属物件吧，总之都得试试。
It must be for finding hidden metal items? Let's give it a try.
精致的保险箱。看上去像是放着贵重物品的保险箱，上面还附着一张便条，似乎是提醒自己以免忘记密码。接下来就该输入密码了……
An exquisite safe that looks to be holding precious items. There is a note attached. It seems to be reminding the owner of the password. Let's try inputting the password...
你毫无头绪，也许应该找找这里的线索。
You have no idea what it could be. Perhaps there are clues around?
便条上写着「保险箱密码是T」，显然密码盘上没有「T」。所以「T」代表着一串数字吗？你需要线索来佐证。
The note says "the safe's password is 'T.'" There is no "T" on the lock, So, "T" must represent a series of digits? You will need to find clues to prove this.
接下来就该输入密码了……
「M」是<unbreak>71839</unbreak>，「N」是<unbreak>7193</unbreak>，「V」是<unbreak>183</unbreak>…而你得到了密码的线索，「保险箱密码是T」。所以，你有头绪了吗？
"M" is <unbreak>71839</unbreak>, "N" is <unbreak>7193</unbreak>, "V" is <unbreak>183</unbreak>... You have the clue for the password: "The safe password is 'T.'" So, do you have an idea?
1、3、2、8，你已经猜到了，密码应该是在「T」九宫格上的笔顺。
You've guessed "1," "3," "2" and "8" so far. The password must be the stroke order for the letter "T" on a nine-square grid.
似乎不太对，还得再次尝试…
That doesn't seem right. You'll have to try again...
咕咕叫的快递箱。箱子放在够不着的地方，也许能用<color=#dbc291ff>发出清脆声响的东西</color>将它吸引过来？
A courier package that is making a growling sound. The package is out of reach. Maybe you can use <color=#dbc291ff>something that makes a ringing sound</color> to lure it closer?
你摇动铃铛，快递箱似乎更靠近了一些。
You ring the bell and it looks like the courier package moved closer.
咕咕的快递箱。里面似乎有饥饿的小兽等待投食，除非你有食物，否则它不会让你打开快递箱。
A courier package that is making a growling sound. It sounds like there is a small hungry creature in there waiting to be fed. Throw it some food or it won't let you open the courier package.
你将方形饭团放在一边，眨眼间，似乎有一团黑影从箱中窜出，并叼走了饭团，发出了一声低沉的吼叫——在箱子里，到底是什么？
You place the square rice ball to one side and, in the blink of an eye, a shadow seems to burst out of the package, snap up the rice ball, and let out a low growl... What on earth is in that box?
随即像是从箱子里走出一个看不见的怪物，在墙上匍匐前进，留下了…手印？
Then, it seems like an invisible monster crawls out from the box and shuffles along the wall, leaving... hand prints?
…云骑军阵刀的碎片吗？可以用来做裁纸刀。
...A fragment of the Cloud Knights' devastator glaive? That could be used as a paper cutter.
That's really gonna hurt your hands.
那个还在发出声响的快递箱肯定有问题……
There's definitely something not right about that courier package making noises...
要是能打开，肯定里面藏着好东西。
If we can open it, I'm sure there's something good in there.
…要让它过来的话，要不要试试铃铛之类的？
...If you want it to come closer, why don't you try using a bell or something?
你顺利地打开了保险箱，除了房产证之外，没想到这里面还藏着一只岁阳。
You successfully open the safe and, alongside the deed, there is something you never expected to see... A heliobus.
可恶的人类…可恶的人类！竟敢这样对付我！
Blasted humans... Cursed humans! How dare you do this to me!
先停手，我是可以讲道理的…终于有活人让老子吸口阳气了，你们让我喘喘……
Stop, I can be reasonable... Finally, a living person for me to breathe the sweet scent of life. Let me catch my breath first...
你们到底是怎么回事？搞些乱七八糟的吓人玩意，有意思吗？快把我给吓死了！
What is wrong with all of you? You think these kinds of terrifying tricks are funny? You almost scared me to death!
等等，闹鬼不是岁阳导致的吗？
Wait! Isn't the haunting caused by heliobi?
谁告诉你的，凶宅不是你们人类自己搞出来的吗？真是的。
Who told you that? Aren't humans the ones who make houses haunted? Seriously.
你一个岁阳也会感到害怕吗？
岁阳为什么就不能害怕了，这里阴森森的，太吓人了。
Why shouldn't a heliobus get scared? It's dark and creepy in here. It's terrifying!
啊，我们听房东大叔雷诺说这里闹鬼，专门过来调查的！
Ah, we heard from the landlord, Renault, that this place is haunted, so we came to investigate!
…哦，房东雷诺。嗯？你们说…是雷诺吗？
...Oh. Renault, the landlord. Wait. You're talking about... Renault?
He said his name was Renault.
这房子的主人确实是雷诺，是个短生种，一百年前就死了。所以，你们看到的其实……
The owner of this house was indeed Renault, and he was a short-life species, who died a century ago. So, the person you actually saw was...
你说的没错，真相就是这样无聊。
That's right. The truth is just that boring.
我在这里真是受够了，你们快用那个葫芦把我带走吧，我们到有点阳气的地方去吧。
I've had enough here. You lot, get me in that gourd and get me out of here. Take me somewhere with some life and yang energy!
我叫你的名字，你敢答应吗？
If I call your name, do you dare to respond?
我叫煞火，你快收了我吧。
My name is Burnie. Hurry and claim me!
你们回来了，怎么样，我的房产证找到了吗？
You're back! Well, did you find my deed?
等等，不如让我来考考你，这房产证上的户主到底写的是谁吧？
Wait, how about we test you a little about who exactly is the owner of the household written on this deed?
…对啊，我一早就告诉你们了，我是雷诺。
...Yeah! I told you that before. I am Renault.
你错了，雷诺是短生种的名字，一百年前就去世了，房产证上写着呢，你不是雷诺！
Wrong. Renault was a short-life species that passed away a century ago. It says right here on the deed! You are not the real Renault!
是你人为制造了闹鬼的假象。
是你赶走了凶宅真正的房主。
You were the one that chased out the real landlord of that haunted house.
我们找到雷诺一家的照片，这上面哪位是你？
We found a picture of Renault and his family. Which one of these is you?
我们还找到了雷诺留下的信息，他们记录下自己遭遇的各类「灵异事件」，最后还是因为闹鬼被迫变卖房产，离开了这里。

We also found messages left behind by Renault. His family recorded multiple "supernatural incidents" they encountered. In the end, these "hauntings" forced them to sell the place and move out of here.
正当你以为无人认识这位化外民之后，企图变卖他的房产，却发现「凶宅」真的闹鬼了，这让你感到害怕……
Just when you thought that no one would know who this outworlder was, you tried to sell off his property. But, realizing this "haunted house" really was haunted, you got scared...
于是乎，你在「罗浮杂俎」上找到了我们，希望十王司能驱散鬼魅。
So, you contacted us on Ghostly Grove, hoping that the Ten-Lords Commission could help drive away these ghosts for you.
证据就在我们手里，我是云骑军，跟我去一趟地衡司吧。
We have all the evidence here. I am a Cloud Knight, and I'll be taking you with me to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
凶宅的真相水落石出。剩下的事就交给地衡司处理吧。
Now the truth behind the haunted house has come to light. The rest is for the Realm-Keeping Commission to handle.
我已经将事情的经过传达给地衡司了，他们应该能妥善处置。
I have already explained the situation to the Realm-Keeping Commission. I'm sure they will be able to handle this.
走吧，我们回绥园，先把这个倒霉岁阳给放进镇妖塔里吧。
Let's go back to Fyxestroll Garden. We can put this unfortunate heliobus in the suppression tower.
没想到「探访凶宅」的结果就是，那根本不算是「凶宅」。
I never thought the results of our "haunted house investigation" would be that it wasn't "haunted" at all...
…不过，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
...Although, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.
你看，我早就给裳裳你说过了，这「罗浮杂俎」上真真假假什么都有，大家想要的不是真相，而是一段愉快的怪谈体验。
Look, I told you before, that there are all sorts of stories on Ghostly Grove, some true, some not. What people are searching for here is not the truth, but a fun ghost story.
I think I'm starting to understand.
…虽然凶宅是假的，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
...Even though the haunted house isn't true, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.
Let me think of a good title.
…没想到真的有人为了赶走他人、牟取利益用上「闹鬼」这么卑劣的手段。
...I never thought someone would do something as despicable as faking a "haunting" to scare someone off and sell their assets for profit!
我们老家那边就经常会讲「有时人心比魔鬼更可怕」，你看那岁阳害怕的样子，我才明白这句话应该是真的吧。
We have a saying in my homeworld: "Sometimes men's hearts are even darker than demons'." Seeing how scared that heliobus was, I've finally truly understood this phrase.
…虽然找到了凶宅的真相，可是我感觉有些不太开心。
...Even though we found out the truth behind the haunted house, I feel a little unsatisfied.
就这样吧，我也先去忙啦，之后再见吧～
Well, let's leave it there. I've got things to do. See you later~
…有了拓片纸，是不是可以在石砖上拓下些什么？
...With this rubbing paper, maybe we can try tracing the message on the stone?
你好聪明！你还是裳裳吗？
That's smart thinking! Is that really you still, Shangshang?
不会读书和不聪明，是两件事！
Not being able to read and being stupid are two separate things!
Looks like we've found everything we need.
我总结一下线索——「M」是<unbreak>71839</unbreak>，「N」是<unbreak>7193</unbreak>，「V」是<unbreak>183</unbreak>。那么，「T」…是什么意思呢？
Let's look at the clues... So if "M" is <unbreak>71839</unbreak>, "N" is <unbreak>7193</unbreak> and "V" is <unbreak>183</unbreak>... What is "T"?
好难啊…{NICKNAME}，要不是用手比划比划？「M」是这样的，「N」是那样的。
This is so tough... {NICKNAME}, why not try drawing them with your hands? "M" is like this, and "N" is like that...
和这个九宫格的数字有什么关系呢？
What does this have to do with the numbers in a nine-square grid?
…保险箱里多半就放着房产证了，拜托了，{NICKNAME}，就靠你了。
...The deed is likely held inside the safe. Please, {NICKNAME}, we're counting on you.
所以，那个…雷诺是怎么回事呢？
So... What's the deal with that Renault?
你们看这张照片，和房产证上的是不是同一个人？
Look at this picture. Isn't this the same one that's on the deed?
啊，我是不小心看到的，我是不小心看到的…确实是同一个人，房产证上写着「雷诺」，是跟桂乃芬一样用着仙舟名的化外民。
Ah! I saw that by accident, and I didn't mean to see that... That is indeed the same person. The name on the deed is "Renault" and he was an outworlder!
那…我们见到的那个「雷诺」又是谁呢？
So... Who is that "Renault" that we met before?
…我已经心里有数了，走吧，我们回去找那位「房东大叔」。
...I think I have an idea. Come on. Let's go back and see that "landlord."
（这好像不太对，再想想该怎么办吧。）
(Something doesn't seem right. Have another think about what to do.)
我怕房产证丢了，就将它放在一个保险箱里，你们肯定能找到的，拜托了！
I was worried I would lose the deed, so I put it in a safe. I know you can find it. I'm counting on you!
(Why not get Sushang to give the password a try?)
以你对素裳的了解，她是一个不擅长读书的好姑娘，同理，她对这些挑战智慧的脑筋急转弯应该束手无策才对。
From what you know of Sushang, she is a good young girl, but she struggles with studies. By this logic, it makes sense that a brainteaser like this would bring her to her wit's end.
但是仙舟上也有一句话叫作「乱拳打死老师傅」，意思就是不按常理出牌、乱中取胜。也许这才是素裳的「王牌」。

But, there is a phrase on the Xianzhou: "Enough random punches can kill a grandmaster," meaning sometimes it is possible to win through pure chaos that defies normal logic. Perhaps this is the "ace up her sleeve."
怎么样，要不要问问素裳？
(Keep your head buried and find the answer yourself)
哎，我懂了，你是打算让我试试。那…我试试就试试嘛。
Ah, I get it, you want me to have a try! Alright... let's give it a shot!
你们这个…异形文字有什么意义，我完全不懂。不过你看图形，「M」一笔画的话是<unbreak>71839</unbreak>，「N」一笔画的话是<unbreak>7193</unbreak>，「V」是<unbreak>183</unbreak>……

These... Strange characters, I have no idea what they mean. However, looking at their shapes, "M" is <unbreak>71839</unbreak> if we're going by single strokes, "N" is <unbreak>7193</unbreak>, and "V" is <unbreak>183</unbreak>...
那么，「T」…好像没有办法一笔画。
Then, "T"... That doesn't seem like it can be written with one stroke.
Then I guess we'll use two. 1, 3, 2, 8.
真的假的？密码是在「T」九宫格上的笔顺？
Seriously? The password is the stroke order for "T" on a nine-square grid?
你们别管了，打开了就是打开了。
Don't worry about that. It's open, isn't it?
植物，并没有什么奇怪的地方。
A plant. There's nothing out of the ordinary.
似乎是坏到发不出声音的乐器，放在一边吧。
Seems like a broken musical instrument that can no longer make any sound. Leave it aside.
茶壶，没有茶，没有水，也没有茶水。
A teapot. No tea leaves, no water, no tea.
货架，不动如山，令人安心的沉稳感。
A shelf. Immovable, reliable, and stable.
鸟笼，笼中之物早已离开。
A bird cage. Its captive has long left.
要是能在直播的时候接到当场打来的恐怖通讯…肯定很有节目效果！
If I get a scary prank call while live on stream... it'll definitely be good for the show!
我觉着吧，这更可能是欠债不还或者仇家报复吧！
I think this is more like a bad debt or some kind of vengeance!
我担心是岁阳作祟，因为帖子里的细节很真实，尤其是专门选在深更半夜打过来这一点。
I'm worried that the heliobi are up to no good, because the details in the post are true — especially the part about deliberately choosing to call in the middle of the night.
据我所知，有些岁阳相当狡猾，会专门选在受害者毫无防备的时候偷袭！
As far as I know, some heliobi can be really crafty and deliberately choose to ambush victims when they're completely off-guard!
听着是挺危险的，不过——岁阳，会用玉兆或者手机吗？
Sounds pretty dangerous. But... can heliobi use jade abaci or phones?
岁阳应该是不能直接使用玉兆的，除非…除非它们附身在受害者身上…糟了！
Heliobi can't use jade abaci directly, unless... unless they take possession of a victim... Darn it!
嗯嗯，还是查清楚比较好，我觉得可能不止一个受害者……
Mmm-hmm, best to get to the bottom of it. I think there may be more than one victim here...
We can split up to cover more ground.
我们人多，分成两组肯定是够的。
There's more than enough of us to split into two groups.
嗯，分头行动的话，可以抽一组人来查下这通讯的来源在哪。
Yeah. If we split up, we can task one group with tracing this call to its source.
Little Gui, what do you think?
{NICKNAME}，能不能别学我说话？这样感觉好奇怪！
{NICKNAME}, can you stop talking like me? It sounds super weird!
我们分头行动，我们去和发帖人见面问清楚，藿藿你就去查查「恐怖通话」的来源。
Let's split up. We'll meet up with the thread's OP; Huohuo, you can go investigate the source of the "scary call."
Okay, I'll go to the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask around.
我认出来了，你就是那个主播！
I knew it was you. You're that streamer!
是我，你们喊我「阿月」就好了。
Yeah, you can just call me A-Yue, though.
小桂子，要再核对下身份吗？
Little Gui, would you authenticate the ID again?
在外面还是叫我「桂乃芬」吧，咳咳。
Please call me Guinaifen when we're out, ahem.
阿月姑娘，你能给我们讲讲到底是怎么一回事吗？
Miss A-Yue, can you please tell us what's going on?
每到深夜，我的玉兆都会接到匿名的通话请求。我壮着胆子接通了，对方说要和我见面，有话想跟我说。
Late every night, my jade abacus receives anonymous call requests. I gather my courage to answer, and the person on the other end says they want to meet me, that they have something to tell me.
之后再打过来，声音就变得很诡异，似人非人，有时是问我怎么不来，有时又突然凄厉地嚎起来，差点没把我人给带走。
When they call back later, the voice grows really weird as though it weren't human, asking me why I haven't yet come or suddenly bawling out in misery to the point that I'm almost carried off.
当然没有，我很少出门，怎么会和人结仇呢？
Of course not. I never really go out. How could I make any enemies?
你还记得对方说的地址吗？
Do you remember what address they said?
记得，我一直记录在玉兆里。
I do. I record everything in my jade abacus.
我本来想去，但港口四下无人，我有种背后发毛的感觉，就不敢去了。但我又管不住我这该死的好奇心…所以我想拜托你们代我前去赴约。

I planned on going but there was nobody at the harbor and I got this feeling, which made my hair stand on end, so I didn't venture out. But I can't control my cursed curiosity... and so I want to ask you to help me go and keep this appointment.
具体的坐标我发给你们了，麻烦你代我和那家伙见面吧，拜托了。
I'll send you the coordinates. Please help meet that guy for me, please.
看坐标的话是在这儿没错了……
Judging by the coordinates, it's right here...
Huohuo, what are you doing here?
对啊，咱们不是分头行动吗？
Oh yeah, shouldn't we have split up?
我刚从地衡司回来，录事帮我调了玉兆的通话记录，上面显示信息源头在这里。
I just got back from the Realm-Keeping Commission, where the clerk helped me retrieve call logs from my jade abacus. The data shows the source of the call was here.
很抱歉，尾巴不在，我…我…我给大家添麻烦了。
I'm very sorry but Tail isn't here. I... I... I've made trouble for everyone.
我们什么交情呐，你可千万别这么想。
We're friends. So don't even sweat it.
Yeah, so long as you're fine, that's all that matters.
打断一下，你们是不是忘了什么…
Excuse me. Have you forgotten about something...?
…它就是打来恐怖电话的那位，玉兆的追踪源头显示就在它身上。
...It's the one who made that scary prank call. The jade abacus tracking display is right on top of it.
可是…普通的魔阴身会用玉兆吗？
But... can the mara-struck actually use jade abaci?
这就得问这位「当事人」了。
That's a question we'll have to ask of the "involved party."
我在旁边守着，免得它反扑。
I'll stand guard and make sure it doesn't attack.
诸位身手了得，能制服这种凶物，麻烦你们好人做到底，让我附身躲几天。
Taking out such a vicious creature means you're all outstandingly capable. Please, won't you be good to the very end and let me possess you for a few days?
...This stench seems familiar... Why, you're a heliobus!
咦？这都被你发现了，行吧，那我也不装了。
Huh? So you can tell. Fine, no use pretending anymore.
算我倒霉，找个路人寄居，结果这家伙突然发起疯来，我受不了了！你们能不能帮个忙，放我出去，再借个身体让我住上几天？
Just my luck — I find a host body and it turns out to be a stark raving lunatic. I can't take this! Can you please do me a solid here and let me out so I can borrow another body for a couple of days?
How can you even say this?
I might as well just lend you my life.
那怎么好意思啊…我也不过是想暂时寄居个几天，用你们的身体吃吃喝喝，休养一下，没这么麻烦。
The nerve... I'd just be temporarily borrowing it for a couple of days, using your body to eat and drink and rest a bit. It's no big deal.
且慢，你先把之前半夜扰民的事交代清楚，不说清楚别想走。
Wait up. Please clear up for me what all that midnight ruckus was about before. You're not going anywhere until you do.
好好好，我说还不行吗。再说了，我现在压根逃不出来。暴起伤人的事不是我干的。她疯得厉害，我控制不住。
Fine! Didn't I already tell you? Besides, there's absolutely no way I can escape right now. I wasn't the one who did all that violent stuff. She's incredibly insane and outside my control.
至于什么「深夜扰民」，那是我只能在那个时候抢到身体的控制权啊。
As for that "midnight ruckus," that was when I'd finally managed to wrest back control.
喏，她身上有枚玉兆，里面存了个紧急联系人，所以我就一遍遍地打过去求助。至于后来的事，那就不用我多说了吧。
Well, she had a jade abacus on her with an emergency contact in it, so I kept trying to call them. I don't need to tell you what happened next.
好了，该交代的我全部交代完了，你们到底帮不帮忙啊！
Alright, I've finished explaining everything to you. Now are you going to help me or not!
我有能将你带走的办法，但…身体不能借给你，你给我去牢里好好待着去。
I've got a way to get you out, but... I can't let you borrow me. You'll have to go to prison and wait a while.
好说好说，只要能从这具肉体里挣脱出来，不必跟一个发癫的家伙绑在一块儿，一切都好说……
That's great. That's great... Everything is going to be great, so long as I can get out of this meat-suit and I'm not stuck together with this maniac...
你面前的幽府武弁发出一阵吃力的嘶吼声。你和你的同伴观望许久，但什么都没发生。
The Wraith Warden belts out a strained roar. You and your companions watch on for ages, but nothing happens.
我、我尽力啦！怎么都无法从这具身体里离开……
That's... the best I can do! I can't get out of this body, no matter what I try...
这家伙脑袋里有个怎么也放不下的念头，把咱们紧紧捆在了一起。
There's this thought stuck in this girl's head. She doesn't let it go no matter what, and it's binding us together tightly.
莫非是…那个紧急联系人？
Could it be... their emergency contact?
咳咳咳咳，刚才不是我叫的，没吓着你们吧。就在刚才那一瞬，我读到了这家伙残存的念头了，嚯，我明白她想要什么了！
Ahem ahem, that wasn't me just then. Hope I didn't scare you. Just then, I managed to read the last remaining thought stuck in this girl's head. Hooboy, I know what she wants now!
她想见玉兆里那个紧急联系人最后一面，说声再见。
She wants to see the emergency contact in her jade abacus one last time to say one final goodbye.
To say goodbye to a friend?
可是…且不说她的朋友愿不愿意看到一个魔阴身朝自己走来。她自己也不想以这般模样去见朋友吧？
But... that's not to mention whether or not her friend wants to meet up with the mara-struck. She doesn't want her friend to see her like this, right?
这个问题倒是好办。只要你们将我从她身体里放出来…我一定帮她完成心愿。
This is a problem that's easily taken care of. If you just let me out of her body... I'll definitely help grant her wish.
We'll let her rest in peace.
嚯，总算解脱了！竟能把我困在其中…真是了不得的执念。
Oh yeah, finally free! Trapping me inside herself like that... what an incredibly powerful obsession.
出于对这份力量的敬重，我会实现她最后的愿望的。
I will grant her final wish out of respect for such formidable power.
走吧，咱们去见见那个让她如此挂念的人。
C'mon, let's go and see who it is she's so infatuated with.
别急，待我先照着她的形象变个模样！
Don't worry. I'll just change into her appearance first!
好了，我记得就是这副模样。
Good. That's how I remember it.
你怎么回事，我们刚刚才聊完，我是煨赫——就是刚刚和你聊天的岁阳呀。
What's up with you? We were just chatting. I'm Singerd — the heliobus you were just talking with.
Watch your phrasing! And don't blow your cover!
我正准备回去呢，…是你…这么多年，你居然想到回来了？
I'm about to go back right now... It's you... After all these years, you're finally thinking of coming back?
…我以为你讨厌我才避而不见。
...I thought you avoided me because you hated me.
怎么会呢，要是你当时没骂醒我，可能我现在还是个神憎鬼厌的混蛋吧。
How could I? If it weren't for you scolding me then, maybe I'd still be an insufferable wretch now.
…我以前不该这么凶你的，也不该擅自替你报名…是我当时一心想着能把你送走，才做出这种蠢事。
...I shouldn't have been so mean to you before. And I shouldn't have signed you up without asking first... All I was thinking about then was sending you off, and that's why I did something so stupid.
过去的事就让它过去吧，别放在心上。而且我感激还来不及呢，要是没有你，我现在肯定还是浑浑噩噩的。
Let the past be the past. Don't take it to heart. And I'm far too late showing my gratitude — without you, I'd definitely still be all discombobulated.
那个通话的事，很抱歉，是我玉兆坏了，老是有杂音。还好现在见到你。夜深了，你还是先回家吧，一个人在外面晃太久也不好。

I'm sorry about that call. My jade abacus got broken and everything was static. Good thing I'm seeing you now, then. It's getting late, and you should go home. It's no good hanging around outside when it's this late.
可我们这才聊了多久…那你呢？你就不想回家看看吗？
But how long were we chatting for? ...So what about you? Don't you want to go home and take a look around?
不了，十王司那边我还有要务在身呢，报完平安…我也该回去了。
No, I've got something important on with the Ten-Lords Commission. I have come to tell you I'm safe... and I should probably go back now.
出门在外，凡事还是多加小心。…你如今在十王司当差，不比以前，我也帮不上什么忙。
Always take extra care whenever you leave the house. ...You're running errands now for the Ten Lords. Things are different now, and I can't help you out with anything.
你注意到阿月似乎紧张了起来，手指焦灼地扣着自己的衣角。
You notice that A-Yue seems anxious as her fingers fidget nervously at the hem of her blouse.
...Anything else you'd like to say to me?
阿月面色凝重，保持着沉默，周遭的空气似乎也凝滞了起来。
A-Yue maintains a solemn, silent expression as the air around her seems to freeze.
过了好一会儿，她深深地吸了一口气，这才开口打破这份尴尬的寂静。
After a while, she takes a deep breath to finally break this most awkward of silences.
我过得很好，你不用担心。
I've been fine. You don't have to worry.
...You can go... with your mind at ease.
说完这句话，她如释重负地叹了口气，你注意到她的眼眶边缘微微发红。
As she says this, she lets out a deep sigh of relief and you notice the rims of her eyes becoming red.
你们目送着阿月离去的身影，直至隐没在夜色中，这才松了口气。
You watch A-Yue as she leaves until she's lost to the night, before letting out your own sigh of relief.
总算结束了。接下来咱们也该分道扬镳了，再见了各位！
It's finally over. Now it's time for us to part ways. Goodbye, all!
你打算往哪儿走？不是说好了只要把你放出来，跟我走也没关系吗？岁阳还真是狡猾啊！
Where do you think you're going? Didn't you promise that you'd do anything so long as we helped you get out of there? Heliobi really are tricky!
这家伙有点狡猾，还是回绥园一趟吧，不将它镇伏下来我始终有点不放心……
This one's slippery. Better get back to Fyxestroll Garden. I won't be able to relax until it's subdued there...
虽说是个乌龙，但总感觉有哪里不对。
Even though it was all just a mistake, something still somehow felt wrong.
她们两姐妹说话太难懂了，像云骑军里对暗号似的。
Those sisters are hard to understand. It's like the Cloud Knights and their passphrases.
明明都魔阴身了，却因为姐姐的事强撑着一口气在…难怪岁阳会附身在她身上。
She's already mara-struck, but she still managed to hang in there all because of her big sister... No wonder the heliobus possessed her.
可惜…自己的妹妹失联多年…再见面却是这种场面。
It's a pity... To have lost touch with your own little sister for years... But when you meet again, it all plays out just like this.
那个阿月，大概是知道的吧？
A-Yue, do you think she... already knows?
我是说，她妹妹不在人世这件事，看她最后那个样子，感觉是知道的。
I mean, knows that her sister's already passed away? Seeing her final expression, it felt like she knew.
She was crying at the end, right?
她说的那句话已经是明示了吧。
That last line of hers was a clear indication.
你观察得好仔细啊，我压根都没注意到这些细节！
What a careful observation! There's absolutely no way I could've noticed that detail!
嗯，看她那样，估计要回去好好消化一段时间了。
Yeah. Seeing how she was, she would probably need to go back and digest things for a while.
总感觉她们之间还有很多…很多故事。
It feels like those two have quite a few... stories between them.
但当事人自己不愿意说，我们也不好贸然打探人家隐私。
But if the people involved aren't willing to say, then we can't just make rash inquiries into their personal affairs.
算了算了，「夜半惊魂」什么的事好歹算是解决了。她俩能再见面也算是某种团圆了嘛。
Ah, forget it. This "midnight terror" or whatever is now resolved. The two of them meeting up again is like some kind of reunion.
按照流程，完成了委托，还是得发点东西…那么就拜托你啦，{NICKNAME}。
Based on official processes, something should get sent now that an assignment has been completed... I thank you for your efforts, {NICKNAME}.
辛苦了！今天就先这样吧，大家早点回去休息吧，回见！
Great job! That's all for today. Head home early, everyone. See you all later!
家人们，你们看到这条消息了吗？绝对劲爆！
Fam, have you seen this news? This is huge!
我已经想好下一篇怪谈该怎么写了！标题就叫……
I've already thought of the plot for the next ghost story! The title will be...
震惊！半夜鬼哭究竟何人所为？
OMG! Midnight Ghostly Crying Exposed: You Won't Believe What's Behind It!
劲爆！不明飞行物背后的真相。
BOMBSHELL! Unmasking the mystery behind the Unidentified Flying Object
超燃！捉鬼小队力克无形孽物！
EPIC! Ghost-Hunting Squad majestically OWNS Invisible Abomination!
不错不错，你挺上道的嘛~
Not bad, not bad at all. You're pretty good at this.
依我看，这次估计也是岁阳作祟——你们记得浮烟最后爆炸变成了漫天的火雨吗？
In my opinion, a heliobus should be behind this incident too — do you remember how Cirrus finally exploded into a rain of fire down from the sky?
这「天上的恸哭声」…有可能是那时四散逃走的碎片，那…尾巴也许就在其中！
"Mournful Cries in the Sky"... It's possible these originate from all the fleeing fragments from back then. Then... Tail might be among them!
如果真是岁阳在天上作乱的话...咱们有谁会飞吗？
If it's really a heliobus causing trouble in the sky... Who among us can fly?
十王司肯定有办法的，对吧藿藿？
I'm sure the Ten-Lords Commission has a way, right, Huohuo?
十王司的判官…也不会飞啊。
Being a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission... doesn't really let you fly.
这下可愁人了，要是岁阳碎片都往天上躲，咱们岂不是只能坐等它自己下来？
This is bothersome. If the heliobus' fragments are hiding in the sky, are we supposed to wait for them to fall?
让我想想…我们该怎么办……
Let me think... what should we do...
有办法了，{NICKNAME}方便跟我来一趟吗？我、我有个想法。
I've an idea. {NICKNAME}, can you come with me? I—I thought of something.
As expected from our Ten-Lords Commission Judge.
听寒鸦大人说藿藿以前就很擅长整备十王司的道具，不愧是专家呀。
Heard from Hanya that Huohuo has been very good at organizing the props of the Ten-Lords Commission, so she's no less of an expert.
没有没有，唔，别、别夸我啦……
No, no. Hmm, do—don't praise me like that.
我已经预定素裳跟我探查林中小屋了，这件事就交给你和藿藿了。
I've asked Sushang to investigate the forest cottage with me, so we'll leave this matter to you and Huohuo.
那我和素裳去忙啦，有什么问题随时联系！
We'll get to work then. Contact us if you've any questions!
藿藿大人，您需要的「物流机巧鸟」已经备妥。
Judge Huohuo, the courier cycrane you need is ready.
…被叫作「大人」还是有些不习惯，麻烦你了。
...I'm still not used to be addressed as a Judge, but thanks.
这就是藿藿大人指定的「飞行式藏月瓠移动平台」，简称「降魔机巧鸟」。
This is the Flying Lunaumbra Gourd Mobile Platform, AKA, exorcist cycrane you've requested for, Judge Huohuo.
It... comes with a courier package?
您真是好眼力——没错，快递箱里还放着藏月瓠！
That's very observant of you. The Lunaumbra Gourd is in the courier package!
How come I don't see a difference?
从外观上看，它和普通的物流机巧鸟没有任何区别，但快递箱里放着「藏月瓠」！
Its appearance may not look different from an ordinary courier cycrane, but there's a Lunaumbra Gourd in the courier package!
只要能实现「带着藏月瓠飞行」的目的，其实也挺简单的。
Whatever that fulfills the purpose of "flying with the Lunaumbra Gourd," I guess. It's actually pretty easy to operate.
高端法器往往只需要简单处理。
High-tech sacred instruments are usually easy to handle.
I thought this was going to be a big invention or something...
这么短的时间，您倒是说说我怎么给您搞个大发明啊。
Please tell me how I can come out with a big invention for you on short notice.
总之，这台机巧鸟就归藿藿大人调遣了。
Anyway, this cycrane is at the disposal of Judge Huohuo.
我们...有谁会用机巧鸟吗？
Among us... do we have anyone who knows how to operate a cycrane?
你注意到两人目光一致，看向了你。
You notice the two of them looking at you inquisitively.
Don't look at me like that. I don't know how.
There's no need to be humble. I'll leave it to you then, {NICKNAME}.
我用机巧鸟救下过驭空的千金。
I once used a cycrane to rescue Madam Yukong's daughter.
I'll leave it to you then, {NICKNAME}.
这算是验证了「降魔机巧鸟」的可行性。藿藿大人请在使用完成后，及时返还。
I suppose this verifies the feasibility of the exorcist cycrane. Judge Huohuo, please return it in a timely fashion after using it.
好的。走吧{NICKNAME}，我们该去那条帖子提到的地方看看了。
I will. Let's get moving, {NICKNAME}. We should take a look at the place mentioned in the post.
应该就是这些岁阳了，{NICKNAME}，准备好了吗？
It should be the heliobus. {NICKNAME}, are you ready?
稍等一下，我还没准备好。
没关系，我会等你准备好的。
It's fine. I'll wait for you to get ready.
嚣张的岁阳不再逃窜，回到了地面上……
The arrogant heliobus stops fleeing and returns to the ground...
还不错，{M#小子}{F#丫头}，这是我出逃以来玩得最开心的一次。
Not bad, {M#boy}{F#girl}. This is the most exciting adventure I've ever had.
只是想玩玩而已。你要是被关在炉子里，你也会无聊到闲出屁来。
I'm just out to have fun. If you're the one being locked in the furnace, you'll find ways to escape from that boring place too.
能这样痛快玩一遭，我也没什么好不满的。有种就别让我再逃出来，再让我逃出来我……
To be able to enjoy myself like this, I guess there's nothing I'm unhappy about. If you got nerve, then don't let me escape again. Or else, I'll...
你好，我是十王司的藿藿，你刚才有没有遇到什么…嗯，奇怪的事？
Greetings. I am Huohuo from the Ten-Lords Commission. Did you meet any... uh, strange occurrence?
奇怪的事？没有，不过我拍了几张景色很好的照片。
Strange occurrence? No, but I did manage to capture some beautiful shots of the scenery.
这、这样吧，请将这个符箓带在身上，如果…有什么事的话，应该会有反应。
H—How about this? Take this talisman with you. If... something happens to you, it will react.
藿藿将符箓贴在三月七身上，什么也没有发生。
Huohuo pastes the talisman on March 7th. Nothing happens.
唔，既然{NICKNAME}这么说的话，本姑娘就当什么都没发生过好了～
Hmm, since {NICKNAME} said so, I'll take it as if nothing happened.
三月小姐别担心。总、总之，我们先回绥园吧，藏月瓠里的…东西还需要镇伏呢。
Miss March, don't worry. I—In any case, we will return to Fyxestroll Garden. The thing... in the Lunaumbra Gourd needs to be restrained.
那只叫作星燏的岁阳，说自己离开造化洪炉只是为了自由，其他的岁阳也是这样吗？
That heliobus named Stafyre said it left the Creation Furnace for freedom. Do you think the other heliobi are the same?
你担心自己限制了尾巴的自由？
Are you worried that you've restrained Tail's freedom?
也许尾巴已经离开了罗浮仙舟？
Maybe Tail has left the Xianzhou Luofu?
也许吧，我也不知道。总之，现在先发个帖子，让那里的人安心吧。
Perhaps. I don't know, too. Anyway, let's publish a post to put the people there at ease.
虽然没找到跟尾巴有关的线索，不过还是谢谢你了，{NICKNAME}。
Even though we did not find any clues about Tail, I'm still grateful to you, {NICKNAME}.
之后我会继续找下去。尾巴比星燏强大许多，它一定不会有事的...嗯，不会有事的。
I will continue to search for Tail. It is much stronger than Stafyre, and I'm sure it will be fine... Yes, nothing will happen to it.
稍等一下，我还没准备好。
没关系，我会等你准备好的。
It's fine. I'll wait for you to get ready.
呼…总算解决这个难缠的家伙了。
Phew... We've finally settled this troublemaker.
还剩下一些岁阳碎片，我们慢慢处理吧。
There are still some fragments left. Let's take our time with this.
我拍了几张景色很好的照片，无论看多少遍大衍穷观阵，咱都觉得很神奇。
I took a few nice scenic pictures. No matter how many times I see the Matrix of Prescience Ultima, I always think it's really something fantastical.
你准备好驾驶机巧鸟了吗？
Are you ready to pilot the cycrane?
只要操控机巧鸟靠近这些岁阳碎片，藏月瓠就会自动将它们吸锁收服。
We just need to move the cycrane closer to these heliobus fragments, and the Lunaumbra Gourd will capture them.
机巧鸟负责靠近…箱子里的藏月瓠负责将岁阳收伏。
Move the cycrane closer... and the Lunaumbra Gourd in the box will subdue the heliobus.
The exorcist cycrane is running smoothly.
Good job. Now, we're left with one place.
Not bad. You're getting better at this.
总感觉这里面没有尾巴，也没有尾巴的碎片……
I don't sense Tail here, and there aren't any Tail fragment...
那个岁阳是不是不太对劲？它看起来…好凶。
Is that heliobus acting weird? It seems... fierce.
怎么回事？它怎么一下子跑到那里了？
What's going on? How did it get there all of a sudden?
就这也想抓到我？吃屁去吧！
And you think you can catch me with those pathetic skills? Eat dirt!
总算来了？好戏还没结束呢！
Finally? But it's not over yet!
你们连忙赶到了三月七身边。
接下来，应该只差最后一处了。
There should only be one location left.
哎？是我眼花了吗…刚才这里应该是有岁阳的吧？
Eh? Am I seeing things... There should have been heliobi there, right?
...Let's go quickly and take a look!
借助降魔机巧鸟，不消一刻，你们便收伏了大部分逸散岁阳。
With the help of the exorcist cycrane, you subdued most of the unruly heliobi in less than ten minutes.
{NICKNAME}，你看到那条新消息了吗？我询问了发帖人，她说她认得你。
{NICKNAME}, have you seen that post? I talked to the OP, and she claimed that she knew you.
也就是说，这次的求助者是熟悉的人？
Does that mean the requester is someone you know?
是啊，这位三月七姑娘可是列车无名客的一员，{NICKNAME}的重要伙伴。
Yes, Miss March 7th is a member of the Express' Nameless and {NICKNAME}'s important companion.
说起来，上次我们在她附近看见了一只岁阳，结果突然消失了...会不会和这件事有联系。
Come to think of it, we saw a heliobus wandering around her the last time, and it suddenly disappeared... Could it be related to this event?
咱们在这里瞎猜也起不到什么作用。既然求助者是列车组的人，这件事就交给{NICKNAME}去办吧。
No point in making wild guesses here. Since the requester is a member of the Crew, we'll leave this matter to you, {NICKNAME}.
Leave it to the Galactic Baseballer.
Giving all the tough work to me, huh?
哎，这不是相信你嘛。再说了，你和她交情那么深，总比我们出面方便一些。
Hey, I put all my trust in you. Moreover, you know the requester well, so it's easier for you to handle it.
和三月七姑娘打交道…是个累活？
Is interacting with Miss March 7th... a tiresome job?
不应该吧，只是{NICKNAME}在开玩笑而已。
It shouldn't be. I believe {NICKNAME} was only kidding.
那…请你拿上这个符箓。只要把它贴在身上，就能查清一个人到底有没有岁阳附体了。
Here... take this talisman with you. Place it on the suspect and you'll know if that person has been possessed by the heliobus.
藏月瓠…藏月瓠的数量不多。就麻烦{NICKNAME}用这个我改造过的鸟笼暂时拘束它，之后再带到镇妖塔降服。
As for the Lunaumbra Gourds... we don't have many left now. Please use this modified birdcage to imprison it temporarily and bring it to the suppression tower to subdue it, {NICKNAME}.
藿藿准备了这么多东西…总觉得这次好像很简陋的样子。
Huohuo sure did a lot of prep-work... but things seem a little sketchy this time.
好用就成，等你的好消息{NICKNAME}。
Whatever works. We'll wait for your good news, {NICKNAME}.
符箓静静地挂在姬子的衣服表面，没有任何反应。
The talisman quietly stays on Himeko's clothes. It doesn't have any reaction.
看来姬子姐没有问题——我早就知道。
It seems like Himeko is fine, just as I suspected.
这是什么从仙舟带回来的小玩具吗？
Did you bring this toy from the Xianzhou?
符箓静静地挂在瓦尔特的外套上。
The talisman quietly stays on Welt's coat.
没有反应啊，看来问题也不在杨叔身上。
No reaction. It seems like Mr. Yang doesn't have any problems either.
将三月七的求助告知了瓦尔特。
You tell Welt about March 7th's request.
这样么…最近我在列车倒是没有发现什么怪事，或许问题并不出在车组成员身上。
I see... I didn't discover any strange occurrences on the Express recently. Maybe the problem doesn't lie with the members.
当然，这只是我无端的猜测，你们还是按计划继续调查为好。
Of course, that's just my unfounded speculation. You should continue your investigation.
符箓静静地贴在帕姆身体表面…粘掉了几根毛。
The talisman quietly stays on Pom-Pom... and takes a few hairs of their body off with it.
哇，三月七乘客你在做什么？
Woah! What are you doing, March 7th?
啊哈哈…这是我跟{NICKNAME}做的一个小测试，恭喜列车长，你合格啦！
Oh haha... I'm doing a small test with {NICKNAME}. Congratulations, Pom-Pom! You've passed the test!
不要随便拿列车长开玩笑啊帕！
Don't you treat your conductor like a fool!
不应该啊，列车上的大家都很正常，那岁阳究竟藏在哪儿呢？
This shouldn't be the case. Everyone on the Express is normal. Where could the heliobus be hiding?
Perhaps the problem lies with you...
我？怎么会？你们上次不是都给我测过了嘛…
Me? How can it be? Didn't you test me the last time?
罢了罢了，你再过来贴我一次试试看。
Forget it. Come and slap it on me again.
你仔细检查着三月七身上的每一个角落。终于，符箓发出了光芒，源头是——三月七的相机。
You carefully check March 7th's entire person. Finally, the talisman begins to glow. The source of the problem lies with... March 7th's camera.
I can't believe... it's really me.
它就是那天逃走的碎片。
It is one of the fragments that escaped the other day.
哦，怪不得之前符箓贴在我身上没反应，原来这家伙藏进了我的宝贝相机里——真狡猾！
Oh, no wonder the talisman doesn't react when it's on me. It turns out that the heliobus was hidden in my precious camera! Dastardly!
呵，没想到被你们识破了，既然如此……
Ha, I didn't expect you to find me. If that's the case...
总之，你先把它找个地方关起来吧，可别又附到什么东西上去了。
In any case, you should imprison it somewhere. Don't let it possess anything else again.
呜呜呜，没想到我才出现没多久，又要被封印回去了……
*sob* I just escaped not long ago, and now I'm going to be sealed again...
明明我还有那么多事情没做，那么多美丽的景色没看……
There's still so much I haven't done... so many sights I haven't seen...
What were you doing in the camera?
不知哪个大东西把我分裂了出来……
I don't know what fragmented me...
我，第一次感觉到自己时，我被关在黑暗里。我从没见过外面的样子，听大家伙们说起，我想看看！
The first time I was aware of myself was when I was locked up in a dark place. I had not seen the outside world. But hearing the others talking about it aroused my curiosity!
没想到你的小盒子里藏着这么多美妙的画片，我一不留神就看呆了。
I didn't know your little box had so many beautiful pictures, so I got distracted looking at them.
我想，寄宿到这个盒子里，也许不错？借这个机会，也可以把那些风景看个够。
Then I thought perhaps possessing this box was a good idea. I can take the chance to see all the beautiful scenery.
唔，听起来有一丢丢可怜啊。
Why did you look for March?
我从来没想过要吸干人类什么的，我只是…被她身上的那股气息吸引，忍不住就去接近了。
I've never thought of draining a human. I was just... attracted by her vibe. I couldn't help but get closer to her.
咱们岁阳开始也和她一样纯净、洁白，就像静静燃烧的火焰。我想，或许就是这样才会被她吸引的吧。
We heliobi were born as pure and innocent as her, like a quiet burning flame. I guess, maybe that's why I was attracted by her.
{NICKNAME}，什么时候你也能这么夸夸我？
{NICKNAME}, when are you gonna praise me like this?
你觉得我该如何处置你？
What do you think I should do with you?
在我也无法想起的远古时代，岁阳一族的先祖满宇宙地漂荡，也没什么心思啊、烦恼啊什么的…我觉得那样就挺好。
In ancient times, beyond my memory, the ancestral heliobi wandered around the universe without any intention or worries... And I think that was pretty good.
我也打算效仿先祖，离开仙舟、重归宇宙，过上逍遥自在的生活。那些以人类心思为食的家伙，我跟它们合不来。
I intend to follow my ancestor's example — leave the Xianzhou, rejoin the universe, and live a life of freedom. I don't get along well with the heliobi that feed on humans' emotions.
…我知道这个愿望很难实现。所以，不管你打算如何处置我，都请先让我见识一下那些照片中的景色。
...I know it's hard to fulfill this wish. So, no matter what you plan to do with me, please allow me to see the scenery in those photos first.
带着遗憾被封印的话，我就再也燃不起来啦！
If I'm sealed with my regrets, I won't be able to burn brightly anymore!
嗯…听你的介绍，岁阳附身会对宿主产生不小的危害。但我到现在什么感觉也没有，说明它确实没做过坏事。
Hmm... You mentioned before that a heliobus' possession will do a lot of harm to the host. However, I haven't felt anything so far, which means it hasn't done any harm to me.
而且它这么欣赏我的照片，怎么可能是坏人呢！？
And since it appreciates my photos, how can it be bad!?
所以…满足一下它的愿望，也不是不可以啦。正好我还打算再去罗浮一趟，拍些照片，逛吃逛吃，就带上它一块儿呗。
So... I don't see what's wrong with fulfilling its wish. Coincidentally, I plan to walk around the Luofu again to take more pictures, shopping, and enjoy the delicacies. I'll bring it with me then.
Let's go. Time to shop and eat!
All you know is to eat...
谢谢…果然世上还是好人多啊。
Thank you... There are still many kind people in the world.
这边的水里偶尔会出现龙的影子，我第一次见时也吃了一惊呢。
Occasionally, dragons appear in the water here. I was surprised when I first saw them.
There're also dragons on the other side.
哎，会吗？我怎么从来没有发现过。
Oh, really? Why haven't I noticed it?
如此巨大的水幕…感觉要是不小心飞进去会被浇灭呢……
What a gigantic water curtain... It feels like I'll be put out instantly if I accidentally fall into it...
岁阳的火焰…应该不怕水吧？
Can the flame of a heliobus... be extinguished by water?
你可不要在脑袋里冒出好奇的情绪啊！这种事情不能试！试试会逝世……
Please don't even think of such thing! You can't risk it! Curiosity kills the heliobus...
说起这分开的海水啊，是咱们列车上某位兄弟动用了隐藏力量才变成这样的。很厉害吧。
Speaking of these parted waters, this was actually done by a member of the Crew when he used his hidden power. Amazing, isn't it?
喔喔，如此强大的力量。他、他是何方神圣？
Wow, he is so powerful! Wh—Who is he?
他是个持明族。呃，你要是问我什么是持明…我就答不上来了，我不擅长科普。但我可以带你去看看他小时候的样子。
He's a Vidyadhara. Uhh, as for the question of what a Vidyadhara is... Sorry, I can't answer that. I'm not good at explaining things, but I can show you what he looked like when he was little.
你看，这些就是持明族小宝宝时的样子。
Look, this is what Vidyadhara babies look like.
不过，他们活的时间久了也会变回这样，必须在蛋里休息一段时间后才能出来。所以我也不知道持明的蛋究竟算年轻呢还是老呢。

But if they live for a long time, they will return to this form. Hence, they need to rest in the egg for a period before coming out again. I'm not sure whether to consider a Vidyadhara egg as young or old.
从如此弱小，变得那样强大…生命，很奇妙啊。
From something so frail to a being so strong... Life is indeed a wonderful thing.
既然如此…你们是如何掌控那位持明，让他为你们动用这股力量的？
If that's the case... how did you and the rest control the Vidyadhara and make him use his power for the Express crew?
掌控？不不，他是我们的朋友。朋友是互相帮助的，朋友也不会想着让对方做他不愿做的事情。
Control? No, he's our friend. Friends are there to help one another and will not force each other to do things they are unwilling to do.
朋友…我，我不懂。但我明白你的意思。
Friends... I—I don't understand... but I strangely know what you mean.
走吧，去下一处景点——建木玄根。
Let's go to our next stop — Roots of the Arbor.
一副快要变成肉棺材的下等躯壳……
An inferior shell on the verge of becoming a flesh-coffin...
这脑袋里倒是装着许多情绪。可惜，可惜，一点儿快乐都榨不出来了。只有苦涩的仇恨、还有失落感…唉，没有品尝的价值了。
This brain contains numerous emotions. But what a pity. There isn't any happiness left in it. There's only bitter hatred and the feeling of disappointment... *sigh* There's no value in tasting it.
顺着人类的念头飞到这儿来，原本以为能尝到些什么，平息我的渴望……
Following the trails of human thought, I was hoping to taste some flavor to quell my hunger...
喂，那边的小东西，这两人是你的棋子吗？分我一个如何？!
Hey, little fellow. Are these two your pawns? How about giving one of them to me!?
你要做什么？请不要伤害我的朋友。
What do you want? Please do not hurt my friends.
哈哈哈，朋友？岁阳竟然会把人类当成朋友？哈哈哈哈哈！
Hahaha, your friends? A heliobus treating humans as friends? Hahahahaha!
放心，我会先吞下你，再接收你送上门的这两份大礼。
Don't worry. I will swallow you first before accepting your gifts.
Come on, make yourself useful, flesh-coffin —
好顽强的战斗意志，又冷又硬。
What a tenacious will for battle! Cold and resolute.
无趣的人类！我倒了大霉寄宿在魔阴身里，结果又撞上你们这样的悍匪。
Dull humans! I'm unlucky enough to possess a mara-stuck body, and now, I encounter vicious bandits like you!
Vile ghost, do you recognize this item?
我…我被关在黑暗里的时候，和同族有过交流。从它们的震动里，我看到过它们操纵过的人类的样子、经历。
When... when I was locked in a dark space, I interacted with my kind. From their actions, I've seen the way and experiences they had when manipulating humans.
它们吸收了那些人类的情绪、被人性沾染，变得狡猾、变得贪婪、变得凶残了。
They absorbed the emotions of the humans and were influenced by their humanity. They became cunning, greedy, and ferocious.
它们…被人类的念头吸引，却又变得比人类更糟了。我不想，像它们那样……
They... were attracted by humans' thoughts but became worse than the humans. I don't want... to be like them...
小宝烛，还记得你说过的「朋友」吗？
Little Arkeri, do you still remember you called us "friends"?
人并不是只有那些负面情绪的。人，很复杂。我有时候也会丧气，也会厌烦，也会想要狠狠敲打某些坏东西。
Humans do not only have these negative emotions. Humans are, in fact, very complicated. Sometimes, I feel depressed or frustrated, too. And I'll want to smash and destroy the things around me.
但是每当回到列车上，和姬子姐还有杨叔说说话，逗逗丹恒，拉着{NICKNAME}一起看车窗外的星星，我就觉得……
But whenever I return to the Express to chat with Himeko and Mr. Yang, tease Dan Heng, or get {NICKNAME} to watch the stars from the train windows with me, I feel...
不，很平静。就像一颗星星，在天空中它该在的位置那样…平静，自然。
No, I feel at peace. Like a star in the sky, it stays where it belongs and exists as itself peacefully.
我，说不出来这是怎样的一种感受。我们人类，不知为什么拥有了思考的能力，拥有了许多烦恼和痛苦，可我们也能享受到这样的平静。我想，这是宇宙对我们的祝福吧？

I can't describe that kind of feeling with words. We humans somehow have the ability to think, to possess a lot of worries and pain, but at the same time, we can also enjoy moments of peace like this one. I guess it's a blessing for us from the universe, isn't it?
我，不明白…但我品尝到了，三月这一刻的感觉。
I don't understand... but I can taste your feelings at this moment, March.
嘿嘿，有时候朋友之间不用说太多话，一个眼神秒懂。看来咱们真是有朋友的缘分啊。
Hehe, that's what it means to be friends. There's no need for many words, and you can understand me instantly with a look. It seems like we are fated to be friends!
来，{NICKNAME}，给咱们拍张照，当是这次远足的纪念吧。
Come, {NICKNAME}. Help us take a picture to commemorate our trip today.
咦，你的拍照技术越来越熟练啦。不愧是我的御用摄影师~
Hey, your photography skills are improving. No wonder I have you acting as my personal photographer~
时候不早了。谢谢你，三月。我，该回笼子里了。
It's getting late. Thank you, March. I... should return to the cage now.
岁阳，对你们人类很危险，对吧？所以我，还是回到黑暗里再睡一阵了。
Heliobi are very dangerous to humans, aren't they? I guess it's better for me to rest in the dark.
这真的是宝烛的想法吗？
Is that really what you think, Arkeri?

就让我来当小火苗的导游吧。

祝你们能永享那份平静。
I wish you will forever cherish that peace.
于是它穿过笼壁，穿过车窗，飘向了更为广阔的外层空间。那里没有欺骗，没有纷争——至少从它诞生至今的大部分时间和空间中，没有。

So they pass through the cage's walls, through the train's window, and float into the spacious outer space. In that place, there are no deceits, no conflicts – at least, in most of the space-time spectrum since its creation.
再见。你们的生命尺度与时间观念截然不同，尽管一时相会，但你明白……

我知道{NICKNAME}为什么要坚持将宝烛带回镇妖塔。

宝烛充分相信你的决定，我也相信，你去做该做的事吧。

(It's time to go back to the suppression towers in Fyxestroll Garden.)

如果照片上的鬼影，都是这么可爱无害的话就好了。哎……

先从你的提问开始吧，你都收集了哪些问题呢？

因为…条件、时机都刚好，我既能在镜头前表演，又能和大家实时互动，挺热闹的，我也很喜欢，你们不觉得靠这个谋生挺酷吗？

I see one friend here has asked, "Will you keep streaming in the future?" Sure, I sure will. Why not?
反正短期内我没有离开仙舟的计划啦，之后还是会坚持直播的。
Anyway, I don't plan on leaving the Xianzhou any time soon, and I'll keep on streaming in the future.

I'm preparing and planning out future live stream segments, which might be played at fixed times so it's easier for everyone to watch. Stay tuned!

Your Xianzhou dialect is really fluent. Where did you learn it?

我以前坐星槎就喜欢聊天，和计程槎飞行士们聊着聊着就忘了时间，还好人家没多收我钱，嘿嘿！
I used to love chatting on the starskiff and I'd lose track of time while chatting with the pilots. Luckily they never charged me extra, teehee!
What's your favorite thing about the Xianzhou culture?
美食！好吃的太多了！我个人比较喜欢金人巷那边的几家老字号，实惠又好吃！
The food! There's so much delicious food! I personally love a few revered old classics over on the Aurum Alley. They're both cheap, and delicious!
仙舟美食博大精深，少吃几顿我都觉得受不了，我感觉我这胃已经是地地道道的「仙舟胃」了。

才不是！我再再再再第不知道多少次在这里声明一遍——
No way! Let me state AGAAAAIN for who-knows-how-many-times now:
未成年请在家长的监护下观看，身体不好的也请慎重，一切都是真实直播，没有任何后期加工。

I only dare to live stream thanks to the protection of my mighty companions. They're all very skilled fighters, so we're asking you to not try this at home. Please seek assistance from the Realm-Keeping Commission if you head there yourself and encounter dangerous situations!

呼——正好我停下来喝杯茶。

看来{NICKNAME}的观众缘还挺好的嘛，诶，{NICKNAME}你脸怎么这么红！

活跃下节目效果卖卖人设而已，你别在意。

啊？你还真脸红了，嘿，还挺可爱的。

你害羞啦！嘿嘿，平时瞧着挺勇的，真没想到回答私密问题时却很可爱呢。
You're shy! Heehee, you always look so tough. I never thought you'd be so cute when it comes to personal questions like this.
好好好，让我们快进到下一个问题吧——

以后肯定还播的呀，不过大家都有各自的生活，所以要组齐人也不容易，观众老爷们记得留意我们账号的开播预告呀。
We'll definitely keep streaming in the future, but everyone has their own lives to live, so it's hard to line everyone up. Remember to follow our channel and enable notifications.
我们出发前是有开播预告的，喜欢看团播的可以留意一下，动动您发财的小手，点个订阅点个关注！

We'll send out a notification for the stream before we head out. Keep an eye out for it if you like live streams, and see if those little hands of yours can click you a fortune. Don't forget to Like and Subscribe!
好啦，录完这段就结束了。观众都喜欢看真实反应，我只是稍微剪了一下……
Alright. We're done after we finish recording this section. Viewers all like real reacts. I just made small edits...
...Will do. We'll do the usual — you do the posting.
Whatever shall I do with you.
Let me post it! I'm the best at posting!
放心吧，你的反应很可爱，肯定有不少人会买账的。
Don't worry, your reactions are very cute. There'll be plenty of people who would buy it.
Good work today once again, {NICKNAME}! Goodbye!
全体目光，向我看齐！我要宣布个事儿！
All eyes on me, please! I've an announcement to make!
…不行，我反悔了，这么重要的事，我们去长乐天说！
...No, I'm backing out. Something this important has to be covered... over at the Exalting Sanctum!
*sigh* Just tell them here and now.
不行，我们的生活需要一些仪式感！
Nope. Where's your sense of ceremony when it comes to life!
我大概知道是什么事了…
I think I know what's going on here...
嘘，憋住，不许说，剧透的都是小狗。
Shhh, put a sock in it. No leaks! Snitches get stitches!
Looks like good news. Let's go.
See you soon in the Exalting Sanctum.
我长话短说，刚刚机巧鸟托运了一个包裹给我，我打开一看——
I'll keep it quick: A cycrane just delivered us a package. Opening it up, I saw...
那东西不会重复发的吧？
They wouldn't send out another one of those things, would they?
不是啦，是金——色——奖——牌！就是那个达成百万粉丝才有的奖牌！
Nope, it's a gee-oh-el-dee GOLD medallion — for getting to one million subs!
The legendary gold medallion! That must be precious.
再往上据我所知就没有更高级别的奖牌了，确实挺珍贵的。
As far as I'm aware, there's no higher medallion on offer. So yes, it's indeed quite precious.
之前是多亏大家帮忙，才拿到了银色奖牌，没想到这才多久啊…这么快就突破到百万粉丝了——当然，还是多亏了大家的帮忙。

Thank you so much to everyone who helped us get our silver medallion. It seems like just yesterday... but now we've already smashed through the million subs mark — and of course, it's all thanks to everyone's support, too.
吃喝玩乐庆祝庆祝是少不了的，不过…我觉得现在更重要的是，我们四个人难得结成小队，还闯出这么一番成绩出来。

We'll have to eat, drink, and make merry of course in celebration — but... I think what's more important right now is that we acknowledge how hard it's been for the four of us to make this team and put together such outstanding results.
我觉得，我们起码也该留个纪念，比如纪念视频什么的，你们觉得呢？
I think, we should at least commemorate the occasion somehow, such as a celebration live stream or something else. What do you think?
What kind of commemoration were you thinking?
我想拍个纪念视频，然后留点合照什么的。
Shooting a vlog, and then taking some group photos or whatever.
I'm down for anything. Up to you.
Don't worry. I've been waiting for just this moment.
我想和大家重新走一遍我直播的地方，有你们陪着我走…然后和过去直播的画面剪辑在一起，我觉得…还蛮有看头的，而且也很有纪念意义。

I want to revisit everywhere I've vlogged before, but together with you guys too... Then, I'll mix and splice that into scenes from those old streams. I think... it'll be really interesting, and also really memorable.
画面什么的我不懂，总之都听你的好了。
I don't understand the mixing part, so I'll just follow your lead.
听起来还挺感人的，能认识大家真好。
Sounds really touching. It's been so great getting to know everyone.
其实我们现在所处的地方就是其中一处——这里是我直播事业开始的地方…这里的每一块地砖我都觉得好亲切。
Actually, where we are right now is one of the locations... This is where my streaming career first kicked off... I know each and every street paver here intimately.
那是因为你刚来的时候抠地砖表演胸口碎大石，你当然会觉得亲切啦，你当时的街头表演真是令人惊讶。

That's because when you first came here, you kept prying them out of the ground and busking by smashing them on people's chest. Of course you'd know them intimately, as your street performances were unbelievable.
那都是过去的事了，我就是那会儿认识你的。
That's all in my past, back when I first met you.
时间过的好快啊，来，我们在这边拍个照好不好，{NICKNAME}，就拜托你了。
Time really flies! Come, let's snap a team photo right here. {NICKNAME}, could you please do the honors?
接下来该去金人巷了…那里的每一家店铺我都出过探店视频。
Next up is the Aurum Alley... I've done store tour vlogs in every single shop there.
那时候有固定的观众了，虽说数量不多，但有聊胜无。
Back then, we had a regular audience which might have been small, but it was better than nothing.
还记得吗这家店吗，当初我们一起来探店，老板娘人还蛮热情的。
Do you still remember this store? Back then, we did a store tour here and the boss was really excited.
噢，我想起来了，吃了那个什么翅根，辣得我差点哭了。
Oh, I remember. We ate those spicy buffalo wings, and I nearly cried.
下次有机会带{NICKNAME}过来吃，到时候看看{NICKNAME}哭不哭鼻子。
Next time we get the chance, let's bring {NICKNAME} over. We'll see if eating those makes {NICKNAME} ugly cry or not.
我还挺喜欢金人巷的，在这里也听说了裳裳和{NICKNAME}的「传奇故事」，笑死。
I quite like the Aurum Alley. I also heard about {NICKNAME} and Shangshang's "Legend" here. That was hilarious.
Hey, isn't that the famous vlogger?
没想到在这里能看到桂乃芬。
Never thought I'd see Guinaifen over here.
Don't worry. I'll snap a quick pic of her.
然后就是去往绥园了，理由大家都懂的，走吧。
Next up it's time to go to Fyxestroll Garden and I think everyone knows the reason why. Let's go.
最后一站就是…绥园，和大家一起冒险的地方。
The final stop is... Fyxestroll Garden, where we've all adventured before.
虽说我们在这里被吓得不轻，但这里也是我直播生涯突飞猛进的开始……
Despite being scared by the horrors here, this is where the meteoric rise of my vlogging career really took flight...
没错，尽管有时候吓得半死……
That's right, even though it usually scares me half to death...
但大家站在一起就没什么好怕的了。
But if we stick together, there's nothing to be afraid of.
先别煽情，说好的惊喜呢。
Let's not sensationalize things. You promised a happy surprise.
别急，一会儿你就知道了。
Don't worry. You'll find out soon.
说得挺好的，再来几句吧。
That's a good way of putting it. Give me a few more lines.
总之就是大家的美好回忆嘛，我们也算是「绥园战友」了。
Anyway, it's a nice memory for everyone. We're all veterans of Fyxestroll Garden now.
感觉这个地方…很适合留下点什么…要不，大家来拍张合影吧！
This place seems... like a great place to make a memory... How does everyone feel about taking a team photo?
You have to be in it, too.
Who's going to take the photo, then?
我先前不是说，给大家准备了个惊喜吗？我这就去把人喊出来，噔噔噔噔——
Didn't I promise a happy surprise for everyone before? Let me call them over, ta-da!
我觉得，以全新的面貌回访过去直播的地点还不够。我们并肩作战这么久，有些观众老爷就一直在跟我打听你们的事。

I still think we need something more than just revisiting previous vlog spots with a new look. We've been fighting side by side for so long now that a few fans in the live stream have been asking me about you guys.
也多亏这些观众的支持，我们才能走到现在。
And it's only thanks to the support of these fans that we've been able to get where we are today.
所以，为了庆祝我拿到金色奖牌，也为了纪念我们的友谊，我开了个粉丝见面会，今天，我要带着这个金色奖牌，和大家一起分享我们的美好回忆。

So to celebrate me getting the gold medallion and also in celebration of our friendship, I've decided to hold a fan meet-and-greet. Today, I'll be bringing the gold medallion with me to share all our wonderful memories with everyone.
Young people sure are full of energy.
我们小桂子真的又懂事又可爱，比棉袄还贴心！
Little Gui gets it, and she's so cute! I feel closer to her than this blanket!
哇，你们真人比上镜好看多了！
Wow, you're even more pretty in real life than on the vlog!
啊，我不是说你们上镜不好看……
Ah, that's not to say that you're not pretty when on stream...
没事，我懂，镜头有畸变嘛。
It's fine. I get it. The camera adds ten pounds.
小妹妹，你这到底怎么做到的，尾巴闪闪的。
Hey miss, how'd you manage to do that? Your tail is sparkling.
这个…这个…这个是秘密，不能说。
It's... it's... it's a secret. I can't tell you.
噢，多半是你家的护理秘方吧，那我还是不问了。
Oh, it's probably your family's secret fur-care routine. I won't ask any more questions.
I have to say, you really are so cute.
Thank you. Thanks for the compliment.
…桂、桂乃芬小姐，绥园还是很危险，这么多人、危、险……
...M—Miss Guinaifen, Fyxestroll Garden is a really dangerous place, especially with so... many... people...
人好多，我、我开始有些晕了……
There're too many people. I'm starting to feel a little... dizzy...
姑娘，看直播的时候我就想问了，你这剑看着好重啊，是真剑假剑啊？
Young girl, while watching your stream, I kept wanting to ask — that sword always looks so heavy. Is it real, or fake?
当然是真的啦，这柄剑可是我娘给我的，我也是练了很久才勉强使得动。
Of course it's real~ My mama gave it to me, and I had to practice for an eternity before I could manage to lift it.
嚯，你这身手可真是绝了！
我看人家的感情状态不是说……
When I saw the relationship status, didn't it say...
So cool with that pose while wielding a bat!
那是台本，一定不是真的！
你也多多和粉丝们交流嘛，这是我们一起取得的成就。
You should interact with the fans more. This is the fruit of our collective labor.
我很享受气氛，正考虑离开了…
I'm just basking in the ambience, and was thinking of leaving...
我明白，不过，我有些话想跟你说。
I understand, but I have something to tell you.
我还打算再感受下热烈的气氛…
I was planning to enjoy the bustling ambience a little longer...
没错，就应该这样。等你感受得差不多就来找我吧，我有话想跟你说。
That's right. This should be how it's done. Come look for me when you're done basking. I've got something to tell you.
来到仙舟之后，我做了各种各样的尝试，杂技、探店、主播，也包括我们捉鬼小队的各种探灵活动，我真的很幸福，尤其是这个账号达成的成就——

After coming to Xianzhou, I tried all sorts of things: Acrobatics, store visits, streaming, and the ghost-busting stuff with our ghost-hunting squad. I'm really blessed, especially with the milestones reached with this account...
The past me would have never dared to even dream of this!
早知道账号就叫「球棒侠」了…
On hindsight, this account should have been called Baseballer Hero...
…我当时可没有考虑这么多，再说了，你现在也是「小桂子Guinevere」。
...I wasn't really thinking that far back then. Besides, you're also "LilGuiGuinevere" right now.
你本来很有受欢迎的天赋…
You have a natural charisma that makes you popular...
…我承认我是自带流量的，但是还得多亏了你们。
...I admit that I come with my own fanbase, but it's also thanks to you all.
账号涨粉太快，有点虚假…
The account's fan count is rising so fast that it's a little fake...
…其实我也有好几次这么想过，这说明「小桂子Guinevere」是真的火。
...That's what I also thought before, but that's just proof of how "LilGuiGuinevere" is truly popular.
虽然这个账号名叫「小桂子Guinevere」，但是它并不是我。「小桂子Guinevere」承载着很多人对它的想象，早已不是某个具体的人了。
This account may be called "LilGuiGuinevere," but it's not mine alone. "LilGuiGuinevere" bears many people's expectations — it stopped being just one person a long time ago.
我做不到像「小桂子Guinevere」一样永远乐观阳光，我也做不到像「小桂子Guinevere」一样永远妙语连珠，受人追捧。
I can't always be an eternal ray of sunshine like "LilGuiGuinevere" is. I also can't always be "LilGuiGuinevere" with her razor-sharp wit and how she's adored by so many.
我一个人是做不到的，这都是有你，有捉鬼小队，有粉丝们的共同帮助才能完成的。所以我想再麻烦你一次，把我们的合照发在罗浮杂俎上。

I couldn't have done it alone — it was thanks to you, the ghost-hunting squad, and the unity of our fans that this was achieved. So I was thinking of troubling you once more — to post the photograph of all of us on Ghostly Grove.
Whatever shall I do with you.
Let me post it! I'm the best at posting!
真是个难忘的夜晚，不是吗？我还打算再待一会。就让我再说最后一句吧——
A truly unforgettable night, no? I plan on staying a bit longer. Just let me say this one last line...
有个帖子我很在意，你们帮我鉴定一下！
There's a post that's on my mind. Can you help me parse it out?
...Nothing's worth worrying so much about. Let me take a look.
家人们，虽然直觉告诉我这是假的，但我还是很在意，去看看吗？
Hey fam, even though my intuitions tell me this is fake, I'm still a little worried about it. Wanna go check it out?
Yeah, let's go. I wanna know, too.
根据发帖人提供的位置信息来看，是这里没错了。
This is the right place, based on the location mentioned in the post.
哪有什么「嘎吱响的空荡货仓」啊，这附近连个人影都没有。
Where's this "creaky old empty warehouse" then? There's not a soul around.
我这里没发现有什么异常之处，看起来挺正常的，就是这附近有点…空旷？
Nothing special around here. It all seems pretty normal. It's just that everywhere around here just seems kinda... empty?
地址是对的，帖子里说的「货仓」到处都是，也算是对的上号。
The address is correct, and it's packed full of similar "warehouses" as mentioned in the post, so we've got the right place.
但网上的东西本来就有真有假，或许是发帖的存心骗我们，或许是风吹过货仓的门发出的声响被误认为是闹鬼，人家也不是有心骗人，谁知道呢。

But there're always problems with what's true and what's fake online. Maybe they're trying to scam us. Maybe a gust blew open the warehouse door, making it creak as though haunted — and they DON'T actually want to scam us. Who knows?
反正就算是白跑一趟也在我意料之中，我们也不必灰心，现在还早，回去休息休息也来得及。
In any case, it's well worth considering that this could even be a waste of a trip. We shouldn't lose heart, because it's still early — and there's still time to go back and take a rest.
小桂子说的在理，不过…我方才就注意到，附近有个家伙老往我们这儿瞧……
Little Gui, that's reasonable enough, but... I've only just noticed, there's a girl just over there who keeps looking this way...
那个人…我也发现了，但我没感受到岁阳的气息，她应该只是个普通人。
That girl... I've noticed her too, but it doesn't feel like a heliobus inside. She should just be a normal person.
上去问问就知道了，流云渡平日里人不多，我们在这里东翻西找的惹人注目也很正常。
Just go and ask, you'll soon find out. The Cloudford is usually pretty quiet on weekdays, and we're out here ransacking the place. It's natural to attract a little attention.
你刚才是在盯着我们看吗？
Were you just staring at us?
我看有位小姑娘挺眼熟的…就是你、你是那个主播对吧，最近很火的那个什么小桂子来着？
One of you girls looks like someone I know... You, you there. Are you that famous vlogger who went viral recently? Little Gui, right?
正是在下，我是桂乃芬，感兴趣的话请到直播间里点个关注吧。
I am indeed. The name's Guinaifen and if you're keen, then don't forget to visit our page, like — and subscribe!
小桂子，不是让你说这个。
Little Gui, that's not what she meant.
咳咳，职业病了抱歉。我们在这儿随便逛逛，你呢？
Ahem, sorry. Call me a workaholic or something. We're just strolling around here. How about you?
噢，我、我啊，我就…我就随便转转——我有个物流信息更新，在附近取件呢。
Oh, I—I... I just... I'm just hanging out here... I've got a notification about a courier delivery and the pick-up spot is nearby.
原来如此，那就不打扰你了。
Is that right? In that case, we won't bother you any further.
这附近除了我们也没个人影，你一个人在外面还是多注意安全。
There's nobody else around besides us. Please take care with your personal safety when you're out on your own.
一切似乎并无异常，小队决定再观望片刻。
Everything seemed normal enough, so the squad decided to stay and watch a while longer.
又冒出来个新帖，而且这个用户名…这个风格……
There's another new post. And the username... and the style...
我感觉这个帖子和上次那个货仓的帖子很像，你们要来看看吗！
This post seems really similar to the previous warehouse one. Come have a look!
…上次扑了个空，真的还要看吗？
...I missed it last time. Do I still have to look?
我脑内的雷达铮铮作响，有一种特殊的直觉。
My internal radar is tingling and giving me a special feeling.
那我们就相信你的直觉，出发。
Well, we trust your instincts. Let's go.
Sushang and Huohuo are still on their way?
我让她们去找其他人打听事情去了。
I sent them ahead to go find some other people and ask around about it.
好像没看到什么广告牌。
I don't think I've seen any billboards around.
我在金人巷待了这么久，这里压根就没有什么「当铺」。
In all my time of hanging out around the Aurum Alley, I've never seen any "pawnshop" here.
也难怪我在附近转悠了半天，什么诡异之处都看不出来。那个帖子的所谓「爆料」，压根就是编出来的。
No wonder why I've been walking around all day but still haven't found anything weird. That so-called "scandal" from the post has got to be made up.
Bad luck. I missed out this time, too...
不，这不是「倒霉」，依我看，这是有人在背后捣乱。
No, it's not "bad luck." In my estimation, this is someone causing trouble behind the scenes.
真闲啊，有空写点小说不好吗？
They must be bored. You know what? You should write novels.
毕竟只是捕风捉影而已。
It's just tilting at windmills, nothing more.
上次在流云渡我们扑空了一次，这次在金人巷又踩了一次坑。
We missed out last time at Cloudford, and this time we were hustled again at the Aurum Alley.
我觉得此事相当蹊跷，上回发帖的人叫「桂桂的咸辣豆汁」，这回发帖的叫「请桂桂喝冰糖豆汁」。
I find this all really weird. The user who posted up last time was GuiguiSpicySourJuice, and this post is by SweetBoba_4_SweetGui.
很少有粉丝会这么喊我，而且…名字恰巧都是某种古怪口味的豆汁。
Hardly any fans call me that, plus... the usernames are all weird juicy names.
Do you think it's the same person?
我怀疑这俩应该是同一个人。现在已经证实两条帖文都是假消息，也就是说——这人是故意在捣乱爆假料。
I suspect they're from the same person. We've confirmed now that both posts are totally fake news. That means: This person is deliberately spreading disinformation.
至于这么做的目的…唔，不知对方究竟是何人，所以作案的动机可就千奇百怪了。但我想能做出这种事，大概率是我的黑粉……
As for their goal? Hmm... I don't know who they are, so the motives for doing this are all going to be strange. But I'm thinking, the kind of person who'd do this has to be one of my haters...
你认真聆听着桂乃芬的分析，不远处一道视线停留在你身上，你顿时察觉到了不对。
You listen carefully to Guinaifen's analysis when you feel sight lines locking on to you from not too far away. Instantly, you realize something is wrong.
小桂子，有人盯着我们了。
啊？有点可疑，先不要声张，你带路，我们直接冲过去问个清楚。
Huh? That's sus. Don't show our hand. You lead the way. Let's just rush over and ask what's going on.
…等等，你看着挺眼熟的，我们是不是在哪里见过？
...Hang on. You seem really familiar. Have we met?
上次在流云渡的就是她！
The girl in the Cloudford last time — it's her!
你为什么要跟踪我们？你好好回答，否则我会考虑到地衡司报警。
Why are you stalking us? Go on, tell us — otherwise I'll have to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
桂桂你先别发火，我叫漫漫，刚才吓到你很不好意思，我也不是有意要害你的或者想怎么对付你，我只是……
Guigui, please don't be mad. I'm Manman and I'm sorry for scaring you just now. I didn't mean to hurt you or to do anything bad to you. I just...
「桂桂」？我知道了，你就是那个发帖人！你说你老编这些贴干嘛？
"Guigui"!? I knew it. You're the one who made those posts! What are you doing making posts like that?
我…其实我…我是你的粉丝，我见你在上面征集投稿什么的，还说会实地走访，我就想着会不会有机会见到你。
I... actually I... am one of your fans. I saw you were soliciting contributions and that you were making real life trips around, so I wondered if I might get a chance to try and meet you.
然后我就试了下…不得不说你真人就算发火也好可爱啊呜呜，你的脸比屏幕上小很多真的可爱死了。
And so I tried, but... I have to say, you're so cute in-person even when you're angry~ Your face is much smaller than on the screen. Just too cute.
