How come eating trash leads to mutations?
Because it wears a "trashcan" on its head.
抱歉，这个笑话似乎并不好笑，我还没完全掌握人类深奥的语言规则。
I'm sorry, that joke wasn't particularly funny. I have yet to fully master the esoteric rules of human language.
我见过一些造物，身躯特征和大部分造物明显不同。它们游离在各个角落，你要是有机会，说不定能碰到它们。
I have seen some creations whose physical traits greatly differ from most of the others. They drift around all over the place. If you get the chance, you might just run into one of them.
如果你能将它们带到我这儿来，那就更好了。有足够的样本，就能破译它们身体特征的秘密。
It would be very good if you could bring them to me. With sufficient samples, the secrets of their physical traits can be decoded.
What is the principle behind the mutations?
很抱歉，这点我们也不是很清楚。不过界种科送了两只特别的造物过来，你可以利用它们进行培育实验。
I'm sorry, this is not well understood. However, the Department of Ecology has sent two creation species that you can use for nurturing research.
接下来，请继续培育造物，这将加快我们的研究进度。您所追寻的问题，届时会有科学的解答。
Next, please keep nurturing creations to help speed up our research progress. The answers to all the questions you seek can be found through science.
{NICKNAME}，你来得正好，艾丝妲站长前不久为造物们购置了一批睡眠用品，她把这称为「猫窝」。
{NICKNAME}, how timely! Lead Researcher Asta has bought some sleeping supplies for the creations. She calls this a "Kitty Cot."
相关用品已清点完毕，现在你可以试试，将培育出来的造物安置好。
Relevant items have all been cataloged. Perhaps you can try using them to accommodate the creations you've nurtured?
Bwa ha ha! This is so fun!
Thanks — you guys have fun without me.
你观察着自己的「最新成果」，可你的「成果们」正不知道从哪个角落翻出来些垃圾，丝毫不嫌脏地把玩着。
Observing your "latest achievements," you find them digging around in the trash — as though your "achievements" do not care in the slightest about playing in filth.
它们玩得很开心，以至于完全不把在场的其他人放在眼里。遍地是垃圾，你看见有造物不满地皱起了眉头。
They were having so much fun that they completely ignored everyone else present. Trash was scattered everywhere, and you could see some creations frowning disapprovingly at the mess.
（赶紧跟保姆机器人说下，让它清理下这里吧。）
(Hurry over to the Helper Robot and get it to clean up in here.)
{NICKNAME}，多亏了你，最近冒出一大批造物，这里也热闹了不少。
{NICKNAME}, thanks to your efforts, many batches of creations have spawned. It's getting lively around here.
这样啊，毕竟是新生造物，心智还不够成熟。
I see. Well, they are still young, their minds not yet fully developed.
但你的顾虑也很合理，就算每天打扫，这种事还是会不断发生……
But these concerns of yours are also reasonable. Even if cleaning is performed daily, similar things will keep happening...
这样一来，它们是玩尽兴了，可其他造物就很难受了。
They have plenty of fun like this, but other creations will suffer.
If it doesn't work out, they can always be put up for adoption.
那可不行。况且，就算你送养了它们，其他造物在场，难免会有类似的情况发生。
That won't work. Even if we put them up for adoption, similar situations will keep happening with other creations.
到时候，难道你要将所有造物都送走吗？
When the time comes, are you going to try and give away all the creations?
或许可以给它们个教训？
Maybe we can teach them a lesson?
No, please don't. This is not good.
既然造物之间的需求不同，有的喜欢玩乐，有的喜欢清净，有的比较邋遢，有的爱干净……
Different creations have different needs: Some like to have fun, some like to be quiet, some are sloppy, and some are germaphobes...
我们可以改造这个舱段，给它们做好功能分区，让它们的需求最大程度地得到满足。
We can modify this zone and divide them by function to try and meet their needs to the greatest extent possible.
很简单，做好功能分区就行。
Simple: Separate them according to their functionality.
概念上有点像，但实际没有这么多工序。
It's a similar concept, but it won't be as complicated in practice.
我估算了下，最基础的需求是进食和休息，我们有现成的资源，完全可以找两个不同的区域，按功能做好划分。

I have run some estimations. Their most basic needs are food and rest, and we have supplies on hand. It is wholly possible to create two separate areas based on that alone, and divide them according to their functions.
在进食区的就只管吃吃吃，吃完了可以稍微在附近玩会儿，反正大家都在吃饭也不会介意。
In the Dining Area, they just indulge in their meals. After eating, they can play nearby — everyone's eating, anyway, so they won't care.
在休息区的就要保持安静，刚刚在进食区吃饱了的，玩累了的，可以直接过来呼呼大睡。
Those in the Rest Area should be keeping quiet. Those who are done eating in the Dining Area or who have worn themselves out playing can come here for a good sleep.
这样的话…它们之间就能减少分歧与摩擦。你只需要教会它们使用不同功能分区就行。
This way... any differences or friction between them can be gradually reduced. You just need to teach them how to use the different areas.
Do we have to move them around manually?
Should we teach them about all this?
造物之间的智力水平层次不齐，我们得想一个周全的方法……
The intelligence levels among creations vary. We need to come up with a comprehensive approach...
图像是最简明易懂的东西，可以在不同分区的地面上喷漆，喷涂上对应的功能涂鸦，这样就不会搞混了。
Images are the easiest way to get meaning across. You can spray a mark on the ground in the different areas, with graffiti of what the area is for to alleviate any confusion.
保姆机器人尴尬地看了看你。
The Helper Robot awkwardly looks at you.
很抱歉，我悬浮的高度是固定的，无法下降…所以……
I'm sorry, but my levitation height is fixed and cannot be lowered... so...
好的，那就麻烦你了，喷漆装置已为你安装完毕。在喷涂好后可以把造物们安置在对应区域。
Then I'll leave it to you. The spray device has been installed. Once you've finished the spraying, you can accommodate the creations in the corresponding areas.
还有，请不要喷错位置！这可能会为其他机器人带来不必要的负担。
And please don't spray in the wrong place! This may cause unnecessary trouble for other robots.
它们很高兴，彼此之间相处得也很愉快。多亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。
They're happy and are getting on very well with each other. All thanks to you, {NICKNAME}.
Sure is. The credit's all mine.
你比我见过的大部分人类更直率，我很欣赏你这一点。
You're more straightforward than most humans I've ever met. I really appreciate that.
你太谦虚了，你做得比所有人预想的都更出色。
You are so humble, and you always manage to exceed everyone's expectations.
舱段分区改造已初见成果，有个好消息要告诉你，{NICKNAME}。
The rezoning work appears to be yielding results. I have some good news to tell you, {NICKNAME}.
Asta is giving me a bonus?
这…不是，不过她会不会这么奖励你，我也不清楚。
That's... not it. I'm not sure if she would reward you for this.
螺丝咕姆先生为我远程升级了系统，我现在的看管范围扩大了，你可以把它们托管在我这儿了。
Screwllum recently upgraded my remote systems, and my operational scope has been expanded. You can leave them with me.
我会定时给你发送监控报告的，你可以放心去研究培育配方，培育更多造物了。
I will send you regular reports so you can rest easy, work on the nurture recipe, and nurture more creations.
After all that, it's still just more about nurturing...
Are there more creations to nurture?
研究进度的事情由艾丝妲站长负责。你可以随时打开培育手册查看进度，她承诺过会在那上面同步更新。
Lead Researcher Asta is in charge of the research progress. You can open the nurturing manual to check the progress at any time, she promised to keep updates in there.
（「生命烘焙箱」就在附近，此处通风良好，还有现成的桌椅……）
(The Lifeform Oven is nearby, there's good ventilation in here, and there's a table with chairs all set up...)
（该给这个区域设置什么功能分区好呢？）
(What function should we designate for this area?)
...Waah! Your heart is even colder than this floor!
这里硬邦邦的，怎么睡哦……
This is so hard, how am I supposed to sleep...
造物们拒绝在冰冷的金属表面上睡觉，它们大声抗议，吵得你脑袋疼。
The creations refuse to sleep on the cold metal floor and protest loudly. You start to get a headache.
（呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
(Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)
看起来还蛮方便的，吃完就能直接去……
That looks really convenient. I can eat and then just go over...
造物们拒绝在此处进食，并对你的行为表示鄙夷。
The creations refuse to eat here, and are disgusted by your behavior.
（呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
(Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)
Ka-caw! Time to eat. I'm pigging out!
喵？你的头太大啦，退一下啊，我也要吃……
Meow? Your head is too big. Please step back, I want a bite too...
造物们大口咀嚼着食物，闹哄哄地对你表示了感谢。
The creations hungrily chomp down the food, raucously thanking you.
（这个区域光照充足，还有舒服的抱枕……）
(This area has plenty of light, and comfy cushions...)
（该给这个区域设置什么功能分区好呢？）
(What function should we designate for this area?)
最近有什么神奇的事吗？
保姆机器人示意你看向它身边的造物伙伴。
The Helper Robot gestures for you to look at the creation by its side.
真没眼力劲，我这么耀眼你都没发现？
Are you blind? Haven't you noticed how splendidly magnificent I am?
根据空间站界种科的命名规则，你可以喊我藤萝饼，能遗传到我这一类基因特征的幸运儿，都可以叫这个名字。
If we follow the Station Department of Ecology rules of nomenclature, then you can call me Wisteria Cake. Anything lucky enough to inherit these quality genetic traits can be called that, too.
你不是第一个这么说的。
You're not the first one to say that.
它是第一个主动要求见你的「阮•梅」造物。
It is the first creation of Ruan Mei's that's asked to see you.
我想看看，传说中的{NICKNAME}，究竟是何方神圣。
Let me see this legendary {NICKNAME} then — show me what in holy heck people see.
嗯哼，长得挺高的，还行吧。
You came just to see me?
我这次来，目的并不只是为了见你。
I didn't just come to see you.
我在研究自己的身世——我的起源，我的种族，我的基因，诸如此类，有大量的领域目前尚处于空白状态。
I'm researching my origin story — my background, my race, my genes, all of that stuff. Most of it is still blank to me.
很可惜，即便以我这聪敏的脑袋，还是得不到想要的答案。我的研究遇到了瓶颈，现在，我需要你的帮助。
Unfortunately, even with this brain of mine I still can't get the answer I'm looking for. My research has hit a bottleneck, and now I need your help.
别急，听我说完，免得你一知半解的还拖累了我的研究。
Don't worry, just listen to this, so your ignorance doesn't impede my research.
在我开始介绍我伟大的研究之前，我要先给你介绍我的朋友——
Before I inform you about my mighty research project, I'd like to introduce you to a friend...
藤萝饼将同伴带到你面前。
Wisteria Cake brings over a companion to you.
你好，我只是应邀而来，你不必在意。
Hello. I'm just here by invite. Don't mind me.
…「阮•梅」女士为什么要创造你…呜呜，这不公平。
...Why did Miss Ruan Mei create you? *sniffle* This is not fair.
你闭嘴，一个骗子还这么招摇，以后不许这么对我的朋友讲话。
Shut up, you're such a scammer, acting all high and mighty. Don't ever talk to my friend like that again.
好了，看到我的朋友——那个招摇撞骗主动倒贴过来的家伙不算，你是不是觉得很惊讶？
Alright, apart from this arrogant friend of mine who won't quit stalking me — don't you feel surprised?
我和她的特征极为独特，这是基因突变造成的，可为何我们会与你所认识的人如此相似，我暂时还没找到原因。
She and I have very similar traits, which were caused by genetic mutations. But I have no idea as to why I might look like some of these other people you know.
但我想，这和你脱不开关系，你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？
But I think it all has something to do with you. Isn't that right, {NICKNAME}?
我怀疑这是受到某种精神层面的影响……
I suspect this is all connected on some kind of spiritual level...
但我的研究实例太少了，所以想请你帮我个忙，能不能帮我培育出更多具有稀有特征的造物。
But I have far too few samples to research, so that's why I'd like to ask for your help in nurturing more creations with a few more rare traits.
你要是实在培育不出来，那就多培育点普通造物，样本够大的话，也能凑合用。
If you really can't manage that, then nurture some more ordinary creations. I can get by, so long as I have enough samples.
空间站的课题和你的研究方向一模一样。
Your research topic is exactly the same as that of the space station.
所以，{NICKNAME}，你能不能想想办法，看看怎么培育出这些稀有造物，空间站的研究就差这最后一块拼图了。
So, {NICKNAME}, can you think of a way to nurture these rare creations? This is the last piece of the puzzle remaining for the space station's research program.
你不说话，那就当你同意咯？
If you don't reply, should I take that as agreement?
既然咱们目标一致，那正好，我有些东西要给你，或许会对你的培育工作有帮助。
It's fine since our goals are aligned. I have some things for you that you might find helpful with your nurturing job.
All together now. Time to take some photos.
{NICKNAME}, thank you for all your hard work over the past few days.
空间站的研究基本完成了，不过，还有最后一件事想麻烦你……
The space station's research has basically been completed. However, there's one last thing I'd like to task you with...
Don't worry, this is really easy.
准确来说，是她有事想请你帮忙。
To be precise, it's her who wants help with something.
…嗯，是我。你可能也看出来了，我身上的气息与特征，和阮•梅本人很像。
...Well, it's me. You may have noticed that I have the same aura and traits as Ruan Mei herself.
连这里的造物都时常把我俩搞混。
Even the creations here get the two of us mixed up.
你确实很像阮•梅女士，所以我才一直跟着你……
You really do look very similar to Miss Ruan Mei. That's actually why I keep following you around...
大家总是很想念她，还有造物会小声喊我「妈妈」…但很遗憾，我并不是阮•梅。
Everyone misses her so much, and I even hear some creations whimper "Mommy"... But unfortunately, I am not Ruan Mei.
我想为它们做些力所能及的事……
I want to do whatever I can for them...
Do you want Ruan Mei to pay them a visit?
如果可以，那自然最好。不过我想，以她的性子，大抵是不会回来了。
If she could, that would be best. But knowing her temperament, I don't think she'll be coming back.
What do you want to do?
我想拜托你拍张大合照。
I'd like you to take some group photos of everyone.
我知道你在空间站手眼通天，想必能联系上阮•梅女士。
You know all the tricks aboard the space station, so I know you must have a way of reaching Miss Ruan Mei.
我们想请你拍几张照片，再把照片发给她。
We'd like you to take some photos and send them to her.
先说我的要求——我和她的合照，请务必发给她看，我很好奇她和黑塔看了会有什么反应。
First up, here's my official request: A photo of me with her, and you have to send it to her. I'm curious about how she and Herta will react.
然后是拍其他造物的大合照。你可以多拍几张发给她。
And then a group photo of all the other creations. You can take a few photos and send her all of them.
嗯，就算没有「已读」也没关系，至少能传达大家的心意……
And well, even if she leaves the messages unread, at least we'll be passing on everyone's feelings...
Don't worry, she'll definitely check it out.
好香咪，这里有好多好吃的，这下可以边吃边睡了呼！
Yum, there are so many yummy snacks here. Now I can snack while I snooze!
造物们边吃边睡，口水与食物残渣流了一地，你与保姆机器人忙得团团转，才把这里收拾干净。
The creations are eating and sleeping, with drool and crumbs all over the floor. You and the Helper Robot dart about trying to clean up everything.
（呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
(Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)
有造物在马桶上睡着了，空气中弥漫着不妙的味道。
One creation is sleeping on the toilet. A putrid stench fills the air.
（呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
(Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)
你的尾巴可以挪过来点吗？我缺个枕头。
Can you move your tail over here? I need a pillow.
造物们在这里安静地休息，你舍不得打破这份温馨。
The creations are resting peacefully here. You don't dare to interrupt this quietude.
不行我要站中间，不许抢我镜头，把我拍好看点！
No, I have to stand in the middle. Don't steal my best angle. Make sure I look good!
你已经很好看啦，不知道阮•梅会不会第一时间发现我……
You already look great. I wonder if Ruan Mei will be able to notice me straight away...
你们这些小家伙，站过去点，听那个大个子指挥！
You little ones, stand over there. Listen to the big fellow now, understood!
藤萝饼和「拉姆之友」吸引了许多造物靠近，它们似乎被它们身上的某种气息所折服，又或是为之沉醉。
Wisteria Cake and "Lambda's Friend" attract many creations to come nearby, with an aura that seemingly captivates them, or perhaps intoxicates them.
I—It's going to be sent off to Ruan Mei!
要不然怎么会拍合照呢？
Why would we take a group photo otherwise?
Creations of Ruan Mei, let's join our hands~
Tears of joy for Ruan Mei~
我亲眼看见的，那个虫子将她吞了进去！一个瘦弱的小妹妹…就这么被虫子活活吞进去了，天啊……
I saw it with my own eyes, that beetle swallowed her! A frail little girl... swallowed by a beetle alive!
你在哪儿看见的，我怎么没看到？
Where did you see it? 'Cuz I didn't.
就在药物制备间下层，不是有道门？一出去就看到了。
There's a door on the lower level of the Pharmaceutical Room. It was right outside there.
接驳车站吗？那边是挺危险的…可怜的小妹妹，等等，她还活着吗？她该不会……
The shuttle station? It is quite dangerous over there... Poor girl... wait, is she still alive? Could she have...
肯定活着呢，我走的时候还听到她隔着肚皮在喊呢！她就在虫子肚子里！
She's definitely still alive! I could still hear her yelling for help through the beetle's outer shell when I left. She's still inside the beetle's stomach!
有没有人啊！快来人！救救那个小妹妹！她被虫子吞到肚子里了。
Is anyone there!? Help! Save that little girl! She was swallowed by that beetle!
被虫子吞了？这要怎么救啊？
Swallowed? So how are we supposed to save her?
Um... Through an opening? Maybe open the beetle up?
那也得先把虫子打晕吧，我可没这身手……
Well, you gotta knock that beetle out first. I certainly can't...
它的模样让你想起了一位故人，将它梳洗一番后，你为它拍下了特写照。
Its appearance reminds you of an acquaintance. After giving it a quick groom, you take a close-up photo of it.
造物们对这里的一切很满意，它们给你留了点「小礼物」。
The creations are all very pleased with everything here. They have left you a "little gift".
…那些可怜的巡海游侠，至死也没发现，此人正是「毁灭」纳努克的化身。
...Even till their deaths, those poor Galaxy Rangers had no idea this person was actually the incarnation of Nanook, the Destruction.
这个故事到此就结束了。
无名客，你也是来听故事的吗？
Nameless one, are you here to listen to a story, too?
我认识你吗？星辰的孑遗、语言的残片、命运散乱的支线、诗篇中唯一的标点。是的，我认识你。
Do I know you? A relic of the stars, a fragment of language, a scattered branch of fate, the lone piece of punctuation in a poem. Yes, I know you.
我以为你不会感到意外。
I didn't think you'd be surprised.
我会讲故事吗？枷锁千钧而穿行于薄冰、灰色的情感顺着刀尖滴落、矫饰的真实形成悖谬。是的，我会讲故事。
Do I tell stories? Shackled, skating 'cross thin ice, go grayed emotions, dripping down the knife's edge as pretentious truth forms scornful paradox. Yes, I've been known to tell a story or two.
我以为你正是为此而来的。
I thought that's why you came here.
You... Are you talking to it!?
听到你与那只鸟的对话，隐书从书肆的柜台后翻了出来，跑到了你们面前。
Hearing you chat with the bird, Yinshu pops out from behind the counter and runs over to you.
你你你你怎么能和它对话？！
H—h—h—how can you talk with it!?
Am I not supposed to talk with it?
啊…抱歉…我只是有些吓到了。别担心，你没做错什么…应该是没做错什么吧……
Ah... Sorry... I just got a little freaked out there. Don't worry. You haven't done anything wrong... at least you probably haven't done anything wrong...
西衍先生把这鸟放在我这里好几天了…这还是我第一次听到它和人说话呢！
Mr. Xiyan has had this bird here for days now... but this is the first time I'm hearing it actually talk with a human!
我听它在给小朋友们讲故事。
I heard it telling some children a story.
这家伙叫「游辞」，它确实是会讲故事，但是…它可从来不和人「对话」啊！
They call this guy "Youci," and it actually does tell stories, but... it's never ever engaged in a dialogue with people before!
而且这鸟怕生得很，一开始甚至不肯离西衍先生太远…一旦看不到西衍先生就不停地啸叫。
It's so afraid of strangers that at first it wouldn't let Mr. Xiyan out of its sight... As soon as he strayed off, it'd start screeching.
也就最近这几天，它才逐渐习惯了在三余书肆门口当活招牌。但我还是不能掀开笼子上的布，不然它还是会鬼哭狼嚎。

But the last few days, it's slowly grown accustomed to life as a living door sign for the Spare Time Book Shop. But I still can't lift the cloth on its cage for fear of it shrieking like a vengeful ghost.
现在有人围在周围，它就自顾自讲故事，没人围在周围，它就像个普通的鸟一样吃了睡、睡了吃。
Now, when people are around, it just goes about telling stories to itself. But when there's nobody around, it eats, sleeps, and excretes just like a normal bird.
像刚才那样，和人有来言有去语的对话，我可是第一次见到啊！
But that kind of back-and-forth conversational dialogue that I saw just then? That's the first time I've ever seen that!
游辞呀～你刚才是不是和{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}对话来着？
Youci~ Were you just talking with {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}?
游辞？我照顾你那么久了，你也和我聊聊天嘛～
Youci? How long have I taken care of you now? C'mon, say something...
Hmph... This stupid bird. So frustrating.
{NICKNAME}, would you like me to tell you a story?
还真是只和你一个人说话啊！怎么搞的，你能通鸟语吗？还是你有什么特别之处…能让这只鸟对你另眼相看？
It really does only talk to you! Do you understand bird language, or is there something special about you... that has this bird giving you special treatment?
{NICKNAME}, let me tell you a story.
这是一个颇为激烈的故事……
你先去忙吧，我再和它僵持一会儿！就不信这鸟不肯开口！
Off you go and do that, then. I'll try and continue to get it to talk. I can't believe this bird refuses to talk!
…就这样，{NICKNAME}取得了胜利。{F#她}{M#他}的威名再一次传遍了整个银河。
...And just like that, {NICKNAME} was victorious. {F#Her}{M#His} fame spread throughout the cosmos once again.
这个故事到此就结束了。
怎么感觉真的打了一架…
Why did that feel like a real fight?
唉…正常情况。你看这鸟笼的样子就知道，它肯定不是普通的鸟。听它讲完故事，就是会莫名觉得…这故事似乎真的发生过。

*Sigh*... That's pretty normal. You can tell just by looking at its cage that it's no ordinary bird. Once you hear it tell a story, you have this inexplicable feeling that... that this story really did happen.
没发生过吧。游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
It never happened, right? Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.
不记得就对了，这应该是它编出来的吧。游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
It's normal that you don't remember, because it just cut that story out of whole cloth, right? Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.
仔细一想，是有这么一回事！
Now that I think about it — it happened!
真的发生过吗！呃…我还以为全都是它编的呢！游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
It happened!? Um... I thought it was all made up! Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.
隐书妹妹在吗？我要买书～
Is Yinshu here? I'd like to buy a book~
啊，有客人来了。算了，我也不自讨没趣了，你和游辞慢慢交流感情吧。我回去工作了。
Ah, a customer. Forget it then. You and Youci take your time getting acquainted. I'll get back to work.
{NICKNAME}，我还有很多故事可以讲给你听。
{NICKNAME}, I've got many more stories I could tell you.
如若银河是一颗行星，你便是最主要的卫星。关于你的传奇，牵动着每一片海的潮汐。
If all the cosmos were a planet, you would be its largest moon. And your legend would impel the tides in every ocean there is.
听我讲故事，你也会得到一些好处。摸摸你的口袋吧。
Listen to my story, and you'll get something out of it. Reach into your pockets.
你摸了摸身上的口袋，发现多了一个奇怪的东西。
You reach into your pocket only to discover something strange.
这是宝贵的财富。只有两种存在得以获赠——诗人及其母题。
This is a precious asset. Only two things exist to be given: The poet and their leitmotif.
对话到此为止吧，我并不擅长。若你想听故事，可随时找我。我有很多故事可以讲给你听。
That's enough conversation for now. I'm not the best at this. Stop by any time if you'd like to hear a story. I've got lots of stories to tell you.
{NICKNAME}, would you like me to tell you a story?
这是一个颇为激烈的故事……
你先去忙吧，我再和它僵持一会儿！就不信这鸟不肯开口！
Off you go and do that, then. I'll try and continue to get it to talk. I can't believe this bird refuses to talk!
{NICKNAME}，要听故事吗？我还有很多故事可以讲给你听。
{NICKNAME}, would you like to hear a story? I've got many more stories I could tell you.
有没有不那么「刺激」的故事？
Do you have any stories that aren't so "intense"?
我有很多其他故事，但并非为你而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
I've got lots of other stories, but they're not just for you. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.
但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...
I've got a few questions I'd like to ask you...
我与你一样，只是一个受造物。
Just like you, I'm a creation.
我与你一样，防止银河走向它的命运/必然/结局/单一的确定系统/前定和谐。
Just like you, I prevent the cosmos from trending toward its own destiny/inevitability/conclusion/single fixed system/predestined harmony.
Why do you only talk with me?
正如之前所言，你牵动着银河的潮汐。
As mentioned, you impel the tides of the cosmos.
I've got something else to do.
啊，您见过在下家的游辞了～怎么样？是不是很有意思？
Ah, you met my little Youci~ How about it? Isn't it fascinating?
是吧！在下就料到您会喜欢它。
Indeed! I knew you'd take a liking to it.
没啥意思？唉，也不奇怪…无名客还是见多识广啊，在下手里的小玩意儿是满足不了您咯·～
Not at all? *sigh* That's no surprise... The Nameless is vastly experienced. Nothing I have in my humble possession could hope to satisfy you~
哈哈哈！确实如此。在下倒是觉得，这份「诡异」恰恰是它最有趣的地方。
Hahaha, indeed! I actually think this "weirdness" is what's most fascinating about it.
那您有没有遇到什么…特殊情况？
So then, have you encountered any... special circumstances?
啊？他和您对话了？…这…看来她没有骗我，这只鸟确实…别在意，在下自言自语罢了。
Ah? It chatted with you? ...This... looks like she wasn't lying. This bird can actually... Don't mind me. I'm just talking to myself.
还有没有别的什么事？比如…给你什么东西？
Was there anything else? Such as... Did it give you anything?
啊哈，在下就料到它会给您留下这羽毛！这可是好东西啊，您要好好保管。
Aha, I knew it'd gift a feather to you! They're really good, and you should take good care of it.
瞧它轻盈通透，像是某种宝石制成的小物件，就把它拿去卖钱呗～卖一个羽毛能少说好几天书呢！
Just look at how light and transparent it is, like some small object sculpted from gemstone. Go sell it for money~ One feather is worth all you can earn across several days of storytelling!
您有空时，多去找它聊聊天吧…在下平时工作比较忙，也担心让它太寂寞。既然它唯独肯和您对话，那也许它还挺喜欢您的呢。

When you have the time, spare some time and chat with it more... I often find myself busy with work, and I fear it grows lonely. Seeing as it only chats with you, perhaps it has taken a liking to you?
况且再怎么说，这些羽毛可是实打实的好东西呀～
And besides, those feathers most assuredly are REALLY good~
She chooses to fight her father...
Cold, sharp claws rake across his back...
He discovers that Aeons do not in fact exist...
Can you give us a horror story?
Why aren't you talking to me?
What a strange and moody bird...
我有很多其他故事，但并非是为这个宇宙而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
I've got lots of other stories, but they're just not ready for this universe. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.
但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...
银河中有个叫做「贝洛伯格」的末日孤城，风雪已经笼罩了它数个琥珀纪。据史料记载，那是某位筑城者为了战胜反物质军团的攻势，用禁忌手段召唤来的无尽冰霜。

Deep in the cosmos lies a doomed outpost city called Belobog, enveloped by a blizzard for several Amber Eras now. Historical records show this to be inexhaustible coldness summoned through unspeakable means by one of the Architects to repel an assault by the Antimatter Legion.
而如今，风雪突如其来地消退了。城市变得温暖宜居，生命也开始复苏。有人说，这是几位英雄用某种方式停止了风雪，使贝洛伯格得以重生。

But now, the blizzard has subsided as fast as it came. The city has become warm and vibrant, and life has started to return. Some say that it was several heroes who, in some way, managed to revive Belobog.
可实际上，那是绝灭大君「星啸」在风雪毁灭她军团前就埋下的伏笔。一颗绝灭大君的「种子」被安放在风雪之外，等待着再次君临世界的契机。

But in fact, this was all foretold by the Lord Ravager Celenova just prior to her legion being wiped out by the blizzard. A "seed" was planted beyond the blizzard by the Lord Ravager, dormant until the next chance to rule the world.
当贝洛伯格的人们正沉浸在万物复苏的喜悦中时，忽然有人看到，那些被冰封的虚卒重新苏醒，在残存的雪原中列队集结。

While the people of Belobog were lost in the joy of the revival, someone suddenly noticed the frozen Voidrangers started to reawaken, assembling into formations upon whatever remained of the Snow Plains.
星啸埋下的种子，此刻已经发芽了。她令风雪消退、寒冰融化，令那些本应永远沉睡的虚卒再度苏醒，展开复仇。
The seed planted by Celenova had begun to sprout. She drove away the blizzard and melted away the ice, allowing those Voidrangers, once eternally frozen, to reawaken to exact cold vengeance.
那些虚卒跪在地上，向这位令人恐惧的领袖宣誓效忠，并齐声呼喊着她那令人战栗的名号——
The Voidrangers dropped to one knee, swearing fealty to their feared leader as they chanted together her devastating name:
故事到这里就结束了，因为没有人亲眼看到接下来发生了什么样的「毁灭」。希望你能喜欢这段不为人知的秘史。
Our story ends here for now, because nobody could survive to see what "Destruction" followed. I hope you've enjoyed this unknown slice of secret history.
我有很多其他故事，但并非是为这个宇宙而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
I've got lots of other stories, but they're just not ready for this universe. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.
但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...
几乎每个人都知道，罗浮的「将军」乃是景元。可只有极少数人清楚，实际上统御罗浮、做出决策的另有其人。景元不过是明面上的将军，那位阴影中的将军才是真正的天人之总。

Almost everyone knows that the General of the Luofu is Jing Yuan. But only a few know about the other person actually making the decisions and controlling the Luofu. Jing Yuan is merely a general to fool the public. It's that secret shadow general who is really running the show.
此人平时不显山不露水，将自己隐藏于市井之中。人们都认为，她不过是一介无权无势的升斗小民。
This person is someone who always keeps their cards super close, hiding in plain sight at the marketplace. Everyone takes her for just a powerless peasant living hand to mouth.
当然，这样是最安全的。无论是丰饶令使还是绝灭大君，都不太可能精准找到这位影子将军的存在。
Naturally, this is the most secure option. Be it an Abundance Emanator or a Lord Ravager, it was impossible to accurately determine the identity of this shadow general.
影子将军擅长卜算吉凶，但却不屑于以此趋吉避凶。在她看来，趋吉避凶乃是庸人所为，想要赢得大，就要赌得多、不怕输。

The shadow general was a skilled diviner, but would not stoop to using the art for personal gain. In her estimation, seeking luck and avoiding misfortune is what mediocre people do. If you want to win big, you have to bet big — and not be afraid of losing.
譬如那日，联盟集结兵力，协助博识学会清缴一处星区内的孽物。在尝试突破造翼者佣兵的封锁时，罗浮太卜符玄认为，应当集结优势兵力，进攻薄弱处。

For example, on that day, an alliance was formed to assist the Intelligentsia Guild in purging abominations within a star zone. While attempting to break through the Wingweaver blockade, Fu Xuan — the Luofu's master diviner — believed that because their rallied forces were superior they should assault the weakest link.
但影子将军却说：「不，我们应当进攻他们防守最严密的部分。」六御大都知道影子将军强硬的性格，没人敢提出任何异议。

But the shadow general countered: "No, we should assault their most strongly defended part." Fully aware of the shadow general's hardcore nature, none of the Six Charioteers dared raise any objection.
只有符玄战战兢兢地说道：「青雀大人，敌人准备充分，如果贸然攻击防守严密处，反而会让我军陷入包围……」
Only Fu Xuan inquired, trembling with trepidation: "Esteemed Qingque, the enemy is well-prepared. If we attack a strongly defended garrison in haste, our forces risk becoming surrounded..."
影子将军一边玩着手中的琼玉牌，一边笑着说：「小玄子，我们打个赌吧。我赌他们的枪里没有子弹。」
The shadow general smiled as she flitted a jade tile between her fingers, and said: "Oh, Fu-Fu — let's make a bet. I bet there's no bullets in their guns."
事实证明，因为步离人和造翼者的内讧，那支佣兵军团的后勤补给已经完全崩溃。
It turns out bad blood between the borisin and Wingweavers had completely collapsed logistics supplies for this mercenary legion.
「防守薄弱处」实际上是他们仅存的有生力量，而看起来防守最严密的地方，则是无数残兵败将在硬撑门面，妄想能骗过联盟军。

The "weakest link" was actually their only remaining strength, while what seemed to be the most heavily defended part was actually where all the scattered remnants of the officers lurked in a vain attempt to deceive the alliance.
可惜青将军不愿抛头露面，她这般英明神武，也久久不为人知，只能成为街头巷尾的传说。
It's a great pity that General Qingque was never willing to show her face in public. Her wisdom and power went unknown for so long, that in the end she could only become an urban legend.
我有很多其他故事，但并非是为这个宇宙而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
I've got lots of other stories, but they're just not ready for this universe. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.
但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...
即使在很多琥珀纪以后，贝洛伯格的人们也会时常想起那场世纪大审判——代理大守护者佩拉审判僭主布洛妮娅。
Even after many Amber Eras, the citizens of Belobog will still harken to the trial of the era: The trial of the tyrant, Bronya, by the acting Supreme Guardian, Pela.
这案情的确离奇：下任大守护者从雪原中回来，说前任大守护者可可利亚已经背叛了贝洛伯格，并被自己就地正法。

The circumstances behind this case are indeed bizarre: The incoming Supreme Guardian came back from the Snow Plains, claiming that the previous Supreme Guardian, Cocolia, had betrayed Belobog — and thus summarily got executed on the spot.
当时在现场，能够证明布洛妮娅所言非虚的证人有抵抗组织的干部和外星的通缉犯。此外还有两位虽不在现场但算是亲历者的人，是被可可利亚剥夺权力的落马官员和她的弟弟。

On the scene at the time, those who could testify that what Bronya said was true included cadres from the resistance movement and some aliens with outstanding warrants. Besides those, there were two people absent who were also witnesses, however: The fallen official stripped of power by Cocolia, and her little brother.
因为每一位证人都有杀害可可利亚的动机，所以自然没几个人肯相信布洛妮娅的鬼话。她很快被佩拉推翻，后者举行了一场关乎贝城命运的大审判。

Scarcely anyone was willing to believe Bronya's nonsense, because each of the witnesses had their own motive for wanting to kill Cocolia. She was quickly vanquished by Pela, who staged a grand trial to determine the fate of Belobog.
在庭审中，越来越多的证据被提出，布洛妮娅证言的真实性开始得到验证。如果按照正常的审判流程，临时军事法庭应该能在几个月内得出结论。

During the trial, evidence mounted up and the veracity of Bronya's claims started to become verified. Were normal procedures to be followed, a provisional military court should be able to reach a deliberation within a few months or so.
但民众间的对立和利益集团间的博弈，并没有给法庭得出结论的时间。在审判开始的第七天，内战爆发了。
But division among the general public and interest groups competing with each other meant the court had no time to reach a conclusion. On the seventh day of the trial, civil war erupted.
也许在内战时，大多数人就已经清楚知道布洛妮娅没有说谎了。但事情发展到这个地步，「真相」早就没有意义了。
Perhaps during the trial, most people had already figured out that Bronya wasn't lying. But once things reach this stage, the truth no longer holds any water.
等到星际和平公司介入调停，并将雅利洛-VI纳入自己的贸易体系时，有很多有识之士悔不当初。但此时又能怎么办呢？
Once IPC intervened with mediation and brought Jarilo-VI into its trading network, many of those in-the-know came to regret it. But what could be done now?
这便是雅利洛-VI近代史中的一页。希望你能喜欢。
This is one page in a chapter on the modern history of Jarilo-VI. I hope you've enjoyed it.
游辞的声音如细雨中飘摇着的纱裙般轻盈，可你却在故事开始的一瞬间，坠入五里雾中…恍惚间，你仿佛陷入了一场恶战。

Youci's voice is as light as a silk skirt dancing in the soft drizzle, and yet you fall into an impenetrable fog the moment the story starts... Dazed, you find yourself to be engaged in a fierce battle.
伟大、尊贵、永世光荣的嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀阁下，恭迎您出征归来。
Welcome back, Your Excellency, the esteemed and illustrious Lord Tick-Tock.
遇见您是我此生莫大的幸运。我该用什么来赞美太阳？绚丽的糖浆因您的出现而黯然失色，简陋的酒吧因您的到来而熠熠生辉，在我心中，您就像那——

It is my utmost fortune to have encountered your presence. How shall I extol the sun? Your radiance surpasses the splendor of syrup, and the humble lounge gleams with your arrival. In my heart, you are akin to the...
苏乐达的瓶盖！若是失去了您，整瓶汽水…不，所有快乐都将毫无意义。
SoulGlad's bottle cap! Without you, the entire bottle of SoulGlad... No, all joy would lose its meaning.
Wait, that's not how he usually talks, right?
很好！我忠实的家仆哟，我正面临选择。请用你那足以昭示未来的舞步，来为我揭晓——究竟什么样的饮品，才配得上这一路的颠沛流离。
Well said, my loyal servant! Now, I find myself at a crossroads. Show me the answer through your dance steps that portend the future: Which beverage befits this extraordinary journey?
您的意愿就是我的意志。
Your will is my command, Your Excellency.
…嗯。嗯。多面骰的花色显示，今日最适宜的饮品，当由那边的调饮师亲手制作。
...Hmm. Uh-huh. Yes, the hues of the dice indicate that the finest beverage shall be handcrafted by the drinksmith over there.
——那边？可笑！那个酒保不过是我从村口旅馆捡回来的，一介村姑，连父母都找不到，你说她能调出我需要的饮料？哈哈，我倒真要看看！

The drinksmith over there? Preposterous! She is naught but a village girl I found from the inn. You believe an ignorant girl, who cannot even trace her lineage, to possess the skill to brew the beverage I require? Ha! How intriguing!
<size=28>It's Madam! She... she's run away again!</size>
那没事。你去告诉它，我回来了，让它速速迎接。
Well, no need to make a commotion. Inform her of my return and request her immediate presence.
我禀告过了，可夫人不听！它还说…还说……
I've told Madam, but she wouldn't listen! She even said... that...
它说…它要在酒吧里当调饮师，再也不回去了！！！
She said... she's going to be a drinksmith and will never come back!!!
啊？岂有此理！我去亲自问问它！
What? How outrageous! I shall personally inquire of her!

你想要掏出你最熟悉的那根球棒，却怎么都找不着。皮鞭重重打在你的身上，一下又一下，不算很痛，屈辱的滋味却是那般真切。
You try to grab your trusty baseball bat, but it's nowhere to be found. The whip keeps hitting you, not really causing much pain, but the humiliation is so real.
（…你倒是说句话啊！难道就这么眼睁睁地看着它们被打吗？）
(...Say something! Are you just gonna stand there and watch them get hit?)
朝眼前的幻象大吼大叫，就能抹消过往，改变未来了么？
Do you really think you can erase the past and change the future by yelling at these illusions in front of you?
我说了，你就是当时的我。
Like I said, you are the former me.
"It's the same two doors as before."
Can't we have a different scene for once?
「左边的门代表*是*，右边的门代表*否*。」
"The door on the left means 'yes,' and the one on the right means 'no.'"
「失去自由、任人摆布是件很痛苦的事，你想要逃离这样的生活吗？」
"Losing your freedom and being at the mercy of others is painful. Do you want to escape that kind of life?"
为家族服务的时候，我们过得很痛苦。
We led a miserable life when we served The Family.
虽然名叫「美梦剧团」，但美梦却从来都与我们无关。
We may be called the Sweet Dreams Troupe, but there's nothing sweet about our dreams.
现在，你选择帮助舒翁，把我们恢复成「美梦剧团」，知道这意味着什么吗？
Now that you've decided to help Siobhan and make us return to the Sweet Dreams Troupe, do you know what that means?
我们将重新过上遭人欺负的生活。没人会在乎工具的想法。
We'll lose our freedom and be at the mercy of others again. No one cares about what mere tools like us think.
拥有自由，我们才能获得幸福。
Breaking free is the only way to find happiness.
噩梦是家族的麻烦，却是我们唯一的机会。
The Nightmare may be a problem for The Family, but for us, it's our only chance to escape.
即使冒着发狂的风险，我也会在这个时候赌上全部。
Even if it drives me into a frenzy, I'm willing to risk everything at this point.
回去吧，你的职责还没有结束。
Now, go back. You haven't fulfilled your duty yet.
房卡都能弄丢，我行李还在大堂，等着运进来呢，耽误了时间谁负责！
I can't believe you lost my room card! My luggage is still in the lobby! Who's gonna take responsibility if I'm delayed!?
汪！请稍等哇，我这就去帮您处理！
Woof! Please wait a moment. I'll go and handle it for you!
稍等？等多久？收房费的时候怎么就不等了，家族催款的时候怎么就不等了？
A moment? How long is that exactly? The Family never waits when they're charging for our room or collecting money, but I have to wait!?
我现在就要见你们的负责人！立刻，马上！不过来，你们谁都别想走！
I want to see the person in charge right now! No delays, no excuses! Or there will be consequences!
汪。可是…我们的管理员，他……
哇咔咔。能不能…拜托不要告诉管理员，要不这样，我现在就飞去找前台……
Heh heh... Could we maybe... not involve the administrator? How about this? I'll go get the concierge right away...
解决起来很快的！很快的……
你在教我做事？我说要见，就得见着。带路的东西少插嘴！
Are you telling me what to do? Shut up! I want the administrator, now!
不管用什么方式，喊你们的管理员过来。否则…就等着瞧！
I don't care what you do. Just get your administrator. Or else!
Very often. Pretty much every day.
就到这里吧。该有答案了。
Let's stop here. I think you have your answer now.
「左边的门代表*是*，右边的门代表*否*。」
"The door on the left means 'yes,' and the one on the right means 'no.'"
「看完了过去的真实情景，你认为——我们应该重新变回『美梦剧团』吗？」
"Now that you have seen the real past, do you think we should return to the Sweet Dreams Troupe?"
「所谓*正常*，对我们而言只是奴役。」
"The so-called *normal life* is nothing more than just slavery for us."
「所谓*异常*，对我们而言才是自由。」
「既然没法享受『美梦』，不如彻底坠入『惊梦』。」
"If we can't enjoy the sweet dream, why not embrace the other side?"
你不是想得很清楚了么？
Don't you already have an answer?
（奇怪，我怎么又回到这地方来了？）
(Weird, why am I back here again?)
还不快去通知？打算让我等到什么时候？！
What are you waiting for? How much longer do you expect me to wait!?
…不好意思，让您久等了。我就是它们的管理者，有什么事尽管跟我谈吧。
...I apologize for keeping you waiting. I'm the administrator here, so please let me know how I can help you today.
就是你？穿得像模像样，怎么就教不出几个靠谱的工具？是脑子不好使，还是水平太差，连这些破烂废都管不住？
You're the one? You might look respectable, but you can't even teach your tools how to do things right? Are you too stupid or too incompetent to manage this junk?
给您造成了困扰，非常抱歉，鸢尾花家系愿意赔……
I apologize for all the trouble caused. The Iris Family is willing to compensate you...
赔赔赔——你赔得起吗！你们的那点工资，连一个系统时的房费都付不起，还好意思说赔偿我？
Compensate me? Can you even afford it? With your measly salary, your compensation wouldn't even cover the room bill for one system hour. And you have the nerve to talk about compensating me?
这条狗弄丢了我的房卡，我要它给我找回来，就那张，其余的都不行。
Hey, this dog lost my room card, and I want it back. Just the one that's lost, not the others.
要是它找不回来，就换你去找！我不管你是趴地上，还是到处摇尾巴求人，反正我要……
If the dog can't find it, then you do it! I don't care if you have to beg, borrow, or steal, I'm going to...
我说…我要你从匹诺康尼消失。自己爬出去，还是我安排人送你，选一个吧。
I said... I want you to disappear from Penacony. You can make yourself scarce on your own, or I can arrange for it. Your choice.
…不是，我可是家族邀请的贵宾，你敢这么对我说话？！
...Wait, I'm a guest of honor invited by The Family. How dare you talk to me like this!?
呵…贵宾，什么贵宾？告诉你吧，我不仅敢这么对你说话——还敢对你动手。

你口袋里插着的那个就是邀请函？给我看看…嗯，落款是「鸢尾花家系家主，梅芙恩」。
Oh, is that the invitation in your pocket? Let me check it... I see. It's signed by Maeven, head of the Iris Family.
梅芙恩的邀约啊，那撕掉也没关系吧？
An invitation from Maeven, huh? So it's okay if I tear it up. Don't you think?
装帧华丽的邀请函瞬间被撕成了碎屑，逐梦客的脸色也随之变得愈发苍白。

好了。现在你不是受家族邀请的贵宾了——你就是个啥都不算的废物，可以滚了吧，只会欺负小东西的*废物*？
Well, then. Now that you're no longer a guest invited by The Family, you're just a nobody and a miserable *basket case* who bullies those little guys. Now, would you kindly vacate the premises?
你…你！我要去找人告状！你就是个疯子，实在是欺人太甚！
You... you're nuts! I'm going to file a complaint! There will be consequences!
别忘了要爬着出去噢？慢走不送！

这个人是谁哇，新来的管理员？
Who's that lady? A new administrator?
呜呜呜，我也不认识，不过…不过她刚才骂那个人的样子真的好帅嘎嘎嘎嘎！
Hmm, I don't know her, but... but she looked so cool when she was scolding that bad guy! Mwahahaha!
你们是「美梦剧团」的成员吧？对这种垃圾别太客气，你越软弱，他们就越是得寸进尺。

下次记得，被欺负了及时去找你们的管理员啊。我先走啦，小家伙们。

(Is this... Siobhan before she became a drinksmith?)

"That was our first encounter with Siobhan."
你其实根本没有想好吧？

「所谓*正常*，对我们而言只是奴役。」
"The so-called *normal life* is nothing more than just slavery for us."
「所谓*异常*，对我们而言才是自由。」
还有其他值得珍惜的东西。

In an instant, the words start to tremble violently, the strokes cascading off, forming a new sentence entirely.
比「自由」更重要的东西…是「牵绊」。
What's even more important than freedom... is companionship.
Is that the answer you were hoping for?
I don't know. Well, who really knows?

按原本的设想，你永远不可能到达这个房间。因为房卡被弄丢了。

出去吧。这场思想实验已经有了结果。

I bought a new radio at the store. Want it?
你不是总说酒吧里冷冷清清的，觉得很寂寞吗？我试了试，这个挺好用，无聊的时候就听听广播呗，鸢尾花家系出品的节目，不会无聊的。

You're always saying the lounge is cold and lonely, right? Well, check this out, it really does the trick. Try listening to the radio when you're bored. The programs from the Iris Family won't leave you bored.
Woof! Thank you! I'll cherish it!
嗯…说到这个，把你捡回酒吧都过了这么久，是该给你取个名字了。

汪！我的名字是「司令」！好威风的名字，我好喜欢哇！
Woof! My name is "Mr. Bigwig"! An awesome name! I love it!

...Reporting to Mr. Bigwig! Recently, The Family sealed off the hotel in the Dreamscape. I'm planning to explore its depths again and see if there are any other Sweet Dreams Troupe members who have been abandoned like you. Requesting your instructions!

(From what I've just heard, Siobhan is planning to explore deeper into the hotel in the Dreamscape to search for the rest of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. Let's follow her.)

Hmm... what's this terrible place? I woke up and found myself here, with nobody but... *sob* monsters!
真是倒霉！霉到家了！呜，紧张就想要上厕所…可这哪有呢？
What bad luck! Oh, this is terrible! Oooh, I need a bathroom when I'm nervous... but where is it?
汪！是和我一起工作过的骰子先生哇！

五乘四再减去二，最后除以六…得到的结果是大还是小？
Five times four minus two, and then divided by six... is the result big or small?
八的平方除以四，减去四，再除以四…得到的结果是大还是小？

I... I have a little tummy ache and I need to use the bathroom.

算不出来才正常。这种小型的「美梦剧团」，本身就没有很强的思考能力，刚才的问题只是为了测试它是否有攻击性罢了，看来意识还挺清楚，没有被噩梦侵蚀太深。

It's natural if you can't handle these questions. Small-sized Sweet Dreams Troupe members don't have good computation abilities. I asked it those questions just to see if it's becoming combative, and luckily, it seems like the nightmare corruption on it's still not too deep.
不介意的话，跟我回去呗？
Would you come back with me, if you don't mind?

愿意来吗？继续留在封锁的酒店里，你会很危险，没有其他人的陪伴…你也会感到孤独。

Then... c—can I take bathroom breaks whenever I want?
哈哈哈，当然可以，你可以随时去做你想做的任何事，不用受任何人的限制，也不会再有人借着管教的名义欺负你们。我不会允许之前的情况再次发生。
Hahaha, of course you can. You can do whatever you want without any restrictions, and there won't be any bullying in the name of discipline. I won't allow what happened before to happen again.
——有兴趣就跟上来吧！我们该回家了。
...Follow up if you're interested! It's time to go home.

汪！酒吧的成员增加了哇！舒翁也给骰子先生取个名字吧！
Woof! We've got a new partner! Siobhan, let's give Mr. Dice a name, too!
哇嘎嘎！我、我想要个最响亮的名字，听着就能把人吓到腿软的那种！
Mwahaha! I... I want the coolest name you can think of, the kind that scares people just by hearing it!
以前写剧本的时候，我就特别讨厌给角色取名字，想想啊…你的骰子上印着图案，长得又很黑，干脆就叫你「黑桃」好了。
Well, I was terrible at naming characters when I wrote scripts... I see you have some spades on your die, so maybe I'll just call you "Spade"?
汪！我觉得这个名字很棒哇，很适合你！
Woof! I think it's a great name! It suits you!
咔咔？哪里适合我了！你这只…傻…傻狗！呼哈哈哈哈，傻狗！
Mwa? How does it suit me? You... you silly... silly dog! Hah hah, silly dog!
——停！说过不准在这里打架。这么有精神，来帮我布置酒吧啊。
Hey, stop! No fighting here. If you're so energetic, come help me set up the lounge.

…款式够精致，和整体的氛围也很搭，看起来终于有点酒吧的样子了。
...The design is sophisticated, and it fits well with the overall atmosphere. Finally, it's starting to look like a lounge.
是不是还缺了点什么？总感觉哪个地方不太对呢。

如果你还打算躲在这个破酒吧，陪那群怪物玩过家家游戏的话——就别怪鸢尾花家系没给你留位置！
If you're planning to keep hanging out in this shabby lounge and play house with those monsters... don't blame the Iris Family for not saving a spot for you!
你、你实在是…太不把自己的前途当回事了！
Seriously, you... you're not taking your future seriously enough!
家族的地位，还有那些鲜花和欢呼对我有什么用？艾米绮，是你陷得太深了。
The status within The Family, the superficial flowers and applauses — What can I do with any of that? You're the one who's gotten too caught up in it, Amiky.

(After completing the jigsaw, the timeline of the memory advances.)

美梦不过是随便借个名字，用幻想吹出的肥皂泡。呵！爱情皆是虚假，激情生于愚昧！
Sweet dreams are as fickle as fantasy-filled soap bubbles. Hah! Love stems from lies, and passion arises from ignorance!
你们…是特意过来欺负我的吗？

没有哇！舒翁想要帮助你！

你曾经是「美梦剧团」的成员吧，被家族抛弃在梦境酒店里了吗？

唉，我从来都是孑然一身，若是未曾抱有过期待，何来抛弃？

我在不远处开了家酒吧，在那里，不会有任何人欺负你，还能遇到和你有着相同处境的「美梦剧团」。你愿意跟我回去吗？

Are you sure... no one will bully me there?
Yes, I won't allow it, at least.

...Are you actually expecting a "yes" from me? I'm leaving. Do you want to come with me or not?
（又得到了拼图碎片…先收着吧。舒翁该带忧郁派回酒吧了。）
(Found another jigsaw piece... Let's keep it first. It's about time Siobhan brings Melancholy back to the lounge.)
I heard there was a lounge here.
汪！还是第一次有怪物找上门来哇！
Woof! This is the first time a monster actively shows up here!
是啊，我就是这家酒吧的店主。看你的模样，似乎完全没有受到噩梦的影响？
Yeah, I'm the owner of this lounge. Judging by your appearance, it seems like the nightmare hasn't affected you, right?
至少到目前，我的思想无比清晰。
At least my mind has been unclouded so far.
告诉我，你到处将这些遭到遗弃的怪物带回来，目的是什么？
Tell me, what's your purpose in bringing back these abandoned monsters?
和你没关系吧？既然你能避免梦境坍塌的影响，就赶紧离开这里，找个安全的地方待着。
It's none of your business, is it? Now that you've managed to avoid the impact of the collapsing Dreamscape, leave and find a safe place.
那为什么，你还留在梦境酒店里？
Then why are you still staying at the Dreamscape yourself?
听我说，即使你现在没有发狂的迹象，但只要是「美梦剧团」，就不可避免地会受到噩梦的侵袭，趁现在神智还清楚，早点逃到安全的地方。

Listen, even if you're not showing signs of frenzy now, as part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, the nightmare will eventually corrupt you. So leave now and find a safe place while you still have your sanity.
但同样，只要是「美梦剧团」，就没有安全的地方。
But similarly, as long as someone's part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, there's no actual safe place for them.
让我去你的酒吧里看看。
哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！是新来的朋友。听好了，在这家酒吧里，你们都得按我说的去做。
Mwahahahaha! Some new friends! Alright, listen up, in this lounge, you all do what I say.
我说啥，就得做啥。明白吗？明白了就乖乖给我…嘻嘻，刷厕所怎么样？
Whenever I give an order, you follow it, got it? Now, if you understand, be a good troupe member and... clean the toilets, what do you say?
唉，果然，最后还是要欺负我。
*sigh* I knew someone would bully me in the end.
胡说什么呢。酒吧里没有那种规矩，自在点就好。对了，还得给你们俩取名字。
Stop your nonsense. Relax, there are no such rules in this lounge. Oh, I need to give you guys names.
How about... I just call you "Melancholy"?
唉，这个名字不适合我。你们看，我既不忧郁，也不怎么会写诗。
*sigh* That name doesn't really fit me. I mean, I'm not melancholic, and I'm not poetic at all.
更何况，忧郁并非是情绪，而是与这个世界相处的态度。
Besides, melancholy encompasses more than just an emotion: It's an attitude towards the world.
汪！听听你说的话！这个名字非你莫属了哇。
Woof! You really should hear what you just said! That name suits you perfectly.
嘻嘻。莫非这就是那些宾客嘴里经常会骂的…雅痞？哇咔咔，这两个字是这么写的嘛？
Hee-hee, perhaps this is what those customers call... yuppies? Mwahaha! Y—u—p—p—i—e? Is that how it's spelled?
It's your turn now. Let me see...
Wait, I already have a name. It's Starlet.
朋友，你把大家都给整沉默了。
I... I don't even know what to say, my friend.
哈哈哈哈哈！不是吧，这么大的块头，名字却叫…小星星？这是什么奇怪的审美哈哈哈！
Hahahaha! Come on, big guy! Are you seriously called... Starlet? What kind of quirky style is that? Hahahaha!
尊重！不要嘲笑别人的名字！
Show some respect! Don't make fun of people's names!
抱歉。我没有取笑的意思，但这个实在是…太好笑了哈哈哈哈哈。
Sorry, didn't mean to poke fun, but it's just... too hilarious! Hahahahaha!
小星星…小星星，请问你会眨眼睛吗？一闪一闪，亮晶晶的那种哈哈哈哈！
Starlet... Do you twinkle, Starlet? Twinkle, twinkle, little star... Hahahaha!
Hey now, you won't like to see me mad! Roar...!!!
好了好了。我们继续来布置酒吧，既然有新成员加入，效率应该能提升不少。
Alright. Let's get back to setting up the lounge. With new members on board, we'll finish it up in no time.
麻烦忧郁派和…小星星来帮忙哈哈哈哈哈哈！
I need your help, Melancholy and... Starlet... Hahahahahaha!
（拿到了全部碎片，可以去完成拼图了。这次拼出来的会是什么呢？）
(Found all the jigsaw pieces. It's time to complete the jigsaw. Wonder what will be the complete image?)
汪！我们的酒吧建好了哇！好漂亮，好气派！！
Woof! Our lounge is all set and ready to roll! It looks so awesome and grand!!!
嘿嘿嘿嘿，是个…可以长期生活的地方了呢，我好感动！
Heh heh heh... finally, a place to call home for a good while. I'm so touched!
唉，世界上没有任何地方比得上自己的家。
*sigh* There's truly no place like home in the world.
Have you thought about our next steps?
它们留在这里，必然有一天会变得狂乱，你要怎么办？
If they stay here, they'll eventually go berserk. What will you do then?
我会想办法。或许不能彻底拯救它们，但至少…可以过着像这样快乐的生活。
I'll figure something out. Maybe there's no permanent solution, but at least... they can have a happy life like this.
受负面情绪侵袭的「美梦剧团」会变为「惊梦剧团」，继而遭到家族的全面清理。除了被封锁的梦境酒店，它们没有可以去的地方。

When the Sweet Dreams Troupe gets corrupted by negative emotions, they turn into the Dreamjolt Troupe and end up being pursued by The Family. They've got nowhere to go except this sealed hotel in the Dreamscape.
难道就始终待在酒店里，等着被消灭吗？
Will they stay in this hotel until they are wiped out?
有我守在这里，它们不会出事。
That won't happen to them, not under my watch.
…该有的物品都准备齐全了。这样站在吧台后面，是不是还挺像个酒保的？
...I've got everything I need. Don't I look like a drinksmith when I stand behind the counter?
（酒吧布置好了，但淑女和铁皮人没有出现。看来记忆回溯还要继续。）
(The lounge is all decorated, but Lady and Tin Man haven't appeared. Seems like the Memory Rewind has to continue.)
呀！好可怕，人家不想和你们约会，别缠着不放——走开，走开啦！
Gah! That's scary. I don't want to date you people! Leave me alone! Go away!
汪！我不是发狂的怪物哇！
Woof! I'm not some berserk monster!
放松，听我说…没事了，我们不会伤害你的，别紧张。
Relax and listen... It's okay now. We won't hurt you. Just take a breath.
可以把眼睛睁开了——看，在你面前的不是怪物，只是普普通通的人类哦。
Open your eyes and... see? I'm not a monster, just an ordinary human being.
你们…人家在这个像迷宫的地方走丢了，怎么都找不到路，可以领人家出去嘛？
Oh, you see... I got lost in this maze-like place and couldn't find my way out. Could you please show me the way?
汪！你说话的语气好奇怪哇，像那些客人一样！
Woof! You're talking in a weird way just like those guests do!
因为人家以前是给宾客表演节目的大明星呀，去过好多厉害的舞台呢。
Well, I used to be a superstar entertaining those guests. I've been on some amazing stages.
…明星？呵，都好久没听到这个词了。你喜欢舞台吗？
...Superstar? Heh, it's been a while since I heard that word. Did you enjoy being on stage?
喜欢！能被那么多人爱着，闪闪亮亮的，站在台上，感觉全身都发着光！多幸福呀。
Yeah, for sure! Being loved by so many guests and shining on that stage is a true blessing!
这么喜欢舞台的话，以后就叫你「大明星」好了。

汪！可是我们已经有「小星星」了哇！
Woof! But we already have a "Starlet"!
Oh, right. Let me think again.
人家…可以给自己取名叫做「淑女」嘛？我一直都好羡慕那些穿着华丽的客人们，他们的言行举止多优雅呀。
Can I... call myself "Lady"? I've always envied those guests in fabulous clothes, they're so elegant.
行啊，你想怎么称呼都可以。那我们回家咯？
Sure, you can call yourself whatever you want. So, shall we head home?
Thank you. I'll be right behind you.
什么叫暂时不对外开放，这就是你们接待客人的态度？…对我有没有那么点尊重？基本的礼仪素养都没有吗？！
What do you mean it's temporarily closed to the public? Is that how you treat your customers? ...Do you even have a smidgen of respect for your customers? Basic etiquette?
汪！酒吧里有只发狂的怪物哇！
Woof! There's a frenzied monster in the lounge!
好可怕！不是告诉人家说，酒吧里很安全的嘛？
That's scary! Didn't you say that the lounge is totally safe?
…不对。它并没有发狂，这个「美梦剧团」只是单纯地脾气坏而已。
...No, it's not frenzied. That Sweet Dreams Troupe member is just grumpy.
来酒吧当然是想找点喝的。喂，你就是这里的调饮师？快给我来一杯，要渴死了都。
A drink, of course. Are you the drinksmith here? Fetch me something! I'm dying of thirst!
…想要什么口味的，我都能给你调。
...Sure, I can make whatever you want.
——来杯微酸不苦，超级甜，尝起来清爽干净，有果香，还带点气泡的饮料！快点！
I want a drink that's slightly sour, not too bitter, super sweet, refreshing, fruity, and with a little fizz! Hurry up!
汪！我们好像没准备这么多种类的材料哇……
Woof! I don't think we have all those ingredients...
材料都不齐还敢开酒吧，搁这搞笑呢。什么破店，连个像样的饮料都调不出来。走了！
What!? How dare you open a lounge without decent ingredients? What a joke! You can't even whip up a decent drink. I'm leaving!
我能给你调出想要的饮料。在吧台旁边站会。
Well, I'll make you the drink you want. Just give me a moment.
喏。你要的饮品，绝对符合要求。
Here you go, exactly what you asked for.
话别说得太早！我曾遇见过不少像你这样的人，自信满满，有几分小聪明就以为能掌控世界，到最后，无一例外都会拜倒在我的脚边。
Don't get ahead of yourself! I've met plenty of people like you, all high and mighty, thinking they rule the world. But guess what? they all end up bowing before me.
给我尝尝，要是味道不对，你这酒吧也别想开下去了。
Fine, I'll give it a try. If it doesn't impress me, your lounge will have to shut down.
这是怎么回事，脑袋有点发晕，像是喝了很烈的酒，心情却很平静。嘿嘿，你们好啊！
Well, what's happening here? My head feels a bit dizzy, like I've had a strong drink, but somehow I'm feeling calm. Hey there, nice to meet you all!
站住，这位小姐，你是如此地美丽，可否许我……
Greetings, my lady! You're absolutely stunning. Would you mind if I...
呀！人家对你根本没兴趣！
Gah! I'm not interested in you at all!
舒翁，你就是个神奇的魔术师，到底对它做了什么哇！
You're truly a miracle worker, Siobhan! What did you do?
简单的尝试而已。我在那杯饮料里放了点能平复情绪的…特殊材料，看起来效果不错，就是剂量大了点，对付这样坏脾气的客人正合适。
It was just a little experiment. I added some... special ingredients that help calm him down. Seems like it worked pretty well on our grumpy customer, although maybe I added a bit too much.
…嗨呀，是在叫我吗？我现在的心情特好，有什么要求啊，尽管提，我都会认真考虑的！
...Oh, hey! Did you call me? I'm in a wonderful mood right now. If you need anything, just feel free to ask, and I'll seriously consider it!
从现在起，你要定期来这家酒吧，我会为你准备美味的饮料，可以接受吧？
So, from now on, you'll be a regular at this lounge, and I'll make sure to serve you delicious drinks. Sounds good?
噢。还得给你取个名字，真令人头疼啊。
Oh, and you need a name. Ugh, this is giving me a headache.
从我演过的剧本里随便挑个好了。嗯，你就叫…就叫「铁皮人」吧！看着块头很大，但有点缺心眼，不错，我决定了，很适合你嘛。
I'll just pick one from the show I used to act in. Let's go with... Tin Man! It suits a big guy like you, a bit tactless and all. Alright, that settles it.
对，要记住了，这就是你的名字。以后我，还有酒吧里的怪物们都会这么称呼你。
Yeah, that's your name. Don't forget it, because that's what all the monsters and I will call you at the lounge.
因为名字啊，是最初的牵绊。
Because names, you know, they form our initial bond.
汪！舒翁…过来，过来这边哇！
哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！有个惊喜，有个惊喜！嘿…可别感动到满地掉小珍珠了哦。
Mwahahaha! We've got a surprise for you! Heh... just don't get all teary-eyed with joy and start sprinkling tears everywhere.
...Why all the secrecy? What's the surprise all about?
嘻嘻，是人家专门为你准备的礼物呀。
Hee-hee, it's a special gift we've prepared just for you.
越是出自真心，话儿便越难说得动听！
The more heartfelt the words, the harder they are to say out loud!
舒翁，最后的步骤就交给你来完成。
Siobhan, I'll leave the final steps to you.
不，现场还有更合适的人选。对吧，新来的调饮师？
No, there are more suitable people available. Right, newly-minted drinksmith?
（咦，这里的舒翁原来…看得到我？！）
(Eh? The version of Siobhan here... can actually see me!?)
——庆祝酒吧终于要开始营业了哇！
...Time to celebrate the grand opening of our lounge!
…说是正式营业，可这地方哪有客人呀。除了你们几个，不会再有宾客光顾了。
...Yeah, it's the grand opening, but I don't think there'll be any other customers coming here, except for you guys.
汪！那也值得好好庆祝哇！我刚到的时候，这里还什么都没有呢！
Woof! Even so, it's still worth celebrating! When I first arrived, there was practically nothing!
现在设施都布置好了，还找到了这么多好朋友哇！
Now everything is set up, and we've made so many friends!
从现在起，这家酒吧就叫做「惊梦酒吧」。
From now on, this lounge will be called Dreamjolt Hostelry.
它属于每一个无法享受美梦的成员，我们不被外面的世界接受，因此才聚在这里。
It's a place for all those who can't enjoy sweet dreams. We're not accepted by the outside world, so we've gathered here.
We are... each other's sweet dreams.
最近这片梦境不太稳定，酒店里有不少发狂的怪物。乖乖跟在我后面，别到处乱跑。
The Dreamscape has been unstable lately, and there are quite a few berserk monsters in the hotel. Be a good boy and stick with me.
Woof! Sure, I'll be a good boy!
汪！前面好像听到了说话的声音哇！
Woof! I think I hear voices up ahead!
随着梦境逐渐坍塌，仍然能保持理智的「美梦剧团」已经不多了。
The Dreamscape is collapsing, and there aren't many Sweet Dreams Troupe members who can keep their sanity.
走吧。我们去更深的地方看看。
Come on. Let's go deeper into the area.
汪！舒翁…你的声音听起来好疲惫哇。
（这时候的舒翁…确实看起来很累的样子。）
(I should be nearing the end soon.)
(This is... the Dreamjolt Hostelry from the past?)
（和现在的布置有明显差别，也没见到那些怪物们。）
(The furnishing is very different from how it looks now, and the monsters are nowhere in sight.)
(Oh? Siobhan and Mr. Bigwig are over there.)
（这个需求…好像没法在饮品单里完成。）
(I don't think... I can fulfill this request in the drink menu.)
Attempt to do a flair with the glasses.
啪嗒…玻璃杯在地面摔得粉碎，看来你的技巧锻炼得还不够。
*crash*... The glass shatters to pieces on the ground. Looks like your skills could use some work.
（听到了不少黑桃的内心想法，它应该对我比较信任了吧？）
(I just heard a bunch of Spade's thoughts. I guess he must trust me more now.)
咕噜咕噜咕，噜咕噜咕噜。骰子摇晃，命运奏响！
*shake, shake* The dice roll as fate plays its tune!
见鬼，怎么还是你？哇嘎嘎嘎嘎嘎，你到底欠了多少钱啊，签了卖身契还是保证书，非要把这家酒吧经营到再次伟大？听我的，别费那个心！

Dang, it's you again. Wahaha, how much money do you owe? Did you sign a contract or a letter of guarantee that you're gonna work this lounge until it's back to its former glory? Listen here, just forget about it!
有这时间干嘛不好？来跟我玩把骰子，试试手气，碰碰运气！
Why not enjoy this time? Let's play dice. Come on, test your luck!
要开咯。买大买小？买大买小？庄家做主，全部投注，输了要补，赢了不付！
Let's get started. Are you going big or small? Big or small? The dealer calls the shots, and all bets are in. Lose, and you've got to pay. Win, and you don't!
你确定要选大的？大的大的大的…噢，我想起来了，肯定是大的！
You sure you want to choose big? Big, big, big... Oh, Now that I think of it, I bet it's gonna be big!
因为小点数全都被我抠掉了——它们坐起来实在不舒服，总让我想上厕所……
Because all the small numbers have been scratched off by me. They were not comfortable to sit on, always making me want to rush to the bathroom...
那就大的咯？不改咯？…再不说话就开咯？
So, you're going big? Not gonna change...? Speak now or forever hold your peace.
好嘞！拭目以待！究竟是小还是小，小还是小呢……
Yeah! I'm on the edge of my seat! Is it small or is it small...
——噼啪！荷官为你表演了一段踢踏舞，骰子转动随脚步的变换越来越快，当你终于跟上节奏摇晃起身体时，它却骤然停住了。

*crack* The dealer starts to tap dance for you, and the dice roll faster and faster, keeping in time with the performance. Just as your body catches the rhythm and starts to sway, the dance ends abruptly.
你清楚看见骰子的每一面都是一点。
You can see plain as day that each side of the dice has a single dot.
果然是小！哎呀，都怪我，抠的时候力气大了点，抠成了个坑！哈哈哈！
It was small, just as I expected! Ack, it's my fault. I put in too much force when digging into the dice. Looks like I made a pit instead! Hahaha!
你确定要选小的？小的小的小的…噢，我当然同意，就该是小的！
Sure you want small? Small, small, small... Oh, yes, I agree. It should be small.
大的多不好，坑坑洼洼，散步容易摔倒，数起来也麻烦，这年头大家都喜欢省心的游戏，不看也能玩，全自动，没毛病！

Those big numbers come with all those holes. How annoying! They fall over easily while walking, and counting them up is such a pain. These days, everyone likes playing games where you don't have to think. They like games you can play without looking because they just run themselves without any problems!
那就小的咯？不改咯？不用想，肯定能赢！
So, you are choosing small? Not gonna change? No need to think about it. You've got this round in the bag!
好嘞！万众瞩目！到底是大还是大，大还是大呢……
Alright. All eyes are on the table! Is it big, or is it big...?
——噼啪！荷官为你表演了一段踢踏舞，骰子转动随脚步的变换越来越快，当你的视线逐渐变得模糊时，它却忽然疯狂挥拳捶击起表面来。

*crack* The dealer starts to tap dance for you, and the dice roll faster and faster, keeping in time with the performance. When your vision gradually becomes blurred, the dealer suddenly starts striking the surface wildly.
你清楚看见骰子的每一面都被砸出了规规整整的六个深坑。
You can clearly see that each side of the dice has six deep, neat holes punched into it.
啦欧啦欧啦欧啦欧…呼，累死了，好久没干过这种重体力活了。
Huff... huff... That was exhausting. It has been a long time since I've done such intense physical labor.
果然是大！我的制作工艺还不错吧，保证挑不出毛病！哇咔咔咔咔！
Ah, it's big! My craftsmanship is pretty good, huh? I guarantee you can't find a single flaw! Hahaha!
...I'm sorry to say that you lost.
不过没关系！因为我现在很无聊哇哈哈！就是特累！
But that's okay. I'm bored now. I'm feeling super worn out!
快给我来杯饮料吧。要…要那个…<color=#dbc291ff>小杯，口味强烈的</color>，能让人瞬间精神的口味！各位玩家，运动后要记得补充电解质哦。

Give me a drink, quick. I want... that... <color=#dbc291ff>drink that's in a small glass and has a strong taste</color> — a taste that rejuvenates my spirit instantly! Players, remember to replenish your electrolytes after exercise.
呜呜呜呜呜，我叫你一声{F#姐}{M#哥}，能别再给我喝这种玩意了嘛？
*sob* Can I ask you not to give me this kind of stuff to drink again, {F#sister}{M#brother}?
说到这个，又想起了我的伤心事。呜呜，你知道吗，我曾经也是个乖孩子，约好要投大就绝对不会小的那种。直到…直到…我被安排来酒店工作。

Speaking of which, I just thought of something very sad again. *sob* I once was a good kid, you know? The kind who literally couldn't have gone small if he said he was going to go big. That was true up until... until... I was assigned to work at the hotel.
这儿的环境可真糟糕，空间窄空气闷还不让随便上厕所，可把我给憋坏了，呃…我是说心里头憋。那群穿黑西装的整天看着，休息时间都不给！

The environment here is just the worst. The air is so stuffy, and they won't even let me go to the bathroom when I want. They're suffocating me. Oh... I mean emotionally suffocating. Those people in black suits are always watching. They never give me time to rest!
转着转着，我就忘了该投出的点数是大还是小了…实话说，大小真有那么重要吗？

…重要吗？不重要吗？明明是客人玩牌，咋还想让我耍诈呢？
...Does it matter or not? Clearly, the guests are the ones playing, and yet you want me to cheat?

Remember: I don't care who you think you are. As long as you are behind that dilapidated lounge and have those dirty glasses next to you, then you better listen to me and do what I want. I'm the one paying you, got it?
听懂了就赶紧去调你的饮料，少在这装模作样，别让我想起那个蠢货。

即使算上那时候，你调出来的饮料也是最难喝的。更要命的是……

...Hello, there? My friend told me there's a new drinksmith here. That must be you, right?

Hee-hee, just as I thought, you seem like a fascinating person to chat with.
呀！没想到您还记得，看来您不仅在调饮方面非常厉害，心思也相当地温柔细腻呢。
Oh! I didn't expect you to remember me! So, not only are you a skilled drinksmith, but you also have a tender and delicate soul.
既然如此，人家再悄咪咪地问句…刚才，是有位非常忧郁的客人来过吗？
In that case, let me ask you a secret question... Did a melancholy customer just leave?
果然！我就知道，时间掐的真准。还好没有正面碰上…呼。
I knew it! Oh, my timing is perfect. Thankfully, I'm not running into him head-on... Phew.
想必你们聊得很开心吧，不觉得那位的气质很特别吗？就是那种…疏离感，若即若离的氛围，才华横溢的孤独，实在太迷人了！
You had a nice chat, right? Don't you find his demeanor special? I mean, the kind of... detachment and iffy vibe! The kind of solitude you'd expect from a genius! It's just fascinating!
忧郁只是表象啦，您不觉得那位的气质很特别吗？就是那种…疏离感，若即若离的氛围，才华横溢的孤独，实在太迷人了！
I'm not talking about his looks. Don't you find his demeanor special? I mean, the kind of... detachment and iffy vibe! The kind of solitude you'd expect from a genius! It's just fascinating!
咳咳。跟您说这些，人家都害羞得有点面红耳燥了，请替我调杯饮料吧。
Ahem... talking about this topic makes me feel all flushed. Please make me a drink.
唔，就点这个<color=#dbc291ff>橡皮糖</color>，想喝点冰块多的，好让人家内部的显像管降降温。
Hmm. I'll just order this <color=#dbc291ff>Chewing Gum</color>, with a little more ice, so I can cool down my internal cathode-ray tubes.
(...Alright, I should add some more ice cubes.)
令人心动的味道。轻易就掌握住了人家的喜好，您果然是位经验丰富的老手呢！
A tantalizing taste, indeed. You must be a seasoned drinksmith who can easily grasp your customers' preferences!
呐呐。您才刚来这不久，不知道有没有注意到…这家酒吧外面，不是很太平？
By the way, you've only been here for a short while. I wonder if you've noticed that... things aren't very peaceful outside the lounge?
人家最近也正发愁呢，黑暗的梦境酒店里，总感觉有些什么吓人的东西在蠢蠢欲动，可想找个安静的地方走走，就只能去那儿呀。
It worries me, too. I've always felt something creepy lurking deep within the hotel in the Dreamscape, but if I want a quiet place, there's not much of an alternative.
…都没有什么僻静的，可以用来约会的地方，好苦恼。
...It's so frustrating. I can't find a good spot for a date.
Why not have your date right here in the lounge?
当然不行！这儿的熟人可太多了，还随时会有顾客闯进来。太难为情了！
No way! There are too many acquaintances here, and customers could walk in any minute. It's too embarrassing!
How about in the Golden Hour?
咦，您不知道吗？在正门附近有那群穿黑西装的人把守，我们都没法离开这里。
Oh, you don't know? A bunch of guys in black suits are guarding the front gate, and we can't step out of this place.
思来想去，还是只有酒店深处的最适合了…稍微走远点，应该不会有事吧？
After some thoughts, the depths of this hotel seem like the best option... as long as I don't go too far, right?
Who's the lucky person you're dating?
嘻嘻，这是秘密。要是人家再和您更加亲近点的话，说不定就全说出来了呢。
Hee-hee, it's a secret. However, if we get to know each other better, I might spill the beans.
Are you going to ask me out on a date?
嘻嘻，人家和您可才刚认识，不能进展这么快的啦。
Hehe, I'd love to, but let's not rush things. We've just met, after all.
嘻嘻，您这是想打听舒翁的感情状况吗？
Heh, trying to peer into Siobhan's love life, huh?
舒翁这么有魅力，性格也温柔，想和她约会的人可多了，人家当然有兴趣。但邀约过好几次，都被拒绝了，就只能转移目标了呀。
Siobhan is so attractive and kind, and everyone wants to date her. I was interested too and asked her out a few times, but got rejected. So, I had to find someone else.
哎，人家发现了，您就喜欢打听这些说出来会害羞的事， 弄得人家都有些过热了。
Well, it seems you enjoy discussing embarrassing topics. It's making me a bit flustered, to be honest.

小、小点声！闹这么大动静，让它发现了怎么办！

它刚才也问过类似的问题。
She asked a similar question just now.
我跟着它走到这家酒吧门口，又亲眼看着它从里面出来，所以别想蒙混过关。它都跟你聊了些什么，有没有提到我的名字？
I followed her right to the door of this lounge and watched her come out, so don't try to fool me. What did she talk to you about? And did she mention my name?
它提到了那个忧郁的客人。
我就知道，我就知道！它还是对那个该死的诗人念念不忘！恶心的文艺腔就这么迷人，让它一直牵挂到现在？
I knew it, I knew it! She just can't get enough of that blasted poet! Is his pretentious literary accent so fascinating that she's still holding onto it?
正常。在这的怪物就没有不喜欢舒翁的，当然不包括我。哼，我根本不怕她。

Well, forget it. It's not worth getting worked up about such nonsense! Just do your job and get me a drink.
要<color=#dbc291ff>大杯的，有点苦味的，颜色好看的</color>。你懂什么叫好看吗？就是<color=#dbc291ff>层次给我分的清楚点</color>，别浑浊得像杯脏水！

I want something in a <color=#dbc291ff>large glass that is a little bitter and with pretty colors</color>. You know what "pretty" means? It means to <color=#dbc291ff>separate the layers more clearly</color>. Don't make it all cloudy like dishwashing water!
（…它还是这么坚持要颜色分层啊。）

哈！——这还差不多，能让我满意的人没几个，我算是对你稍微有点好印象了。
Ha! That's more like it! Not many people can satisfy me. Now, I'm slightly impressed with you.
嘿嘿，又想起来个事。上次我来店里的时候，你是不是还对我无礼来着？
Oh, hey, I just remembered something. Were you rude to me the last time I came here?
我是不是…说过要教训教训你？
And did I say... I'd teach you a lesson?
(Get ready to pull out your baseball bat.)
别激动。我回去后仔细想了想，那时候是我不对，说话冲了点，产生了些误会哈。
Hey, chill out. I thought about it, and I realized I was a bit too aggressive, and there might be some kind of misunderstanding.
我向你道歉，希望修复我们之间的关系。所以你看，下次那位红色客人来的时候，能不能帮我说点好话？不用夸奖，多提提我的名字就好！
I apologize for that, and I hope we can be on better terms. So you see, next time that guest comes around, could you put in a good word for me? No need for flattery. Just mention my name more often!
这点小要求，你应该不会拒绝吧？
You'll do me this small favor, won't you?
Well, it depends on my mood.
想清楚点，这件事对你也有好处。你要是让我开心，我就会常来光顾这家酒吧，你也能拿到更多小费。

当然有。你要是让我开心，我就会常来光顾这家酒吧，你也能拿到更多小费。
You see, if you make me happy, I'll drop by more often, and you'll receive more tips.
很棒的提议，对吧？你收钱，我享受服务，双方都有得赚。
A great deal, isn't it? You get paid, and I get served. A win-win situation for both of us.
在这个破烂的酒吧里，谁都得听我的，整天调饮料有什么前途，要是选择站在我这边，我保你后面能过得顺心！
Everyone in this lousy lounge takes orders from me! What's the point of mixing drinks all the time? Stay on my side, and I'll ensure you a happy life!
没有人能拒绝我的建议。因为我总是对的。

<size=28>...You! You have no idea what's good for you!</size>

（它对我的态度还是这么蛮横啊。）

（不过从聊天里知道了不少铁皮人的事，它应该愿意跟我说说心里话了吧？）

Record information about the Tin Man.

那言语的价值是什么？我们拼命发出自己的声音，只是徒劳吗？

陌生的调饮师，你能给我答案吗？
Tell me, strange drinksmith. Do you hold an answer?
No, I don't. And stop asking.
唉，明知那扇门已经对我紧紧闭上，却还总是忍不住地去敲。
*Sigh* I can't help but knock on the door I know is closed to me.
很多事本来就是徒劳无功的。

唉，追寻这种问题的答案，就像在车站等一艘不会到来的船，永远得不到结果。
*sigh* Seeking answers to such questions is akin to waiting at a station for a ship that will never arrive.
算了，没什么好说的，还是喝饮料吧。只有那温润的液体，能给予我痛苦的心灵以些许慰藉。
Let it go. Let's simply have a drink. Only the warmth of that liquid can offer solace to my tormented soul.
请给我<color=#dbc291ff>小杯装的眼泪，此刻我只想安静品尝生活带给我的强烈苦涩。</color>
Please give me a <color=#dbc291ff>small glass of tears. I just wish to quietly savor the intense bitterness that life has brought me</color>.
要是你手头碰巧…我是说碰巧，有什么饰品，<color=#dbc291ff>能让我回想起剧院里的那些观众，</color>就放上去吧，我想看。谢谢。
If you happen to... and I do mean happen to have some decorations <color=#dbc291ff>that can remind me of the audience back at the theater</color>, please put it on. I'd like to see it. Thank you.
（能代表匹诺康尼观众的装饰物…我得仔细去挑选下。）
(A decoration that represents Penacony... I'll have to pick one carefully.)
令人赞叹的杰作！看啊，你的双手是何等地神奇，轻易便能抚平我内心的创伤！
A wondrous masterpiece! Your hands possess an enchanting touch, effortlessly mending the wounds within me!
唉。热烈的情感转瞬即逝，玻璃杯已然见底，而我内心的空洞仍未填满。
*sigh* Passionate emotions are transient. The glass is empty, yet the void in my heart remains unfilled.
好在，这杯迷人的饮料让我与你相识了。
Thankfully, this delightful drink has made us acquaintances.
你知道吗，来到这家酒吧前，我只是个落魄的戏剧演员，扮演过无数不知名的小角色，始终郁郁不得志。没有方向，没有收入，没有自我。
You know, before I came to this lounge, I was a struggling actor relegated to countless minor roles, plagued by desolation. No direction, no income, and no self-esteem.
我这一生，尽是遗憾，你说我还能获得幸福吗？
Regrets have permeated my life. Do you think I can still discover happiness?
If you have to get an answer, then it's "no."
唉，你道出了生活的真相。提出问题前，询问者的心中通常都已有了答案。
*Sigh* You've spoken truthfully about life. More often than not, the questioner already holds an answer in mind before asking the question.
唉，你问得好，繁华皆是表象，其后的狼藉与痛楚从不为世人所知晓。
*sigh* A piercing question, indeed. Happiness is but a facade, with the world oblivious to the pain and suffering concealed beneath.
我就是个活在戏里的角色，从来只会模仿别人的话语，改不掉，也丢不了。
I'm like a character in a play, confined to mimicking the words of others. I can't change the situation or myself.
过去不断追赶着我，可怖的梦魇始终萦绕着我，尽管找到了这处乐园，我心中的悲伤也从来没有减少分毫。那不是简单几杯饮料就能消除的痛楚，而是……
The past continues to haunt me. Even in this paradise, the dreadful nightmare persists, and the sadness within me never fades. It's not something a few drinks can wash away, but...
唉，未经允许就向旁人揭露自己的伤疤是很失礼的事情。适当地表露悲伤，适当地感到喜悦，适当地接受离别，这对彼此都好。
*sigh* It's impolite to expose my wounds without permission. It's better to share sorrows, experience joys, and bid farewell appropriately.
还是先点单吧。请给我<color=#dbc291ff>一大杯越浓稠越好的饮料，味道稍微刺激点。最重要的——再来点爱，谢谢。</color>

Better make an order first. Please give me something in <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass, as thick as you can make it, and tastes a little intense. Most importantly — a little more love, please</color>.
我曾疯狂地迷恋戏剧，那是由缤纷华服与妆饰共同构造起的幻梦。
Once, I was fervently obsessed with plays, dreams woven from vibrant costumes and make-up.
可惜，我的爱早已遗失在了过去。
Unfortunately, my love became lost in the past.
（…按它的习惯，应该是指放个跟动画角色有关的装饰物上去吧？）
(...Based on its habits, it probably means it wants a decoration related to cartoon characters?)
这是何等地不幸。世界以痛吻我，还要我付小费！
How unfortunate. The world kisses me with pain yet expects a tip in return!

(...Based on its habits, it probably means it wants a decoration related to cartoon characters?)
时间啊，在此停驻吧！这杯饮料实在太过美妙，我将用一生去回味。
O, time! Cease your march! This drink is so exquisite, and I yearn to savor its flavor for the remainder of my days.
即使心头被愁云笼罩，你的善意与调饮技巧仍旧给我留下了极深的印象。
Despite the sorrow clouding my heart, your kindness and drink-mixing mastery have deeply impressed me.
唉，就很郁闷，离别总是让人感伤，但请…不要后悔和我的相遇。
*sigh* Farewells always carry a tinge of bitterness, but please... do not lament our encounter.
并非是我所点的味道。唉，就连尝到如愿的饮料，对现今的我而言也是遥不可及吗？
This is not the flavor I ordered. *sigh* Is it too much to even ask for a drink that quenches my thirst?
即使心头被愁云笼罩，你的善意与调饮技巧仍旧给我留下了极深的印象。

*sigh* Farewells always carry a tinge of bitterness, but please... do not lament our encounter.
You're not here to see me, are you?
嘻嘻，何必这么较真呢。您都做了这么长时间调饮师，应该很清楚，心里话呀，还是不说出来为妙。
Hee-hee, why so serious? You've been a drinksmith for quite a while, and I'm sure you know better than to speak your mind.
其实，人家过来找您，是听说了件非常有意思的事，想和您分享。
Well, I came to see you because I heard something interesting and wanted to share it.
要是没兴趣的话，那就算了吧。
Well, if you're not interested, then forget it.
真的不想听？人家准备直接回去了哦。
You really don't want to hear it? Fine. I'll just head home.
没什么意思，还是算了吧。
No, I don't. Let's just forget it.
哎，可人家偏偏想要讲给您听，倾听客人的话不是调饮师的职责嘛，懈怠工作的话，人家要去向舒翁告状了。
Even so, I still want to tell you. Isn't it part of a drinksmith's job to listen to your customers? If you slack off, I might have to file a complaint with Siobhan.
Alright. I don't want to risk losing my job.
嘻嘻，还是上钩了。不过现在有些渴了，烦请您先给人家调杯饮料吧。
Hee-hee, great! But I'm feeling a bit thirsty now. Could you make me a drink first?
唔，这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>松弛感，清清爽爽的，是我喜欢的类型哦。可别加太多冰，</color>人家最近身体很虚。
Mm, this time, I want a <color=#dbc291ff>uplifting and refreshing drink that I like. Don't add too much ice</color>. I've been feeling under the weather recently.
（记得以前都会要超多冰的，是因为没聊到害羞的话题，不需要降温了嘛？）
(I remember she used to ask for a lot of ice cubes. So, she doesn't need ice cubes this time because she hasn't brought up any embarrassing topics?)
味道真好，您还是这么懂人家的心。真希望您能永远在这里工作呀，永远都在人家身边。
This tastes amazing! You still understand me so well. If only you could stay here forever, by my side.
好啦，喝完调制的饮料，也该把那件好玩的事告诉您了，就是呀——
Well, now that I've finished my drink, it's time to share that interesting story with you...
人家呢，偶然间得知了舒翁的秘密。
Actually, I stumbled upon Siobhan's secret by chance.
嘻嘻，当然是所有人都会感兴趣的那种秘密啦。
Hee-hee, the kind of secret that would pique anyone's interest, of course.
人家不是打算在梦境酒店里逛逛嘛，就在不久前，来酒吧的路上，碰见了个打扮很漂亮的女孩子，看来看去的不知道在找什么。
I was wandering around the hotel in the Dreamscape when I spotted a gorgeously dressed lady searching for something.
在这里遇见外面的客人可是稀罕事，所以人家就多跟了段时间。然后呀，就听见那个女孩子嘴里念念有词，好像是说——
It's rare to come across an outsider in this place, so I followed her for a while. Then, I overheard her murmuring something like...
想约舒翁出门去玩，可舒翁拒绝了她好多次，躲在这不肯走，她就直接找上门来啦。
She wanted to hang out with Siobhan but had been turned down multiple times. So, she decided to come straight to the lounge.
还说什么…现在的舒翁肯定会答应她，感觉像是认识了很长时间呢。
She even said... Siobhan would definitely accept her offer this time... It's as if they've known each other for ages.
假设您就是这位当事人的话，还会继续联系对方嘛？
If you were in that lady's shoes, would you keep trying to contact Siobhan?
I wouldn't give up until I got what I wanted!
就喜欢您这样的气势！人家也要朝这个方向继续努力！
That's what I like about you! I should have the same attitude!
呀！听着就很难受。虽然您这么说…可心里头的想法哪有这么容易压下去呀。
Ohh, that's tough. Even if you say that... it's not easy to suppress what's on your mind.
…跟您说这个，是因为人家也藏着不少秘密，犹豫要不要讲出来。
...I'm sharing this with you because I'm also holding onto many secrets, and I'm hesitant to reveal them.
但又是胆怯，又是难为情的，很多话到嘴边，好几次都硬生生咽回去了。唉。
But then again, I'm too timid, and those words get stuck in my throat, and swallowed back. *sigh*
到底要不要把那位约出来，大胆表明自己的心意呢……
Should I ask him out and boldly express my feelings to him...
Seize the chance while you have it!
Hmm, but it's not that simple...
还是麻烦您调杯饮料吧，想要<color=#dbc291ff>小杯，微微苦的，味道要特别特别柔和，稍微放些冰块就好。</color>就像人家现在的心情，烦闷呀。

I'd like to bother you to make a drink that is <color=#dbc291ff>very slightly bitter in a small glass, and it has to taste really mellow. Just a little ice will do</color>. Just like my current mood: Upset.
（…它在烦恼的，应该是和忧郁派相关的事吧？）
(...Is she worrying about something related to Melancholy?)
是手抖放错材料了吗？按我对您技术的了解，不应该会出这么明显的纰漏呀。
Did you accidentally use the wrong ingredients? I didn't expect you to make such an obvious mistake.

Fantastic! This drink is exactly what I wanted! You truly understand me the best.
和您聊过后，感觉心里舒服了不少。看来您谈话的本事，和调饮的技巧一样高明呢。
Talking to you has made me feel much better. It seems your talent for conversation matches your skill in mixing drinks.
要是人家在面对那位的时候，也像您这样能说会道就好了。
If only I could chat with him as effortlessly as you do.
…不管怎么样，还是要采取行动！回去就想办法，要等人家的好消息呀！
...Nevertheless, I must take action! I'll come up with a plan! Wait for my good news!
呃…是不是人家刚才讲的烦心事影响您的状态了，这杯饮料不像是您的正常水准呀。
Um... did my problem bother you? This drink doesn't quite match your usual standards.
和您聊过后，感觉心里舒服了不少。看来您谈话天的本事，和调饮的技巧一样高明呢。

（没有其他客人过来，好像有点累了…就到这吧。）
(No other customers now. I'm a bit tired... Let's call it a day.)
怎么好像有人对我哈气…
Did someone just breathe on me...?
怎么回事，居然是个真人。我还以为舒翁放了个调饮工具在这里。
What's happening? A real person here? I thought Siobhan put a drink mixer here.
...Do I look like a drink mixer to you?
Are you trying to start a fight?
梦里连会说话的广告牌都有，谁知道你是不是真人。
You can even find talking billboards in the Dreamscape. Who knows if you're a real person or not?
整天闹哄哄的骰子，还有个傻不啦叽的闹钟。会动的物件看多了，渐渐也就分不清了。
There's a noisy dice and a stupid alarm clock. Once you've seen too many animated objects, you'll struggle to tell them apart from real people.
所以你到底是来干嘛的？
当然是来喝饮料。舒翁没和你讲过么？
Drinks, of course. Didn't Siobhan tell you?
给我来杯<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>。既然打算在这做调饮师，就先让我看看你的水平。
Give me a glass of <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Since you want to be a drinksmith here, let's see what you're made of.
你在酒吧里的地位很高啊？
You're a big shot at the lounge, I guess?
我们没有地位差别。但通常我会负责照顾它们。
There's no status difference here, but it's true that I usually take care of the others.
我不需要得到你的认可吧？
I don't think I need your approval, do I?
不需要。但我想赶你走，方法有很多。
No, you don't, but if I want to get rid of you, I have many ways to do that.
I want a glass of <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Don't forget.
（…它始终话里有话，舒翁没说过小星星这么难相处啊。）
(...His words always imply something. Siobhan never mentioned that Starlet could be so difficult to get along with.)
算你做的不错，舒翁找来替班的人确实还有点本事。
Not bad at all. Now I see Siobhan did find someone decent to take her place.
舒翁和你交代了些什么，要好好修复我们？
What did Siobhan tell you? To fix us up?
你在这工作也有段时间了，是怎么看待这些怪物的？
You've been working here for a while. So, what do you think of those monsters?
Is that what you really think?
Do you expect me to believe that?
They're all pretty close... family members?
「家人」这个词的份量很重，不要随便使用。
The word "family" carries a lot of weight. Don't throw it around lightly.
Do you expect me to believe that?
你是不是把自己排除出去了。
我很清楚自己是什么，不需要你来提醒。
I know exactly what I am, and I don't need you to remind me.
「模样很新鲜，性格有些奇怪，都有各自的情绪问题，但习惯了也挺可爱的。」
"They look pretty unique. Although they're a bit eccentric and have their own emotional problems, they can be quite adorable once you get used to them."
Is that what you are thinking now?
我说什么你都不会相信吧。
You won't believe anything I say anyway.
算了。问你也得不到答案，人类都很会撒谎，说的话不能算数。
Forget it. You wouldn't give an answer even if I asked. Humans are all good at lying, and their words don't hold any water.
...You were the one who asked first, right?
I just don't understand what you want.
再给我杯饮料。<color=#dbc291ff>要超大杯，梦幻风格的，口感浓厚</color>的那种。这个要求觉得困难么？
Make me another drink. <color=#dbc291ff>In an extra large glass, dreamy, with a thick texture</color>. Is this request too difficult for you?
（感觉它不是光顾酒吧的客人，更像是…来试探我的？）
(Feels like he's not just here for a drink, but more like... testing me?)
自己瞧瞧，这是能喝的饮料吗？果然不该对你有太多期待，早点回去吧。
See for yourself. Is this even drinkable? I shouldn't have expected too much from you. Let's call it a night.
舒翁和你交代了些什么，要好好修复我们？
What did Siobhan tell you? To fix us up?
