这里叫做「惊梦酒吧」，因为客人们都是「惊梦剧团」的成员。
This place is called Dreamjolt Hostelry, because all the guests here are members of the Dreamjolt Troupe.
「美梦剧团」你应该见过？街头跑来跑去的广告牌，自动弹奏的乐器，还有那对大得出奇的眼睛，梦境里，这样拥有自我意识的物件到处都是。

You've seen the Sweet Dreams Troupe, right? Those billboards that run around the streets, the musical instruments that play automatically, and those surprisingly large eyes. In the Dreamscape, objects with self-awareness like that are everywhere.
那些怪物原本都是「美梦剧团」，工作认真，训练有素，服从家族的管理，为来往宾客提供消遣和服务。对，都是乖孩子。

All those monsters used to be part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe — hard-working, well-trained, and obedient to The Family, providing amusement and service to the guests. Yeah, they were all good children.
直到…噩梦的侵袭，把它们变成了怪物。就是你现在看到的样子。疯疯癫癫，胡言乱语。
Until... the nightmare struck and turned them into monsters. The form that you now see, insane and babbling.
Is there a solution to this?
就是你现在正在做的事，调制合适的饮料，聆听客人的想法，安抚它们的情绪。
The solution is what you're doing now — making the right drinks, listening to your guests' thoughts, and calming them down.
你可真会说话，就是这么把那群孩子骗得服服帖帖的？别多想，是在夸你呢。
You're quite a smooth talker. Is this how you tricked those children? Oh, don't get me wrong. It's a compliment.
在成为酒吧的调饮师前，我曾经是「美梦剧团」的管理员。说是管理者，但我始终把那些孩子当家人在看待。所以，看到它们变成这样，我很痛心。

Before becoming a drinksmith, I used to be the administrator of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. My title might have been their administrator, but I treated them like my own family. That's why it hurts me to see them in this state.
我守在这，希望能帮到它们…变得正常点，能重新得到人们的认可，过上开心的生活。
So, I decided to stay here, hoping that I could help them... get a bit normal again. That they can regain recognition from the people and have happy lives.
但这个过程实在太漫长了。即使暂时解决了怪物的情绪问题，噩梦仍然会再度袭来，周而复始，没有尽头。
But the process was too long. Even with the monsters' emotional issues temporarily placated, the nightmares will still return time and time again, with no end in sight.
And I'm starting to... feel tired.
...So, that's why you asked me for help?
没有彻底的解决办法吗？
Can't we resolve this problem once and for all?
Well... I'm getting a bit sleepy.
这次的故事就到这，后面有机会再讲吧。
That's all for now. I'll tell you more later when a chance arises.
用来采撷灵感的氛围已经足够，请——给我调份<color=#dbc291ff>怀旧风格，超大杯，带着微微甜，味道又特别强烈</color>的饮料吧。

I have enough atmosphere to generate inspiration now. Please, make me a drink that brings feelings of <color=#dbc291ff>nostalgia, in an extra large glass, and is slightly sweet. Its taste should be particularly strong</color>!
…味道非常棒。除了加拉赫外，你是我见过的人里面学习调饮最快的了，真不打算在这家酒吧长期干下去？
...It tastes great. Besides Gallagher, you're the fastest learner I've ever met when it comes to mixing drinks. Are you really not planning on working at this lounge for a long time?
饮品无论好坏，代表的都是当下最真实的想法，对面前这位客人的理解，以及你打算如何回应对方的信任，看似简单，里面蕴含的东西可多着呢。

Drinks, whether they taste great or terrible, reflect your most genuine thoughts at this moment, how you understand the guest before you, and how you intend to respond to their trust. This might seem simple, but it's so much more than that.
...Oh, there's something else I need to tell you.
尽管在家族看来，「美梦剧团」只是供宾客娱乐的道具，但对它们感兴趣的人不在少数。跟我打过招呼，来酒吧光顾的也有好几个。

Even though The Family treats the Sweet Dreams Troupe as mere props for the guests' entertainment, there are quite a few people who take a genuine interest in them. Some have even told me about it and become regulars at the lounge.
你要是有兴趣，也可以邀请信任的朋友过来玩。
If you're interested, you can also invite your trusted friends here.
梦境酒店不是被家族封锁了？
But isn't the hotel in the Dreamscape sealed off by The Family?
说是我的客人就行，家族的守卫不会拦你。不过是群服从命令的猎犬罢了，别太给他们面子。
Just tell them you're my guest, and The Family's guards won't stop you. They're merely obedient Bloodhounds following orders. Don't take them too seriously.
把怪物的事透露出去可以吗？
Is it really okay to tell others about the monsters?
说实话，会有一定的风险，家族始终希望能清理掉那些怪物。但我相信你的判断。
To be honest, this is a bit risky, as The Family always intend to wipe out those monsters. However, I have faith in your judgment.
就到这吧。你也累了，好好休息。这条路还很长，也会比你预想的更加艰难。
That's all for now. You must be tired too. Get some rest. The road ahead is long, and it'll be tougher than you expect.
嗯…味道还算过得去，但似乎有点破坏现在的气氛了。
Hmm... the flavor is okay, but it kinda kills the current vibe.
饮品无论好坏，代表的都是当下最真实的想法，对面前这位客人的理解，以及你打算如何回应对方的信任，看似简单，里面蕴含的东西可多着呢。

Drinks, whether they taste great or terrible, reflect your most genuine thoughts at this moment, how you understand the guest before you, and how you intend to respond to their trust. This might seem simple, but it's so much more than that.
...Oh, there's something else I need to tell you.
尽管在家族看来，「美梦剧团」只是供宾客娱乐的道具，但对它们感兴趣的人不在少数。跟我打过招呼，来酒吧光顾的也有好几个。

Even though The Family treats the Sweet Dreams Troupe as mere props for the guests' entertainment, there are quite a few people who take a genuine interest in them. Some have even told me about it and become regulars at the lounge.
你要是有兴趣，也可以邀请信任的朋友过来玩。
If you're interested, you can also invite your trusted friends here.
梦境酒店不是被家族封锁了？
But isn't the hotel in the Dreamscape sealed off by The Family?
说是我的客人就行，家族的守卫不会拦你。不过是群服从命令的猎犬罢了，别太给他们面子。
Just tell them you're my guest, and The Family's guards won't stop you. They're merely obedient Bloodhounds following orders. Don't take them too seriously.
把怪物的事透露出去可以吗？
Is it really okay to tell others about the monsters?
说实话，会有一定的风险，家族始终希望能清理掉那些怪物。但我相信你的判断。
To be honest, this is a bit risky, as The Family always intend to wipe out those monsters. However, I have faith in your judgment.
就到这吧。你也累了，好好休息。这条路还很长，也会比你预想得更加艰难。
That's all for now. You must be tired too. Get some rest. The road ahead is long, and it'll be tougher than you expect.
还是从你先开始吧，想知道些什么呢？
Let's start with you. What would you like to know?
喂喂，别这么急躁…这个问题也太复杂了，一时半会儿怎么说得完？
Hey, don't rush things... The answer to your question is way too nuanced. How am I supposed to answer them all in one go?
感觉有点渴了，给我来杯<color=#dbc291ff>清爽的饮料吧，口味别太重</color>——其余的任你发挥，我相信你的调饮技术。
I feel a little parched. Make me a <color=#dbc291ff>refreshing drink, and keep it mild</color> — I'll leave the rest to you. I trust your mixology skills.
品尝你调出来的饮料总会让我想起很多事…你真的没有偷偷对我使用那个神奇的能力？
Tasting the drinks you make always brings back memories... You didn't secretly use your magical ability on me, did you?
…没有的话，要不对我使用试试，看你能不能成功？
...No? Maybe you can try using it on me and see if it works?
开玩笑的。这么说是因为，只要坐在你的对面，就会感觉特别放松，像是一场温暖舒适的梦。可惜呀，梦终究是没法长久的…就像这间酒店一样。
Just kidding. I say that because as long as I sit opposite you, I'd feel super relaxed like I'm in a warm, cozy dream. Unfortunately, dreams don't last forever... just like this hotel.
抱歉。对这家「惊梦酒吧」，我应该解释得更清楚些的。
I'm sorry. I should have explained everything about this Dreamjolt Hostelry better.
这些怪物在平时没有表现出攻击性，是因为有你为它们调制饮料的缘故。酒吧提供的饮料对它们而言会有稳定情绪的功效，能在一定程度上抵抗噩梦的侵袭。
Those monsters don't show aggression most of the time because of your drinks. The drinks offered here can stabilize their emotions, helping them resist the nightmare corruption to some extent.
要是不给它们调制饮料呢？
What if we stop making them drinks?
就像你看到的这样，失去理性，胡乱攻击周围的对象，直至…彻底无法恢复。
Just as you saw, they'll lose their sanity and start attacking everything around them until... until they're beyond recovery.
这些饮料是你特意准备的？
Did you prepare these drinks on purpose?
当然，准备这些材料花费了我不少心思，好在确实收到了成效。
Of course. It took me a lot of effort to gather the ingredients. Luckily, my efforts paid off.
要是离开这些特制的饮料，它们就会失去理性，胡乱攻击周围的对象，直至…彻底无法恢复。
Without these special drinks, those monsters will lose their sanity and start attacking everything around them until... until they're beyond recovery.
即使如此，怪物们陷入狂乱的情况仍旧时有发生，到现在甚至越发地频繁。我们所做的，和整个梦境的坍塌比起来不过是杯水车薪罢了。

Even with my drinks, they still descend into a frenzy from time to time, and it's happening more frequently now. The entire Dreamscape is collapsing, and we're just futilely trying to delay its impact like pouring cold water into a pot about to boil over.
这家酒吧的处境…实则岌岌可危。
The situation of this lounge... is far from promising.
So that's why Starlet became frenzied...?
小星星的情况比较特殊。它过去遭遇过太多悲伤的事，所以对酒吧里的陌生人很戒备。
Well, their situation is a bit different. They have experienced too many tragic events, so they're naturally wary of strangers in the lounge.
…别看它好像很有想法的样子，其实内心仍然是个离不开人的孩子，只不过顾虑得太多，没法完全信任你罢了。别太往心里去。
...Don't be fooled by their mature look. Deep down, they're still a dependent kid. They're just too wary to completely trust you right away. So, don't take it personally.
等你们更加熟悉后，相信它会向你透露真实的想法。
I'm sure they'll open up and show their true feelings once you two become more familiar with each other.
至于我…呵，安抚情绪不过是家族的惯用手法，没什么好说的。
As for me... Well, soothing emotions is what The Family is used to doing, so there's nothing complex about that.
你曾经是它们的管理员。
You used to be their administrator.
对，我应该说过，但也只是*曾经*。「美梦剧团」是为宾客服务的道具，哪位客人会愿意和一群随时可能发狂的怪物相处呢？

Yeah. I mentioned that before, but *not anymore*. The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are props entertaining the guests. No guest would want to hang out with a bunch of monsters that could go wild at any moment.
You're a member of The Family.
对，我应该说过，我曾经是「美梦剧团」的管理员，但也只是*曾经*。
Yeah, I mentioned that. I used to be the administrator of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, but *not anymore*.
「美梦剧团」是为宾客服务的道具，谁会愿意和一群随时可能发狂的怪物相处呢？
The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are props entertaining the guests. No guest would want to hang out with a bunch of monsters that could go wild at any moment.
所以后来我就失业啦，只能待在这个酒吧里——照顾这群变得奇怪的孩子们。
So, I lost my job and could only stay in this lounge... taking care of these quirky kids.
它们对我来说就像家人一样，我不会丢下它们。
To me, they're like my family, and I'm not leaving them behind.
调杯你最擅长的吧。或者说…你认为现在最适合我的饮品。我们相识的时间不短了，在你心中，最适合我的饮品是什么呢？
Make me your best drink... or one that you think suits me best right now. We've known each other for quite a while now. So, what do you think is the drink that fits me best?
I'm looking forward to your answer.
呵。这滋味还真是令人回味无穷。
…看来你很习惯窥探别人的内心嘛？
...Looks like you're quite used to peering into people's hearts, right?
说实话，把自己心境全部展露出来的感觉…呵，还真挺难受的，让人很没有安全感啊。
Honestly, revealing all of my innermost feelings... Hah, it feels pretty bad. It makes you feel vulnerable.
I'm not quite skilled at it.
没事，现在也顾不得那么多了。继续吧，这杯饮料还没喝完呢。
Well, we can't pick and choose right now. Let's keep going. I haven't finished my drink yet.
我是个孤儿，不知道父母是谁，没记事的时候就被遗弃在了「白日梦酒店」里，鸢尾花家系的家主梅芙恩收养了我，把我作为未来的明星培养长大。

I'm an orphan, and I never knew who my parents were. I was abandoned at the Reverie Hotel before I was old enough to remember anything. Maeven, head of the Iris Family, adopted me and raised me as a future star.
我曾在演艺事业上取得了巨大的成功，但终究…我不适合舞台，我不属于那里。
I once achieved great success in my acting career, but in the end... the stage wasn't for me. I just couldn't fit in.
聚光灯下的生活实在太过喧嚣…我讨厌待在镜头前，讨厌数不尽的演出采访，更讨厌念那些乏味到让我想吐的台本。比起跟吵闹的人群相处，我更愿意待在它们身边。

Life under the spotlight was too much for me... I despised being in front of the camera, the never-ending interviews, and the mind-numbingly boring scripts. I'd rather be with those monsters than in a rowdy crowd.
I... long for a real family.
A real family... like the Sweet Dreams Troupe?
对。它们都是单纯的孩子，没什么复杂的心思。和它们呆在一块，让我感到放松，幸福。
Yeah. They're simple and innocent kids. Being with them brings me peace and happiness.
所以我也见不得那些将它们视作工具，肆意使唤的人。可是，这种人在梦境里实在太多了，自私虚伪，靠着欺负弱者来维持可怜的自尊心。

That's why I can't stand those who treat them as tools and boss them around. Unfortunately, there are too many selfish and hypocritical people in the Dreamscape, bullying the weak to boost their own pathetic egos.
我离开了舞台，因为想帮助它们。后来你也看到了，梦境开始坍塌，酒店遭到家族封锁，成为了发狂的怪物游荡的场所。

So, I left the stage because I wanted to help them. You know what happened next: The Dreamscape started collapsing, and the hotel got sealed by The Family and became a spot infested by frenzied monsters.
我留在这里，寻找那些遭到抛弃、但神智仍旧清醒的「美梦剧团」。我建立了这家酒吧，为怪物们调制饮料，想办法安抚情绪，希望能改变它们的命运。

I stayed here, searching for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe members who were still sane. I established this lounge, making drinks for those monsters and finding ways to calm them down, hoping to change their fate.
它们是我最重要的家人，我不想看它们受伤害。
They're my most important family, and I don't want to see them get hurt.
嘿，你好啊！给我来杯…呃，<color=#dbc291ff>带点苦，带点柔和</color>的饮料！
Hey, how are you! Get me a glass of... Hmm, something <color=#dbc291ff>slightly bitter and mellow</color>!
哇嘎嘎嘎！这就是我想要的，你果然是个好酒保！
Woah woah woah! This is exactly what I want. I knew you'd be an amazing drinksmith!
饱了！差不多就到这吧，感谢招待！我还会再来的哦。
I'm full! It's time I stopped. Thank you for your hospitality! I'll come back soon.
啊？…这是啥？能喝吗？我尝一口…喂喂，这不是我要的味道啊！
Ah? ...What's this? Can you even drink it? Let's have a taste... Hey, this isn't the taste I wanted!
算了，谁叫我这么宽容又善良呢！钱给你，下次记得，嘿嘿…记清楚我的要求。
Forget it. Good thing I'm generous and kind! Here's your money, but remember next time, heh-heh... make sure you get my order properly.
嘻嘻，又见面了！这次…呃，我想要<color=#dbc291ff>甜的！味道强烈的饮料，还要让人神清气爽</color>才行！
Hee-hee, we meet again! This time... Er, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet! And tastes strong! And it has to be refreshing</color>!
哇嘎嘎嘎！这就是我想要的，你果然是个好酒保！
Woah woah woah! This is exactly what I want. I knew you'd be an amazing drinksmith!
喝饱咯！该走咯！感谢你的接待，下次见！
I'm full from drinking! I should get going! Thank you for your service. See you next time!
啊？…这是啥？能喝吗？我尝一口…喂喂，这不是我要的味道啊！
Ah? ...What's this? Can you even drink it? Let's have a taste... Hey, this isn't the taste I wanted!
就这样吧！嘿嘿，随时有饮料喝，还要什么独轮飞车！我走咯！
That's all! Hee-hee, who needs an Unicycler when I get to drink whenever I want! I'm off!
汪！我就爱你调的饮料哇！请听好——我这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>微微甜，特别柔和，特别清爽的味道</color>！喜欢！
Woof! I simply love the drinks you make! Please listen carefully — this time, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>that tastes very slightly sweet, very mellow, and very refreshing</color>! Me likey!
汪！这就是我最想要的味道，亲爱的调饮师，你真的好懂我哇！
Woof! This is the taste I really want! My dear drinksmith, you know me too well!
谢谢你的招待，我还会来找你玩的汪！
Thank you for your hospitality! I'll come back next time to play with you later, woof!
汪…好像和我预想的不太一样哇，亲爱的调饮师，你是没认真工作嘛？
Woof... It's a little different from what I expected. My dear drinksmith, are you sure you're serious about your job?
这次就原谅你了，下次要好好地招待我哇！
I'll forgive you this time, but please be more attentive in the future!
汪！我来找你玩了！请给我一杯<color=#dbc291ff>超级甜，味道强烈，口感浓厚</color>的饮品！喝不到你调的饮料，我就觉得好无聊哇！

Woof! I've come to play with you! Please give me a glass of something <color=#dbc291ff>super sweet, strong-tasting, and thickly textured</color>! I'm bored out of my mind when I don't get to drink your mixed concoctions!
汪！这就是我最想要的味道，亲爱的调饮师，你真的好懂我哇！
Woof! This is the taste I really want! My dear drinksmith, you know me too well!
好喝的饮料！好开心哇！谢谢你汪！
A tasty drink! Happy! Thank you, woof!
汪…好像和我预想的不太一样哇，亲爱的调饮师，你是没认真工作嘛？
Woof... It's a little different from what I expected. My dear drinksmith, are you sure you're serious about your job?
要是舒翁发现了会批评你的哇，我先帮你保密，但下次要好好接待我汪！
Siobhan will reprimand you if she finds out. I'll help you keep it a secret first, but I hope you'll treat my order more seriously next time, woof!
您好。我来打扰了。方便的话，能给我调杯饮料吗，就要<color=#dbc291ff>有点苦，味道超级强烈的，颜色分成三层</color>。麻烦了！

Hello, sorry to bother you. Can you make a drink for me? I want something that's <color=#dbc291ff>a little bitter, tastes super strong, and is layered in three colors</color>. Thank you for the trouble!
哈！您真是位优秀的调饮师，调出来的饮料正正好好就是我想要的！
Ha! You're truly a superb drinksmith — your drinks are exactly the way I want them!
非常满足！我这次就先离开了，感谢您的招待！
I'm very pleased! I'll be leaving now. Thank you for your hospitality!
呃…您是不是太累了，发挥有些失常。没事的，您调出来的饮料，我都能喝！
Err... You don't seem like yourself. Are you too tired? It's all right. I'll drink anything you make!
请好好休息，我还会再来光临，希望届时能见识到您的真实水平！
Please have a good rest. I'll be back again soon — I hope to witness your true skill when I swing by!
…我过来没给您添麻烦吧？要是有时间的话，麻烦给我调杯<color=#dbc291ff>超级甜，口感浓厚的饮料，颜色就分两层</color>好了。万分感谢！
...I hope I'm not troubling you by coming over? If you have time, please make me something <color=#dbc291ff>super sweet and thick. Colors in two layers please</color>. Many thanks!
哈！您真是位优秀的调饮师，调出来的饮料正正好好就是我想要的！
Ha! You're truly a superb drinksmith — your drinks are exactly the way I want them!
在我的心目中，您已经达到了和舒翁相近的水平！我还会来拜访的，向您致敬！
In my heart, you've already achieved the same level as Siobhan! I'll come back to visit and pay tribute!
呃…您是不是太累了，发挥有些失常。没事的，您调出来的饮料，我都能喝！
Err... You don't seem like yourself. Are you too tired? It's all right. I'll drink anything you make!
这次的拜访就到此为止，感谢接待！
That's it for this visit. Thank you for your hospitality!
看啊，奇妙的命运让我们再度相遇了。为了庆祝这来之不易的重逢，请您调杯饮料吧，<color=#dbc291ff>需要梦幻风格，口感很浓厚的类型，别忘了将知更鸟小姐的装饰加上去</color>，谢谢。

Look, wondrous destiny has brought us together again. To celebrate this hard-earned reunion, please make me a drink. <color=#dbc291ff>It needs to be dreamy and with a thick texture. Don't forget to add Miss Robin's decoration on top</color>, thank you.
美妙的夜晚，美妙的饮料与美妙的你，世间还有什么能抵得过此刻！
An enchanting night, an enchanting drink, and an enchanting person such as you — what in the world can be better than this?
离场之时已到，感谢您的热情款待，愿我们能再次相聚。
It's time to leave. Thank you for your warm hospitality and may we meet again.
世间的苦痛将我的脊背压垮，而我却连那可口的甘霖都无缘品尝！
The world's bitterness weighs heavy on my shoulders, yet I do not even have a chance to taste that delectable beverage!
哎，这就是流离之人必须踏上的颠沛旅途。再会吧，不愿交出真心的调饮师。
*sigh* This is a desolate journey that a wanderer has to make. May we meet again, reticent drinksmith.
你知道吗，这世间所有的相遇都是纠缠，我们之间一定是有什么看不见的牵绊在的吧。哎，请给我杯<color=#dbc291ff>味道强烈，口感非常清爽的饮料，再放个动画里的角色上去</color>，谢谢。

Do you know that in this world, all encounters are simply entanglements? There must be some invisible bond between us. Hey, please give me <color=#dbc291ff>a strong-tasting yet refreshing drink. And add a cartoon character too</color>, thanks.
美妙的夜晚，美妙的饮料与美妙的你，世间还有什么能抵得过此刻！
An enchanting night, an enchanting drink, and an enchanting person such as you — what in the world can be better than this?
戏剧的高潮已过，我们这些演员该谢幕了。衷心祝您过得愉快。
The climax of the play is over. It's time for us actors to bow and take our leave. We hope you have a good day.
世间的苦痛将我的脊背压垮，而我却连那可口的甘霖都无缘品尝！
The world's bitterness weighs heavy on my shoulders, yet I do not even have a chance to taste that delectable beverage!
哎，命运的底色总是悲剧，即使如此，我仍旧希望再度与你重逢。
*sigh* The primary hue of fate is always a tragedy. But even so, I still hope to see you again.
您好呀，人家如约来找您玩啦。请给我杯<color=#dbc291ff>能让心情松弛下来，口感清爽的饮品吧，麻烦多加点冰块哦</color>。
Hello there, I've come as promised to have fun. Please give me a drink <color=#dbc291ff>that can uplift me, with a refreshing taste. May I trouble you to add more ice please</color>?
呀！味道真是好，您还是这么懂人家的心呢。
Ah! The taste is fantastic. You know me inside out.
和您聊天的感觉真愉快，感谢招待，人家还会再来光顾的呀！
It's always a pleasure chatting with you. Thank you for your hospitality, I'll come back soon!
…是因为您的心乱了嘛，调出来的饮料好像和人家的需求不太符合呀。
...Is it because your heart is unsettled? The drink you made doesn't seem to match my requirements.
没关系，我愿意等您，下次要调出让人家感到开心的饮品啊！
No worries, I'm willing to wait for you. Next time, do make something that'll bring me joy!
嘻嘻，有空的话，来和人家聊聊天怎么样？先来杯饮料吧，想要<color=#dbc291ff>有怀旧感觉，口感超级浓厚的饮品，这次得少加点冰</color>，人家最近身体有点虚。

Hee-hee, if you're free, how about having a chat with me? Let's have a drink first. I want <color=#dbc291ff>a drink with a nostalgic feeling and a super thick texture. Do add less ice this time</color>. I've been feeling a bit under the weather lately.
呀！味道真是好，您还是这么懂人家的心呢。
Ah! The taste is fantastic. You know me inside out.
真开心，和您共度的时光总是这么美妙。要记得我哦。

…是因为您的心乱了嘛，调出来的饮料好像和人家的需求不太符合呀。

你已经是个成熟的调饮师了，该学会记住顾客的喜好。来杯我每次都点的饮料吧，就是<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>，别搞错了。
You've grown into a mature drinksmith. It's time to remember the preferences of the customers. Get me a glass of my usual, the <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Don't get it wrong.
味道很好，接待顾客的水平也不错，你是少有的能让我满意的人。
The flavor is great, and so is your service. You are one of the few that can impress me.
差不多该走了，要是对这份工作还算喜欢，就多待段时间吧。
It's time to go. If you're enjoying this job, then stay a while longer.
错了，不是这个。哎，还是让舒翁多教教你吧。
Wrong. This is not it. *sigh* Get Siobhan to teach you more.
这次就到此为止吧，我会再来看看你有没有长进的。
Let's call it a day. I'll be back to see if you've improved.
最近酒吧里来了不少顾客，变得热闹了，虽然有点吵，但也算是好事吧。给我来份<color=#dbc291ff>超大杯，有松弛感的饮料，口感清爽点</color>，辛苦。

The lounge's been getting quite a few customers lately. It's getting bustling. It may be a little noisy, but that's a good thing. I'll have an <color=#dbc291ff>extra large, uplifting drink with a refreshing taste</color>, thank you.
味道很好，接待顾客的水平也不错，你是少有的能让我满意的人。
The flavor is great, and so is your service. You are one of the few that can impress me.
就到这里吧，我还会再来光顾，希望你能喜欢这份工作。
That's all. I'll come back again. Hope you enjoy the job.
错了，不是这个。哎，还是让舒翁多教教你吧。
Wrong. This is not it. *sigh* Get Siobhan to teach you more.
哼，早就跟你说过调饮师不是那么好当的，平时多练练吧。
Hmph, I told you being a drinksmith isn't as easy as you think. You should practice harder.
汪！你好，新来的调饮师！我是汽水狗，只要遇见了这只狗狗，就会获得幸福哇！
Woof! Hello, new drinksmith! I'm Soda Dog. Just the sight of me will bring people joy!
你看起来好累的样子，有什么我能帮忙的哇？
You look pretty tired. Is there anything I can help with?
...Can you help make drinks for me?
汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!
...Can you help me wash the cups?
汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!
...Can you help me clean the tables?
汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!
汪！不用谢，即使答应了帮忙，我也什么都不会做哇。
Woof! No need to thank me. Even if I agree to help, I won't lift a paw to help.
因为我只是狗狗，什么都做不到，你最开始就不该对我抱有太高的期待汪！
And that's because I'm a dog. I can't do anything. You shouldn't have had high expectations for me in the first place, woof!
（这只狗是故意来惹我生气的吗？）
(Is this dog trying to rile me up on purpose?)
…你急了，对不对？你急了！你急了！
...You're getting angry, aren't you? You're getting angry! Angry!
汪！但你是酒吧的调饮师，就算再生气，你也得给我调制饮料。对不对？
Woof! But you're the drinksmith for this lounge, so even if you're mad, you still gotta make me a drink. Isn't that right?
You are too kind. Thank you!
听好了——我想要杯<color=#dbc291ff>清爽的饮料</color>，拜托你了汪！拜托你了谢谢汪！
Listen up — I want <color=#dbc291ff>a refreshing drink</color> please, woof! Pretty please, woof!
（…能给我个把它赶走的选项吗？）
(...Is there an option to toss this dog out?)
Encourage the customer in front of you to leave.
汪！我是为你带来幸福的汽水狗狗，在你变得快乐前我都不会走的哇！
Woof! I'm the Soda Doggo that brings you happiness. I won't be going anywhere until you are happy!
（…还是好好完成舒翁的委托吧。）
(...I should work toward completing Siobhan's assignment.)
我超爱这杯饮料汪！新来的调饮师，你在服务客人方面好厉害哇！
I love this drink, woof! Newbie, you are top of the pack when it comes to serving customers!
汪！我还有个问题哇，就是…外面那么多好玩的地方，为什么你要来这里做调饮师哇？
Woof! I still have a question, woof! Umm... With so many fun places out there, why did you come here to be a drinksmith?
因为接受了舒翁的委托。
汪！花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
Woof! Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!
Because I'm passionate about mixing drinks.
汪！看看你说的话，你自己相信吗？说谎话是不对的哇！
Woof! Just listen to yourself. Do you even believe in what you just said? It's no good to lie!
这不是你的酒吧，花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！

你比那个黑桃讨厌多了！
You're a bigger pain than that Spade!
我很好相处的，处不好在自己身上找找原因哇！
I'm pretty easygoing. If you don't get along with me, maybe the problem lies with you!
我的情绪很稳定哇，稳定地让你讨厌。这样有什么问题吗？
I'm emotionally stable. So emotionally stable that you'll be annoyed. Is there a problem with that?
汪！倒是你，作为调饮师，却对顾客提出过分的评价，这样很不对的哇！

你不觉得自己更过分吗？
Don't you think you're the one crossing the line here?
有吗？或许有吧，那要不咱们约定，要是谁再用言语攻击对方，谁就是狗狗哇。
Am I? I mean, maybe. Let's make a deal. Whoever uses their words to attack the other person will be declared a dog.
这样公平了吧！没任何问题汪！
That's fair, right? That should be no problem, woof!
...I don't want to discuss this with you anymore.
说不过就屏蔽哇。遇到你这种不讲道理的人，就算是宽容的汽水狗狗也没办法哇。

Woof! There's nothing much to say. Better just continue drinking. I want a <color=#dbc291ff>slightly sweet</color> drink! Can you do it?
不对！我要的不是这个汪！不会吧，不会有人连酒单上的字都看不明白哇？

嗝！有点晕乎乎的…和你聊天好开心，我还会来酒吧找你玩的，要记得欢迎我哇！
Burp! I'm feeling a bit dizzy... It's so nice talking to you! I'll come hang out with you some other day. Be sure to welcome me with open arms!

汪！带来幸福的汽水狗狗又来拜访你了！期待吗？开心吗？
Woof! The Soda Doggo that brings happiness has returned to visit you! Were you looking forward to seeing me? Are you happy?
...I didn't want you to come at all.
这样吗，但我也根本不在乎你怎么想的哇！
Oh, is that so? But I don't care what you think anyway!
I was looking forward to this! I'm so happy!
谢谢你！但你期待也没用，我根本不在乎你怎么想的哇！
Thank you! But no matter how much you look forward to it, it's pointless. I don't care what you think in the slightest!
汪！我想去哪就去哪，想说什么就说什么，谁都管不着！
Woof! I go wherever I please and say whatever I want. There's nothing anyone can do about me!
曾经我也像你这样，忙着给每位顾客送饮料，别人对我说话，我只能回答：「收到汪」。

汪！你终于明白了！但想通只是开始，最重要的是要付诸行动哇！

You still make my blood boil!
汪！生气也没用。只要你还在给别人工作，就必须先忍着哇！
Woof! No point in being angry. As long as you're working for someone else, you better put a lid on it!
看你也挺累的，不如现在开始跟我练习吧！给我调杯<color=#dbc291ff>大份浓浓的</color>饮料，我就教你该怎么和人接触哇。
I see you're pretty tired. Why not start practicing with me? Make me a <color=#dbc291ff>large and strong</color> drink and I'll teach you how to interact with people.
（它这种说话方式…真的不会被揍吗？）
(With a mouth like that... how is it not getting a beat down?)
玻璃杯在手中泛着美妙的光，让你觉得非常舒适。
The glass in your hand has a gorgeous glow and makes you feel an incredible sense of comfort.
味道真的好棒！从现在起，你就是狗狗心目中最优秀的调饮师了！
The flavor is amazing! From now on, you are the best drinksmith in my heart!
喝完了饮料，该教你怎么说话了。咳咳，听好哇……
After drinking this, it's time to teach you how to talk. Hehe, listen up...
——喂！傻狗！嘿嘿嘿，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜，还想教人呢？
Hey! Idiot dog! Heh heh heh. You really want to teach someone with that pathetic brain of yours?
新来的，别被这只狗的外表给骗啦！装出可爱的样子，其实…嘿，嘴里全是难听的话！

以前它还是派送员的时候，收到的差评就是最多的！嘲讽客户，偷喝汽水，私吞小费…就没干过什么正经事！除了尾巴摇得特欢！

When that dog was a courier, it got the highest number of negative reviews! Making fun of customers, stealing soda, and pocketing tips... It's never done what it's supposed to, beyond wagging that tail of its so happily.
是吧！我虽然疯，可我不害人啊，但和它认识这么久，就没听到过几句好话！
Good! I may be crazy, but I've never hurt anybody. I've known that dog for a long time, I've never heard anything good about it!
哇嘎嘎，我是个疯子，但我从不害人！咱们认识了这么久，我说过你一句坏话嘛？
Wahaha, I'm crazy, but I've never hurt anyone! You and I have known each other for a while. Have I ever said anything bad about you?
劝你——那就是条自私又嘴臭的狗，最好离它远点，别没事自找苦头吃！
Let me tell you — it's a selfish, bad-mouthed dog. It's best if you keep your distance. Don't give yourself unnecessary headaches!
汪！荷官先生经常胡言乱语，到处捣蛋，精神不太正常哇。酒吧里的怪物都不喜欢它。
Woof! Mr. Dealer is often pulling things out of thin air and causing trouble wherever he goes. He's kind of off, you know. No one at the lounge likes him.
…嘿！说谁呢！我可都听得到。敢在背后说我坏话，必须给你颜色瞧瞧！
...Hey! Who are you talking about? I heard everything you just said. If you're going to talk smack about me behind my back, I'll have to give you a hard time!
我在和亲爱的调饮师进行私密聊天，你不准插话！
I'm having a private conversation with our dear drinksmith here. Mind your business!
别在意，荷官先生的话都是骗人的哇！不像我，永远都只会对你友好地摇尾巴哇！
Everything Mr. Dealer says is a lie, so don't mind him! He's not like me. I'll always wag my tail in a friendly way to you! That's the only thing I can do!
谢谢！只要摇几下尾巴，你就会信任我。你还真是好骗哇！
Thank you! You'd trust me just with a few wags of my tail! You're so easy to fool.
Do you think I'd believe you?
你不相信也无所谓，反正我也只是随口说说哇！
I don't care if you don't believe me. I'm just saying whatever I want!
汪！好渴！再给我调杯饮料，要<color=#dbc291ff>甜甜的，清清爽爽</color>的类型！
Woof! Delish! Hit me with another. I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet, refreshing</color>, something along those lines!

哇嘎嘎，我是个疯子，但我从不害人！咱们认识了这么久，我说过你一句坏话嘛？
Wahaha, I'm crazy, but I've never hurt anyone! You and I have known each other for a while. Have I ever said anything bad about you?
劝你——那就是条自私又嘴臭的狗，最好离它远点，别没事自找苦头吃！
Let me tell you — it's a selfish, bad-mouthed dog. It's best if you keep your distance. Don't give yourself unnecessary headaches!
汪！荷官先生经常胡言乱语，到处捣蛋，精神不太正常哇。酒吧里的怪物都不喜欢它。
Woof! Mr. Dealer is often pulling things out of thin air and causing trouble wherever he goes. He's kind of off, you know. No one at the lounge likes him.
…嘿！说谁呢！我可都听得到。敢在背后说我坏话，必须给你颜色瞧瞧！
...Hey! Who are you talking about? I heard everything you just said. If you're going to talk smack about me behind my back, I'll have to give you a hard time!
我在和亲爱的调饮师进行私密聊天，你不准插话！
I'm having a private conversation with our dear drinksmith here. Mind your business!
别在意，荷官先生的话都是骗人的哇！不像我，永远都只会对你友好地摇尾巴哇！
Everything Mr. Dealer says is a lie, so don't mind him! He's not like me. I'll always wag my tail in a friendly way to you! That's the only thing I can do!
谢谢！只要摇几下尾巴，你就会信任我。你还真是好骗哇！
Thank you! You'd trust me just with a few wags of my tail! You're so easy to fool.
Do you think I'd believe you?
你不相信也无所谓，反正我也只是随口说说哇！
I don't care if you don't believe me. I'm just saying whatever I want!
汪！好渴！再给我调杯饮料，要<color=#dbc291ff>甜甜的，清清爽爽</color>的类型！
Woof! Delish! Hit me with another. I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet, refreshing</color>, something along those lines!
（…怎么感觉它们的关系不太好？）
(...I get the sense that these two don't have a good relationship.)
汪！味道真棒，舒翁不在的时候，你就是这里最伟大的调饮师了哇！
Woof! This tastes amazing! When Siobhan's not around, you are the greatest drinksmith here!
汪！心情变得超好！但…是不是喝太多了，看到了好多黑色的影子哇。
Woof! You really turned my mood around! But... I wonder if I drank too much. I'm seeing lots of black spots.
这边，嘿，这边…好狗狗，咱们去玩，跟我来，有个特好玩的地方！
Over here. Heh. Over here... good little doggie. Let's play. Come with me. I'll take you to a fun place!
...Woof? You want to play with me? Wait for me!
（黑桃带着司令出去玩了，它们两个不会闹出事来吧？）
(Spade took Mr. Bigwig out to play. I wonder if those two will cause trouble.)
（不过…听到了不少司令的信息，感觉更理解它的想法了。）
(But... I feel like I understand Mr. Bigwig more now listening to it.)
不是这个汪…你的脑子也像荷官先生那样不是很好使哇！
This is not it, woof... The function of your brain is just as off as Mr. Dealer!
汪！心情变得超好！但…是不是喝太多了，看到了好多黑色的影子哇。
Woof! You really turned my mood around! But... I wonder if I drank too much. I'm seeing lots of black spots.
这边，嘿，这边…好狗狗，咱们去玩，跟我来，有个特好玩的地方！
Over here. Heh. Over here... good little doggie. Let's play. Come with me. I'll take you to a fun place!
...Woof? You want to play with me? Wait for me!
（黑桃带着司令出去玩了，它们两个不会闹出事来吧？）
(Spade took Mr. Bigwig out to play. I wonder if those two will cause trouble.)
（不过…听到了不少司令的信息，感觉更理解它的想法了。）
(But... I feel like I understand Mr. Bigwig more now listening to it.)
Are you looking for me, old man?
好吧，咱们不扯这些闲篇了，先前你帮了不少忙，我想着也得投桃报李——
Well, never mind that. You did me a great favor, so I thought I'd repay your kindness...
最近有个后辈捣鼓出了个小东西，我估摸着你会喜欢。我跟他打过招呼了，你可以过去玩玩，还挺有意思的。
Recently, a young fella made a gadget, and I thought you might like it. I've given him a heads-up. You can go over there and have some fun. It's pretty interesting.
喏，他才回空间站，一听你来了，就在这附近恭候你呢——
He just came back to the space station, and when he heard you were coming, he waited there for you...
嚯，你就是大家说的{NICKNAME}，那个无名客是吧？
Ooh, so you're that {NICKNAME} everyone's talking about. The Nameless, huh?
呃，莱桑德老叔没跟你打过招呼吗？
Uh, didn't old Lysander mention me to you?
Lysander asked me to come to you...
Yeah, it's me! You've found the right person.
咳咳，简单自我介绍下吧，我叫鲍勃，维修科的科员，刚回空间站。
Ahem, let me introduce myself. I'm Bob. I work in the Maintenance Department, and I just got back to the space station.
前阵子我去匹诺康尼度假去了，没想到竟错过了你这么位大人物，实在可惜。
I was on vacation in Penacony, and little did I know I'd miss meeting a big shot like you there.
Don't butter me up. Let's get to the point...
哎，我这不是拍马屁…「黑粉群」里讨论过了，有鼻子有眼的，我是实打实地佩服你。
Well, I'm not trying to butter you up... We were discussing things in the Heritor group, and I genuinely admired you.
你怎么到匹诺康尼去了？
呃，就度假地而言，「盛会之星」应该都是智慧生命的首选吧……
Um, when it comes to vacations, any intelligent life would choose the Planet of Festivities, right...?
咳，我去匹诺康尼，除了度假之外，顺道还解决了一道技术难题。
Ahem, so I went to Penacony for a vacation and ended up solving a technical issue along the way.
有位流光忆庭的技术人员在那儿，先前我们在邮件里交流过几次…在她的帮助下，我得以提取出这团玩意——
I met a technician from the Garden of Recollection there, with whom I had exchanged several emails before... With her help, I managed to extract this stuff...
鲍勃示意你看向他身旁的这团忆泡。
Bob gestures towards the memory bubble next to him.
对啊，花了我不少心血的，我自己测试过了，特有意思。
Yeah, it took me a lot of effort. I tested it myself, and it's pretty fun.
不不不，这不是普通的忆泡。
Nah, nah, it's not "just" an ordinary memory bubble.
…这个忆泡…承载了我的童年回忆…还有所有的快乐……
This memory bubble... holds all my childhood memories... and all the good times...
这话题转得太生硬了吧？
Why such a sudden change of topic?
咳咳，这个抱歉，想起童年往事，难免有点感叹。
Ahem, my bad. I couldn't help but get sentimental when I think about my childhood memories.
我没有难过，我只是有点唏嘘，毕竟是多少年前的回忆了。
I'm not feeling down, just getting a bit sentimental, you know? It's all those memories from way back when.
我小时候特别爱玩一款游戏，来空间站之后我还想复刻出来…可惜那家游戏公司早就倒闭了，我想买版权都不知道找谁买……

When I was a kid, I was crazy about this game, and I thought about recreating it when I came to the space station... But unfortunately, the game company went bankrupt ages ago, and I had no clue whom to contact for the rights...
好在，在某次睡梦中，我有了灵感——或许，我能通过「记忆」这种介质，将童年的游戏复刻出来……
Luckily, I had this amazing idea in my dreams: What if I recreated the game using my "memories" as the basis...?
这个专项研究我做了大半年了，有空间站的便利条件，再加上一些技术支持，嘿嘿，现在成功捣鼓出来了。
I've been working on this project for almost a year now. With all the resources on the space station and some technical assistance, I've finally made it happen.
这个忆泡，实际上就是「战意狂潮•童年回忆无污染赤诚燃魂整合版」——简单的定制化战斗游戏，你能和记忆中的仇敌安全畅快地打上一整天！

This memory bubble is actually "Tides of War: Untainted Childhood Memories Passionate-Heart Burning-Soul Ultimate Collection" — It's a cool and easy customized fighting game where you can battle all those childhood foes in the memory for a whole day!
而且…我在里面加入了大量的定制化内容，有辅助功能在…玩起来比我小时候玩的老版本轻松多了！
And... I've added all sorts of customized features and assists in there... Now it's way easier than the old version I played as a kid!
啊，这…这个，这怎么能算开挂，又不是什么「声控一声通关」，要自己慢慢打的！
W—Well, it's not... not a cheat, yeah! It's not like you press a button and instantly beat the game! You still have to clear those stages yourself!
…这，只能说是年龄问题，代沟嘛……
...Well, that's how they named games back in the day, you know...
来来来，这玩意还在「内测」阶段，莱桑德老叔让我给你留了个名额，你来试试呗！
Anyway, this game is still in alpha, and Uncle Lysander has asked me to save you a spot. Why not come and give it a try?
怎么说，你全打通了？这才多久啊…我不信！我小时候明明要打上好几个月才能通关……
What? You've beaten the entire game already?... No way! It took me months to beat it when I was a kid...
Well, you were just a kid back then...
也是，小时候的我…哪能跟你这个大个子比啊！合理，非常合理！
Yeah, you're right... You can't expect a kid to beat a game as fast as an adult! That totally makes sense!
非常简单，随便打打就过了。
This game is just a piece of cake.
…好吧，或许这就是无名客的非凡之处。
...Alright. I guess you Nameless are simply extraordinary.
无名客见识广，你身手又了得，还能给我这小玩意做测试……
The Nameless is well-traveled, you have moves, and yet you can even test this little thing for me...
说真的，谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，你能来玩，是我的荣幸，你的测试数据也帮了我大忙。
Seriously, thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}. It's my honor to have you play it, and your feedback and data are super helpful.
{NICKNAME}{F#老姐}{M#老哥}，怎么样，玩玩看嘛？好歹是我小半年的研究心血，帮忙测试下给点意见呗！
Want to have some fun, {F#Sister}{M#Brother} {NICKNAME}? I've put almost a year into this game, so give it a go and let me know what you think!
无名客见识广，你身手又了得，还能给我这小玩意做测试……
The Nameless is well-traveled, you have moves, and yet you can even test this little thing for me...

Seriously, thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}. It's my honor to have you play it, and your feedback and data are super helpful.
我感觉这个项目大有可为啊，说不定能为空间站创收不少，嘿嘿！
I really think this project has loads of potential. Maybe it could rake in some serious cash for the space station! Hee-hee!
越来越搞不懂这些年轻人…算咯，他们开心就好……

材料都在吧台上，种类齐全，你直接用就好。不收钱。
The ingredients are all on the lounge, the whole range. Feel free to use them. I won't charge you.
噢，差点忘了，要是客人们满意的话，我会按工作量给你付酬劳的。待遇包你满意。
Oh, I almost forgot. I'll pay you based on your workload if the customers are happy. The pay will satisfy you for sure.
我会在对面守着，放心大胆地去做吧。
I'll be watching things from over there. Take it easy and dive into your work.
（…记得在饮品单里看到过这杯饮料。）
(...I remember seeing this drink on the drink menu.)
（感觉黑桃说话有点疯疯的，但还算是好接触的类型？）
(I feel like the way Spade talks is a bit crazy, but they seem pretty easy to get along with.)
嘿呀。让我瞧瞧…新人？该不会…你是欠了舒翁的债才被抓过来打工的吧？
Heya! Let's take a look at this... new drinksmith? Let me guess... You owe Siobhan some money, which is how you got roped into working here.
肯定是这样！我就知道，舒翁看起来温声细语，待人温柔又好说话，走在街上都要被问有没有兴趣去当明星的那种，但背地里绝对是个魔鬼！

That must be it! I knew it. Siobhan looks soft-spoken and treats people so gently. She's quite the talker. Whenever she's on the street, people always ask if she wants to become a celebrity, but she's definitely a devil in disguise!
直接说吧，你欠了她多少钱？看看…嘿，我能不能帮你找补找补？
Be straight with me. How much do you owe her? Let's see... Hey, can I help you with that?
Even with your help, I still might not be able to pay it back.
不会吧，你不会真的以为我会帮你还钱吧。我是说…我知道有个发财的地。
Are you kidding me? You didn't really think I was going to help you pay off your debt? I was saying... I know a place where you can strike it rich.
梦境酒店的深处，嘻嘻，那里有个长得像闹钟的怪物，就喜欢别人骂它。你呢，过去使劲多喷它几句，说不定…它心情好，就把钱全给你了！

In the back of the hotel in the Dreamscape, hehe, there's a monster that looks like an alarm clock and enjoys having people tell it off. So you could go over and spit a few sentences at it. Maybe... that'll put it in a good mood, and then it'll give you all its money!
记住了吧，可别说是我告诉你的哦。嘎嘎嘎嘎…好了，做个乖酒保，给我点喝的。
Remember, you can't say that I was the one who told you. Hahaha... Okay. Now, be a good drinksmith and put in an order for me.
来点苦的怎么样？让我想想，想…就要那个！那个…那个…<color=#dbc291ff>迷失午夜</color>！
Let's get the bitter ones! Let me think, I think... I want that! That... that... <color=#dbc291ff>Lost Twilight</color>!
哇嘎嘎嘎！这饮料的颜色就很适合我，你看，我多深沉啊，沉得都飞起来了！
Woah woah woah! The color of the drink suits me so well. Look at how deep and profound I am. So deep that I'm flying!
刚才说到哪儿了？噢，梦境酒店，那地方可不太平。
What was I saying? Oh, the hotel in the Dreamscape is not safe.
舒翁不太让咱们随便走远，但我偷偷给你讲，前天啊，我在那看到了好多人。
Siobhan doesn't let us go too far, but just between us, I saw lots of people over there a few days ago.
就是那种穿…穿啥来着…黑色西装的！碰见就想逮住我，吓得我都掉小珍珠了。结果你猜…怎么着，他们根本就不敢进来哈哈！

They were all wearing... something like... black suits! They wanted to arrest me when they saw me. I was so shocked I got teary-eyed. And in the end, guess what... they don't even dare to step foot in here. Hahaha!
我站在里面疯狂嘲讽，他们气得直冒烟呢，只能灰溜溜地走了。你说有意思不！

I stood inside and started wildly mocking them. They were so mad that smoke was coming out of their ears. All they could do was walk away with their tails between their legs. Pretty interesting, right?
好像有点口渴…再给我来杯味道<color=#dbc291ff>超级强烈</color>的饮料吧，要能让我回忆起戏耍他们的愉悦的那种！
I'm a little thirsty... Bring me another <color=#dbc291ff>super intense</color> drink, one that reminds me of the joys of playing tricks on them!
嘿，朋友，知道嘛，你都让我汗流浃背了。我说你该不会是走后门进来的吧？
Hey, friend. You know, you've got me breaking out in a sweat. Did you get a position here cos you know someone?
算了！别看我个头小，心里头却是一等一地宽容！
Forget it! I may be small, but I have a big and tolerant heart!
刚才说到哪儿了？噢，梦境酒店，那地方可不太平。
What was I saying? Oh, the hotel in the Dreamscape is not safe.

Siobhan doesn't let us go too far, but just between us, I saw lots of people over there a few days ago.

They were all wearing... something like... black suits! They wanted to arrest me when they saw me. I was so shocked I got teary-eyed. And in the end, guess what... they don't even dare to step foot in here. Hahaha!
我站在里面疯狂嘲讽，他们气得直冒烟呢，只能灰溜溜地走了。你说有意思不！

I stood inside and started wildly mocking them. They were so mad that smoke was coming out of their ears. All they could do was walk away with their tails between their legs. Pretty interesting, right?
好像有点口渴…再给我来杯味道<color=#dbc291ff>超级强烈</color>的饮料吧，要能让我回忆起戏耍他们的愉悦的那种！
I'm a little thirsty... Bring me another <color=#dbc291ff>super intense</color> drink, one that reminds me of the joys of playing tricks on them!
你做的好啊！喝这个仿佛就能体会到那些黑西装的苦涩心情，就像…呜呜，哭着回去找妈妈的那种感觉哈哈哈哈哈！
You did a good job! Drinking this, it's like I can feel the bitter emotions of those people in black suits. It's like... *sob* going home crying to your mother. Hahaha!
说了这么多话，感觉舒坦了不少。再差的酒保也是个酒保，总能陪你聊两句不是。
With all that said, I feel way more comfortable. I guess even a bad drinksmith is still a drinksmith who can spare you a word or two.
嗝。差不多饱了…走了走了。新人，你自己多保重！可别被舒翁吃了哦。
*hiccup* I think I've had enough... I'm off. Take care of yourself, newbie! Don't let that Siobhan eat you alive.
这是啥？还是我舌头出问题了？再尝一口……
What's this? Or is there something wrong with my taste buds? Let me taste it again...
喂，你该不会是个味盲吧？醋和糖浆都分不出来的那种，对着陌生人喊妈妈的那种？
Hey, are you unable to taste flavors, or something? You know, the kind of person who can't tell vinegar from sugar? Like the kind of person who would call a complete stranger "Mom"?
说了这么多话，感觉舒坦了不少。再差的酒保也是个酒保，总能陪你聊两句不是。
With all that said, I feel way more comfortable. I guess even a bad drinksmith is still a drinksmith who can spare you a word or two.

*hiccup* I think I've had enough... I'm off. Take care of yourself, newbie! Don't let that Siobhan eat you alive.
嘿，亲爱的朋友，不要溜走，本琥珀纪最惊艳的魔术表演即将拉开序幕！
Hey, my dear friend! Stick around, because the most mind-blowing magic show in this Amber Era is about to start!
或许，你已经见识过我身后这神奇的迷宫——我敢打包票，没人能在里面找到出口。
You might have noticed the incredible maze behind me. No one will ever find their way out of it.
而现在，表演就要开始，请耐心参与其中。
And now, the show is about to begin. Sit tight and join in.
去吧，燃起你的热血！当最后的三块拼图被补齐，我便会将迷宫的面貌改写。而魔术师的秘宝，亦将为你显形！
Get ready for a thrilling adventure! When the last three puzzle pieces fall into place, I'll reshape the maze, and the magician's secret treasure will be revealed to you!
可真是堵厚障壁，一眼望去，恐怕得凑齐整整十二位英雄的伟力才能将它洞开。
These walls are seriously strong. It would probably take a dozen heroes to break through them.
坚不可摧的事物总是从内部瓦解…从高处俯瞰世界，也许能找到开辟道路的谜题。
What seems impenetrable always cracks from within... Look from above, and you might find the puzzle that opens the path.
到全新的迷宫中寻找吧！我把财宝都藏在了那里——你仿佛能听到魔术师的耳语，他在期待赞美与掌声。
"Seek it out in a whole new maze! I've hidden all my treasures there!" It feels like you are hearing the magician's whisper, eager for praise and applause.
就这？本想对他的节目指点一二，但你忙着去找他的宝箱，还是算了。
Is that it? I wanted to give him some advice on his show, but you were too busy searching for his treasure chest, so forget it.
英雄，总算把您给盼来了，您要是再晚会儿，他们非得把脑袋给我削下来不可。
You finally made it here! If you didn't show up, they would've had my head.
也不知道是哪个家伙在公馆里搞的破坏，触发了建造之初设计的反入侵装置，办公室里的空间被弄得一团糟。
Someone messed up the Pavilion and triggered the security system we installed during construction. The office is a complete mess now.
装置的维修要很长一段时间，但里面的文件都有急用，必须得赶快抢救出来。
It'll take a while to fix the system, but the documents inside are urgently needed and must be salvaged quickly.
来的就您一个人，还面什么试啊？直接上吧。
You're the only one here. Let's just get started.
那些贪生怕死的家伙，一听到可能要和迷因打交道，我话都没说完就没影了。
Before I could even finish my words, those cowards just ran away as soon as they heard they might run into memes.
看到钱眼睛比激光炮还直，看到危险跑得比扑满还快，还得是英雄您威武豪迈。
Their eyes lit up like lasers when they heard about money, and they ran faster than a Trotter when they heard about danger. Now I'm counting on you, hero.
至于委托的报酬，说出来怕吓到您——可以直接兑换等额信用点的<unbreak>5000</unbreak>苜蓿币，怎样，没见过这么阔绰的手笔吧？
Now, for the reward... Brace yourself because this good news might shock you! It's <unbreak>5,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits! Enough to redeem the same amount of IPC credits! Incredible, right?
Who do you think I am, a beggar?
To be honest, you'll have to pay more.
这价位很不错了，其他同类的委托更低，<unbreak>5000</unbreak>还是因为在公馆才加的钱。放别人那儿，就这，还得再黑走您两千，五五分成已经不能再良心了。

That's a decent price. Other agents pay even less! You'll get <unbreak>5,000</unbreak> credits because we're in this Pavilion, and if it were someone else, they'd take another <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> credits from you! A <unbreak>50</unbreak>/<unbreak>50</unbreak> split like this is good enough.
这样，最后到手的钱我三你七，您拿七千，总行了吧？
Alright then, when everything's settled, I'll take <unbreak>30%</unbreak>, and you take <unbreak>70%</unbreak>. Deal?
时间不等人，上面的雇主们开始催进度了。看到我身后那扇门了吗？准备好了就出发吧。
Clock's ticking, and the higher-ups want some progress. See that door behind me? Set off whenever you're ready.
英雄，咱们辛辛苦苦跑了这么久，这些文件上都写了些什么，您就不好奇？
We've been working our butts off, hero. Aren't you curious about what's written on these papers?
只要偷偷看一眼，无论是敲他们一笔，还是卖给其他感兴趣的人，都大有搞头。
Let's just sneak a peek, and then we could either sell them to someone interested or use the content to blackmail those higher-ups.
Are the Bloodhounds into this, too?
我可从没说过自己是猎犬，咱就一打工的。
Hey, I never said I was a Bloodhound. I'm just an ordinary employee trying to make ends meet.
上头把委托交给猎犬，猎犬家系再把任务交到底下，底下的又把工作外包给我们，我们再替他们招人来干活，拿点「小费」很正常。

The Bloodhounds get these tasks from the top brass and then assign them to their agents. The agents then outsource the work to us, and then we help recruit people like you to handle it, so it's only fair that we take a little "tip" for ourselves.
欸？这几份文件…是不是有点？《美梦剧团的生产后护理》、《苏乐达的一百种喝法》，他们平时都看的啥啊。
Huh? These documents... seriously? Postpartum Care for Sweet Dreams Troupe, and A Hundred Ways to Drink SoulGlad...? What the heck are they reading in their leisure time?
英雄，您看，咱要不再进去一趟？外包嘛，不寒碜。
Maybe we should go in again, hero? Just outsourcing work, nothing big deal.
《关于增加筑梦经费的提案》、《白日梦酒店设备更新草案》，都在张嘴要钱。看来不止是咱们经费不够，上头也没钱，大家都不容易啊。
Proposal on Increasing Funding for Dream Construction Project, and Draft on Equipment Renewal in Reverie Hotel... all about asking for money. Looks like even the higher-ups are strapped for cash.
不过这回总该没——等等，为什么这份经费报表跟个拼图似的，只有半截…
But this time, there isn't... Wait, why does this funding statement look like a jigsaw puzzle? It's only half of it...
您有没有发现一个盲点？真想偷情报的从来没被防住，咱们这些劳碌命反而次次被绕得原地转圈。
Noticed something funny? These methods never prevent those who really intend to steal information. They only make us ordinary workers go in circles.
如果安全带只在需要解开的时候才结实，那它到底是安全带还是危险带？
If a seat belt is only fastened and sturdy when it needs to be unbuckled, is it a seat belt or a stupid belt?
算了，事情都办到这儿了，咱也不好拿着半截文件回去交差。最后回去一次，我保证。
Well, forget it. We can't just go back with half of the document. We'll go back one last time, I promise.
伯顿小心翼翼地把两份报表放在一起，纸质的文件上，密密麻麻的数字飞速闪动。
Burton carefully pieces the two parts of the statement together, and the numbers on the paper rapidly flash.
不愧是公馆的东西，这报表的内容居然是实时更新的。
This stuff updates in real time? As I'd expect from the Pavilion.
趁四下无人，英雄，咱们也来瞅瞅，被上头加急抢救出来的文件，到底有多重要。
Since there's no one around, let's take a peek at this document and see why the higher-ups are so desperate for it, hero.
您看，这儿还有批给找回这份文件的经费呢——什么？二十万！
Look at this, the document reveals the reward amount for those who retrieve it... Wait, WHAT!? <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> credits!?
到猎犬手里剩十五万，再分到底下各个人手里，怎么着也得有个五六万，那小子居然骗我说就到手了三万。
The Bloodhounds took a chunk, and the agents chipped away some more. In the end, my boss said the reward was only <unbreak>30,000</unbreak> credits.
难怪委托难度这么高，感情是把上头发的钱，都给吃了回扣了！亏我还在替他们哭穷，我呸，再穷也穷不到他们头上。
Tsk! No wonder this task is so tough! They've taken all the money and left us with a measly payout! And here I thought they were strapped for cash and I was trying to help them save money!
这是您的报酬，一分不少，如果有多的，就当是补偿您的辛苦费。
Here's your payment, not a penny less. And if it's more than the amount we agreed on, consider it as compensation for your hard work.
至于雇主那边，他胃口倒挺好，今儿个我非得去和他交流交流「感情」不可。
As for my boss, heh, seems like he's got a big appetite. I'm going to have a "little chat" with him today.
喔唷，实际状况可比我听到的版本的糟糕多了，怎么才给这点儿钱？
Geez, the actual situation is way worse than what I heard. If that's the case, why is the pay so paltry?
猎犬的误判吗？看来上头的人手确实不够。
Did the Bloodhounds miscalculate? Looks like they're really understaffed.
这是？跨星域出差旅费的报销单，这下有倒霉蛋要破费了。
What's this? An interstellar travel reimbursement? Now some poor soul has to foot the bill.
咱们还是再往更深处找找吧。
应该翻得差不多了，再找下去我估计得把墙皮都撕下来一层。
I think we're almost done. If we have to keep digging, then I guess we'll have to tear down the walls.
还是先从这里出去吧，在办公室里吐出来要扣钱的。
Let's just get out of here. We'll lose money if we end up puking in the office.
地形居然还带变的，筑梦师在设计反入侵装置的时候究竟经历了什么？
Hold on, the terrain even changes? What were the Dreamweavers thinking when they designed this security system?
这么复杂的结构，公司和反物质军团没防到，反倒把自己人给防了。
So complicated. They thought they could defend against the IPC or Antimatter Legion, but instead, they just ended up trapping their own people inside.
让我看看又是什么好东西…《匹诺康尼异常记录名册》，听起来不便宜。
Let's see what we've got this time... List of Anomalies in Penacony. Doesn't sound cheap.
靠！居然是本小说，欺骗我纯真的感情。
Heck! Can't believe it's just a novel! What a letdown!
呼，可真晕死我了，拿最少的钱，干最累的活。
Phew, this is a bit too much. Getting such paltry pay for the toughest job.
当然，比起我这微不足道的劳累，还是您最辛苦，请英雄先走。
But hey, you must be way more exhausted, hero. Go ahead.
这活儿对身体负担也太大了，难怪接单的时候都没人跟我抢。
This job is simply overwhelming for me. No wonder there were no competitors when I took it on.
最可气的是，外包工还不给买保险，万一有个受伤什么的，连赔偿都拿不到。
You know what's the most annoying part? We outsourced laborers aren't even covered by insurance. And if we get injured, we won't receive any compensation.
终于找到了，为了这剩下的半截报表，差点连这条小命都没保住。
Finally, I almost got myself killed for the other half of the document.
英雄，咱们出去把两截报表拼起来吧。
Let's get out of here and put the two parts together, hero.
嘘，猎犬离太近了，别让他们听见。
Shhh, the Bloodhounds are close by, we don't want them to hear us.
嘘，小声点，别让猎犬听见了。
Shhh, keep it down. We don't want the Bloodhounds to hear us.
呃…你知道我说的是啥吗？不玩绝对会后悔的。
Um... Do you know what I'm talking about? You'll definitely regret not playing the game.
如果你收到过我们的通知…就快说出「密码」吧。
If you've received a message from us... say the password.
你看过钟表小子，真不错！但不是这个！
Impressive! You've watched the Clockie series! But that's not the password!
你爱…不是不是，不是这个！
So, your favorite tea... No, no. That's not the password!
对了，这就是「哈努兄弟」和「仓鼠球骑士」的口头禅，知道这个，你就能拍他们的影片了。
Right! That's the catchphrase from Brother Hanu and Hamster Ball Knight. Since you know the answer, you'll be allowed to shoot their films.
我给你标好了拍摄区域，设备也给你弄好了，准备好就来吧。
I've marked the filming area and got the equipment ready. Come when you're ready.
Phew... We're in a safe area now.
我是影视乐园的工作人员，负责在封闭期间领你们这些游客来体验项目。
I'm a staff member of Clock Studios Theme Park, and I'll be your guide through the program while the park is closed.
唉，家族说什么安全检查…查到最后搞出了一堆惊梦剧团和忆域迷因，我们珍贵的超大银幕还被不知道什么东西砍成了两半，真是气人！

The Family said they were doing a security check... but ended up creating tons of Dreamjolt Troupe monsters and Memory Zone memes! And something even chopped our precious mega-screen in half. It's outrageous!
哎呀，抱歉，不该跟客人抱怨这么多的……
Oops, sorry. I shouldn't complain to guests...
现在这里的《仓鼠球骑士：速度与坚果》和另一侧的《哈努兄弟：狼之道》都开放了，欢迎您随时动工拍摄…呸，体验游玩！
Now Hamster Ball Knight: Fast & Furynuts and Brother Hanu: Way of the Wolf are available. Please feel free to work... I mean, have fun!
As I thought, you're trying to make me work for free...
呃…您先玩玩再说嘛，我们的设计师已经把影片的制作过程改的和游戏没什么两样了，而且您可以从中得到影视乐园准备的小礼品！
Well... why not give it a try first? Our designers have turned the movie production process into a game, and you'll get a small gift upon completion!
您收获快乐，我们解决动画排期问题，让更多宾客收获快乐，这不是大好事嘛！
You'll have fun, we'll solve the animation workload, and other guests will have fun too. Isn't this a perfect solution for everyone?
没什么事的话我就先走了，您玩的开心——别忘了游玩条款，拍摄作品版权归克劳克影业所有哦！
If there's nothing else, I'll take my leave. Have fun! And don't forget the terms! The copyright of the animations belongs to Clock Studios!
你将开拓小鸟摆放在街机上
You place the Trailbirder on the arcade machine
你将银狼小鸟摆放在街机上
You place the Silbird Wolf on the arcade machine
你将三月小鸟摆放在街机上
You place the March Bird on the arcade machine
你将流萤小鸟摆放在街机上
You place the Birefly on the arcade machine
你将知更小鸟摆放在街机上
You place the Robird on the arcade machine
你将翡翠小鸟摆放在街机上
You place the Jadebird on the arcade machine
眼前的小鸟轻轻松松叼起比你还大的街机，拍拍翅膀飞走了——
The little birdie in front of you picks up an arcade machine larger than you with ease and flies away...
嗨，您就是{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}吧？久仰久仰！我是鸢尾花家系的缇娜，之前的邀请函就是我发给您的！
Hi! You must be {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I'm so happy to finally meet you! I'm Tinah from the Iris Family, the one who invited you!
既然您应邀而来了，那么首先请让我为您简单介绍一下本次的测试内容吧：
Since you've come, let me briefly explain the test to you:
「折纸小鸟对对碰」是款由苜蓿草家系投资、鸢尾花家系研发制作的集换式街机对战游戏。
Origami Bird Clash is a multiplayer trading arcade machine battle game developed by the Iris Family, with the Alfalfa Family as investors.
游戏方式很简单：我们现已将用来对战的*街机*投放到了匹诺康尼的各个角落，您需要根据我们提供的*地图*找到它们。
The gameplay is simple: Arcade machines used for battles have been placed all over Penacony, and you'll have to find them with the help of the map we provide.
被找回的街机将被集中放置在这艘船上，测试者们可在此通过街机进行对战。
Recovered arcade machines will all be stored on this airship, and testers can use them to play against each other.
好了，更多的内容我就先不赘述了，您还是亲自体验一下吧。
Alright, I won't bore you any further with more details. After all, it's much more interesting to try it out yourself!
瞧，这是本次活动的初始街机，简称「初号机」。您可以使用本台机器进行身份信息录入，从而获得自己的专属ID卡。
Now, if you look over here, you'll find the first arcade machine of this event, Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>. Register your personal information on it, and you'll receive your own ID card.
没错，就是这样。那么现在，您拥有自己的「专属折纸小鸟」了——如您所见，每位玩家的折纸小鸟，都是根据其形象专门定制生成。
Exactly like that, yes. You now have your very own Origami Bird. As you can see, the design of every player's Origami Bird is tailored to their likeness.
那么现在，事不宜迟，我们先来进行基础的新手教学吧？
Shall we get right to the tutorial for newbies now?
我们先去这次的活动场地看看，请随我来！
Let's take a look at the event venue, come with me!
很好，您已经基本掌握玩法了。那么接下来请根据初号机的内置地图，出发寻找更多的街机，并解锁更多的玩法与功能吧！
Great! You've mastered the basics. You can now use Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>'s built-in map to find more arcade machines and unlock more gameplay and features!
游戏期间如有任何问题或意见，欢迎随时向我反馈。您的支持将会是我们前进的动力。
If you have any doubts or feedback while playing, please approach me anytime. Your support is what motivates us to do better.
那么接下来，愿您度过一段愉快的时光。
With that, I wish you an enjoyable gaming session!
总算走了，这新手教程可真不怎么样……
She's finally gone. This tutorial kind of sucks...
Yo! I haven't seen you in a while. Missed me?
Take a guess? I'll tell you if you get it right.
不错嘛，很高兴见到你还保持着最基本的警觉…放心吧，我的投影经过了特殊的加密处理，目前只有你能看到。
Not bad! Glad to see you've still got your wits about you. Don't worry, my hologram is encrypted. You're the only one who can see it right now.
怎么样，看到我这么「咻——」地一下出现在面前，你就没什么想说的吗？
Well? Don't you have anything to say after seeing me pop up in front of you so suddenly?
When did you hack your way in?
Take a guess. I'll tell you if you get it right.
Take a guess if I'm gonna take a guess?
算了，不逗你了——还记得之前给你们打包的隐藏地图作弊代码吗？为了保证星穹列车的诸位不会卡关，我特意在里面加了个小彩蛋。

Meh, I'll stop teasing. Remember the cheat code for the hidden map I gave you some time back? To ensure that everyone from the Astral Express can clear the stages, I've specially added a small Easter egg inside.
哈？我是那么无聊的人吗！有这个时间我还不如去养只电子宠物玩玩。
Huh? Do you think I've got nothing better to do? If I had the time for that, I'd spend it playing with a virtual pet.
还记得之前给你们打包的隐藏地图作弊代码吗？为了保证星穹列车的诸位不会卡关，我特意在里面加了个小彩蛋。
Remember the cheat code for the hidden map I gave you some time back? To ensure that everyone from the Astral Express can clear the stages, I've specially added a small Easter egg within.
你就这么对我念念不忘？
You must think of me all the time.
…你脑子中病毒了吗？还念念不忘，你又不是我的星际网络账号……
...Has your brain been infected with a virus? Me, think of you all the time? Don't kid yourself. It's not like you're my Interastral Network account.
跟你直说吧，还记得之前给你们打包的隐藏地图作弊代码吗？为了保证星穹列车的诸位不会卡关，我特意在里面加了个小彩蛋。

I'll just get to the point. Remember the cheat code for the hidden map I gave you some time back? To ensure that everyone from the Astral Express can clear the stages, I've specially added a small Easter egg within.
怎么样——惊不惊喜、意不意外？
Surprise! Didn't see that coming, did you?
没必要这么戒备，我要是真想做什么手脚的话早就下手了，也没必要现在出现在你面前。
Hey now, don't get your hackles up. If I were up to no good, I wouldn't have waited until now to do it, nor would I be appearing before you now.
放心吧，那玩意只能在梦里起作用，而且保质期也差不多就要过了。
Relax, that thing only works in dreams. Besides, its shelf life will be over soon.
那么现在，我们可以进入正题了吧？
Can we now move on to more important matters?
我这次来呢，目的很简单，就是为了你在测试的这款「折纸小鸟对对碰」。
I'm here for a very simple reason: The Origami Bird Clash game you're testing.
这游戏虽然本身玩法无聊的很，还毫无挑战性，来头却并不那么简单——
Although the game is terribly boring and kind of mindless, the people behind it aren't simple.
公司那帮家伙趁着谐乐大典和家族搭上了线，这事你肯定知道。但我猜你不知道的是，这游戏就是家族为了示好，投给公司的「问路石」。

I'm sure you're aware that those guys in the IPC made use of the Charmony Festival to hook up with The Family. But I bet you didn't know that this game is The Family's way of testing the waters and a show of goodwill to the IPC.
苜蓿草家系投资、鸢尾花家系研发制作，而公司负责运营——这么有趣的一组COMBO，我会好奇不也合情合理吗？
The Alfalfa Family invests in the game, the Iris Family develops it, and the IPC manages it. An intriguing combo, don't you think? It's only natural for me to be curious, no?
这么一说我也有点好奇。
Now that you mention it, I'm starting to get a little curious too.
那既然你同意了，ID卡借我用用，放那就行——
Well, since you've agreed to it, let me use your ID for a while. Just place it over there and—
What do you need my ID for?
当然是和我一起玩游戏啊。我先用你的账号拷贝一份数据……
To play the game with me, of course. I'll copy the data from your account first...
对，就放那儿…别乱动，马上就好。
Yes, just place it there... Don't move, it'll take just a minute.
搞定——让我看看，嗯…「根据街机附带的地图寻找线索」…{NICKNAME}你还等什么呢？快点启动「初号机」啊！
Got it — Let's see, hmm... "Find clues according to the map in the arcade machine"... {NICKNAME}, what are you waiting for? Hurry up and launch Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>!
竟然还有线下互动流程，是因为知道原本的玩法过于简单，所以想增加一些跑腿的流程来找补吗…哼，设计思路还真好猜。

Whoa, there are actually offline interactive processes. Are they making people do in-person fetch quests because they know the game is too simple and want to make up for it? Hmph, it's so easy to tell what they're thinking.
看那边的NPC——就是那些聚在一起的广告牌，那边肯定有东西。
Look at the NPC over there... Yeah, those billboards gathered together. Something's definitely up with them.
这么简陋的Demo也好意思拿出来测试，我果真不该抱有任何期待……
I can't believe they have the nerve to release such a crude demo for testing. Shouldn't have expected better...
准备好了吗？好了就赶紧开始，我倒要看看对战的部分能做成什么样……
Ready? Then let's get started. I want to see how they designed the combat system...
吵死了啾！好想狠狠揍它们一顿啾！
Pipe down, tweet! I really want to teach them a lesson, tweet!
Phew, finally, some peace and quiet, tweet~
Tweet! You found me! Tweet tweet!
虽说按流程，我现在该给你出「谜题」了啾，不过嘛……
According to the procedures, I should be giving you a puzzle to solve, but...
谢谢你把我从要了鸟命的噪音里解救出来，就算你合格了啾！
I'm going to mark you as having cleared it since you saved me from that horrendous noise that could drive even a bird crazy, tweet!
I'll be off then, tweet tweet!
…就这？就算是作为Demo，这流程也太简单了吧？
...That's it? Isn't this a bit too simple even for a demo?
根本就是个白盒好吗，里里外外都透着敷衍…算了，总之先回去看看街机的内置游戏做得怎么样吧。
It's pretty much just white-box testing at this rate. Everything is so perfunctory... Forget it, let's just go back and see how the arcade's built-in games are doing for now.
唔…倒是比我想象中要好些，权当消遣放松一下也不错…嗯，你怎么了？
Uh, it's surprisingly better than I expected it to be. Maybe I can take this as an opportunity to relax and have a break... Hm? What's up with you?
俗话说得好，胜败乃PVP常事，偶尔赢我一局，你也不至于激动得都快掉帧了吧？

You know what they say about PVP games: You win a few, and you lose a few. No need to get all worked up just because you beat me in an occasional round, is there? You're about to start dropping frames.
不过你这家伙操作意识倒还不错，下次要不要和我一起来打……
You seem pretty good at handling yourself in games, though. Next time, why don't we play...
锵锵——恭喜您解锁了第一台街机！那么接下来，请让我为您介绍折纸小鸟街机自带的DIY功能！
Ta-da! Congratulations! You've unlocked the first arcade machine! Now, allow me to show you the Origami Bird Arcade Machine's built-in DIY feature.
在通过街机进行对战并获得胜利后，您的ID卡自动将录入对手的信息，获得对方的折纸小鸟皮肤，甚至*技能*！
After winning an arcade machine battle, your ID card will automatically save data on your opponent, granting you their Origami Bird skin and abilities!
这也就意味着，您有机会使用其他玩家的专属小鸟进行对战！怎么样，是不是非常令人心动——
In other words, you'll be able to use another player's bird in combat. Doesn't that sound wonderfully exciting?
而除此之外，卡片中存储的小鸟形象还可以通过特殊方式打印出来，请让我为您演示操作方法！
What's more, by employing a special method, you can even print images of birds saved to your card. Here, allow me to demonstrate!
…啧，这破玩意怎么这么高，设计的时候就不能考虑一下皮皮西玩家吗……
...Tch, why is this piece of junk so tall? Couldn't they have spared a thought for Pepeshi players when they were designing it?
您看，就是这样——那么您快来试试将您自己的小鸟也摆上去吧！
See? That's how you do it. Now, try placing your own bird up there!
您做得非常好。事实上，对于DIY模块，我们还设计开发了其它玩法，只是本次测试中尚未实装。
Nicely done! We actually designed more game modes for the DIY module, but they haven't been implemented. Not for this test, anyway.
为表歉意，刚刚的基础款黄金小鸟就送给您了。
As amends, you can have this basic Golden Bird you saw earlier.
哈，形象还能自定义？玩法本身虽然还有提升空间，周边系统倒是弄得像模像样的嘛。
Oh, you can customize the design? The game mode itself could use some work, but I guess the peripheral gameplay systems aren't too shabby.
Yep, that looks so much better.
你那是什么表情…放心，这个投影我也做了信息加密，不会被发现的。
Why are you looking at me like that? Don't worry, I encrypted the hologram. No one's gonna notice.
Who died and made you Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>?
Don't like it? Well, too bad.
那么我就先不打扰啦，祝您接下来玩得开心~
Alright, I'll leave you to it now. I hope you enjoy the game!
这个NPC可真生动。要是这次的测试流程能有她一半活泼就好了……
This NPC is so cheerful. If only the test has some of that vitality too...
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
啾——你好聪明！人家好喜欢你！
Tweet! You're so clever! I like you!
哇！这就是折纸小鸟吗？好可爱啊——
Wow! Is this an Origami Bird? It's so cute!
喂！听听你说的是人话吗——好歹都是一辆车上下来的，我怎么就不能收到邀请了！
Hey! Rude. We both disembarked from the same train. Of course I got an invite too!
再说了，先前折腾了那么久，我也得歇口气放松一下心情嘛。
Besides, after everything we went through, I deserve a break to unwind too.
唉，说到这个我就郁闷，怎么最近每次度假都跟仙舟话本里的渡劫似的……
*sigh* Talking about it is making me all depressed. Why are our vacations all ending in trials and tribulations lately? It's like we're in one of those Xianzhou stories!
还记得我入梦前怎么说的吗？「说不定还会有亲人反目、家破人亡、阴阳两隔、血流成河之类的经典桥段」，没想到就真这么刺激。

Do you remember what I said before we entered the dream? "Maybe we'll even witness classic scenarios like family feuds, tragic losses, worlds torn apart, espionage situations, rivers running red with blood, stuff like that"? Honestly, who'd have thought that things would really turn out that exciting?
呃…咱们应该也不是什么高危命途吧……
Um, we are not actually on a super dangerous Path... Are we?
少来！这跟我有什么关系啊，你别诬陷本姑娘！
Huh? Hey, it's not my fault! Don't go blaming me!
你这么一说，我都考虑去给黑天鹅小姐当个学徒了。你瞧，我要是学成了，每次跃迁之前算上一卦，保准当次的开拓之旅顺顺利利的……

But since you've brought it up, maybe I should take a lesson or two from Miss Black Swan. Think about it: If I master the art, I can divine our future before we do a warp jump. It'll guarantee a smooth trailblazing expedition for sure!
…那个黑天鹅还会算卦？那不是仙舟的玩意吗……
...Black Swan knows the art of divination? I thought that was a Xianzhou thing.
而且到时候一下车，我就往路边支个摊子一坐，帕姆就再也不用担心经费问题了！
And the next time we disembark, I'll just set up a roadside stall doing this, and Pom-Pom will never have to worry about our expenses again!
我觉得比起黑天鹅小姐…
Instead of Miss Black Swan, Back'n & Forth...
阿来阿往或许更合适你。
Back'n & Forth might make better mentors for you.
嗯？这俩人不是说相声…等等，你骂谁呢！你才……
Ah? Aren't those two the crosstalk comedy duo? ...Wait a sec, that's a backhanded comment! You...
啾！坏人类——让鸟久等——人家走了啾！
Tweet! Bad humans, bad! Making a birdie wait! I'm leaving, tweet!
呃…不好意思啊，你别生气……
Sorry, sorry. Don't get your feathers ruffled...
怎么搞得像我欺负鸟似的…算了，要不我们边回船上边说？
Oh, now I sound like I'm bullying a bird... Forget it. Why don't we talk on the way back to the ship?
这么快就恢复精神了？小姑娘还挺有活力。
You sure recovered fast. That's some spirit you have.
大概这就是「开拓」的命途吧……
That's the Path of Trailblaze for you, I suppose...
怎么还不过来…在那嘀嘀咕咕什么呢，不会是在说我坏话吧？

可恶，美少女永不认输！不行——再和我来一局！

对了，旁边那两台街机上的折纸小鸟是怎么回事？其中有一只是你的小鸟吧，我的也可以摆上去吗？
By the way, what's up with the Origami Birds on those two arcade machines by the side? One of them is yours, right? Can I put mine there too?
哇，好可爱…真不愧是本姑娘的专属小鸟，简直就是鸟中美少女嘛！
Wow, it's so cute! That's a bird befitting of a girl like me, alright! It's a beauty even among birds, no doubt about it!
你这边结束了？你的同伴要一起…呃，算了，看来还是不要打扰她了。
Are you done here? Does your friend want to... Uh, never mind. Let's not bother her.
我刚刚更新了一下ID卡里的数据，现在继续？
I just updated the data in the ID card. Wanna keep going?
唔…美少女的折纸小鸟应该叫什么…美少鸟？不行不行，听着太怪了……
Hmm... What should a pretty girl's Origami Bird be called? Birdy girl? Nope, not that, it's so weird...
对了，据说你能在梦里看到别人看不见的东西，还能改变别人的情绪…是吗？
By the way, I heard you can see things that other people can't in your dreams, and you can also alter people's emotions... Is it true?
这能力简直就像开了挂一样，有机会可以让我研究一下吗？
That's totally a cheat code if you ask me. Mind letting me look into those abilities of yours sometime?
绕来绕去的我要晕3D了，就不能给个自动寻路吗——
We've been going around in circles for so long. The 3D graphics are gonna make me sick if this goes on! Why isn't there an auto-navigation feature...
Tweet! You found me! Tweet tweet!
我和拼图先生已经在这里等很久啦！
Mr. Jigsaw and I have been waiting here forever!
快点快点，我早就准备好了！
Hurry up! I'm ready to go!
个鬼啊！知不知道什么叫先来后到！
Yeah, right! Ever heard of "get in line"!?
And I was here first, woof!
屁嘞，我更高，所以我先来的，懂？
Shut your trap. I'm taller, so I got here first. Got it?
你与银狼兴致勃勃地吃着这没头没尾的瓜。然而由于太过投入，你们并未注意到苏乐达瓶内渐渐飙升的气压……
You and Silver Wolf are so immersed in watching the drama that neither of you notices the rising pressure in the SoulGlad bottle...
That was close... {NICKNAME}, are you okay?
Don't mention it. I'm just glad you're okay.
You can catch bullets with your bare hands too?
呃…没这么夸张吧？而且为什么是「也」啊？
Um, that's a little overstating it. And what do you mean by "too"?
我只是想到处逛逛，毕竟之前一直没什么时间……
I'm just looking around since I didn't have the time to do that before...
你竟然跑这里来了，我还以为你对这种地方没兴趣呢。
I didn't expect to see you here. I thought you'd have had enough of the Golden Hour by now.
嗯，我原本打算稍微转转，然后就去绿洲的时刻，不过没想到这么巧，竟然遇见了你们，还是两个人一起。
Mm-hmm, I was actually planning to go to the Moment of Oasis after wandering a little longer. I wasn't expecting to bump into the two of you — and both at the same time, too.
嗯，我也觉得和{NICKNAME}非常投缘。
Yes, I feel like we get along wonderfully too, {NICKNAME}.
因为银狼对我念念不忘。
Silver Wolf said she was thinking of me all the time.
没完了是吧！再这样小心你的账号……
Are we still talking about that!? Don't forget, I can access your account...
不过这里吵成这样，也真亏你待得下去。
That said, I'm surprised you stuck around in a place this crowded.
人多热闹嘛，看着大家这样有活力，我感觉自己的情绪都稍微高涨起来了。
The more, the merrier, as they say. Besides, seeing everyone so chipper kind of lifts my spirits too.
对了，既然正巧遇到，{NICKNAME}要再来一起拍张合照吗？
Oh, since we've run into each other... {NICKNAME}, would you like to take another photo together?
我觉得这地方还挺有纪念意义的，而且离开梦境之后，大概就很难再有这样相处的机会了……
This place makes for a memory worth remembering. Besides, it'll be hard for us to hang out together like this again once we leave the Dreamscape...
要拍照也不用急于这一会儿，你的假期离结束还早着呢。不过既然在这里遇到了，那正好，来和我们一起玩吧。
Chill out, you've still got plenty of time before your holiday's over. No need to take that photo right away. That said, since we've run into each other, why don't you join us for some games?
还记得你在{TEXTJOIN#87}上见过的街机吗？现在家族打算在那玩意的基础上开发一款新游戏。
Remember those arcade machines you saw on {TEXTJOIN#87}? The Family plans to develop a new game based on them.
我和{NICKNAME}正在对这游戏进行测试，你要是没什么事，就也一起吧。
{NICKNAME} and I are testing the game for them now. If you don't have anything on at the moment, why not join us?
呃…但我还在猎犬家系的通缉名单里呢……
Uh... I'm still wanted by the Bloodhound Family, though.
保护美少女我义不容辞！
I'll do my best to protect a pretty young lady!
哈哈…谢谢你。不过是我的错觉吗，这话怎么听着有点耳熟……
Haha, thanks. I appreciate the gesture. Still, is it me, or have I heard that line somewhere else before...?
…倒也不必，一个信号干扰插件就能解决的问题。
No need to go through that trouble. A signal jammer plug-in will do the trick.
嗯，那就一起吧。不过先说好，我可不擅长打游戏哦。
Count me in, then! But don't say I didn't warn you: Gaming isn't my forte.
怕什么，就那点难度，还不如你平时操作萨姆呢。走吧{NICKNAME}，我们先把街机薅出来，然后回去给她开个账号。
Oh, please. Controlling SAM's way harder! You have nothing to worry about. Come on, {NICKNAME}, let's go get that arcade machine. We'll create an account for her after that!
怎么样，基本玩法都会了吗？会了就先去打一局练练手。
How's it going? Gotten the hang of it yet? If you're ready, you can try a practice match.
那…{NICKNAME}，可以稍稍陪我玩一会儿吗？
Um... {NICKNAME}, if it's alright with you, could you play the game with me just a bit?
你看起来有点兴致缺缺……
不然呢？就算是DEMO，做成这样也很难让人有动力继续肝下去吧……
Yeah. I know it's just a demo, but the direction they took for the game does nothing to motivate their players to continue the grind.
这种游戏大概也就能忽悠忽悠那些轻度玩家了吧，比如和你同车那个小姑娘……
Games like this are only good for casuals... Like that girl who came here on the same train as you.
怎么样，基本玩法都会了吗？会了就先去打一局练练手。
How's it going? Gotten the hang of it yet? If you're ready, you can try a practice match.
那…{NICKNAME}，可以稍稍陪我玩一会儿吗？
Um... {NICKNAME}, if it's alright with you, could you play the game with me just a bit?
我已经准备好了，随时可以开始哦。
I'm good to go, so we can start anytime.
啾——我***的两个**，气死鸟了啾！
Tweet! #@%$ the two $@%#^$%, I'm so livid, tweet!
嚯，这NPC还挺有个性…正好，*干扰插件*搞定了，我们也回去吧。
Oh? This NPC sure has a mouth... Okay, so... *disrupt plugin* and done. Let's go back.
Get out of my way, tweet!
要被踩扁了啾！爪子倒是先挪一挪啊，傻狗！！！
You're about to get trampled, tweet! Move your paw aside, stupid dog!!!
什么玩意啊这都！*美梦小镇文明用语*…我啾啾的——*美梦小镇文明用语*啾！
Just what in the world! *Dreamville expletive* I tweet tweet *Dreamville expletive* tweet!
呼…别让我再见到它们，尤其是那只傻狗，不然尾巴毛都给它啄秃了！
Hoo... Don't let me see them again, especially that stupid dog. Or else, I'll make sure to chew up all of its tail hair!
你…还有你们啾！就知道在那闲聊，我都被压成纸片儿了，也不说先把我拔出来啾！
You! And you, tweet! Having fun chit-chatting? I've been flattened into being a flap of paper! Get me out of here, tweet!
You are an Origami Bird though... You're made of paper...
这叫修辞！修辞不懂吗！你该不会连折纸大学都没上过吧啾？
It's a figure of speech, don't you know!? You didn't even go to Paperfold University, did you?
算了，既然你们发现了我，那我也得遵守规则啾！
Forget it. Since you found me, I should stick to the rules, tweet!
我先回船上了…啧，羽毛都压皱了啾……
I'll go back to the airship first... Tsk, my feathers are all crumpled up, tweet...
虽然是意料之中的结果…但等我好好练习过之后，{NICKNAME}可以再和我玩一局吗？
I knew this would happen, but... Oh, well. I'll practice some more. When I'm done, {NICKNAME}, will you play another round with me?
We can play as many rounds as you like!
那…你们继续去玩吧，我大概还需要一点时间来熟悉这款游戏。
Um, you can go ahead and play without me. I probably need a bit more time to get the knack of the game.
…真的假的，竟然开始上头了…喂，我说{NICKNAME}，你是有什么「对萤特攻宝具」吗？
...I can't believe it. Are you getting hooked on the game!? Hey, {NICKNAME}, fess up. Do you have a special "Anti-Firefly Noble Phantasm" or something?
咳…你知道我之前尝试过多少次拉她一起打游戏吗？策略的、动作的、休闲的、模拟经营的…但凡能推荐的我都推过了，这家伙却始终兴致缺缺。
Uh, do you have any idea how many times I've tried to convince her to game with me? Strategy, action, casual, simulation... I've suggested everything under the sun, but she never shows any interest.
Who'd have thought this day would ever come... Tsk tsk...
银狼说的那些游戏我都尝试过啦。但实话实说，跟萨姆的操作系统相比，那些游戏的设计都显得过于…平淡了。
I tried all those games that Silver Wolf mentioned, actually. But in all honesty, compared to SAM's operating system, those games are all a little... bland.
…啧，真羡慕你。那{NICKNAME}你先继续吧，我在这里指导指导流萤。反正后面的流程都大同小异，我也没什么兴趣。

Tsk, wish I were you. Anyway, {NICKNAME}, feel free to go on ahead. I'll stay behind to teach Firefly a few tips and tricks first. The mechanics in the later stages are pretty much all the same anyway, so I'm not too keen on playing anymore.
这是…这只折纸小鸟…是不是和我有点像？
Oh, this is... Is it my imagination, or does this Origami Bird look a little like me?
这就是你的专属小鸟，根据你的形象生成的那种。你看，那边还有一只我的呢。
Mm-hmm, this is your exclusive little bird. It was made in your likeness. Look, mine's over there.
好可爱啊…{NICKNAME}、银狼，谢谢你们！我非常喜欢。
It's so cute. Thank you, {NICKNAME}, Silver Wolf! I love it.
啧啧，你这家伙…倒是很会嘛，难不成还是个恋爱养成游戏老手？
Tsk tsk, not bad... Could you have been a pro in romance games?
真的假的…那要不我给你推荐几款，方便入坑？我只玩精品，绝对保质保量。
