What can I say? I'm a pro at winning people over.
很自信嘛。那回头我们找款新游戏比一比，看谁先打出全结局呗？
Feeling confident, aren't we? Then let's pick a new game later and see who clears all the endings first?
恋爱养成游戏…是什么类型的游戏？要不也带我一起玩吧？
Romance games... what kind of games are those? Can you show me how to play them?
咳…不说闲话了。{NICKNAME}，你该干什么就干什么去吧，我还得带流萤继续特训呢。
Ahem... Let's get back to business. Feel free to go on ahead without us, {NICKNAME}. I'm staying with Firefly to continue her special training.
{NICKNAME}？没想到能在这里遇见。你也是来参加那个折纸小鸟游戏测试的吗？
{NICKNAME}? I didn't think I would be able to meet you here. Are you here to test the game about Origami Birds too?
我最近刚好想要稍微散散心，就过来看看。
I felt like I needed a change of pace lately, so I decided to pop by.
You like playing video games too?
不…其实我并不擅长玩游戏，只是最近想要稍微散散心，就过来看看。
Not really... Games aren't my strong suit, to be honest. But I felt like I needed a change of pace lately, so I decided to pop by.
我记得{NICKNAME}你应该很擅长游戏吧？毕竟每次看到你时都是手机不离手…那接下来，我可以和你一起吗？
If I recall correctly, {NICKNAME}, you're quite the expert at games, right? After all, I've never seen you without your phone in your hands. Do you mind if I join you?
那句话是怎么说的来着…「大佬，请带带我」——是这样的没错吧？
How do they say it again? ...Oh, I remember now. "Carry me, please!" Did I get it right?
在银河间巡演的时候，曾有位朋友送了我一本童谣。故事的主角是位没有名字的勇者。
Back when I was on a cosmic tour, a friend once gave me a children's book. The protagonist of the story was a hero without a name.
那位勇者肩负着打败魔王、拯救公主的使命，四处冒险、走遍了大陆的每一个角落。
Tasked with the duty of vanquishing the demon lord and rescuing the princess, the hero walked every corner of the land, going on adventure after adventure.
旅途中他不时会遇到一种调皮的小精灵。它们喜欢捉迷藏，被找到时还会发出某种奇怪的笑声，就像刚刚的小鸟一样……
During the journey, he occasionally encounters mischievous little sprites. They enjoy playing hide and seek, and when found, they emit a strange laughter, just like the little bird from earlier...
虽是给小孩子看的童谣，但那本书的情节非常精彩动人。一路上，勇者遇到了许多的神奇生物，也见到了各异的美丽风景。

Although it's a tale for children, the story is incredibly exciting and engaging. During his journey, the hero encountered so many fantastic creatures and witnessed so many unique and breathtaking places.
他在草原上驰骋、攀登雪峰、穿越沙漠、甚至曾抵达过炙热的地心……
He rode across fields, scaled snowy peaks, and crossed deserts, even reaching as far as the fiery core of the planet...
那勇者最后打败魔王了吗？
Did he vanquish the demon lord in the end?
那勇者最后救出公主了吗？
Did he rescue the princess in the end?
唔…大概吧。奇怪，那本书我曾反复读过好几遍，如今却记不清故事的结局了。
Hm... I think so? Strange, I've read that book so many times, but I can't seem to recall how it ends.
但和勇者一同冒险的那种身临其境的感受，直到今天仍然记忆犹新。
At any rate, that feeling of immersion like I'm still adventuring with the hero is still fresh in my mind even now.
就好像一首经典的歌曲一样，即便已然忘却准确的歌词曲调，可曲中传达的某种心绪、情感、企望，已然深植于人们的心间……

It's like listening to a classic song. Even if the lyrics and melody have become fuzzy, it doesn't change how the emotions, nuances, and feelings of longing expressed in the song have engraved themselves on the listener's heart...
啊，抱歉，耽误得似乎有些久了…我们现在是不是该回去了？
Ah, I'm sorry! I held you up for a while, didn't I? Is it time we head back?
{NICKNAME}，你终于回来了！快快快，和我来一局，这次我定要一雪前耻！
You're finally back, {NICKNAME}! Hurry up and play a match with me. This time around, I will avenge my previous loss!
咦…原来还有其他人在，这位小姐是？
Huh... There are other people here as well. Who are you, miss?
是我，三月小姐。好久不见，很高兴见到你。
It's me, Miss March. It's good to see you again.
这个声音…难道是知——咳、咳咳咳！
This voice... sounds like Ro— *cough, cough cough*!
梦里就是这点好，无论外貌还是嗓音，乔装起来都非常方便。
This is why dreams are such wonderful things — it's so convenient to disguise myself, from my appearance to my voice.
确实方便，我刚刚根本没认出来，哈哈…所以知更鸟小姐也是来这里测试游戏的吗！我觉得这个游戏超好玩诶……
So convenient that I couldn't even recognize you at all, haha... So, are you also here to test out the game, Miss Robin? I think it's a really fun one...
是啊，我刚刚和{NICKNAME}玩了一局，感觉还挺有趣的。
Yes, I just played a match with {NICKNAME} and it was indeed quite interesting.
哇，有这种好事{NICKNAME}你竟然不叫我！我也想和知更鸟小姐一起玩…所以你们谁赢了？
Wha... I can't believe you didn't tell me about this, {NICKNAME}! I want to play the game with Miss Robin too... So, who won in the end?
呵，少嘚瑟，待会先来与我大战三百回合！
Hah, don't be so cocky. Later, let's have a one-on-one battle!
对我怎么不见你这么谦虚，待会先来与我大战三百回合！
You're just pretending to be humble. Later, let's have a one-on-one battle!
对了，{NICKNAME}，你先把知更鸟小姐的折纸小鸟摆上，给我看……
Oh right, {NICKNAME}, you should place Miss Robin's Origami Bird first, so that I can take a look at it...
嗨——嗨！各位，我又来了——请大家一同恭喜{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
Hello! Ladies and gentlemen, it's me again... Please join me in congratulating {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!
既然您已率先集齐了四台街机，那么请让我为您送上本次测试的纪念奖励——「折纸小鸟街机·限定豪华款」！
Since you managed to collect four arcade machines first, allow me to give you the souvenir for this test: A limited-edition deluxe version of the Origami Bird Arcade Machine!
那么，在本次测试流程的最后，请允许我向诸位介绍一位贵客——
Well then, as we come to the end of the test, allow me to introduce a guest to all of you...
今天的熟面孔可真不少…没想到这么快就又见面了，诸位。
There are quite a number of familiar faces here today... I didn't expect to meet all of you again so soon.
呃，你好，翡翠女士，好巧啊……
Ah, hello, Madam Jade. What a coincidence...
我原本只是顺路替托帕跑一趟，验收下项目进度，倒是未曾想还有这惊喜……
I was only intending to do Topaz a favor and check on the progress of this project. I certainly didn't expect to be surprised as well...
难得这么热闹，我不妨也来添个彩头。
Since there's such a lively crowd, let's give them something to cheer about.
这位小姐，可以请你替我陪他们玩一局吗？
Miss, would you play a match on my behalf?
咦？当、当然没问题，翡翠女士！
厉害厉害，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，难怪您能在测试中拔得头筹！
How impressive! No wonder you were able to come in first during the test, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!
那么恭喜，现在这只美丽优雅、娴静端庄的小鸟属于您了！不赶紧摆出来看看吗？
In that case, my heartiest congratulations, for this beautifully elegant and quietly dignified bird now belongs to you! Are you not going to place it right now?
在缇娜闪闪发光的企盼眼神中，你将翡翠小鸟摆上了最后的街机。
As Tinah looks on, her eyes sparkling with anticipation, you place the Jadebird on the final arcade machine.
完美！非常完美——好啦，那么眼看着本次测试就要接近尾声了，诸位要不要一起拍照留个纪念？
Perfect! Utterly perfect... Alright, seeing as the test is coming to an end, shall we take a group photo to commemorate this moment?
拍照吗？好呀好呀，带我一个！知…你要来吗？
A photo? Sure thing, count me in! Ro... *ahem*, are you joining in?
Huh... I can be in the photo, too?
去呗，之前你不就想和{NICKNAME}合照吗。
Go on, didn't you want to take a photo with {NICKNAME} earlier?
Um... how about you, Madam Jade?
我就不必了吧，毕竟…这地方的人际关系有些复杂呢。万一照片被其他人看到的话，那影响可不太好。
That won't be necessary. After all... the social dynamics of this place are quite complicated. It would be rather unfortunate if the photo is seen by others.
噢？噢…理解，理解。那么，除了翡翠女士以外的各位，请移步这边……
Oh? Oh... I see. In that case, apart from Madam Jade, would everybody come over to this side...
很好，那么我宣布——本次「折纸小鸟对对碰」白盒测试正式告一段落！
Perfect! I hereby announce that the Origami Bird Clash white-box testing has officially come to an end!
…哈，我就说吧，果然就是个白盒……
Ha, told you! It was totally a white-box test...
非常感谢各位的参与，后续我们将根据测试数据及获得的意见反馈，对游戏进行更深度的打磨，敬请期待！

Everybody, thank you very much for participating. We'll use the data gathered from the test and the feedback provided by you to improve the game even further. Please look forward to the final release!
此外，已投放的样机将作为纪念品留在大厅里，本次测试结束后依旧可以使用哦。
In addition, the used prototypes will be kept in the hall as souvenirs, so you'll still be able to access them even after the end of this test.
什么，还可以继续玩吗？好耶——
What? We can continue to play the game? Yay!
没错！并且这些街机中已录入本次测试玩家的对战数据，能够生成更高强度的关卡供大家挑战……

Indeed! Not only that, the battle data of all players who participated in this test have been recorded in these arcade machines, allowing them to generate even more difficult stages for all of you to challenge...
Yo, looks like there's even DLC over there?
嗯，她估计早就发现了。 不过问题不大，我们这就要溜了——对了，你不是说想去「绿洲的时刻」吗？反正我现在也无聊得很，干脆和你一起好了。

Yes, she probably found out about us long ago. However, it's no big deal, for it's time for us to slip away... Right, didn't you mention that you wanted to visit the Moment of Oasis? Since I have nothing else to do right now, I'll go with you.
既然这样…机会难得，要不要去日光公园逛逛？我还从来没和人一起「野餐」过…嗯，出任务期间那种不算。而且梦里的公园应该没有昆虫吧？

In that case... since this is a rare opportunity, shall we visit Sunshine Park? I've never had a picnic with another person before... Well, if you don't count missions. Also, the parks in dreams shouldn't have any insects, right?
行呗，那我们就走了，{NICKNAME}。晚点找你联机，记得把时间给我空出来。
Alright. In that case, we're out of here, {NICKNAME}. I'll contact you again later, so remember to leave some time for me.
再见，{NICKNAME}！谢谢你的邀请，我今天很开心！
Goodbye, {NICKNAME}! Thank you for inviting me, I had a lot of fun today!
既然如此，我也先告辞啦，祝各位度过愉快的一天！
Well, it's also time for me to bid farewell. Have a pleasant day, everybody!
唉，这么快人就都走光了，果然快乐的时光总是短暂的……
Ugh, all of them left so quickly. Time flies when you're having fun, indeed...
不过你可不许走，{NICKNAME}。刚刚缇娜小姐跟我说了街机的新玩法，你快来陪我试一试！
Anyway, you're not allowed to go yet, {NICKNAME}. Miss Tinah just told me about a new game mode for the arcade machines, so you've got to try it out with me!
…这非常有趣，知更鸟小姐。那么如果你需要，我这次依旧可以提供一些小小的帮助。
How interesting, Miss Robin. I can still aid you, if you require any help on my end.
…我会考虑的，翡翠女士。但无论如何，非常感谢你的善意。
I will think about it, Madam Jade. Regardless, I appreciate your kindness very much.
无妨。时间还早，我们不如换个地方好好聊聊。难得恰好彼此都有空闲，不是吗。
It's not a big deal. Since it's still early, why don't we chat somewhere else? After all, you have time to spare, right?
当然，我正巧知道一家不错的咖啡厅，环境优美、而且非常清净，或许你会喜欢……
Of course. I happen to know a decent café that is spotless and overlooks some beautiful scenery. Perhaps you'll like it...
Tweet tweet — this way, tweet tweet!
关于「折纸小鸟」，匹诺康尼一直都流传着这样的说法：这些卡通角色其实是真实存在的，但只有被它们认可的人才能看见。
When it comes to Origami Birds, there has always been an urban legend spreading around Penacony: That these cartoon characters are actually real, but can only be seen by people whom they approve of.
所以当这些小鸟出现在眼前时，我不由产生了一种非常奇妙的感觉……
Therefore, when these birds appeared before my eyes, an intense feeling of marvel welled up inside me...
对了，{NICKNAME}，待会可以稍微等等我吗？
Oh, right. {NICKNAME}, can you wait a while for me later?
在回去船上之前，我可能需要做些简单的变装。
Before I return to the ship, I may need to disguise myself for a bit.
毕竟在梦里，人们本就该能够随心所欲呢…对了，{NICKNAME}，我其实并不擅长这种游戏，你可以教教我吗？
Of course, in dreams, people should be able to do as they please... Oh, by the way, {NICKNAME}, I'm actually not very good at these games. Can you teach me?
客人您准备好了的话，随时都可以开始哦。
You can start anytime you're ready, esteemed guests.
啾啾！来陪我玩捉迷藏啾~
Tweet tweet! Come play hide and seek with me, tweet!
啾啾啾——被你们发现了啾！
Tweet tweet! You got me, tweet!
This is fun, thank you, tweet!
这…你这变装变得连种族都不一样了啊？
This... you've changed so much that even your species is different now?
您来了，来来来，我给您介绍下，这位是我们科的新人——
You're here! Come, come. Let me introduce to you the latest addition to our department —
噢，您就是传闻中的{NICKNAME}啊，久仰大名！我是梅透娜，刚来空间站不久，以后请多指教。
Oh, you're the {NICKNAME} that everyone's been talking about. It's an honor! I'm Metauna. I only just arrived at the space station. It's nice to meet you.
So... you were looking for me?
是这样的，之前世玲姐丢给我的一套战斗模拟工具，名字叫「星芒战幕」……
It's about a combat simulation tool that Shiling shoved in my hands. It's called the Stellar Flare...
有点耳熟，好像我还测试过。
Sounds familiar. I think I've tested it before.
对对对，就是我喊您来帮忙的，当时多亏有您！
That's right. I was the one who called for you to help. Good thing you were around that time!
这是一套作战模拟软件，旨在提高使用者的战斗水平。
This is a combat simulation software. It's supposed to boost its user's combat proficiency.
早期开发版的测试结果挺好的，在安保科的评估中，他们甚至觉得该程序有交付给「公司」那边商业化的潜力。
Early prototype test results were encouraging. The Security Department even expected that this program had the potential to be submitted to the IPC for business applications.
最次也能留作空间站内部安防训练使用。
At worst, it would be kept on the space station for training purposes.
嗯嗯，小娜说的没错，我们科室挺看重它的。
Yes, yes. Metauna's right on the nose. We feel really good about this project.
所以咱们科就派了我过来给前辈搭把手，希望我俩能优化下这套工具。基于需求，我给这一版的程序取了个新名字叫「星芒烁变」…哈哈，新版本新气象。

Which is why the department sent me to assist you, in the hopes that we can optimize this tool. As per the requirements, I gave this version of the program a new name — Stellar Shimmer... Haha, new version, new beginnings!
不过说实话，我是没什么信心啦，一上来就接触这么大的项目…这压力我有点吃不消。
But to be honest, I'm feeling really anxious about this. To be involved in such a huge project so soon after I arrived... I think the stress is a bit too much.
别慌，现在原始代码已经迭代过一版了，我们对齐了安保科的需求，优化了模拟战斗的流程……
Keep calm. The source code's already been iterated once. We've also cross-checked with the Security Department's requirements and optimized the simulated combat's process...
咱们科室的黑话就打住吧，凯辛姐，还是说正事吧。
Enough of internal jargon, Grumpy. We should get down to business.
咳咳，不好意思，这是职业病了…总之，程序优化好了，但还差个精通战斗的高手来完成测试。所以我就找了您过来，有些冒昧，但空间站里身手了得的，我第一反应就是您了……

Ahem, sorry. Work habits... In any case, the program has been optimized, but it still lacks a combat master to complete its testing. That's why we sought you out. It's a bit sudden, but you were the first person I thought of when it comes to battle prowess superiority on this space station...
{NICKNAME}，您能否赏脸来帮我们这个忙？
{NICKNAME}, will you be so kind as to help us out?
既然如此…我也不好拒绝。
If that's the case... I'd be hard-pressed to refuse.
义不容辞，这种事找我就对了。
Just part of the job. You've come to the right person.
太好啦，有高手帮忙，肯定能成！
Fantastic! With an expert helping out, this'll surely be a success!
程序已经装载在旁边的终端上了，测试的事…那就拜托您了！
The program has been loaded on the terminal by the side. As for the testing... We're counting on you!
怎么样，您已经全部测完了吗？
How was it? Did you finish all the testing?
I cleared all the levels, and it was a cinch.
I knew it. There's no one better!
有点棘手，还好我技高一筹。
It got a little hairy. Good thing I was a little stronger.
您觉得棘手？唔…看来难度设置不太合理，连您都这么说了，其他人肯定吃不消。怪我，我回去重新调试下相应的数值好了。
It was difficult for you? Oof... I guess the difficulty setting is still too harsh. If you're saying that, others would surely get stomped. My bad, I'll have to go back and tweak the relevant values.
真的很感谢您，这次帮了我们一个大忙！我刚刚看了下后台上传的数据，感觉没什么大问题…等我们再调试下，通过验收不在话下！

I really must thank you, as you've helped us out greatly this time! I just took a look at the uploaded back-end data, and nothing seemed amiss... Wait till we're done with the adjustments, and it'll definitely clear inspection!
提交回去，其他前辈估计会大吃一惊——然后推给「公司」那边搞商业化，不出五年，不不不，搞不好一经上市就会大受欢迎——再之后我的考评，我的研究经费，嘿嘿……

When it's submitted, my seniors will probably be flabbergasted. And then they'll recommend it to the IPC for commercial applications. Within five years, no no, it may even be a surefire hit once it gets released on the market! And then my assessment, and my research funding, hee-hee...
咳咳，小娜，现实点。先给我们的大救星道谢吧，托您的福，这项目未来可期——所以我给您准备了一些小礼物，希望您能收下。

Ahem, Metauna, let's keep the daydreaming for later. I'd thank our savior first — it's all because of you that this project will have a bright future. I've prepared some token gifts for you. Please take them.
Yes yes, thank you so much!
测试的事…就拜托您了，如果测试过程中遇到什么问题，请随时知会我。
We're counting on you for the test. If you run into any problems during its course, please feel free to contact me.
We'll definitely change it for the better!
这位叫「铄金」的对手，似乎是个修行仙舟古武术的格斗家。
Our opponent, Shuojin, appears to be a fighter using Xianzhou ancient martial arts.
我查了查他的对战记录，不算是个特别厉害的选手。你应该可以放心接下挑战。
His combat history suggests he's not particularly formidable. You should be able to take on this challenge with confidence.
我了解了。不过，不管是什么样的对手，我都不会掉以轻心的。
Understood. Still, I never underestimate any opponent.
另外…你真的不打算考虑一下和公司的商务合作吗？
Also... Are you sure you won't reconsider partnering with the IPC for business?
It's not entirely off the table.
我不知道…我个人不想答应这件事，但我也不知道断然拒绝是不是一件好事……
I'm not sure... I personally don't want to agree to it, but I don't know if it's wise to refuse it outright.
我也觉得。我毕竟来自小地方，实在搞不懂这些大势力的种种套路……
I agree. Coming from a small town, I find the intricate games these big players play are just beyond me...
和你合作不就算和公司合作吗？
Doesn't working with you essentially mean collaborating with the IPC?
这肯定不一样啊！我现在的身份不过是一个体育记者，和卢卡选手之间谈不上有什么商务往来。
It's completely different! I'm just a sports journalist, and I don't have any business dealings with Contestant Luka.
我确实想拒绝掉这个「商务合作」…但无论拒绝还是点头，于情于理都应该去当面给出回应。
I'm leaning towards declining this business partnership... but whether I refuse or agree to it, it seems right to give a response in person.
Coach {NICKNAME}, can you head over to Aurum Alley with me?
{NICKNAME}教练，陪我去一趟金人巷吧。我得当面拒绝他们。
Coach {NICKNAME}, can you head over to Aurum Alley with me? I need to decline their offer in person.
现在拒绝或接受都为时过早，还是和公司见一面再下判断吧。
It's too early to decide. Let's meet with the IPC first before making a decision.
Good to see you again, Luka, {NICKNAME}.
虽然我们三个已经算是熟人了，但我还是郑重地通过组委会那边传达了合作意愿。
Even though we are acquainted, I had formally expressed my intention to collaborate with you through the committee.
战略投资部希望聘请卢卡选手成为我们的品牌代言人，并在整个产品线上进行深度合作。
The Strategic Investment Department would like to hire Luka as our brand ambassador, working closely with him across our entire product line.
这一方面有利于提升卢卡选手的知名度——也就是说，全银河都会看到你「铁臂卢卡」的广告招牌。
This role would boost Luka's visibility — "Luka the Strongarm" could become a name featured on billboards throughout the cosmos.
此后贝洛伯格作为巨星的家乡，一定能获得更多的发展机遇！
Then Belobog, as the hometown of a superstar, would certainly attract more development opportunities!
无论从贝洛伯格还是从公司的角度来讲，这份代言合同都是好事。
This endorsement benefits both Belobog and the IPC.
喔，那当然不错～我一贯的原则，就是绝对要让合作伙伴拿到实惠。
Absolutely. My principle has always been to ensure our partners get real, tangible benefits.
Is the IPC really that generous?
嗯…公司当然没有那么好心，我也不是什么慈善家。这是一桩双赢的生意，仅此而已。
Well... The IPC isn't exactly generous, and I'm certainly not running a charity. It's purely a mutually beneficial business deal, nothing more.
你怎么总惦记着贝洛伯格？
Why do you keep focusing on Belobog?
那是当然的了，毕竟这可是我经手的案子。难道你们不想为贝洛伯格做些什么吗？从这个角度来看，我们可是一边的。
Because I'm the one who worked on this case, naturally. Don't you want to contribute something to Belobog? We are on the same side in this regard.
...May I take a moment to think this over, if that's okay?
没问题，你慢慢考虑～这次合作邀约是出于互惠互利的善意，我希望你能抛开过去对公司的印象，借这次合作结下更深的信任。

Take all the time you need~ This invitation is offered in the spirit of mutual benefit and goodwill. I hope you can set aside your previous impressions of the IPC and build deeper trust through this collaboration.
……很抱歉，到头来我还是得拒绝您的好意。
...I'm sorry, but I have to decline your generous offer.
看来你的信任十分珍贵，你不想随随便便把它交给公司。
Your trust appears to be precious, and you're not willing to give it away to the IPC lightly.
不，托帕小姐，我非常信任你的善意。我们交过手，所以我很清楚你是否值得信任。
No, Miss Topaz, I deeply trust your intentions. Having clashed against you before, I can confidently say you are trustworthy.
只是…我来参赛的初衷是让世界看到贝洛伯格。如果与公司合作，会让我觉得自己的行为不那么纯粹。
But... my initial reason for competing was to showcase Belobog to the entire universe. Partnering with the IPC might make me doubt the purity of my actions.
我相信托帕小姐的善意，但…贝洛伯格是否准备好接受公司的善意，又应当如何接受公司的善意…这我真的不知道，一时也拿不定主意。
While I trust Miss Topaz's intentions, I'm... not sure if Belobog is ready to accept the IPC's offer, or how we should accept that offer... I can't make a decision right now.
……感谢你的坦诚，卢卡选手。如果你想通了，随时联系我～
...Thank you for your honesty, Luka. If you change your mind, feel free to let me know anytime.
哦对了，听说你接下了那个名叫「铄金」的选手的挑战了？
Oh, by the way, I heard you accepted the challenge from that fighter, Shuojin?
你说那场「邀请赛」？为什么突然问起这个？
Are you referring to the invitational match? Why bring this up all of a sudden?
就当是个旁观者的提醒，当心点。那家伙可有不少盘外招。
Just a heads-up from an observer. Be careful. That guy has plenty of dirty tricks.
感谢你的提醒，我会注意的。{NICKNAME}教练，我们也该回休息室了。
Thanks for the heads-up. I'll keep that in mind. Coach {NICKNAME}, we should head back to the lounge now.
感谢你的坦诚，卢卡选手。如果你想通了，随时联系我～
Thanks for your frankness, Luka. If you change your mind, you can reach out anytime.
盘外招？我以前的比赛生涯里，倒是遇到过那种喜欢使盘外招的卑鄙拳击手，有个家伙专在赛前给别人的饮料里下泻药。
Dirty tricks? I've come across some fighters who like to rely on dirty tricks in my days in the ring, like one guy who always snuck laxatives into his opponents' drinks.
巧了嘿，我也认识这么个剑客…
Interesting. I know a blade master who does that too.
哈哈哈，教练你还真是什么人都认识！
Hahaha, you sure know a variety of people, coach!
那你可要看牢你的水壶了。
Better keep an eye on your water bottle then.
哈哈哈，这就要靠教练你帮我严防死守啦！
Hahaha, coach, I'm counting on you to keep a close watch!
你们两个怎么还有心思开玩笑！卢卡选手！出大事了！
Are you two really joking right now? Luka, we've got a serious situation!
啊？出什么大事了？你先别着急，慢慢说……
What's going on? Take a deep breath and tell us slowly...
我带来了赛场外的报纸，你们看！
I've brought a newspaper from the arena. Take a look!
去网上看看吧，现在有一大票人都在讨论「卢卡塌房，竟是公司走狗」的事情，闹得非常大！
Check online. There's a lot of buzz about Luka being an IPC puppet. It's causing quite a stir!
这…先不论这里面的内容都是捏造的…我和托帕小姐见面，才是不到一个系统时之前的事吧？这怎么都登报了？
...Apart from the fact that the content might be fabricated... I just met with Miss Topaz less than a system hour ago. How did it get published so quickly?
这里信息流动速度和贝城不同。
The speed of information flow here is different from Belobog.
唉…虽然之前就感觉到了，这还是我第一次实际体会这信息流动速度有多可怕……
Sigh... Even though I already kinda guessed it, this is the first time I've truly realized how terrifyingly fast news can spread here...
不不不，这根本不是「信息流动速度」能解释的问题。
No, no, no, this isn't just about how fast information spreads.
这文章也是一系统时内写好的？
This article was written within a system hour?
仙舟科技那么发达，估计也有什么「快速写稿机」？
With the Xianzhou's advanced technology, I wouldn't be surprised if they have something like a "rapid drafting machine".
不不不，这里面还有多方采访呢！总不可能是「自动采访机」瞬间完成的吧？
That's impossible! There are multiple interviews in this! There's no way they have an "automatic interviewer machine" that can instantly do all the interviews!
这些新闻报道和采访稿，绝对不是临时准备的。这是蓄谋已久的恶意报道！
These reports and interviews were clearly not whipped up at the last moment. They're the result of a premeditated malicious report!
可他们也不知道我和托帕小姐见面的事啊？这…总不会是托帕小姐……
But they didn't know about my meeting with Miss Topaz, did they? It couldn't possibly be... Miss Topaz... behind this...
不，与托帕小姐无关，公司没必要做这种事。恐怕这位幕后黑手准备了很多个版本的报道，只是在等待合适的契机吧……
No, it's unrelated to Miss Topaz. The IPC has no reason to do this. The person behind this has likely prepared multiple versions of the report and was just waiting for the right opportunity...
如果你没去与托帕小姐见面，恐怕他们就会选择其他报道。
If you hadn't met with Miss Topaz, they probably would have opted for a different report.
卢卡选手，你是惹到什么人了吗？怎么会有人专门做这种事……
Luka, did you make an enemy? Why else would someone go to such lengths to do this...
How could I have possibly made an enemy... Oh no!
托帕小姐说，我们接下来的对手——铄金，很擅长搞一些「盘外招」。这恐怕就是他的手笔。
Miss Topaz mentioned that our next opponent, Shuojin, is known for using dirty tricks. This must be his doing.
I'm going to confront him about this.
千万别去！现在去找他麻烦，完全是授人以柄……
Don't! Confronting him now would only make you fall into his trap!
说实话，面对汹涌的舆论，个人就是没什么特别好的应对方法……
Honestly, there's no good way to handle the tidal wave of public opinion.
我先想办法找人辟谣吧…但辟谣的速度永远比不上造谣的速度——那家伙就是利用这一点，想让你溺死在舆论之中。
I'll try to find someone to debunk the rumors... but the speed of debunking always lags behind lies — he's counting on that to drown you in public opinion.
唉…真是头疼。不过也无所谓，只要接下来我在赛场上堂堂正正地击败铄金，观众们自然就会知道他说的那些全都是谎言。
*sigh*... So annoying. But it doesn't matter. As long as I can defeat Shuojin fair and square in the upcoming match, the spectators will all see that everything he said was a lie.
卢卡选手…事情恐怕不会像你想的那么顺利。负面印象一旦形成，就没那么容易恢复了……
Luka... things might not turn out the way you hope. Once a negative perception sets in, it's difficult to reverse it...
好啦～卡美丽小姐，不要那么悲观。我卢卡哪有那么容易被盘外招击倒？一切都会好起来的！
Alright, don't be too pessimistic, Miss Carmella. I'm not so easily overcome by dirty tricks. Everything will work out!
我出去透透气，稍后回来再讨论这事。
I need some air. I'll be back later to discuss this.
看起来卢卡选手需要一些时间调整一下心态…我们在这里等等他吧。
It looks like Contestant Luka needs some time to clear his head... Let's wait for him here.
I've got other stuff to do.
想用流言蜚语击倒我？真是可笑！语言再怎么难听，还能比拳头硬吗？

还真是卢卡…我之前还是他的粉丝呢！

哈哈，这下喜欢过卢卡成了你的「案底」了！
No way! Being a former fan of Luka is basically like being a cyber criminal!
他看过来了！你别那么大声！

看模样是个挺阳光的小伙子，怎么背地里……
He looks like a decent guy. How could he be scheming behind the scenes...
我觉得他不是坏，就是单纯的蠢。小地方来的，还是习武出身，估计文化水平也不太行。
I don't think he's bad, just a bit naive. He's from a small town and has a background in martial arts, probably not the most cultured.
蠢就是坏！这两者有什么区别吗？
Naive is just as bad! What's the difference?
两位朋友，我得罪过你们吗？有必要说得这么难听吗？
Friends, have I wronged you in any way? Why speak so harshly of me?
Oh no, he heard us, run!
别走啊！我们好好聊聊嘛！
真的诶…你听说那件事了吗？

为什么每个人都在谈论我…我到底做错了什么？

你听说卢卡那件事了吗？
Did you hear about what happened with Luka?
真没想到卢卡是这样的人！
I never thought Luka would be like this!

糟糕，一定是幻觉又发作了……

我没拿公司一分钱！我已经拒绝了！

战略投资部一直对贝洛伯格贼心不死，卢卡，你也打算趁机捞一笔吧？

胡扯！我对贝洛伯格从来没有过半点不忠！

可惜没有人会相信你。他们只会相信我传达给他们的真相。

初次见面。之后我们应该还会在赛场上重逢吧…还是说，你打算识趣一些，就此退赛？
Nice to meet you for the first time. We'll probably meet again on the field... unless you plan to bow out gracefully now.
我不会退赛，人们也不会一直被你愚弄。我会在赛场上证明自己，他们有自己的判断力。
I won't drop out, and people won't keep being fooled by you. I'll prove myself on the field, and they can judge for themselves.
不，绝大多数人只会误把别人的观点当做自己的观点——只要大家都说你是可恶的，那么他们就会「认为」你是可恶的。
No, most people simply adopt others' perspectives as their own. If everyone says you're vile, then they'll believe you're vile.
那就来证明我错了吧——用你的拳头，用你唯一擅长的方式。
Prove me wrong with your fists, then — the only way you know how.

卢卡选手！我只是来和你打个招呼而已，你竟然不讲武德，暴起伤人！
Luka! I just came to say hello, and you attack without honor!
难道你不敢在赛场上和我堂堂正正比一场，非得像这样用一些阴损的盘外招吗？
Scared to fight me fair and square in the arena? Must you resort to these dirty tricks?
就是就是！卢卡你怎么不讲武德！

分明是你在用盘外招，特意来这里挑衅我，怎么变成我不讲武德了！

人家铄金都受伤了！怎么会是人家挑衅的你！

不许走！他不讲武德，偷袭我！我们这道理还没说清楚呢！

就是就是！先把道理讲清楚再走！

把路让出来吧。还是说你们要先跟我的球棒讲讲道理？我可不是参赛选手，不受你们的道德绑架。

这…是他要讲道理，又不是我们要讲道理，你跟我们喊什么？
It's him who wants to argue, not us. Why are you yelling at us?

人群一哄而散，你带着卢卡再度来到了丹鼎司。
The crowd disperses, and you take Luka to the Alchemy Commission.
{NICKNAME}和卢卡，你们又来了呀～卢卡，妾身的梦貘对你有帮助吗？
{NICKNAME} and Luka, here you are! Luka, has the tuskpir been helpful to you?
非常感谢，那只梦貘对我很有帮助，这些天睡眠质量变好了很多……
Thank you. That tuskpir has been helpful, and my sleep quality has improved a lot...
但是今天…我又出现了很强烈的幻觉……
But today... I had a very strong hallucination...
你简单地讲了讲卢卡遭遇的困境。
You briefly describe the predicament Luka is facing.
嗯…看完那篇报道之后，我走在路上总能听见别人在讨论我的事…后来不知不觉陷入了幻觉，还在幻觉里和人大打出手……
Hmm... after reading that article, I can't stop overhearing people discuss me on the street... Later, I found myself slipping into a hallucination and ended up in a fight...
别担心，这只是精神压力引发了神经衰弱，进一步加重了你的幻觉。
Don't worry. It's just the mental stress causing neurotic exhaustion, further intensifying your hallucinations.
灵砂让丹士送来了香炉。她点燃香薰，和缓的烟气蔓延开来。
Lingsha had the alchemist bring over an incense burner. She lights the aromatherapy, and soothing smoke spreads.
你们在这里稍微休息一下吧。要是一直处在备赛的紧张状态中，对身体也不好～
Rest here for a bit. Being in a constant state of pre-competition tension isn't good for your health.
真难受…感觉大家都对我有误会，我想辩解，他们也不听……
It feels terrible... it seems like everyone misunderstands me. I try to explain, but they won't listen...
有什么好辩解的？原本相信你的人，不需要听你的辩解，打定主意不相信你的人，又不会听你的辩解。
What is there to explain? Those who initially believed in you don't require your explanations, and those who are determined not to believe won't listen to your explanations.
难道就让舆论这么乱说吗？
Are we just going to let the public opinion slander me like this?
舆论这东西嘛…和这香炉里的烟一样，只会随着风飘来飘去。风向总会变的，不是所有的风都会吹向你。
Public opinion... it's like the smoke in this incense burner, drifting with the wind. The wind will eventually shift, and not all of it will blow against you all the time.
你觉得周围的人都在议论你，是因为你身处竞锋舰的擂台附近。
You might think everyone is talking about you, but that's because you're near the Skysplitter arena.
可放眼整个罗浮…大部分人都不认识一个参加演武仪典的域外拳手吧？
But... Looking at all of the Luofu... Most of them would not know about an outworlder boxer participating in the Wardance.
妾身当初因为一些旧事，在罗浮丹鼎司内也饱受流言的困扰，不得不随师父一起远渡他乡……
Years ago, I faced rumors within the Luofu's Alchemy Commission and had to travel far with my master.
可事到如今，这些都已烟消云散。而我，回到了罗浮成为丹鼎司的掌事者。
Those issues have dissipated into thin air over time. Now, I've returned to the Luofu to oversee the Alchemy Commission.
所以您的意思是，好好打这场「邀请赛」，用实力证明自己？
Do you mean I should simply fight well in this invitational match and prove myself with my skills?
妾身以为，这是你当下能实实在在应对流言的最好方法。
I believe this is the best way you can truly handle rumors right now.
怎么样？心情好些了吗？好些了就赶紧回去准备比赛吧！

我好多了。谢谢你，灵砂司鼎！
I feel much better. Thank you, Cauldron Master!
It's just like a magic cure!
要是谣言能用熏香驱散就好了。

别贫嘴，快回去准备比赛吧！要好好教训一下那个造谣的家伙哦～
Enough with the jokes. Get back to training for the match! Show that rumor-spreader what you're made of!
快回去准备比赛吧！要好好教训一下那个造谣的家伙哦～
Get back to your training quickly! It's time to show that rumor-spreader a lesson!

听说你和铄金的比赛要开始了…我过来瞧瞧。

托帕小姐提议，她可以帮你解决铄金带来的麻烦。
Miss Topaz offers her assistance to help you handle the trouble caused by Shuojin.
这是我们自己惹上的无妄之灾，还是不要给公司添麻烦了吧。

如果我接受了托帕小姐的帮助，那就欠了你一个大人情。到时你再提起商务合作的事，我可不好拒绝了。

别这么说。我可不单单是为了你的声誉，也是为了公司的声誉呀～

况且无论如何，我都绝不会以「人情债」要挟你做出违心的判断，放心吧。
And I certainly wouldn't use a favor to coerce you into doing something you're uncomfortable with. Rest assured.
谢谢托帕小姐，心意我领了。但我也有我的处事原则，欠了人情债，就必须还。
Thank you, Miss Topaz, for your consideration. However, I abide by my principles — if I owe a favor, I must repay it.
刚才有人对我说，舆论就像香炉里的烟，只会顺着风飘。只要等到风向转变的时候，所有的谣言都会消退。
Someone once told me public opinion is like incense smoke, drifting with the wind. Just wait for the wind to change, and all these rumors will dissipate.
我现在应该做的，就是用我这双拳头，在擂台上证明自己。
Right now, I need to prove myself with my fists in the ring.
好吧，我明白了。我不会强求你接受任何帮助。

However, if I may offer a piece of seasoned advice — the quickest way to clear the smoke is to put out the fire.
说的没错，只要肯等待，所有风波都会过去。但你需要等上很久，而时间是最昂贵的。
You're right. All storms pass eventually, but waiting takes time, and time is costly.
走了～改变主意记得叫我～

卢卡选手，我觉得你刚才应该接受托帕小姐的帮助…{NICKNAME}教练，你怎么看？

是啊！一般人遇到这种事，哪有机会动用战略投资部的资源来替自己解决麻烦啊？

在擂台上证明自己就够了。

在擂台上能证明什么呢？舆论场上，立场大于事实、标签大于观点、感性大于理性，情感宣泄大于深度讨论…你要证明给谁看呢？

What really can be proven in the ring? In the court of public opinion, allegiances outweigh facts, labels trump perspectives, emotions eclipse logic, and outbursts overshadow deep discussions. Who are you trying to convince?
The truth will always reveal itself.
抱歉，我实在没办法这么乐观……
I'm sorry. I can't be as optimistic...
别担心，卡美丽小姐。先待我赢回一场胜利，再谈之后的事吧。
Don't worry, Miss Carmella. Let me secure a victory, then we can discuss the future.
亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎来到星天演武仪典邀请赛的擂台！
Dear spectators and friends, welcome to the Luminary Wardance invitational match!
本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是风头正劲的明日之星——「铁臂」卢卡！
In this match, the two opposing sides are, the rising star — Luka "Strongarm"!
以及仙舟古武术的传承人——铄金！
And I'll introduce the inheritor of Xianzhou ancient martial arts — Shuojin!
Luka, we don't want to see you win!
呃…卢卡选手最近因为一些捕风捉影的传闻，受到了部分粉丝的敌视。
Ah... Luka has been subjected to some baseless hostility from a segment of his fans.
但是没关系，我相信卢卡选手一定能在赛场上证明自己！加油呀！卢卡选手！
But no worries. I'm confident Luka will demonstrate his true capabilities in the competition today! Go, Luka!
那个叽米就是公司的员工！他如此逆风局还向着卢卡说话，可见卢卡真的是公司走狗！
Owlbert is paid by the IPC! The fact that he still speaks well of Luka despite the controversy proves that Luka is just an IPC puppet!
我原以为叽米是个可爱的好鸟，结果也是公司的一丘之貉！
I used to think Owlbert was a decent character. But it turns out he's just another IPC stooge!
啊这…卢卡选手，再替你说话我恐怕要把自己也给搭进去了，你自求多福吧！
Ah... if I continue to defend you, Luka, I might end up implicating myself. You're on your own!
铄金，我不想和你多说一个字。就让我用拳头来向大家展示——我卢卡究竟是公司走狗，还是一名堂堂正正的格斗家吧！
Shuojin, I don't want to waste words with you. Let my fists show everyone — am I, Luka, just an IPC puppet, or am I a true fighter?
哈哈哈哈！公司走狗，我不会屈服于你的淫威！今日对决之后，你卢卡定会身败名裂。
Hahaha! IPC puppet, I won't bend to your intimidation! After today, you, Luka, will be utterly disgraced.
你这混小子，下手真狠啊……
卢卡选手顶住巨大的压力，成功战胜了铄金选手！真是一场酣畅淋漓的大胜！
Under immense pressure, Luka triumphs over Shuojin in a thoroughly satisfying triumph!
让我们把掌声献给胜利者——卢卡选手！
Let's give a round of applause for the winner — Luka!
黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！
Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged! Rigged!
我以为这演武仪典公平公正，谁想到也会有如此黑幕？
I thought this Wardance was supposed to be fair and just. Who would have imagined there was such rigging!
我是堂堂正正打赢的，哪里有什么黑幕？
I fought fairly and won! This isn't rigged!
哪里有黑幕！你们不要在这里胡说！
There's no rigging! Stop spreading falsehoods!
观众朋友们，没有黑幕。是我技不如人，肉身扛不住卢卡的铁拳…对不起，让你们失望了……
Dear spectators, this isn't rigged. I was simply outmatched and could not withstand Luka's iron fists... I'm sorry to have disappointed my supporters...
What act are you putting on now?
铁拳打肉身，想想都疼…卢卡下手真的太黑了，怎么会有这么恶毒的人啊？
Iron fist to flesh, just thinking about it hurts... Luka hits too hard. How can someone be so cruel?
能不能报警让地衡司把卢卡抓起来啊？
Can we call the Cloud Knights and have the Realm-Keeping Commission arrest Luka?
就是！我们不能让他就这么逍遥法外！
Exactly! We can't let him get away with this!
这…我分明用自己的实力赢得了比赛…怎么会变成这样……
I won the match fair and square... How did it come to this...
卢卡选手，此地不宜久留。快走吧，这里我来应付。
Luka, it's not safe to stay here. Go quickly, and I'll deal with this.
好好好，大家冷静一点！不要那么大的火气！这样吧～我给大家唱个歌吧～给大家翻唱个《在银河中孤独摇摆》怎么样？
Alright, alright, let's all calm down! No need to get so upset! How about this — I'll sing a song for everyone, a cover of Sway to My Beat in Cosmos. How does that sound?
片刻之后，你带着失魂落魄的卢卡离开了赛场。
Moments later, you leave the arena with the disheartened Luka.
明明凭实力打赢了，可是为什么…为什么事情会变成这样子呢？
I won fair and square, but... why did things turn out this way?
网上有人科普说雅利洛-Ⅵ是个已经灭亡的行星。可贝城的大家不是活得好好的吗！
Some online sources claim that Jarilo-VI is an extinct planet. But aren't the people of Belobog still alive?
他们还说我是个冒用身份的偷渡客…？喂，我可是正儿八经地从天舶司海关进入仙舟的啊！
They're saying I'm a stowaway using a fake identity... Hey, I entered the Xianzhou properly through the Sky-Faring Commission customs!
有人说我以前是混泯灭帮的…对了，卡美丽小姐，泯灭帮是做什么的啊？算了，你不用回答，听名字也知道这不是什么好东西。
Some even say I used to be part of the Annihilation Gang... Right, Miss Carmella, what does the Annihilation Gang do? Never mind. You don't have to answer, as the name tells me it's nothing good.
还有这个…有个评论说我的手是被仙舟剑士给剁了，所以才换上了现在的义肢，专挑罗浮的选手打压。
There's a comment claiming my arm was chopped off by a swordmaster from the Xianzhou, so I got my current prosthetics specifically to challenge fighters from the Luofu.
这样的玩笑……一点也不好笑！
Such jokes... are not funny at all!
卢卡，别看这些了，这对你现在的状态一点好处也没有。
Luka, stop looking at these. It's not helping your current state.
现在最好的做法是放下手机。
The best thing to do now is to put down your phone.
我明白！我知道自己现在该把所有人的评论当作一阵风那样。可是，我没法装作什么事都没发生啊！我看到一些支持我的人只是为我辩护了两句，就在网上遭到了围攻。
I understand! I know I should take everyone's comments lightly. But I can't pretend nothing happened! Some of my supporters briefly defended me, only to face backlash online.
在贝城的时候，我从没意识到「打赢比赛」这件事会伤害这么多人……
Back in Belobog, I never realized that winning a match could hurt so many people...
赛场上大家聚在一起的时候，确实都会为胜利者欢呼的。
When we are all together at the arena, everyone indeed cheers for the winner.
但比赛之外，尤其是在网上…可不是人人都会为胜者高兴的。毕竟，一直胜利在某些人看来也是一种傲慢。
But outside of the arena, especially online... not everyone is happy for the winner. After all, being continuously successful can be seen as arrogance to some.
但这也不代表所有人都希望看到你失败的，卢卡先生！你刚才说过，有支持者会为你辩护。在网上，不友善的声音听起来总会特别响亮刺耳，让支持你的声音反而显得微不足道。
But that doesn't mean everyone wants to see you fail, Mr. Luka! There are supporters for you. Online, unfriendly voices always seem particularly loud and harsh, overshadowing the supportive voices.
何况…假如让你重来一遍今天的比赛，你会为了逃避这些刺耳的声音选择输给铄金吗？
Moreover... if you could redo today's match, would you choose to lose to Shuojin just to avoid these grating voices?
我……绝不会为了任何理由假装输给谁。
I... would never pretend to lose to anyone for any reason.
那就对了！你现在最应该做的就是收拾好心情，为那些还在支持你的人赢下更多的比赛。
That's right! What you should do now is get your spirits up and win more matches for those who are still supporting you.
卡美丽小姐，教练，我要接着开始今天的训练了。
Miss Carmella, Coach, I'm going to start training for today.
不愧是「铁臂卢卡」，没想到你不仅接下了对手的拳，还扛住了这波舆论攻势。
Truly Luka the Strongarm! Not only did you take on your opponent's punches, but you weathered this wave of public opinion too.
是…是托帕小姐，欢迎大驾光临！
It's... Miss Topaz, welcome! Great to have you here!
卡美丽，{NICKNAME}，还有卢卡，你们好啊，我来看看卢卡选手的状态如何。
Hello, Miss Carmella, {NICKNAME}, and Luka. I came to check on how Luka is doing.
当然…不只是为了这个。我来是为了送一封活动邀请函给卢卡选手。
Not just for that. I'm here to deliver an invitation to Luka for an event.
卢卡应该已经拒绝过代言了。
当然，我并不是为了代言的事来的。以网络上的流言蜚语来看…他和公司现在不应该、也不适合缔结商业合作，这会让双方都无利可图的。
I know. I'm not here about the endorsement. Given the online rumors... he and IPC shouldn't, and couldn't enter into a business partnership now, as it would be unprofitable for both sides.
所以，我这次来之是为了送一封活动邀请函给卢卡。
My visit is purely to deliver an event invitation to Luka.
借着演武仪典的风头，公司打算举行的一次小小的产品发布活动，就在这座竞锋舰上。如果能请到卢卡选手到场参加，会是一件十分荣幸的事情——
Riding on the momentum of the Wardance, the IPC plans to hold a small product launch event here on the Skysplitter. It would be an honor if Luka could attend.
这样一来岂不是坐实了网上的流言？他们可是把我喷成公司豢养的狗了……
Wouldn't that just validate the online rumors? They've been smearing me as the IPC's lapdog...
我发出邀请，正好能解决这个让你头疼的麻烦。
My invitation could solve this headache for you.
我们签下了一位新的代言人，会在这一次的产品发布活动上正式亮相宣布。
We've signed a new ambassador, who will make an official appearance at this product launch.
卢卡出现在活动现场，但代言人却不是他，人们对他的无端猜想就会不攻自破，要不了多久流言也会烟消云散的，对吧？
Luka showing up at the event, but not as the ambassador, would dispel baseless speculations, and soon the rumors will dissipate.
顺带说一句，我给你带了一只全新的战斗义肢作为礼物——我注意到在之前的比赛中你的铁臂总有些轻微的制动失误，怕是磨损得厉害，不堪用了吧？

By the way, I brought you a new combat prosthetic as a gift. I noticed some slight malfunctions in your iron arm during the last match. The wear and tear is probably so much that the arm is no longer suitable for use, I presume?
你不肯拿公司的钱，我也很头疼，所以我只好用这样的小恩小惠来「收买」你了。
You refuse to take the IPC's money, which troubles me, so I have to "bribe" you with these little favors.
别问我「我该给你多少钱」这样伤人的问题。记得换上它，好好迎接你的下一场比赛。
Don't bring up anything about the prosthetic's cost. That'll hurt my feelings. Make sure you gear up and get ready for your next match.
时候不早了，我还得去筹备发布会。那么，就此别过吧。
It's getting late. I still need to prepare for the launch event. Farewell for now.
托帕小姐，请留步！你…为什么要帮我解决麻烦？
Miss Topaz, wait! Why are you helping me solve these troubles?
你们雅利洛人的自尊还真是和雪地里的石头一样冰冷坚硬啊。你的潜台词是问我到底打什么算盘对吧？
Your Jarilo pride is as cold and hard as a rock in the snow. Are you trying to figure out what plans I've got?
我可是嗅到了阴谋的气息…
喂！可别把公司的人都当作耍弄阴谋诡计的坏蛋啊。
Hey! Don't assume everyone at the IPC is out to play dirty.
托帕小姐本可以对处于舆论风口的卢卡先生不闻不问，装聋作哑。但她却不避嫌来发出邀请。没道理这样猜疑别人的好心吧？

Miss Topaz could have acted oblivious and ignored Mr. Luka, who is at the center of public scrutiny. Instead, she chose not to shy away from suspicion and extended the invitation. Isn't it unfair to question someone's good intentions?

我尊敬无法被收买的人…或者说，贝洛伯格相关的一切是由我负责的项目，我要为它的长远利益考虑。你想选哪个理由说服自己都可以。明天见。

I respect those who can't be bought... or rather, everything related to Belobog is under my project, and I have to consider its long-term interests. Pick whichever reason you want to convince yourself. See you tomorrow.
欢迎两位。卢卡，你能抛开别人的眼光，出席这次的发布活动，我很高兴。
Welcome, both of you. Luka, I'm glad you could overlook the public scrutiny and join us for the event.
The launch event is about to start.
随着一阵强而有力的音乐响起，主持人摇摆身子登上了擂台。
As powerful music plays, the host sways onto the stage.
女士们先生们、父老们乡亲们，不管咱们罗浮有没有昼夜的概念，总之先祝大家早上好中午好晚上好！我是你们最爱的主持人——叽米！
Ladies, gentlemen, elders, and community members! Whether the Luofu has a day-night cycle — good morning, good afternoon, and good evening! I'm your favorite host, Owlbert!
前日那场卢卡对铄金的比赛，想必让很多观众心中颇有愤懑吧？勇敢正直的铄金选手，怎么就输给了阴险狡诈的卢卡选手？这简直太令人意难平了！
The recent match between Luka and Shuojin likely left many spectators feeling outraged. How could the honorable and brave Shuojin lose to the cunning and deceptive Luka? It's simply too much to bear!
所以今天，在我老叽米的安排下，专门为铄金选手组织了一场「复仇赛」，而复仇的目标，自然就是——恶名昭彰的——「铁臂」——卢卡！
So today, under my arrangement, a rematch has been organized specifically for Shuojin. The target, of course, is the notorious Luka "Strongarm"!
卢卡下去吧！下去吧！下去吧！

各位稍安勿躁…接下来，则是即将上演复仇大戏的勇士，同时也是「次世代动力战斗装甲ARMS」的代言人，仙舟古武术传承者，星际和平公司产品代言人——铄金！

Everyone, please calm down... Coming up next is the warrior set to perform in this revenge play, the spokesperson for ARMS — Advanced Reinforced Mechanized Suit, the inheritor of Xianzhou's ancient martial arts, and the IPC's product ambassador — Shuojin!

...Isn't Mr. Shuojin a member of the traditional martial arts schools that oppose IPC? Why did he take on this mech endorsement?
我之前还在网上看他直播表演肉身击破公司机甲的绝活……怎么这会儿又来给公司的武器代言了？

我也不知道啊，这两边怎么穿一条裤子里去的，这是唱的哪一出啊？
I have no clue... How did these two end up on the same side? What's the deal with this?

有人看到我站在这擂台上也许会感到奇怪，认定我表里不一，在金钱和利益面前屈膝做了仙舟的叛徒。但我要告诉各位，事情绝不是各位所想的那样的！
Some of you might find it odd to see me up here and think I'm just selling out for money, betraying the Xianzhou. But that's not true!
最初公司找到我，要我为这款机甲代言时，我是拒绝的！铄某人苦练的仙舟古武术，那是正儿八经的非物质文化遗产，其强健体魄的功效远胜机甲百倍，是寰宇文明不可多得的瑰宝！

When the IPC first approached me to endorse this mech, I refused! The Xianzhou's ancient martial arts I've practiced diligently are a legitimate intangible cultural heritage, whose effects in strengthening the body are a hundred times superior to those of mechs, a rare treasure of universal civilization!

咳咳，但各位也许没听说过，我们这一系武学与星际和平公司机甲有源远流长的关系。

那么有人就要问了，这仙舟古武术怎么就能和星际和平公司扯上关系呢？这话当从两千多年前说起。有史载为证，博识学会曾受邀相助仙舟参与丰饶民战争……

彼时有博识学会的智者效仿仙舟金人，造出十三套动力甲，并悉心改良了金人格斗术用于盟助仙舟——这，便是铄某人所用古武术之由来。

Back then, the wise men of the Intelligentsia Guild modeled their creations after the Xianzhou's aurumaton, crafting thirteen sets of powered armor and meticulously refining aurumaton combat techniques to aid the Xianzhou — this is the origin of the martial arts I practice.
可叹年悠月久，这段盟友佳话竟然被后人遗忘。这也是我今天出现在这里的原因，我要还原历史，重现历史。星际和平公司的机甲，也是咱们仙舟古武术的瑰宝！

Regrettably, over the years, this tale of allies has been forgotten. This is why I'm here today, to restore and bring back history. The Interastral Peace Corporation's mechs are also treasures of Xianzhou ancient martial arts!
没想到啊没想到，公司的动力甲竟然与仙舟有如此深厚的关系——

公司的机甲和你的武术同根同源是吧？之前你怎么不想起来？是公司用钱唤醒你的记忆了吗？

到现在了你才跟我们说这个？你对得起我们这些支持你的老粉吗，铄金？！

各位且慢震怒！为了证明铄某所言非虚，今天我将穿上这套装甲为各位演示一番，让各位瞧瞧我的一招一式配上这公司铁甲是否是天衣无缝！

各位！在之前的演武仪典上，我以一招之差，惜败于来自贝洛伯格的卢卡选手！恰好他今天到访，铄某人冒昧向他再度发起挑战，不知卢卡选手是否愿意再指点我一番？

Ladies and gentlemen! In the previous Wardance, I lost to Luka from Belobog by a narrow margin! Coincidentally, he is here today, and I boldly challenge him again. Luka, would you be willing to teach me a move or two once more?
这该不会是托帕安排的吧？
