If I accept his challenge and lose, he'll regain his honor from his previous defeat in the ring...
但要是我拒绝了他的挑战，恐怕要落个拳台上不战而逃的名声，被这位铄金先生当作大肆宣传的材料。
But if I refuse his challenge, I'll likely earn infamy for fleeing the ring without a fight, which Shuojin will surely use as propaganda.
说的不错。要是拒绝他的挑战，恐怕要落个拳台上不战而逃的名声，被这位铄金先生当作大肆宣传的材料。
Well said. If you refuse his challenge, you might gain infamy for fleeing the ring, and Shuojin would use it as propaganda.
所以……这就是托帕小姐所说的「解决问题」的法子吗？她把机会递到了我的面前，我也得牢牢把握才行。
Is this Miss Topaz's way of solving problems? She's handed me the opportunity, and I need to grasp it firmly.
铄金先生，你的挑战，我接下了！
好家伙！卢卡选手干脆利落应下了这场战斗！
Alright! Luka decisively accepts the fight!
铄金选手究竟能否一雪前耻，身着公司提供的动力甲，击落来自贝洛伯格的明日之星，以他独门武学挽回昨日的败局呢？让我们拭目以待！
Will Shuojin be able to redeem his previous defeat, wearing IPC powered armor and using his unique martial arts to turn yesterday's defeat around? Let's see!
…呜，怎么可能。公司的最新款动力甲，没道理打不过你这乡巴佬的原始科技……
...Ugh, how is this possible? The IPC's latest technology shouldn't be outmatched by your primitive technology...
这一定是黑幕，没错！是黑幕！是公司的黑幕！观众朋友们，这卢卡一定是和公司勾结起来，用了什么见不得人的手段，才能像这样打败我的！
This must be rigged! It's rigged! It's The IPC's rigging! Dear spectators and friends, Luka must have colluded with the IPC and used some sneaky tactics to beat me!
你在说什么胡话呢？和公司勾结的不就是你吗？
What nonsense are you talking about? Isn't it you who's colluded with the IPC?
铄金先生，看来这次，要身败名裂的人是你了。
Shuojin, it seems this time, the one to be disgraced is you.
看来比赛的结果已经尘埃落定！本场比赛的胜利者，乃是万众瞩目的超级巨星、磐岩的冠军——「铁臂」卢卡！
It seems the outcome of the match is settled! The winner of the match, the superstar in the spotlight, and the champion from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!
接下来，也将为各位披露星际和平公司将在本次发布会上隆重推出的全新产品——「玛米图<unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus战斗用外骨骼」！
Next, we will unveil the new product that the Interastral Peace Corporation is proudly introducing at this launch event — Mamitu <unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus Combat Exoskeleton!
没错，现在卢卡选手所佩戴的那一款，正是我们所开发的新产品！卢卡选手，举起你那胜利的手臂，向大家展示一下吧！
Yes, the model that Luka is wearing right now is our newly developed product! Luka, raise your victorious arm and show it off to everyone!
稍等一下，这怎么变成我义肢的发布会了……
Hold on. How did this turn into my prosthetic's launch event...
是啊，托帕小姐？托帕！你跑到哪里去了！这怎么变成他的发布会了？这不是我的发布会吗？托帕小姐，这跟我们说好的不一样啊？
Indeed! Miss Topaz? Miss Topaz! Where did you go? How did this turn into his launch event? Isn't this supposed to be my event? Miss Topaz, this isn't what we agreed on, is it?
首先，这既不是「你的」发布会，也不是「他的」发布会，这是公司产品的发布会。其次，这和说好的一模一样，铄金先生——这场发布会，将属于获胜的产品。
Firstly, this is neither "your" nor "his" event. This is a product launch for the IPC. Secondly, everything is exactly as agreed, Mr. Shuojin — this event belongs to the winning product.
托帕！你这个阴险歹毒的公司狗！我是不会放过你的！我要宰了你！
Topaz! You treacherous, ruthless corporate lapdog! I won't let you get away with this! I'm going to take you down!
…正如各位刚才看到的那样！卢卡选手使用「玛米图<unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus战斗用外骨骼」，甚至击败了公司最新研发的「次世代动力战斗装甲ARMS」！真是令人大跌眼镜的矛盾大对决！

...As you just witnessed, Luka used Mamitu <unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus Combat Exoskeleton to defeat the IPC's latest Advanced Reinforced Mechanized Suit (ARMS)! Truly a jaw-dropping clash of contradictions!
可是，我两只手臂都还在，该怎么使用这机械义肢呢？
But I still have both arms. How am I supposed to use this mechanical prosthetic?
请各位放心，「玛米图<unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus战斗用外骨骼」现提供免费客制化服务，为不同身体结构的客户量身定做适合自己的外骨骼！
Rest assured. Mamitu <unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus Combat Exoskeleton now offers free customization services, tailor-made for customers with different body structures!
那么，哪里才能买得到呢？
So, where can one purchase it?
星际和平商城各大门店均有销售！我老叽米还给大家争取到了<unbreak>100</unbreak>个免费体验名额，今天在发布会现场和我一起高呼兑换码——「铁拳卢卡！无敌拳法！」即有机会领取！

Available at all major outlets of the Interastral Peace Mall! I, Owlbert, have secured <unbreak>100</unbreak> free trial spots for everyone. Today at the launch event, chant the redemption code "Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!" to claim your spot!
免费体验？不得了了，公司难得要发善心了！有便宜不占是王八蛋！
A free trial? Don't miss out — The IPC is rarely this generous! It would be foolish to pass up such a bargain!
Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!
Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!
Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!
Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!
明明之前还都在骂我…这场面还真是…令人感慨啊……
They were still cursing me earlier... This turn of events is truly something to ponder.
是啊～但也令人心情舒畅，不是吗？
Yes, but it's quite satisfying, isn't it?
这里太吵了，卢卡，咱们换个地方聊聊吧。
It's too noisy here, Luka. Let's talk somewhere else.
伴随着巨浪般的欢呼，托帕与卢卡来到了上层擂台边。
Amidst the roaring cheers, Miss Topaz and Luka move to the upper tier of the arena.
怎么样，卢卡选手，对我的安排还满意吗～
How do you like my arrangement, Luka?
虽然让铄金露出了真面目…但，托帕小姐，下次还是请把安排事先告诉我吧！
Although it exposed Shuojin's true colors... Miss Topaz, please inform me about the arrangements in advance next time!
我不懂，铄金那个家伙，讨厌公司到骨子里去了，怎么会这么轻易地上钩，答应你的合作邀请？
I don't get it. Shuojin despises the IPC to the core. How could he fall for it and agree to your cooperation offer?
嗯？铄金恨公司吗？未必吧～
Does Shuojin really hate the IPC? I think perhaps not...
<unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours before the launch event
广告代言？你这是什么意思？我可是现在整个罗浮反对公司资本介入仙舟武术的意见领袖。
Endorsement? What do you mean? I am currently the leading voice in the Luofu opposing the IPC's capital intervention in the Xianzhou martial arts.
战略投资部这次来到演武仪典的会场，不是为了争些无关紧要的比赛名次。以这场比赛为契机，获取更多的商业利益，才是我们的目的。铄金先生，相信你也是如此吧？

The Strategic Investment Department is here at the Wardance not for some trivial match rankings. Using this match as an opportunity to gain more business benefits is our goal. Mr. Shuojin, don't you feel the same?
对你我这样的人来说，道德、观点、立场都不过是给别人听的说辞。唯一重要的，只有数不清的信用点，不是吗？
For people like us, morality, perspectives, and allegiances are just pretenses for others. The only thing that matters is countless credits, isn't it?
呵…一个广告代言单子就想收买我？别傻了，我纵横拳台这么多年，难道还差这一点钱吗？而且我可早就听说你本想签下卢卡作为代言……

Do you think a mere endorsement deal can sway me? I've dominated the fighting scene for years. Do you think I'm that desperate for money? Besides, I've heard you were originally aiming to sign Luka as your spokesperson...
可惜，他不是个识时务的年轻人。他拒绝了我的提议。
Unfortunately, he's not a very smart young man. He refused my proposal.
有人拒绝双赢，就会有人接受。所以我找到了你。接下来，我将以「新产品发布会」的名义组织一场比武，比赛双方分别是，你和卢卡。
When someone refuses a win-win, someone else accepts. That's why I found you. Next, I will organize a duel under the guise of a new product launch, where you and Luka will compete.
我会为你准备最新款的公司装甲。凭你的本事，再加上公司最近研发的机甲，难道还惧怕一个独臂的拳击手吗？
I have prepared the latest IPC armor for you. With your skills, plus the IPC's newly developed mechs, are you afraid of a one-armed boxer?
…这台公司的装甲，就是你们准备找我代言的东西？
...This the IPC armor... is that what you want me to endorse?
没错。想一想，这次代言会带给你多大的好处？当众击败卢卡选手，被公司选为仙舟专属形象的代言人。
Bingo. Think about how beneficial this endorsement could be for you. Defeating Luka in public, and being chosen by the IPC as the exclusive face of the Xianzhou.
看到这块广告牌了吗？上面会印着你的脸，罗浮上的每个人都会认识你。
See this billboard? Your face will be on it, and everyone in the Luofu will know you.
印着我的脸…既然如此，那我还有个要求——我想做战略投资部相关业务管线的仙舟专员。
My face on a billboard... In that case, I have one more request — I want to be the specialist for all relevant businesses the Strategic Investment Department has with the Xianzhou.
公司欢迎不同文化、不同背景的新面孔。前提是：你在明天的发布会上，能赢过卢卡。
The IPC welcomes new faces from different cultures and backgrounds. That can be done — provided that you beat Luka at tomorrow's launch.
哈哈，你是瞧不起我铄金，还是瞧不起你们公司的机甲？
Are you underestimating me, or your company's mechs?
It seems we have reached an agreement.
哦对了…你一直标榜自己使用的是仙舟传统武术，这会不会和公司的机甲产品有些概念冲突？
Oh... Considering you've always emphasized your use of traditional Xianzhou martial arts, wouldn't that conflict conceptually with the IPC's mech products?
不用担心。咱们仙舟古武术兼容并包，海纳百川，就算给我一把爆能枪，我也能把它包装成仙舟古武术的兵击流派之一。
Don't worry. Xianzhou ancient martial arts are inclusive and comprehensive. Even if you handed me a blast gun, I could integrate it as one of the traditional martial styles of Xianzhou.
这么大的广告牌，印着我的脸…哎呀，真是的，想想就刺激。几百年了，终于混出头了。
Such a large billboard with my face on it... Ah, just the thought is thrilling. After hundreds of years, I've finally made it.
原来…是这么一回事。这下我实实在在欠了你一个人情。
So... that's what this is all about. Now I truly owe you one.
可别这么说，我只是在处理一个小小的舆论麻烦。铄金不该为了战胜你，将公司拖入舆论的风波。
Please don't say that. I'm just handling a minor public relations issue. Shuojin shouldn't drag the IPC into controversy just to defeat you.
所以我给了他一个机会——当着我的面拒绝我，旗帜鲜明地继续反对公司。可惜他没有做到。
So I gave him a chance — to reject me in my face, clearly continuing his opposition to the IPC. Unfortunately, he didn't take it.
但我实在弄不明白，你为什么要让我来击败你们自己的机甲产品呢？
But I don't understand why you wanted me to defeat your mech products.
你是说…「次世代动力战斗装甲ARMS」。哈哈，那不过是一点滞销的旧型号存货罢了。
You mean... Advanced Reinforced Mechanized Suit (ARMS)? That's just some old unsold stock.
连广告牌都准备好了，这代言合同，我看来是非签不可了？
With the billboard already prepared and the endorsement contract in place, I suppose I have to sign it, don't I?
别太有心理负担。现在演武仪典的选手们，除了某位通缉犯，也就只剩下你还没接受公司的赞助了。
Don't feel too pressured. Now, among the Wardance contestants, besides a certain wanted criminal, you're the only one left who hasn't accepted the IPC's sponsorship.
别着急嘛～照这个势头，你很快就会遇到他的。
Don't worry. You'll probably meet him soon.
我还有其他事要忙，先走了。你就在这里慢慢欣赏自己的海报吧。
I have other matters to attend to and has to go. Enjoy admiring your poster here.
托帕小姐…真的很感谢你！
Miss Topaz... I appreciate your help!
别谢我，谢你自己吧～如果发布会上你输了，今天这里宣传的产品就是铄金和他的「新款机甲」了。
Don't thank me. Thank yourself. If you had lost at the launch, today's promoted product would be Shuojin and his new mech.
这「邀请赛」还真是凶险啊…若是没有托帕小姐救场，真不知道会变成什么样。
This invitational match was truly perilous... If it weren't for Miss Topaz's intervention, who knows what it could have turned into?
We owe her a big thank-you.
嗯，我也必须更加尽心尽力地打拳了。毕竟拿了人家的钱，就得好好帮别人做宣传。
Yes, I must also do my best to fight harder. After all, having taken their money, I need to do my part in promoting their products.
The IPC's methods are quite frightening...
看起来很吓人，仔细想想也还好。
They seem scary, but if you think about it, not so much.
托帕小姐的计划，看起来相当歹毒，但却是打小人不打君子的阳谋。如果铄金是个正直的人，靠这招就根本没办法让他进圈套。

Miss Topaz's plan, though seemingly malevolent, is a cunning strategy that targets the unworthy, not the noble. If Shuojin were a person of integrity, this tactic wouldn't have lured him into the trap.
Miss Topaz is betting on both sides.
唉，也不能要求人家不计风险帮助我这样一个小人物啦……
Can't expect her to take risks for a nobody like me...
不管怎么说，比赛都还得继续。哎…真心希望下次不要遇到这么恶心的对手了。
Regardless, the competition must go on. Sigh... I hope we don't encounter such vile opponents next time.
嘿嘿，遇到了也不怕。「无敌的磐岩冠军」才不会被同一招击败两次哩！
Even if I do, the peerless Boulder Champion won't be defeated by the same move twice!
听说选了个仙舟的代言人
Heard they chose a Xianzhou ambassador.
The IPC has finally seen the light.
Has the event not started yet?
我就说吧…他和公司有一腿
I told you... he's involved with the IPC.
{NICKNAME}，您好，这里有一个您的包裹，请签收一下。
Hello, {NICKNAME}. There's a package for you. Please sign here.
包裹？你最近也没乱买东西啊…看着眼前硕大的游戏机，你的大脑开始飞速运转。
Package? You didn't buy anything recently... Your brain starts to whirl in overdrive as you look at the big arcade machine in front of you.
且不论一个没长手的广告牌，怎么搬动这么重的货物。自己最近是中了什么奖？还是梦游的时候误刷了丹恒的信用卡？
And this is on top of how a handless billboard managed to carry such a heavy item... Did you win something recently? Or did you accidentally swipe Dan Heng's credit card when you were sleepwalking?
难道是假面愚者的陷阱？该死，这群家伙肯定选的货到付款。
Could it be a trap from the Masked Fools? Darn it. Those Fools must have picked the option for cash on delivery for delivery fees.
最终，千言万语汇聚成一句话。
In the end, those countless words merge together into one sentence.
这是商业机密，{F#女士}{M#先生}。
如果商品无破损情况，我就先离开了，还有两百份包裹需要在这个系统时内派送——当然，这里是梦境，就算有破损也多半是美术设计。

If the item isn't damaged, then I need to go. There are still <unbreak>200</unbreak> packages I need to deliver before the next system hour — And since we're in the Dreamscape, any damage is probably a deliberate aesthetic choice anyway.
你打开游戏机，一串患有社恐的文字以惊人的速度从眼前逃离。但假如你拥有足够强大的动态视力，就能轻易看清它的内容。

You switch on the arcade machine, and strings of words afflicted with social phobia run away from your vision at a startling speed. However, had you owned a more powerful dynamic vision, you would have read its content with ease.
这是我做的游戏机，{NICKNAME}，希望你能从中享受到游戏的乐趣。
This is the arcade machine I made, {NICKNAME}. I hope you can experience the joy of video games with it.
你发现了一台刚开封的游戏机，虽然它并没有长眼睛，但你十分确信，你们的视线交汇在了一起。
You find an arcade machine that has just been set up. Though it doesn't have eyes, you are sure that your eyes met for a moment.
「嘿，朋友，你就不好奇，我这儿有什么刺激的游戏吗？」游戏机无声地向你发出邀请。
"Hey, friend. Aren't you curious about what kind of exciting games I have here?" The arcade machine silently invites you.
这是一段被「终末」带至此地的景象。当你穿过<color=#dbc291ff>「黄金与机械」</color>的战火，跨越<color=#dbc291ff>美梦雕琢的世界</color>后，终会抵达的未来。

This is a scene brought here by the Finality. This is the future you're destined to arrive at after weaving through the fires of war in <color=#dbc291ff>Gold and Gears</color> and traversing the <color=#dbc291ff>Dreamjoy Statue World</color>.
你可以在那之后回到这里，届时，你将见证完整的故事。
You can return here after you've done all that. By then, you will bear witness to the whole story.
当然，你也可以像现在这样，向前迈进一步，让视界与「终末」重合。因果逆转，未来的事物显现在你的眼前……
Or you can also do what you are doing right now — Take a step forward and let your horizon merge with the Finality. Cause and effect overturn, and the future appears before you...
底层逻辑检定完毕…未发现异常数据，尝试第<unbreak>1291</unbreak>次信息输入……
Underlying logic assessment complete... No data anomalies found. Attempting the <unbreak>1291</unbreak>st message input...
结论：未能与黑塔取得联系。
Conclusion: No contact established with Herta.
I'm here to do testing again.
很遗憾在这种时候与你相会，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。如你所见，项目出现了原因不明的故障，测试也将暂时延期。
I apologize for meeting you here at this time, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. As you can see, the project has encountered an unknown error. The test will also be temporarily delayed.
逻辑：在模拟宇宙中出现了巨大的空洞，它无法被观测和干涉，却始终保持正常运行。
Logic: A massive void has appeared in the Simulated Universe. It cannot be observed or interfered with, yet it continues to operate within normal parameters.
根据烛墨学派的资料，这片空洞本属于第二次帝皇战争后，一段被称为「学派战争」的历史。
According to data from the Candelagraphos, this void originally belonged to a time in history named the "Scholars' Strife" after the second Emperor's War.
但从外部向内窥探，那里只有一片紊乱的「不可知域」。
But when observed from the outside, all that can be seen within is only a chaotic "Unknowable Domain."
这正是我们当前面临的困境之一。
This is exactly one of the dilemmas we are currently facing.
对于「不可知域」的修复工作，黑塔女士表现出异常的热情，她自告奋勇地接入了模拟宇宙。
Madam Herta is displaying unusual excitement towards the reconstruction of the Unknowable Domain, and has volunteered to connect herself to the Simulated Universe.
但在那之后不久，我们就失去了联系，她的人偶也尽数陷入宕机状态。
Shortly after that, we lost contact. All her puppets are currently in a state of complete shutdown.
结论：距离她进入「不可知域」，已过去<unbreak>33</unbreak>个标准时。
Conclusion: Thirty-three standard hours have passed since her entry into the Unknowable Domain.
逻辑：诚然，可以直接找到黑塔女士，从外部将她强制弹出。但很可惜，那并非轻易能到达的场所，我们的时间也不甚宽裕。
Logic: It is possible to directly locate Madam Herta and forcefully eject her externally. Unfortunately, the location in question is difficult to reach, and time is running short.
Let me go in and look for her.
…事实上，这的确是现存的最佳解决方案。
...Honestly, this is the most optimal and immediate solution.
根据现有状况推断，最佳的解决方案是——找到一位有充足经验的测试员，从内部找到黑塔女士，将她带出来。
Based on the current situation, the most optimal solution is to identify an experienced tester, locate Madam Herta internally, and facilitate her extraction.
逻辑：在信息不充足的前提下，如果我在接入后，陷入和黑塔女士相同的失联状态，或将导致情况向不可逆的方向恶化。

Logic: Given the limited information we have, if I were to connect and subsequently experience the same communication breakdown as Madam Herta, it could result in an irreversible deterioration of the situation.
相反，由我在外部维持与你的联系，监视系统的运行，至少能够保证你的个人安全。
On the contrary, if I were to maintain communication with you on the outside and monitor the system's operation, it would ensure your safety at the very least.
I knew it. It has to be me.
I'll have to bite the bullet.
情况紧急，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，请务必尽快出发。
The situation is urgent, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, please depart immediately.
提问：关于「不可知域」产生的原因，是否找到了有益的线索？
Question: Were there any useful clues discovered regarding the cause of the Unknowable Domain?
有些头绪，但不多——博识学会的黑历史倒见着不少。
There are some clues, but not many — I saw much of the dark history of the Intelligentsia Guild.
学派战争距离现在，也就一百多个琥珀纪。照理说，作为直接参与者的烛墨学派，应该完整记录了事件的始末。
It's only been about a hundred Amber Eras since the Scholars' Strife. Logically, as a direct participant, the Candelagraphos should have thoroughly documented the entire event.
可当我把资料和「不可知域」内的历史进行比对，却发现，到处是缺漏和虚构。
But when I compared the data with the history in the Unknowable Domain, I discovered that there are numerous omissions and fabrications throughout.
逻辑：博识学会向来对「神秘」讳莫如深，尤其是这种重要史料，理应不会放任虚构史学家进行篡改。

Logic: The Intelligentsia Guild has always been extremely apprehensive regarding the Enigmata, especially concerning such important historical materials. They would not have permitted the History Fictionologists to tamper with it.
除非他们是有意为之，借「神秘」的手来藏匿不应存在的信息。
Unless they did it with the intention to use the Enigmata as a cover, to conceal crucial information that should not exist.
It's my favorite time — Watch the drama unfold.
The History Fictionologists are such great tools.
学派间为了支配「权杖」的算力打得你死我活，或是私底下有不可告人的交易，这些都无关痛痒。真正值得藏起来的，只可能是一种东西——知识本身。

The schools shed blood over the allocation of the Scepters' computational power, or there could have been clandestine exchanges happening, but all are inconsequential. There's only one thing truly worth concealing — knowledge itself.
按照公开的说法，数千台「权杖」被学士们愚蠢的问题占满，耗尽算力，变成如今任人拍照打卡的景点，飘浮在宇宙中的垃圾。

According to the official report, thousands of Scepters were flooded by foolish questions from scholars, exhausting their computational power. Now, they have become mere photo-op spots for everyone, floating in space like debris.
我会信？那可是天才的造物！——螺丝咕姆，我们对「权杖」系统的模拟精度能提升到多少？
You think I'd believe that? That is a creation of a genius! Screwllum, how much more can we improve the simulated accuracy of the Scepter?
结论：按照之前的估测，如果把模拟宇宙的算力全部集中在一起，仿真度能达到<unbreak>71</unbreak>％以上。
Conclusion: According to the previous estimates, if we concentrate all the computational power of the Simulated Universe, we can increase the accuracy to <unbreak>71%</unbreak> or more.
够用了。诸位很清楚，我不是一个安于现状的人。我一直想突破既有的知识桎梏，寻到新的突破点，令全宇宙的知识总量再度跃升。

That's enough. I'm sure everyone here knows that I'm never one to accept the status quo. I've always sought to push beyond the existing boundaries of knowledge, find new breakthroughs, and advance the total knowledge of the universe multiple-fold.
这一次对「学派战争」的演算，正是为了这个目标。为此，我打算<color=#dbc291ff>为模拟宇宙引入第五位合作者</color>了。
The current extrapolation of the Scholars' Strife is precisely for that purpose. Therefore, I've decided to <color=#dbc291ff>add in the fifth collaborator for the Simulated Universe</color>.
I really want to meet Yu Qingtu!
难道是爱吃香蕉的那位？
Could it be the one who loves to eat bananas?
我们把鲁珀特二世「复活」吧！
当然不是字面意思上的「复活」。收集学派战争的数据，在模拟宇宙仿造出完整的「权杖」系统，重现帝皇的外置思维单元。

Of course, I'm not literally "reviving" anyone — Gather all the data from the Scholars' Strife, replicate the entire Scepter system in the Simulated Universe, and recreate the Emperor's external cognitive unit.
然后，我们就能得到第五位天才的头脑。而我，将向他……她？不，应该说向它提出问题——正如当年「学派战争」的尾声，有人提出了那个{RUBY_B#孤波算法}最终被我解开的难题{RUBY_E#}一样。

Then, we will be able to obtain the brain of the fifth genius. Then I shall ask him... or her? No, should be "it"... a question, just like how someone asked at the end of the Scholars' Strife the {RUBY_B#solitary waves theory}question that I ultimately solved{RUBY_E#}.
虽然斯蒂芬和阮•梅女士并无异议，但我个人对此持保留意见。为一次研究加入太多目的，会极大分散研究的精力。

Although Stephen and Madam Ruan Mei are both agreeable, I personally have reservations. Introducing multiple objectives into a single study will significantly dilute the research focus and reduce efficiency.
保留意见就是没意见——「学派战争」、我的起点、{RUBY_B#鲁珀特二世}第五位天才{RUBY_E#}这一切就像首尾相嵌的锁链，螺丝咕姆，你可别跟我说你对这次演算不好奇。

Reserving judgment is as good as having no opinion — the Scholars' Strife, my beginnings, and {RUBY_B# Rubert II}the fifth genius{RUBY_E#} — These are all chains tightly linked to one other. Screwllum, you'd better not tell me you're not curious about this extrapolation.
如您所说，实事求是：我的分析权重中确实加入了百分之十五的好奇情感。
As you indicated, to be objective: My analysis does include a fifteen percent weightage of curiosity.
嘿，{NICKNAME}，你在黄金与机械的表现不错，应对鲁珀特的造物也有经验，而我现在又正好缺一个助手，你说这事儿巧不巧？

Hey, {NICKNAME}, your performance in Gold and Gears was decent. You are experienced in dealing with Rubert's creations too, and it looks like I'm lacking an assistant. Isn't this just the perfect coincidence?
黑塔直勾勾地望着你，多半不打算给你选择的权利。不过仔细想想，这可是和黑塔女士一起做研究的宝贵机会，你真的想拒绝吗？

Herta stares at you intently, likely not intending to offer you a choice. But, after careful thought, this is a precious opportunity to work with Madam Herta on a research project — do you really want to decline?
黑塔女士拒绝了你的拒绝。
Madam Herta refuses to accept your refusal.
就这么定了——多来收集「权杖」的数据，保证你会看到不少刺激的好东西。
Then this settles it. Do come and collect more Scepter data. I guarantee that you'll see many exciting things.
难以置信，一个只出现在「学派战争」时期的演算盲区，但到目前为止，二者却没表现出任何相关关系。
Unbelievable, an extrapolation blind spot that only appeared during the Scholars' Strife era — But these two factors have not shown any relationship with each other to this day.
失灵的设备，毫无规律的现象，无论对哪个时代的学者都堪称致命的打击。
Malfunctioning equipment and phenomena occurring without rhyme or reason are fatal blows to scholars of any era.
难道是铁墓？不，如果是它，影响不可能局限在模拟宇宙，整个空间站都会因它的力量而瘫痪。
Could it be Irontomb? No, if that was it, the effect would have extended beyond the Simulated Universe. The entire space station would have been incapacitated from its power.
是鲁珀特二世留下的后手吗？可他早就死透了，总不至于还能从模拟宇宙里钻出来。除非……咱们的演算足够逼真？不可能。

Could Rubert II have concocted a contingency plan up his sleeve? But he was already dead beyond measure — He couldn't possibly emerge from within the Simulated Universe... Unless... our extrapolation is actually sufficiently realistic? Impossible.
最坏的打算是，两个区域的重合，真就只是一场巧合。巧合，巧合也太多了……
The worst-case scenario is that the overlapping of these two domains was sheer coincidence. Coincidence... too many coincidences...
现象与本质，火光和影子。如果巧合的出现率趋向饱和，在「巧合」的背后，一定存在「必然」的本质。
Phenomenon and essence, sparks and shadows... If the rate of coincidences appearing approaches saturation, there must be an essential "inevitability" beneath such "coincidence."
帕提维娅接收到的未知信号就是一个巧合，但她因此成为了学派战争时期最伟大的学者。
The unknown signal that Patavia received was a coincidence, but that was how she became the greatest scholar during the Scholars' Strife.
「不可知域」…我已经迫不及待地想知道，还有什么在等着我们了。
The Unknowable Domain... I already can't wait to find out what awaits us.
虽然，自始至终，我们都没能解开「不可知域」形成的原因。但至少我们搞清楚了帕提维娅博士在「学派战争」时期的经历。
Though we never managed to clarify the cause of what formed the Unknowable Domain, we are at least clear on Doctor Patavia's experiences during the Scholars' Strife.
她最终利用「权杖」系统扩展思维，甚至差点实现了鲁珀特二世未能完成的<color=#dbc291ff>自我加冕</color>。
She eventually used the Scepter system to expand her intellect, even almost accomplishing the <color=#dbc291ff>self-coronation</color> that Rubert II could not complete.
她本可以成为「完美的学者」，拓宽宇宙的知识总量，但自我怀疑却最终让她止步了。
She could have become "the perfect scholar," broadening the overall quantity of knowledge in the universe, but self-doubt eventually made her halt her advance.
唉……她只能遗憾地为世人留下那道孤波谜题，却不能成为解谜的天才。
*sigh* ...She could only regrettably leave behind that solitary wave conundrum as her legacy, unable to become the genius who solved that dilemma.
提问：这个「不可知域」是一个不经意的巧合？如蝴蝶扇动翅膀。还是一个圈套？邀你我跌落其间。
Question: Is this Unknowable Domain an accidental coincidence? Like a butterfly flapping its wings? Or is it a trap, luring us into its abyss?
谁能为天才设置陷阱？在天才的研究里。
Who can set a trap for a genius within a genius' research.
答案：另一位天才。鲁珀特一世虽然被寂静领主杀死，但他的知识却借由二世的头脑重生。
Answer: Another genius. Rubert I was slain by the Lord of Silence, but his knowledge was reborn with the Second Emperor's brain.
同为俱乐部成员，我们都明白——任何一位天才都不容小觑，哪怕对方死去许久。
As Society members, we all understand that no genius is to be underestimated, no matter how long it has been since their demise.
与以往不同，黑塔并未反驳。
Herta does not retort — a departure from her usual self.
Let's just prepare for the worst...
你感觉这阵沉默持续了很久，对天才而言，一秒的思考，或许恰如人们一个琥珀纪的思考那般深远。
For you, this momentary silence seems like an eternity — To a genius, however, a second's contemplation may just be as profound as the thoughts of an average person over an Amber Era.
与以往相同，我和斯蒂芬会在外部全力保障你们的安全。无论如何，请二位务必平安归来。
Just like before, Stephen and I will fully guarantee your safety outside. No matter what happens, you two must return safe and sound.
It's finally time to solve the puzzle.
{NICKNAME}，在接入模拟宇宙前，有件事需要提前告诉你。
{NICKNAME}, before connecting to the Simulated Universe, I have something to tell you.
如果发现情况不对，马上往回跑，千万不要回头。
If you sense something amiss, turn around and run back with all you've got. Do NOT look behind you.
The Unknowable Domain has completely dissipated.
按照黑塔女士的计划，原本打算将鲁珀特二世的数据体作为第五位天才邀至席间，未曾料想，竟是「寂静领主」的数据体活化。
Madam Herta's original plan was to turn Rubert II's data into the fifth genius and invite them to our table, but we did not expect the data entity emulating the Lord of Silence to gain sentience.
这只剧毒的蝴蝶从模拟宇宙中挣脱，不仅没有同我们合作的打算，反倒留下遍地狼藉。
This lethal butterfly escaped from the Simulated Universe. Not only was she disinterested in cooperating with us, she also left chaos in her wake.
唉～越想越可惜，她那操弄概率的能力，和模拟宇宙简直是天生的一对。
Ahhh... it's a terrible pity, the more I think about it. Her proficiency in manipulating probability is absolutely tailored to the Simulated Universe.
针对这次的外部入侵事件，有必要对模拟宇宙的防火墙进行相应的迭代处理。
This external intrusion has raised the need to make the necessary improvements to the Simulated Universe's firewall.
最好预留一个小口，告诉她：「有空常来坐坐。」
Best to leave an inconspicuous backdoor to tell her: "Come back again when you have time."
出现的到底是真的波尔卡…？
Was it really Polka who appeared...?
真假并没有那么重要。「寂静领主」似乎拥有沿着因果链条自由现身的力量。
Her true identity doesn't matter. The Lord of Silence appears to have the power to show up along the chains of karma.
模仿她的数据体也好，研究她的档案也罢……恐怕只是直呼名字，就能让她有所感应，切，快赶上会魔法的老妖婆了。算了，我们最好不要再谈这个话题了。

Whether it's a data entity emulating her or a document recording investigations about her... I fear that she will feel something as long as her name is called out. Bah, she's almost like an old hag who knows magic. Forget it. We should just drop this topic.
提问：既然波尔卡女士不想加入模拟宇宙，她又为何要主动落入我们的陷阱？
Question: If Madam Polka does not wish to join the Simulated Universe, why would she intentionally walk into our trap?
好奇？或者单纯是为了好玩？要么就是报复我们在背后念叨她的年纪。
Curiosity? Or just out of plain old fun? Either that, or she's taking revenge on us discussing her age behind her back.
就这破俱乐部的人，有几个是精神正常的？
Is there anyone in this damned Society without a few screws loose?
再者说，最后差些落入陷阱的，反倒是为她布设罗网的我们。
Also, the hunter almost became the hunted. We almost got caught in a trap despite our own trap-laying.
那么，我们的第五位合作者……
还是看看，阮•梅能不能成功把余清涂拉进来吧。
We'd better see if Ruan Mei can successfully drag Yu Qingtu into this.
很高兴能看到你们安全地回来，推论：这或许是此次课题最大的一项收获。
I am glad that you are all back safe and sound. Deduction: This could be the greatest information haul gained from this research topic.
The damage on the Simulated Universe...
用有机生命的修辞来说，我们确实在模拟宇宙里「玩过头」了。
In the vernacular of organic lifeforms, we have definitely "overdone" it in the Simulated Universe.
不过这并非无益，逻辑：两位宝贵的合作伙伴，其权重远高于个体安全和运行效率。
But it was not all in vain. Logic: The two research partners are of far more import than individual safety and operational efficacy.
斯蒂芬表示，他在目睹了寂静领主的技术后「大受震撼」，想要做出一套与她相同的面部认知滤网。
Stephen expressed that his "mind was blown" after witnessing the Lord of Silence's methods, and wishes to make a facial recognition filter mesh similar to hers.
复述：「再也不用担心被人看见了。」
Reiteration: "No more worries about being seen by others again."
二世为自己打造的衣冠冢，还有墓前的花束。打破了我们一直以来，对反有机方程乃至帝皇的认知。
The cenotaph that the Second built for himself and the flowers by the tomb overturned what we thought we knew about the Anti-Organic Equation, or even about the Emperor.
曾有位朋友告诉我，「个体间存在的差异，远比有机和无机生命间的差异更大。」
A friend told me once: "The differences between individuals far surpass those between organic and inorganic lives."
跨越种族传播的反有机病毒，也佐证了这一观点。
The spread of the Anti-Organic Virus across the species barrier has also proven this perspective.
虽然二世身为有机体，与智械有所不同。但我愿相信，反有机方程之下，仍然存在无法被掩埋的「情感」。
Rubert II was an organic being, different from Intellitrons. But I choose to believe that, under the power of the Anti-Organic Equation, there still laid emotions that could not be buried.
以这一发现作为前提，结论：编写反转反有机方程的程序，其可行性并不为0。
With this discovery as the premise... Conclusion: The probability of composing a program that reverses the Anti-Organic Equation program is greater than 0.
虽然寂静领主破坏了模拟宇宙复现的「权杖」系统，但关于下个阶段的研究，她的话倒给了我不错的灵感……
Though the Lord of Silence has destroyed the Scepter system reproduced by the Simulated Universe, her words gave me plenty of inspiration for the research's next stage...
看你忧心忡忡的，还有什么要说的吗？我现在心情不太好，只给你一次提问的机会，想清楚了再问。
From your anxiety-laden expression, I take it you have more to say? I'm not in a particularly good mood right now, so you only get one question. Think hard before asking it.
啧，偏偏问了最麻烦的问题……
Tsk, you just had to ask the hardest question...
解开孤波算法难题时，我得到了一个常数。
When I solved the solitary waves theory, I obtained a constant.
当宇宙的不稳定指数超过它，未来便会倾向混沌的未知，被迷雾包裹。当不稳定指数低于它，未来则会落入确定的轨迹，再无自由意志。

When the universe's unstable index exceeds it, the future will veer towards the chaotic unknown, enveloped in fog. When the unstable index is less than it, the future will fall into an ascertained trajectory, and free will ceases to exist.
但是，在这个疯癫的宇宙，就算是常数也会坍塌和变化。「智识」、「神秘」…各个命途的力量相互挤压，不断改写常数的定值。
But even constants collapse and change in this universe of madness. Erudition, Enigmata... The various Path powers press against one another, continually rewriting the constant.
未来是确定的，还是混沌的，这道难题依然无法解答。
Is the future destined or chaotic? This conundrum remains unsolvable.
真正的战争，从来都没有结束。
The true war has never ended.
情况紧急，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，请务必尽快出发。
The situation is urgent, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, please depart immediately.
就这么定了——多来收集「权杖」的数据，保证你会看到不少刺激的好东西。
Then this settles it. Do come and collect more Scepter data. I guarantee that you'll see many exciting things.
这次的实验非同以往，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，还请注意安全。
This experiment is different from those prior, {F#ma'am}{M#sir} {NICKNAME}. Please stay safe.
「不可知域」…我已经迫不及待地想知道，还有什么在等着我们了。
The Unknowable Domain... I already can't wait to find out what awaits us.
与以往相同，我和斯蒂芬会在外部全力保障你们的安全。无论如何，请二位务必平安归来。
Just like before, Stephen and I will fully guarantee your safety outside. No matter what happens, you two must return safe and sound.
如果发现情况不对，马上往回跑，不用管我。还有，千万不要回头。
If you sense something amiss, turn around and run back with all you've got. Don't worry about me, and do NOT look behind you.
二世为自己打造的衣冠冢…以这一发现作为前提，结论：编写反转反有机方程的程序，其可行性并不为0。

The cenotaph the second emperor made for himself... With this discovery as the premise... Conclusion: The probability of composing a program that reverses the Anti-Organic Equation program is greater than 0.
未来是确定的，还是混沌的，这道难题依然无法解答。真正的战争，从来都没有结束。
Is the future destined or chaotic? This conundrum remains unsolvable. The true war has never ended.
What kind of questions do you have?
我们要怎么解开「不可知域」？
How will we solve the Unknowable Domain?
收集「学派战争」的数据，复现出完整的「权杖」系统，到那时，鲁珀特二世的遗产自会告诉我们答案。
Collect data about the Scholars' Strife and replicate the complete Scepter system. Then, Rubert II's legacy will naturally show us the way.
波尔卡•卡卡目还会回来吗？
只要我还走在「智识」的命途上，想必总有一日会和她再度相遇的。只是不知道，下次见面她会准备什么样的手段来招呼我呢……
So long as I walk along the Path of Erudition, I think I'll end up meeting her again one day. I just don't know what she'll do to greet me next time...
不对劲…我怎么还有点小期待呢？
Something's off... Why am I looking forward to this?
有人用某种锐器在黑塔一尘不染的模拟宇宙实验舱壁上刻下一行字——
Someone used a certain sharp object to carve a string of words on the wall of Herta's spotless Simulated Universe experiment pod...
「只有一种让我加入你们的方式：我的手术刀刺入了某位天才的咽喉。」
"There is only one way for me to join you all: When my scalpel pierces into the throat of a certain genius."
你明白，除你们之外，再也没有其他人踏入过此间，而那些人都不会是这行冰冷刻字的作者。
You understand that, besides you all, no one else has ever set foot in this space. And those people wouldn't be the authors of such a bleak declaration.
说起来，我还没怎么「开拓」过那节有吧台的车厢…今天难得悠闲，去逛逛吧。
Hmm, I haven't really "trailblazed" that bar car much, have I...? Heh, and I AM free today... Time to go check it out, then!
每次来这节车厢都忍不住感叹，真大呀……
Every time I come here, I can't help but marvel at just how spacious this car is...
怎么感觉面积都比其他车厢更宽敞，这符合物理学吗？
It also feels wider than the other cars... How is this even physically possible?
欢迎来到「派对车厢」，亲爱的无名客。您是要喝点饮料、吃点东西，还是要开始…「派对时刻」呢？
Welcome to the Party Car, Nameless. Would you like to have a drink, a snack, or... commence "Party Time?"
好的，请品尝这杯「柴米油盐」。它有浓稠的柴油质感，同时具备稻米的清香和海盐的清爽，是列车上享誉数个琥珀纪的饮品。

Right away. Here's a Rustic Infusion for you. The fragrant aroma of rice, the refreshing taste of sea salt, and a rich consistency matching that of oil — this has been a classic drink on board the Express for several Amber Eras now.
而且它的名字也颇具巧思——其中恰好暗藏了「柴油」二字，令人忍俊不禁。
I particularly like the clever use of "rust" in its name. You can't help but laugh, can you?
好的，请品尝这道「扳手手拌沙拉」。它用料健康、分量刚好、味道清爽，正适合用来加餐。
Right away. Here's a Wrench Drenched Salad for you. Made with healthy ingredients in the perfect serving size, this is just the flavorful refreshment you should be reaching for between meals.
而且它的名字也颇具巧思——「扳手」与「手拌」形成了谐音与回文的精妙结构，而我的手恰似一对「扳手」，令人忍俊不禁。
There's even a clever wordplay in its name: "Wrench" and "drenched" almost rhyme, and I have wrenches for hands! You can't help but laugh, can you?
来临了，「派对时刻」！不过只有您一位无名客，恐怕是开不成的。还是下次吧。
It's Party Time! ...You're the only Nameless here. We can't start a party with only one person. Perhaps next time, then.
不过这让我想出一个笑话——有人问一位无名客：「你的派对来了几名客人？」那位无名客失落地回答道：「无名。」
This brings to mind a joke. Someone asked a Nameless: How many names are on your guest list? The Nameless shrugged and said, none, they were all "Nameless."
这车厢的名字好热闹啊…
This car has an upbeat name...
您是说「派对车厢」？的确，这是个热闹的名字。可惜现在的列车比较冷清，与「热闹」二字相去甚远。
You mean the Party Car? Yes, it does sound upbeat. It's a pity that the Express is so quiet right now... The exact opposite of "upbeat."
但这样也好。如果列车上人太多，我们的「派对车厢」恐怕就要变成「排队车厢」了。「派对」与「排队」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
But this might be for the best. If the train were too crowded, our "Party Car" might just become a "Panic Car." Another joke of mine! You can't help but laugh, can you?
我希望您能喜欢这节车厢，亲爱的无名客。就算开不成派对，您也可以在这里放松身心。
I hope you enjoy your time in the Party Car, dear Nameless. We may not be able to get a party started right now, but please feel free to relax and unwind here.
这节车厢以前叫「会议车厢」。我的{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}说，现在无名客人这么少，用不到一整节车厢来开会，就自作主张改成了「派对车厢」。

This used to be called the Meeting Car, until my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#} came along thinking they wouldn't need an entire car for meetings among just a handful of Nameless. That's when my previous master made the decision to rename it the Party Car.
我只是一台调饮机器人，几个琥珀纪以来，致力于为各位无名客提供最优质的服务。
I'm merely a drinksmith robot who has been doing his best to provide impeccable service to the Nameless for several Amber Eras.
作为一台调饮机器人，我被设计为恰如其分地缺乏存在感。您不记得我，正符合设计预期。
As a robot drinksmith, my design ensures I remain appropriately inconspicuous. The fact that you don't remember me is precisely as intended.
需要我再为您做下自我介绍吗？
Sure. No more than three sentences, please.
我是某位无名客发明的调饮机器人，于几个琥珀纪前被制造。后来被{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}从角落里翻出，重新为星穹列车服务至今。

I am a robot drinksmith, invented and created several Amber Eras ago by a certain Nameless. My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#} found me in a corner, dusted me off, and has had me serving passengers on the Astral Express ever since.
竟然两句话就介绍完了…那再补一句吧，我的名字「闭嘴」，来源于姬子小姐对前任主人说的最后一句话。
Oh, that only took two sentences. I'll add one more then. I was named after the last thing Miss Himeko said to my previous master: Shush.
Sure. Keep it under <unbreak>40</unbreak> words, please.
我是一台古老的调饮机器人，由{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}修复。如今待在派对车厢，为各位调饮。
I am an antique robot drinksmith. My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#} repaired me. I now work in the Party Car, mixing drinks for passengers.
顺带一提，三月七小姐和列车长刚刚去了楼上的房间，说要找您。
I should mention that the conductor and Miss March 7th went up to your room looking for you a short while ago.
我建议您上去看看他们，免得他们到处寻找。
Perhaps you should go and see them, to save them the hassle of looking all over the place for you.
来了来了，{NICKNAME}乘客，我们找你半天了！
There you are, {NICKNAME}! Pom-Pom has been looking for you all day!
What made you think I'd be here?
你睡昏头了吧？这里是你的房间，当然要到这里来找你了！
Are you daydreaming? This is your room, silly! Where else would we go to look for you, if not here?
我怎么有自己的房间了？
I have my own room now?
你是列车组的一员，当然有自己的房间了！
Of course you have one. You're part of the Crew!
Why is it such a mess in here...?
Shouldn't you be asking yourself that...?
我失忆了！我是谁？你们是谁？
I've lost my memory! Who am I? Who are you guys?
嘿！本姑娘哐哐给你两拳，看你想不想得起来！
Hey, are you sure? Maybe a couple of punches will help to jog your memory?
哎，看着这一地杂物，就不由得想起了{NICKNAME}乘客刚成为无名客的时候……
Aw, looking at this mess reminds Pom-Pom of the time when {NICKNAME} first joined the Nameless...
是啊。这无比杂乱的储物间，将你的思绪带回了过去。
Indeed. This utterly cluttered storage room brings your thoughts back to the past.
那时，你刚刚在「黑塔」空间站经历了一场险象环生的冒险。然后你登上了星穹列车，展开了属于自己的太空喜剧。
Back then, you had just survived a perilous adventure on the Herta Space Station. Then, you boarded the Astral Express and began your own Space Comedy.
我记得，那好像是登上列车后不久的事……
I remember that. It was shortly after I boarded the Express...
Some... or maybe a long time ago
彼时彼刻，刚登上列车时……
At that moment, when I first boarded the Express...
我…我就是听到通风管道里有声音，觉得藏了什么奇怪的东西，就想爬上去看一看，结果…就卡住了……

I... I'd heard noises coming from the ventilation ducts, which made me wonder if something was hiding in there. Curiosity got the better of me, and I climbed up to take a look... And then I got stuck...
那你找到「奇怪的东西」了吗？
So, did you find anything out of the ordinary in there?
找到了。是同样卡在里面的{NICKNAME}。
Mm-hmm. I found somebody else stuck in the ducts: {NICKNAME}.
Any thoughts to share on the matter, {NICKNAME}?
I just wanted to explore the place.
真不错，是个「开拓」的好苗子。
I'm glad we found ourselves a natural at trailblazing.
I apologize for my grave misjudgment.
那倒不至于。只是有些危险，下次不要这么做了。
Hehe, let's not go overboard. Still, it was dangerous — let's not do anything like that again.
我听到通风管道里有声音…
I heard noises coming from the ducts, so—
好啦，今天是个好日子，就不做什么批评教育了。让各位齐聚一堂，是因为列车长有事要宣布。
Alright, alright. Today's a happy day, so Pom-Pom won't spoil it with lectures. I've gathered everyone here today because I have an announcement to make!
咳咳！让{NICKNAME}乘客在列车上如此居无定所，实在是本列车长的失职帕……
Ahem. It was terribly remiss of the conductor to have left {NICKNAME} without a room of {M#his}{F#her} own on the Express...
{NICKNAME} seems pretty happy with the current arrangement, though!
哼哼，所以——姬子乘客，问出我们的问题帕！
Hehe, go on, Himeko. Ask the golden question!
我倒觉得，这些问题由列车长来问更合适哦。
Ah, but I think the conductor should be the one to do the honor instead.
…咳咳…{NICKNAME}乘客，你是否愿意加入星穹列车，成为一名「无名客」？
...Ahem... Then here goes: {NICKNAME}, will you join the Astral Express Crew as a Nameless?
I thought I was already part of the Crew.
哪有那么简单？你还没经过「杨叔十八机兵阵」的试炼，怎么称得上是合格的无名客呢？
Hehe, not so easy! You can't call yourself a Nameless until you've cleared the "<unbreak>18</unbreak> Sentinels: Mr. Yang" trial!
正好小三月也没经过试炼，我稍后去准备一下，明天下午就让你先挑战一次这「杨叔十八机兵阵」。
Which reminds me — March hasn't cleared it yet either. I'll set it up a little later — tomorrow afternoon you can be the first one to give it a shot.
别别别，小三月不懂事，说着玩的！
Ohhh! Please don't! I was just joking!
Wow, you answered in a heartbeat!
当然可以啦～但我肯定还是不希望你拒绝。
Of course! It's your choice, after all. But I'd really, really, really love for you to try!
还以为是要给我分配房间…
And here I thought you were going to assign me a room...
请{NICKNAME}乘客不要着急，那是下一个流程！
Don't jump the gun, {NICKNAME}! That's next on the list!
You don't have to give us an answer right away.
成为无名客，意味着你不再留恋过去，而是选择开拓未来。
Becoming a Nameless signifies leaving the past behind to blaze a trail into the future.
比起关照自身，你更爱探索世界。
Exploring the far corners of the universe will seem more exciting than just looking out for yourself.
要暂别熟悉的生活，前往未知的世界展开冒险。
You'll step out of your comfort zone to set forth on adventures into uncharted territories.
不再渴念脚下的大地，而是将远方的群星当做自己的故乡。

Will that professor really be involved in the development?
这谁知道？反正广告上是这么说的！
Who knows? Anyway, that's what the advertisement says!
除此之外，这个「浴室里的星际旅行」系列，我还买了很多热门好物呢！
Besides this, I also bought many popular items from the Interstellar Travel series for the bathroom!
百分百可以折射出彩虹的花洒，附带湿度显示功能的防水音响，还有贾勒巴岩浆岩提取的浴盐，用了之后池水会像岩浆一样咕嘟咕嘟冒泡……

A shower head that can reflect rainbows <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of the time, a waterproof speaker with a built-in humidity display, and bath salts extracted from Jalleba lava rock that make the bathwater bubble like magma...
看来这入浴剂没有让你变聪明。
It looks like this bath soak didn't make you any smarter.
Hey~ Tease me again, I dare you!
你把头伸过来，我给你增加点智慧！
Come closer, and I'll add a bit of wisdom for you!
Remember to call me next time you go shopping.
没问题～星际和平商城的优惠狂欢季可吓人了，咱俩得携手杀出一条血路！
No problem! The discounts and deals at the Interastral Peace Mall are crazy. We'll need to team up and fight our way through!
(Next step, let's decorate the living room...)
（客厅里的家具，得早早置办起来！）
(We need to get the furniture for the living room sorted out soon!)
（再采购一些零食和饮料，就能邀请大伙来玩了。）
(Once we buy some snacks and drinks, we can invite everyone over to hang out.)
再次祝您今夜好梦，我这就告退。
Once again, I wish you sweet dreams tonight. I'll take my leave now.
我的购物车里还有好多居家热门好物呢，需要的话，我分享链接给你~
I have lots of popular home items in my shopping cart. If you need, I can share the links with you~
每一次冲泡咖啡都能带来全新的口感…很像我们的旅途，不是吗？
Each time you brew coffee, it brings a whole new flavor... It's very much like our journey, don't you think?
帕姆正在计算本次「卫生大评比」的总分…敬请期待评比结果帕！
I'm calculating the total score for this Hygiene Showdown... Stay tuned for the results!
拟真幻彩显示屏、拟神经电子脑处理器…真是豪华啊。就连我也想要置办一套了。
Realistic holographic display screens, neuro-synthetic electronic brain processors... It's truly luxurious. Even I want to get a set for myself.
藏品的摆放还是随心所欲一些为好。无名客的生活总是充满疲惫，在这种小事上，不妨就放过自己吧。
Arranging collectibles is best done as you please. A Nameless's life is always full of fatigue, so why not give yourself a break on these small matters?
哎哟，我也想翻新一遍自己的房间了。
Wow, this makes me feel like revamping my own room.
看着这里从无到有逐渐充实起来，真让人舒心。这种好日子，就该做些什么来庆祝一下！
It's so nice seeing this empty space gradually fill up with furniture. A happy occasion like this calls for a celebration!
不是啦！是说{NICKNAME}自己一个人的庆祝！
No, silly! I'm talking about {NICKNAME} celebrating in {M#his}{F#her} own way!
换作是我，肯定要在晚上好好泡个热水澡，尽情享受属于自己的时间～
If it were me, I'd take a relaxing hot bath in the evening, and enjoy some me time.
That's a unique way of celebrating.
哼哼，本姑娘可是「星穹列车泡澡协会」的创始人！
Hehe, you're talking to the founder of the Astral Express Bath Association, after all!
Is there even a bathtub in your room?
隐藏式设计，你不懂了吧？
It's concealed, of course! Ever heard of secret rooms?
确实，也是时候让{NICKNAME}享受一下个人时间了。
All I know is, {NICKNAME} deserves to take some time off for {M#himself}{F#herself}.
虽然房间建好了，但以后也要好好值日帕！列车也该启程了，要准备的事情还非常多呢！
Even though your room is set up, you must remember to keep up with your duties! The Express will be departing soon and there's still so many things to do!
And now, {NICKNAME}, we'd once again like to say...
大家碰杯，饮尽杯中的饮料，随后欢笑着告辞，一起离开了你的房间。
The group raises their glasses, drinking in unison, then with laughter, they bid farewell and exit your room together.
随后，几乎房门关上的下个瞬间，又有人敲响了你的房门。
Just as the door is about to fully close, there's another knock at your door.
亲爱的无名客，您现在有空吗？
Dear Nameless, are you available right now?
需要些饮料吗？或是一些茶点？我的知识库显示，夜宵或许会对健康造成负担，却能带来超乎想象的快乐。
Would you like anything to drink? How about some refreshments? My knowledge base indicates that while late night snacks may negatively affect one's health, they can also bring great joy.
我认识一位年轻的无名客，他早睡早起，坚持锻炼，严格规划热量摄取，拒绝了我的每一条建议。至于夜宵…在他眼中简直是毒药。

I once knew a young Nameless who was both early to bed and early to rise. He had a regular exercise routine and strictly regulated his caloric intake, rejecting every suggestion that I ever gave him. To him, midnight snacks were no different from poison.
后来，他度过了健康、长寿的一生。
As a result, he lived a long and healthy life.
亲爱的无名客，这是个令人警醒的案例，不是吗？
It's quite a tale of caution, is it not, dear Nameless?
Cool story, but I just want supper right now!
对不起，此地是一片没有「宵夜」的战场。这个笑话怎么样？「宵夜」与「硝烟」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
Ah, but you shouldn't have supper if you want to be super. How did you find the joke? Hilarious wordplay, isn't it? You can't help but laugh, can you?
I'd rather live a long life.
已录入{NICKNAME}乘客的饮食习惯数据，从明日起将为您调整食谱，提供营养更加均衡的餐食。明日午餐：萝卜丁、生菜叶、鸡胸肉，淋柠檬汁。

{NICKNAME}'s dietary preferences have been saved. Starting tomorrow, your meals will be changed to a more nutritionally balanced menu. Tomorrow's lunch menu includes diced carrots, raw lettuce, and chicken breast with lemon drizzle.
言归正传。听说您有泡澡的打算，我决定前来送您一份恰当的礼物，一块有着传奇历史的香皂。
Ah, but I digress. After hearing about your plans for a good soak, I thought this would make a most suitable gift and wanted you to have it. It's a bar of soap with a storied history.
这是阿斯德纳的狼人英雄「哈努努」生前最爱用的香皂。
Hanunue, the werewolf hero of Asdana, loved using this soap when he was alive.
「闭嘴」的半球形玻璃罩缓缓打开，机械臂将升降台上的「香皂」取出，郑重地放进你的手里。
The hemispherical glass dome of "Shush" slowly opens. A robotic arm carefully retrieves the "soap" from the platform and solemnly places it into your hands.
泛着银光的底板已经略带锈迹，根根挺立的铁丝却仍然扎手。
The silvery surface of the base has already started to show signs of rust, but the upright iron bristles are still sharp to the touch.
可能是习俗不同吧，在你那里类似的事物一般叫「金属毛刷」。
It might be a difference in customs, but where you are from, this kind of item is usually called a "metal brush."
This thingamajig is a bar of soap?
Werewolf fur is a pain to manage, after all.
忙碌了一天的无名客啊，请问，您要先洗澡、先喝杯饮料、还是要先听我再讲个笑话呢？
It's been a long and busy day for you, Nameless. Would you like to take a bath, enjoy a beverage, or listen to another of my jokes first?
I'm gonna take a bath. Please leave.
{NICKNAME}乘客，你来得正好！帕姆最近添了些新衣服，决定在这里给自己安排一个衣帽间～
Passenger {NICKNAME}, you arrived just in time! Pom-Pom recently got some new clothes and decided to set up a coatroom here for myself~
你看看，这个位置怎么样？
What do you think of this spot?
嘿嘿，帕姆也这么觉得。刚好塞满了这个角落！
Hehe, Pom-Pom think so too. It fits into this corner perfectly!
哦？关于帕姆衣帽间的位置，{NICKNAME}乘客有更好的想法吗？
Oh? Do you have a better idea for Pom-Pom's Coatroom, Passenger {NICKNAME}?
How about placing it in the Parlor Car?
怎么能放在观景车厢？难道「帕姆换装」是什么景观吗？
How can it be placed in the Parlor Car? Is my changing clothes a sightseeing attraction now?
How about placing it in the Archives?
那不就变成丹恒乘客的衣帽间了吗？
Wouldn't that make it Dan Heng's coatroom instead?
How about placing it in the cargo carriage?
别开玩笑了帕！帕姆对生活品质要求很高的！
Stop joking around! Pom-Pom has high standards for quality of life!
暂时驳回！目前看来，还是这个地方最合适。
Rejected for now! For the moment, this spot still seems the most suitable.
不能放在你自己的房间吗？
Can't it be placed in your own room?
哼哼，帕姆可是列车长～整个列车都是帕姆自己的房间！
Hmph, Pom-Pom is the conductor~ The entire train is Pom-Pom's room!
那么，衣帽间的位置就决定是这儿啦。{NICKNAME}乘客，来都来了，顺带帮帕姆看看今天穿什么帕！
Then, the coatroom placement is decided! Passenger {NICKNAME}, since you're here, help Pom-Pom decide what to wear today!
听说你正在筹备什么计划？
I heard that you're currently working on some kind of plan?
你从哪儿听…咳咳，我是说，没错！
Where did you... Ahem... I mean, you're right!
我，达米亚诺斯，发现了一个绝佳的商机。而它就躺在圣城的围墙外面。
I, Damionis, have discovered a superb business opportunity lying just outside the walls of the holy city.
你想入伙吗，英雄？只要得手，我们就会成为新时代的开拓者。保准赚个盆满钵满！
Do you want to join in, hero? If we get our hands on it, we will surely become the trailblazers of the new era! Great fortune is awaiting us!
Hmph, you got me in hot soup last time!
嗐，我那不是…太激动嘛。这次肯定不会出乱子——探险可是我的老本行！
Aye, can you really blame me...? I was just too excited back then. But no one's getting into hot soup this time, because adventuring is what I do!
You're actually interested in making money?
…啊哈哈。我虽然向往星空，但有时也得把目光转回大地才行。
...Ehehe. Well, I do yearn for the skies, but I should also occasionally have to turn my face back down to earth.
英雄，听说你来自天外之界，可能有所不知…曾经的圣城远不止现在这么点地盘。
I hear you're from a world beyond the sky, so you might not know this... But the holy city used to span across far greater lands than what you see now.
在很久以前，奥赫玛周围曾经簇拥着许多附属城邦——就像黎明机器被欧洛尼斯的群星围绕那样。
A long time ago, countless allied cities existed around Okhema... In the same way that Oronyx's stars surround the Dawn Device.
那时的奥赫玛是真正的「永恒之城」。比起一座城市，它更接近一位母亲。站在山崖上向外眺望，视野所及之处全是我们的领土！

Okhema was a true "Eternal City" back then. People did not think of it as their city, but rather a motherly figure. When one stood on top of the hill and looked outward, everything we could see was our territory!
…后来，黑潮的威胁愈演愈烈，城墙以里成了唯一安全的地方，这些地方逐渐都被废弃了。
...Then, the black tide raged stronger. The area within the city walls became the only safe place, while all other regions gradually grew deserted.
…谁说不是呢？不过多亏了这段往事，我们才有大赚一笔的机会。
...Isn't it? But it's also thanks to these events of the past that we have an opportunity to strike it rich.
想守住那么大一片区域，哪有退守城墙容易？也多亏了这段历史，我们才有大赚一笔的机会。

Rather than protecting such a vast territory, isn't it more feasible to fall back and defend just the city walls? But I guess it's also thanks to these events of the past that we have an opportunity to strike it rich.
Are we going to... go grave digging?
呃，也不能算错。准确的说，我们是去回收有用的东西。
Err, you're not entirely wrong. I am more inclined to think that we're going to bring back items that still have worth.
听说尼卡多利还活跃的那会儿，圣城墙外统统生活在疯王的阴影下，个别城邦甚至被他投出的巨矛砸进了地里…那种地方我们肯定去不了。

When Nikador was still active, everything beyond the walls of the holy city was living under the mad king's shadow. Their giant spear even sent some states buried several feet into the ground... We're not going to reach those places for sure.
如今你们讨伐了疯王，他的眷属也不再像以前那样活跃。这正是外出探索的绝好时机！
His titankins are beginning to die down now that you've defeated the mad king, making this the perfect time to go on an adventure!
虽然这些旧城基本都被毁得差不多了，不过总有些犄角旮旯还能保持完好——比如藏在地下的部分。
The ancient cities may be in utter ruin by now, but I'm sure some parts of them managed to remain as they were... Say, places that have been buried underground.
前不久，我在附近的旧城内发现了一座地下宫殿。只要能从里面挖些宝贝回来，你想在圣城住多久、买什么，都不成问题！

I found an underground palace beneath an ancient hypogeum around here a while ago. Just dig up those treasures, and you can stay however long you want in the holy city... Heck, you can even buy whatever you want here!
Are they really worth that much?
有句话怎么说的来着？「最值钱的东西都埋在地里。」当然，陷阱和危险也少不了……
How does that saying go again? Ah, "the most valuable things are all buried underground." Along with a ton of traps and danger, of course...
Are you sure it'll be safe?
我已经去踩点好几次了，一个怪物都没有…就是个别防御措施还没失效。
I've checked out the site a dozen times now and I haven't seen a single monster! ...Maybe except for a few of their defense mechanisms that are still functioning.
埋在地下、规模巨大的建筑群，多半是用来存放贵重物品的地方…就是可能有些防御措施。
A massive underground building complex that was likely used as a vault to store valuable items... and safeguarded with defense mechanisms that may be still functioning.
…那你至少能得到荣耀。想象一下吧，「收复故土之人」，多么伟大的头衔。
...But you'll at least receive glory. I mean, think about your potential title — "Reclaimer of Lost Lands"! Isn't that a noble title to be known by?
至于证据？你带回来的战利品就是最好的证明。只有搜集到足够多的战利品，大伙才会相信你确实完成了壮举。

As for proof? The treasures that you bring back will make for the most irrefutable proof. As long as you bring back a large enough pile of treasures, the rest will be convinced of your incredible feat.
总而言之，计划很简单，我负责带路，你负责解开那里的残余机关。得手后，咱俩三七分成。
In any case, our plan is simple: I'll lead the way, and you can sort out whatever mechanisms that remain. And when we finally get to the treasures, we can split them 3-7.
Why am I only getting <unbreak>70%</unbreak> of the treasures?
你只拿三成会不会太少了？
You're only taking <unbreak>30%</unbreak> of the treasures? Don't you want more?
啊？我的意思是，我拿七成，你拿三成。
Huh? I'm getting <unbreak>70%</unbreak>. The <unbreak>30%</unbreak> is yours.
你有重新选择措辞的机会。
You have a chance to reconsider your words.
…好吧，我承认，这事少了你办不成——但是少了我也一样。
...Oh, alright. I'll admit that we can't do this without you... but the same goes for me.
咱们各退一步，对半开，如何？
Let's both compromise and agree on an equal split?
痛快，就爱跟你这样的人合作。
Excellent. That's why I like working with people like you.
唉，七三开就七三开吧…分赃的话题到此为止！
Bah, I'll just live with a 7-3 split... This is final! No more negotiation on how we're splitting the loot!
Negotiate any further and it'll be a 9-1 split.
唉，七三开就七三开吧…分赃的话题到此为止！
Bah, I'll just live with a 7-3 split... This is final! No more negotiation on how we're splitting the loot!
我已经找好了绕开城墙的最佳路线。事不宜迟，咱们这就出发吧。
I already have an ideal route to go around the city walls. Let's set off now.
记得做足准备，我等你回来。
Of course, it's best to be well-prepared. I'll be waiting for you.
I'm ready for our adventure. Lead the way to the ancient city.
好啊。事不宜迟，咱们这就出发吧。
记得做足准备，我等你回来。
Of course, it's best to be well-prepared. I'll be waiting for you.
在达米亚诺斯的带领下，你来到了奥赫玛外的附属城邦，在地下的一扇门前停住了脚步……
With Damionis' guidance, you have come to a vassal city outside of Okhema and stopped before an underground door...
到了，就是这里。据我先前探明，通往地宫内部的路就在前方。
We're here. Based on my previous scouting of the area, this should be the way into the hypogeum.
听说它被{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量庇护，原先是用来对抗黑潮的避难所，之后嘛……
{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power supposedly protected this place. It used to be a shelter used to resist the black tide, but years later...
这里看起来和奥赫玛很像。
This place looks so similar to Okhema.
都是同一时期的建筑风格，差别大了反倒奇怪吧。
That's to be expected. They were built around the same period, after all.
不过这地宫都还没来得及派上用场，就被废弃了。
It's a pity that people back then ended up abandoning this hypogeum before it could serve its purpose.
别提了。避难都还没开始，这里就被废弃了。
Don't even begin. This place was abandoned even before it could serve as a shelter.
We're not going to find anyone in here, right...?
怎么会？避难都还没开始，这里就被废弃了。
Why would we? This place was abandoned even before it could serve as a shelter.
因为之后大伙意识到，黑潮一旦来了就不会褪去，再坚固的避难所也不能维持太久。
People later realized that the black tide does not retreat once it takes over a location, so even the most robust of shelters would not hold out for long.
与其在灾难来临时躺进棺材等死，不如从一开始就不让灾难发生……
Rather than making themselves comfortable somewhere safe while waiting for death to claim them, they decided they should prevent this disaster from even occurring...
所以说，这里面有好东西的概率还是很大的——如果我们能解开封印的话。
So, it only stands that there's a high chance of finding valuable treasures in there... provided we can break its seal.
看见那个了吗？「预言算碑」，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的造物。正是它身上的禁制关闭了大门。
See that thing over there? That's a Prophecy Tablet, a creation of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. Its containment mechanism is the very thing keeping this gate locked.
按理说这应该是雅努斯的权能，不过命运三泰坦亲如一家，能力互通倒也算合理。
This should actually be the authority of Janus, but seeing how close the Three Titans of Fate were, I guess it does make sense for them to share their powers.
总之，只要这玩意还存在，我们就没法继续前进。
Anyhow, as long as that tablet is active, we're not going to be making any progress.
你是和黄金裔并肩作战的英雄，解除封印对你来说应该不难——我等你的好消息！
Since you are a hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs, I assume it wouldn't be difficult for you to break this seal? I'll be waiting for your good news, then!
门开了！不愧是你，光凭我自己可解不开这个。
Ooh, it's open! I knew I had to bring you along. I wouldn't have been able to open it on my own.
至于后面会遇到什么，就是完全的未知数了——真正的冒险，想想都激动！
Alright, I have no idea what we're going to encounter once we walk through here. But that's the spirit of adventuring! Just the thought of it excites me!
Didn't you already draw a map of the place?
我拜托过{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的祭司，用他的预言和我的专业知识做了大概的勘探。但每个房间里具体有什么…只有亲自看过才知道。

I asked help from {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s priest, and I was able to use his prophecy and my personal expertise to briefly survey the area. However, if we want to know what's actually in each room... We will have to find out ourselves.
总之，我们还是继续前进吧。
In any case, we had better press on.
…你比我还激动。你才是真正的「探险家」！
Looks like you're even more excited by this prospect than me... You are indeed a true "explorer"!
你们向地宫深处走去，脚下是凝结了不知多少历史的砖石。
You head deeper into the hypogeum. Along the way, you step on countless bricks, each a slice of history condensed over untold years.
又一扇门，又一道封印…不出所料。
As I expected... Here's another door and, along with it, yet another seal.
不过这看起来像是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的东西…为什么会出现在这里？
But this looks like a creation of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}... Why is it here?
总之只要解开它就好了吧？
Regardless of the reason, we just need to solve it, right?
根据套路，应该是这样没错。但泰坦的事情，谁又能说清了……
That should be the case, assuming this seal works the same as the others. However, when it comes to Titans, nothing is ever for certain...
我只记得种地和骑大地兽时要拜吉奥里亚，没听说它还能封闭山洞…不过泰坦的弯弯绕，谁又能说清了？

I can only recall that people pray to Georios when they're farming or riding dromas. I've never heard of Georios being able to seal off caves before... Yet, when something involves the whims of Titans, who can really tell?
Do you need me to eat some soil?
呃…如果你打算靠这种方式伪装成大地兽，那我想应该没用。
Uh... If you believe that doing so would help you to disguise yourself as a dromas, I don't think that such a drastic step is really necessary.
总之你先试试能不能解除它，万一情况不妙咱们再溜就是。
Anyway, you should first try and see if you can break the seal. We can still flee if anything goes awry.
居然又成功了…或许这里的防御并没有我想象中那么严密。
I can't believe you succeeded again... Perhaps this place isn't as well-defended as I had imagined.
继续前进吧，希望里面还剩下值得带走的东西。
Let's continue onward. Hopefully there will still be items in this place valuable enough for us to bring back.
你们继续向地宫深处走去，耳边划过千百年未变的风声。
You progress even further into the depths of the hypogeum, and winds that have continued to blow for thousands of years whistling past your ears.
嚯，这里的空间真宽阔，比起如今的圣城都不遑多让啊。
Oh. It's really quite spacious here. In fact, it's comparable to the size of the holy city as it is nowadays.
没想到小小的附属城镇里居然还有这种地方，当时的建筑工艺可真发达。
I can't believe such a place could be located within a tiny ancillary town... The architectural craftsmanship of those days was truly advanced.
Okhema's ancestors must have been quite wealthy?
那是当然！早在黄金战争时期，奥赫玛就是当之无愧的「永恒之城」了。
Of course! Even as far back as the Chrysos War period, Okhema has always been the undisputed "Eternal City."
这个话题还是先放一放吧——看到那些复杂的道路了吗？想要通过这里，恐怕不像之前那么容易。
Let's set this discussion aside for now... Do you see these complicated paths? It seems that progressing onward won't be as easy a task as before.
Let's continue this conversation later, then.
的确，看看那复杂的道路…想要通过这里，恐怕不像之前那么容易。
Alright... In any case, do you see these complicated paths? It seems that progressing onward won't be as easy a task as before.
和其他房间一样，这里的大门也被封印了…不过还是有好消息的，看那边，<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>。
The door here is sealed, just like all the other rooms... And yet, there's still a silver lining. Look over there. It's the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>.
据说那玩意源自{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的手笔，可以抓取重物，但需要一定天赋才能操纵…
According to legend, that object was created by {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Although it can grab heavy objects, only people of sufficient talent can control it...
这里有这么多金币，想必是关于「偷窃」的考验。我猜只要偷走足够数量的金币，封印就能解开了…我没有驱动那玩意的天赋，你试试看？

There are so many gold coins here. This must be related to the "stealing" test. I guess we just need to steal enough coins for the seal to unlock... I don't have the kind of talent to activate that thing. You wanna give it a try?
随着封印解除，通往地宫更深处的路径再次畅通。
With the seal dispelled, the path to the deeper part of the hypogeum is open once more.
虽然不是第一次见，但我还是好奇…如此巨大的手，真能用来偷窃吗？
Although this is not the first time I've seen this item, I'm still curious about one thing... Can such an enormous hand really be used for theft?
没有目击者就是完美的潜入。
Any infiltration can be considered flawless if there's no one around to witness it.
的确。这么说来，用蛮力砸开银行大门也算偷窃的一种…扎格列斯，实在可怕。
Indeed. If so, I guess breaking open the entrance to a bank by force could also be viewed as a form of theft... Zagreus is a terrifying Titan indeed.
砸开银行大门不算偷吗？
Shouldn't breaking open the main entrance of a bank be considered a form of robbery?
这么说来，刺客也有消灭所有目击者来达成潜入的技巧…扎格列斯，实在可怕。
If that's the case, then assassins can be considered to have accomplished their infiltration by eliminating all witnesses... Zagreus is a terrifying Titan indeed.
不错，气氛活跃了一些。我们继续前进吧。
Well, it looks like the atmosphere has livened up quite a bit. Let's press on, then.
你们继续向地宫深处走去，身影在古老的走廊上拉得修长。
You progress even further into the depths of the hypogeum. Your silhouette elongates as you proceed down the ancient hallway.
通过这片区域之后，应该就是存放宝藏的金库了吧。算算距离，差不多也该到尽头了……
Past this area should be the vault where treasure would be stored. By estimating how far we've traveled, it seems like we're close to our goal...
坚持住，伙计，胜利近在咫尺……
Keep going for a while longer, buddy, for victory is at hand...
感觉坚持不住的反而是你…
Why do I feel like you're the one who isn't able to keep going?
我只是有些不祥的预感，我已经做过太多无用功了……
I merely have a sense of foreboding. After all, my previous efforts have all come to naught...
希望这次能有与之匹配的回报吧。
Hopefully, this time my effort will bear fruit.
这地方好像不能直接通过…有什么办法吗？
It looks like we can't pass through this area directly... Do you have any ideas?
刻法勒在上…这、这太神奇了！
By Kephale above... Th—This is absolutely incredible!
门开了，但这次你们没有义无反顾地前进…因为门的背后是更多、更多扇门。
Although the door's open, you don't proceed onward without hesitation like you did before... Because there are more and more doors behind this door.
因为门的背后是更多、更多的房间，连接它们的道路如树枝般交错延伸，有些甚至通往悬崖峭壁。
That's because behind this door lies even more rooms that are connected by a maze of paths that intertwine like the branches of a tree. Some of these paths even lead toward steep cliffs...
刻法勒在上啊…这还有完没完了！要想探完这里，怕是三辈子都不够用吧……
By Kephale above... Is there an end to this!? If we wish to explore all of them, it'll take us more than three lifetimes to do so...
唉，想想也是，如果这里真有好东西，怎么可能留给我们来拿？
*sigh* Now that I think about it, if there really was something valuable here, surely it wouldn't still be lying here for us to pick up?
达米亚诺斯陷入了低落，就像他第一次被告知「天外之界」并不存在的那天——你听见了幻想破灭的声音。
Damionis sinks into despondency, just like the time when he was first told that the "world beyond the sky" didn't actually exist... In fact, you can practically hear his dream shattering into pieces.
只要勇于开拓，总会抵达终点。
As long as you continue to blaze a trail, you will eventually reach your destination.
更多房间意味着更多可能性！
More rooms signify more possibilities, right?
这关都过不了，还怎么去天外？
If you can't even get past this hurdle, how do you still expect to venture beyond the sky?
…也是，来都来了，不做成点什么总觉得欠口气。
...You're right. Since I'm already here, I owe it to myself to see this through to the end.
但是就算继续深入，我估计也帮不上什么忙…不如以后我就在入口望风好了。万一有怪物逼近，我还能及时提醒你一下。

However, if we are to continue onward, I don't think I'll be of much help... Perhaps I should just stay by the entrance and act as a lookout. That way, if I spot any approaching monsters, I will be able to warn you in time.
You're not trying to escape, are you?
怎么可能？探险家是不会抛弃同伴的！
Who do you take me for? Explorers never abandon their companions!
何况我要是真丢下你，回到圣城后谁还敢跟我组队？这笔账我是能算清的。
Besides, if I were truly to abandon you, who would dare team up with me again when I return to the holy city? I can figure out what's good for me.
You're not planning to slack off, right?
怎、怎么能叫偷懒呢？这是分工，分工！
H—How can this be considered as slacking off? This is just a division of labor!
何况我要是真不干活，回到圣城后谁还愿意跟我组队？这笔账我是能算清的。
Besides, if I were really going to laze about, who would be willing to team up with me again when I return to the holy city? I can figure out what's good for me.
Alright, let's do as you say then.
你居然这么信任我？真令人感动……
You have so much trust in me? I'm truly touched...
那就期待我们的继续协作吧，英雄。要是在里面找到什么东西，你先收着就好。
Well then, let's look forward to our continued cooperation, dear hero. If you find anything valuable in there, just keep it with you for now.
小心点，这后面有些路可能不止通往地下…如果遇到危险，可以跑回入口找我。
Be careful, for some of the upcoming paths may not merely lead further underground... If you encounter any danger, just run back to the entrance and find me.
随着最后一道封印解除，原本杂乱的前路收束为一，露出了通往地宫尽头的捷径。你连忙把这个消息告诉了达米亚诺斯……
As the final seal is broken, the initially chaotic paths merge into one, revealing a shortcut to the depths of the hypogeum. You hurriedly relay this development to Damionis...
居然真的有隐藏房间？比我想象中还要经典……
Wait, there really is a hidden room? This place is even more classic than I had imagined it to be...
不管怎么说，地宫大半部分都是由你独自完成探索的，这份荣耀也应当属于你。
Regardless, since you explored a majority of this hypogeum by yourself, the honor of uncovering its depths should also be yours.
你去吧。我会在后面守好来路的——万一门突然关上了，我会及时提醒你。
You should continue onward. I'll stay behind and keep watch over our return path. Should the door suddenly slam shut, I will promptly alert you.
你沿着那条捷径前进。道路一直向前延伸，将你引去了尽头的某个房间……
You follow the shortcut as it extends toward a room at the far end of the hypogeum...
宝箱的表面刻着一系列文字，虽然历经磨损，但还能辨认……
Lines of text are engraved upon the surface of the chest. Although the chest has suffered significant wear and tear, the inscribed words are still legible...
致可能到来的某人：你会来到这里，要么是外面的封印已经失效，要么是你亲手解开了它们——这证明了你的幸运或智慧。

To the person who manages to reach this place: The fact that you're here means that either the seals outside are no longer active or that you broke the seals yourself. Therefore, you're either very lucky or extremely intelligent.
黑潮的威胁愈发强烈。我们不得不带走一切能带走的东西，融入圣城的怀抱。我们将不再以萨白尼人自居。
The threat of the black tide grows ever stronger. We are forced to take as many of our belongings as possible and seek the holy city's embrace. No longer shall we live independently as Sabanians.
可我还是希望有人能记住我们家乡的名字，以及这里曾经发生过的一切。因此，我留下了这小小的一部分回忆。
Yet, I am still hopeful that people will still remember the name of our native home, as well as the events that have transpired here. This is why I have left a tiny portion of my memories here.
或许将来的某天，人们会回到故土，新生的孩子会知晓我们的一切、并在刻字石板前流泪…但我再也无法看到。

Perhaps someday, people will return to my birthplace once more, and newborn children will learn all about us and weep before this inscribed slate... Alas, I will not be around to witness such a scene.
希望那时的我们还能造出穹顶。
I pray that when that day arrives, we will still be able to construct a dome.
你打开箱子，里面是一些陈年杂物，以及一块蒙尘的刻字石板。这便是萨白尼人最后的遗产。

When you open the chest, you find some ancient items inside, as well as a text-inscribed stone slab that's covered in a layer of dust. These items form the final legacy that was left behind by the Sabanians.
你离开地宫，和达米亚诺斯在安全的地方汇合。
You leave the hypogeum and reunite with Damionis again at a safe location.
我在地宫里发现了文物…
I discovered some artifacts in the hypogeum...
什么，真的有？能、能让我看一看吗……
Wait, really? C—Can I take a look at them...?
你展示了萨白尼人的遗产。
You show the Sabanians' legacy to him.
…令人震惊，这些是货真价实的古代遗产。而且这块石板保存得相当完好，堪称极品！
...How extraordinary. These are genuine pieces of ancient heritage, and this slab has been preserved surprisingly well. An exquisite relic indeed!
我就不问你都经历过什么奇遇了。收好吧，它们毕竟是你的战利品。
I won't ask you to elaborate on what you have experienced. Keep these priceless treasures safe, for they're yours now.
唉，看到这些玩意，我突然有种感慨——盛筵难再啊。
*sigh* I suddenly feel quite emotional when I look at these artifacts. After all, they are proof that good times never last.
昂扬向上的黄金年代并非永恒，进步与发展亦不是必然…曾经被众人视作救星的圣城，也终究难逃时间的侵蚀。

The optimistic and prosperous Golden Age cannot flourish endlessly, just as progress and advancement are never a guarantee... Even the holy city, once viewed by the masses as a beacon of hope, will also eventually succumb to the ravages of time.
倘若那个时代的人看到如今落魄的我们，大概会吐槽「这都什么不肖子孙」吧，哈哈……
If the people of that time were to witness the state that we're in right now, they would probably gripe about how we're a bunch of "unworthy descendants," haha...
至少你们仍在与黑潮对抗。
At least you're still resisting the black tide.
的确，那些奋战在一线的战士，还有城中的所有公民…他们的努力是真实存在的。
Indeed, the warriors fighting on the front lines, as well as all the citizens living in the city... Their hard work is plain to see.
希望在黑潮降临前，我还有机会去天外之界一趟，哈哈。
I hope that before the black tide descends upon us, there is still an opportunity for me to journey to the world beyond the sky, heh.
没必要给自己那么大鸭梨。
There's no need to put so much pressure on yourself... It might sour your ability to soar.
你是想说压力吧…哈，这活跃气氛的手法可真不咋样。
Was that your attempt at a joke...? Heh, the way you choose to liven up the atmosphere is middling at best.
不过…我确实感觉好受了些。眼下还有更重要的事去做，没空为宏大的东西感伤。
And yet... I actually feel better now. Seeing as how there are more important things to accomplish, now's not the time to feel sad over grandiose dreams.
Living is the best! Long live life!
是啊，至少我们还活着——这也是一种成功。
Yes, at least we're still alive... That is an accomplishment in itself.
希望在黑潮降临前，我还有机会去天外之界一趟，哈哈。
I hope that before the black tide descends upon us, there is still an opportunity for me to journey to the world beyond the sky, heh.
总之，守好这些东西。也许它们一百年后会变得更值钱也说不定呢。
Anyway, you should take good care of these things. Perhaps they'll be even more valuable a century from now.
啊，大门打开了！这样是不是就算通过试炼了？
The door is open! Does this count as clearing the trial?
据说，很久很久以前，奥赫玛城门口有八座山。
Once upon a time, so the story goes, eight mighty mountains blocked the entrance to Okhema.
这八座山堵塞了通往城区的路，为百姓生活带来了严重不便。
They cut off all paths to the city, making daily life a struggle for its citizens.
这时，一只比山还高的大地兽出现了。它一张口，便吃掉了其中七座，只剩如今刻法勒屁股下那座……
Then along came a dromas bigger than any mountain. One gulp later, seven mountains vanished, leaving only the one Kephale sits on now.
世人称它为，大•巨•极•大地兽•撕裂群山者•垃圾制造狂•后面编不出来了——简称「大撕垃」。
They named it the Super-Duper-Mega-Ultra-Dromas-Summit-Incisor-Litter-Launcher-Can'tMakeStuffUpAnymore — or "Dromasilla" for short.
这便是我喜爱大地兽的二百七十个理由之一：大即为美。也就是说，大地兽是世间最美丽的造物。
That's just one of the <unbreak>270</unbreak> reasons I love dromases: Bigger is more beautiful! Which makes dromases the most beautiful creatures in the world!
诚然，故事整体的真实性有待考量，但其阐述了一个颇具评估价值的论点——人们认知中大地兽的体型，绝不是这一物种所能达到的极限。
Well, the story may be questionable, but it makes an interesting point. The dromas sizes we've seen are nowhere near what that species is truly capable of growing into.
还记得大地兽工坊的这颗蛋吗？据我推断，它拥有「大撕垃」的神魂。一旦孵化，便很可能成为新的<color=#dbc291ff>超•极•大地兽</color>。
Remember this egg in the Dromas Workshop? My research suggests it contains Dromasilla's soul. When it hatches, we might witness the birth of a new <color=#dbc291ff>Super Dromas</color>.
之后我要闭关一阵。在此期间，那颗蛋就托付给你了。千万别让它被愚昧之人破坏。
I need to go off-grid for a while. The egg is in your hands now. Keep the ignorant away from it, please.
我听遐蝶说了，你初抵奥赫玛时曾与大地兽游戏甚欢。被大地兽所喜爱的都不是坏人。
Castorice mentioned you had a great time with the dromases when you first got to Okhema. Anyone the dromases like is a good person in my book.
准确地说，研究如何把这颗蛋孵出来。目前我有三十二种可行的方案，只是需要一些时间验证。
I'm researching how to hatch this egg, actually. I have thirty-two promising plans so far, but I need time to test them all.
最强、最劲、最具传奇色彩的大地兽。它是所有大地兽的牧人，会带领生灵们走向更美好的未来…咳，多余的修辞就不赘述了。
The strongest, mightiest, most legendary of dromas-kind. The shepherd to all dromases, guiding all beings toward a better future... *Ahem* Let's leave it at that.
记住，出现问题，去找风堇助教。
Remember, if you need help, just look for Assistant Instructor Hyacine.
一天什么都没做，好累啊……
I did absolutely nothing today. Why am I so tired?
你四下张望，目光最终落在那颗紫色的蛋上——它正开始出现裂痕。
Glancing around, you see the purple egg, now covered in cracks.
又没有外力干涉…该不会这么巧，它要在这时候孵化了吧？可别发生什么意外啊！
No one's near it... Is it hatching on its own? Right now? Hopefully nothing goes wrong!
*Intense sounds of the shell being ripped apart*
不知为何，这未来的超•极•大地兽长得有点…萌？
Strangely enough, this future Super Dromas looks surprisingly... cute?
Aww, it's so cute! I'm keeping it.
没人能对可爱的生物说不，一种莫名的好感从你心底油然而生。
No one can say no to something this cute. You feel an inexplicable fondness growing inside you.
出于本能，又或是出于不舍，这只初来世间的生物赖住了你。
By instinct or attachment, this newborn creature has decided to stick with you.
呜嗡，呜嗡？（说话？什么是说话？）
不，它只是在发出「呜嗡」的叫声——但你能听懂。联觉信标，很神奇吧？
No, it's just making "grumph" sounds. But you understand it perfectly. That's the Synesthesia Beacon for you. Amazing, right?
嗡……？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我的肚子为什么会叫？）
Grumph...? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, why is my tummy growling?)
应该是饿了？记得大地兽吃的是红土…还好，这里是大地兽工坊，手边就有不少。
Is it hungry? Dromases eat redsoil, if you recall... Fortunately, the Dromas Workshop has plenty of it.
呜嗡，呜嗡——（嘿嘿，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}最好啦。）
说罢，它便将一整桶红土全吃了，天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
Then it gobbles up a whole bucket of redsoil. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.
Eat the redsoil yourself while it watches.
一回生，二回熟。你将红土塞进了自己的嘴里，期待着它能给出些有趣的反应——
Learning is by example. You shove redsoil into your mouth, hoping for an amusing reaction—
呜嗡，呜嗡。呜呜。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的脸好奇怪，哈哈。让我也试试——）
Grumph! Grumph grumph. Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa} looks so silly, haha. I'll try it too—)
说罢，它便将剩下的红土全吃了，天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
Then it gobbles up all the remaining redsoil. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.
你从兜里摸索出了几十种在各个世界搜集到的食物，想看看它喜欢哪个。
You search your pockets and find dozens of foods from different worlds, wondering which one it'll like.
只花了<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒，它全吃了。天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
It only takes <unbreak>15</unbreak> seconds to eat everything. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.
呜嗡！（嗯！肚子不叫了，谢谢{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
Grumph grumph! (Mmm! No more tummy sounds, thanks, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)
——单看容积，这孩子将来也许真能成长为一头参天巨兽——就像那刻夏故事里讲的那样。
Seeing how much it eats, this little one might really become a giant beast someday, just like in Anaxa's stories.
没有任何含义，它只是在单纯的呜呜叫。
Take a closer look at it.
它也用水汪汪的大眼睛盯着你。
It looks back at you with big, sparkly eyes.
没有任何含义，它只是在单纯的呜呜叫。
Take another good look at it.
It tilts its head sideways, looking confused.
呜嗡？（怎么啦？{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？要我摸摸你吗？）
Grumph? (What's up, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}? Should I pet you back?)
It wins the contest with pure cuteness.
平稳的呼吸声传来，或许是因为有你陪着，它睡得十分安详。
Gentle breathing sounds fill the air. Your presence seems to help it sleep peacefully.
眼下这个状态，你实在没法留它一个在这里。更何况——
You can't possibly leave it alone like this. Besides—
