呜呜…（大家会不会对我失望？我会不会配不上超•极•大地兽这个名号？）
*sniff* (Will they all be disappointed in me? Maybe I'm not worthy of being called the Super Dromas?)
呜…（或许，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也会和我分开……）
想什么呢，祷言会失控，八成只是因为你太瘦了，下次培养得全面发展发展。
What are you thinking? The prayer went out of control, probably just because you're too skinny. Next time, try developing a more balanced build.
而且想成大器不得失败个几百几千次的…支棱起来，我还等着你给我养老呢。
Besides, if you want to become someone strong, you'll have to fail hundreds or even thousands of times... Chin up. I'm still counting on you to look after me when I'm old.
至于分开？更不用担心，我可是{TEXTJOIN#247}的监护人啊，陪伴孩子长大是我的使命。
As for being separated? That's nothing to worry about. I'm {TEXTJOIN#247}'s guardian. Watching you grow is my mission.
只要你一直在前进，道路就会不断延伸。所以，不要停止长大啊——
As long as you keep moving forward, the path will keep stretching ahead. So don't stop growing—
放心吧，就算再特别，也没人能要求你必须完美无缺，毕竟就连泰坦神明也做不到。
Relax. No matter how special you are, nobody gets to demand perfection from anyone. After all, not even the divine Titans could manage that.
举例来说——我住的地方就在某位神搞恶作剧时爆炸过一次。
Take me, for example. My place literally got blown up once when a certain god pulled a prank.
总之，一两次失败别放在心上，你可是我家的孩子，活得再随心所欲一点吧！
Anyway, don't let one or two failures get to you. You're my kid, so go ahead and live however you like!
其实在你出生之前，我就确信我家的孩子一定会闯祸，准备了两千万利衡币的赔偿款。
Even before you were born, I was confident my kid would stir up troubles, so I set aside <unbreak>20</unbreak> million Balance Coins for compensation purposes.
结果到现在一分都没花掉，一定是我的教育方法出了问题。
But not a single coin has been used. Clearly, something's off with my parenting style.
呜嗡。呜……（谢谢你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。我想…应该没事了，嗯。）
Grumph. Grumph... (Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. I think... I'm okay now, hmm.)
呜呜，呜嗡，嗡嗡。（呜诶，酷酷的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}居然讲起道理来了，好诡异哦。）
Growl, grumph, grumph. (Whoa, seeing my cool {F#Mama}{M#Papa} talk about something serious is kind of weird.)
Glad you're feeling better. Want some food?
呜嗡！（哇，我错了，不要吃我啦——哈哈……）
Grumph! (Wah, I'm sorry, please don't eat me — hahaha...)
呜嗡。（嗯…得先回去向大家报个平安才行。）
Grumph. (Hmm... I should head back and let everyone know I'm safe.)
Let's go, I'll come with you.
现在修正还来得及，跟我念：规则，就是用来打破的！
It's not too late to fix this, repeat after me: Rules are made to be broken!
呜嗡（规则，就是用来打破的。）
Grumph (Rules are made to be broken.)
呜嗡！（规则，就是用来打破的！）
Grumph! (Rules are made to be broken!)
很好！现在你还害怕失败吗？
Great! Now, are you still afraid of failures?
呜嗡…（感觉好像怎么都无所谓了…）
灰宝，你们回来了！之前的事我都听说…{TEXTJOIN#247}又变小了？怎么会……
Grayie, you're back! I heard what happened... {TEXTJOIN#247} shrunk again? How did that even...
It just has an upset stomach.
No problem, it's already been solved.
嗯…好吧，我知道啦。那个，旅团对接人有封信托我交给你们。
Hmm... alright, I get it. Anyway, the troupe liaison left a letter for you.
Huh? (What does it say up there?)
Don't be too hard on yourself.
没事，聘不到你是他们亏了。
It's fine. If they didn't hire you, that's their loss.
呜嗡，呜嗡。（不是啦，我是想说——气死，下次能不能免试啊。）
Grumph, grumph. (No, what I meant was— Ugh, so annoying! Can't we skip the test next time?)
啊！二位回来啦！实在抱歉，刚刚接到个有点赶时间的任务，兽皇已经带着「贝茜摩丝」它们先走了。另外…是发生什么状况了吗？
Ah! You two are back! I'm so sorry, but I just got an urgent mission and Beast Emperor already left with "Behemoth" and the others. By the way... did something happen?
刚刚我们拯救世界去了。
We were just out saving the world.
It just went to take a bath.
原来如此，一定是有事要办吧。我们还担心是不是说错话了……
I see. You must have had things to do. We were worried we might have said something wrong...
不说这个，我来是想告诉二位，虽然主队出发了，但我们还是想邀请{TEXTJOIN#247}加入。
Anyway, I came here to tell you both that even though the main team has left, we'd still like to invite {TEXTJOIN#247} to join us.
{TEXTJOIN#247}愿不愿意先参加留在城里的「驻屯分团」？虽然资历较浅，但一定能帮它快速熟悉旅团的工作。
{TEXTJOIN#247}, would you like to start out with the city-based "Garrison Regiment"? Though you're a bit green, it'll definitely help you get familiar with the troupe's work quickly.
Is there also a Survey Corps?
看来阁下提前做过功课了啊——听说大地兽之祖「荒笛」仍在世时，它的追随者们还组成了「宪分团」，史称三大兽团。
Sounds like someone did their homework. Back when Terravox, the ancestor of the dromases, was still around, its followers formed the Military Police Brigade, one of the three legendary beast groups.
呜嗡！（嗯！去！听起来更好混。）
Grumph! (Mm hmm! Let's go! Sounds way easier to get by.)
哈哈，虽然我还是听不懂它的话，但这句我倒是理解了。欢迎你！分团的第一次考核任务是在三周后，到时直接来找我们就好。

Haha, even though I still can't understand what it's saying, I got that part at least. Welcome aboard! The first assessment mission for the Regiment is in three weeks. Just come find us when it's time.
当然，你也可提前熟悉一下氛围。到时候见啦，{NICKNAME}阁下，把{TEXTJOIN#247}放心交给我们吧。
Of course, you're also welcome to check out the vibe beforehand. See you then, {NICKNAME}. You can leave {TEXTJOIN#247} in our good hands.
Baby's tummy is making thunder noises...
呜嗡！（好耶，我要吃一座山！）
Grumph! (Yeah! I could eat a whole mountain!)
只要顺利完成任务，并且完成一些考核，就能直接转至主队！也就是实习，怎么样？
Once you complete the mission and pass a few evaluations, you'll get to join the main team. It's like an internship, what do you think?
旅团实习当日，你对即将出门的小驮兽千叮咛万嘱咐，生怕它到了新的环境被人欺负。
On the day of the troupe internship, you gave your little pack beast endless reminders, worried it might get bullied in a new environment.
「呜嗡~（没事的，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你知道我的，只有我欺负别人的份。）」
"Grumph~ (Don't worry, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. You know me. I'm the one who does the bullying.)"
…话是这么说，该担心的还是会担心。万一遇上发了疯的泰坦眷属…或者它乱吃野外不干净的土，吃坏了肚子怎么办？
...Well then, but you can't help worrying. What if it runs into some crazed Titankin? What if it eats something dirty out in the wild and gets sick?
Maybe I should go with you to take a look.
It'll be fine. Just trust the kid.
没错，它可是你家孩子，一定能轻松地解决问题，在众人面前大放异彩。
That's right, it's your kid after all. They'll breeze through this problem and shine in front of everyone.
无需担心！但…要是它希望表现给你看的时候，你却不在场，那该有多遗憾啊……
No need to worry! But... if it wanted to make you proud and you weren't there to see it, wouldn't that be a little sad...?
Maybe I should go with you to take a look.
这就是几分钟前你的心理活动。其实回想这些没什么意义，因为你人已经在这了。
That was what went through your mind a few minutes ago. But reminiscences don't matter now. You're already here.
呜嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你真是无处不在。）
呜，呜嗡嗡~（谢谢你来看我！这样我更有底气了。）
Grumph, Grumphhh~ (Thank you for visiting me! I feel more confident now.)
…多好的孩子啊，你不禁潸然泪下。
...What a wonderful child. Your eyes start to well up.
英雄，我们要出发了——再不加快脚步的话，会吃到大地兽的尾气。
Hero, we need to head off now. If we don't pick up the pace, we'll be eating the dromases' exhaust fumes.
是时候了，就在第一次监护人之旅中见证孩子的成长吧！
It's the moment to witness your child grow on your first trip as their guardian!
呜嗡——（诶嘿，状态不错，没在{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}面前丢人——真是太遗憾了。）
Grumph— (Hehe, not bad at all, didn't embarrass myself in front of {F#Mama}{M#Papa} — What a shame.)
I don't understand you, big guy.
呜，呜~嗡~~~（它说…我们两个长得简直一模一样。）
Grumphhhh~~~ (It says... we look exactly alike.)
呜，呜~嗡~~~（它还说，老大的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是它的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，让我替它向你问好）
Grumph, Grumphhh~~~ (It also says that boss's {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is its {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, and asked me to say hi to you.)
呜嗡。（好怪哦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你又多了个孩子呢。）
Grumph. (That's so weird, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Now you've got another kid.)
Its eyesight must be pretty bad.
呜嗡嗡，呜嗡嗡嗡！（它之前还瞧不起我，但现在我已掌握岁月的神力，它就认我做老大啦——我可不止这一个小弟哦！）
Grumph, grumphhh! (It used to look down on me, but now that I've mastered the divine power of time, it calls me boss. I don't just have one little follower!)
看来，你的孩子在外完全不用担心，再给它些时日，定能掀起腥风血雨…不，成就一番大事业！…嗯？它偷偷干什么呢？

Looks like there's no need to worry about your child out there. Give it a bit more time, and it might just stir up a savage storm... no, I mean, accomplish something amazing! ...Hm? What is it sneaking around for now?
呜？！呜嗡嗡嗡——（没什么！我们先回家吧！我想多练习一下祷言。你会陪我的对吧，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？）
Woo!? Grumphhh— (It's nothing! Let's go home! I want to practice my prayers a bit more. You'll stay with me, right, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}?)
最近的{TEXTJOIN#247}十分刻苦，要么是一遍遍地练习祷言，要么就是沉浸在阅读中，有些时候还会突然不知所踪——
Lately, {TEXTJOIN#247} has been putting in serious effort. It is either repeating its prayers nonstop or completely absorbed in reading. Sometimes it even vanishes without a trace—
看着孩子这么努力学习，作为家长，你心中五味杂陈。
As a parent, watching your child work so hard fills your heart with a complicated mix of emotions.
是时候进行亲子间的「交流」了，当然，事关孩子的心理健康，必须认真对待才行。你决定斟酌下措辞——
It's time for a little "heart-to-heart" with your kid. Of course, since it's about its mental well-being, you decide to take it seriously and choose your words carefully—
孩啊，我们来谈谈人生吧。
Hey kiddo, let's talk about life.
孩啊！这是我一生一次的请求——
My child! This is my one and only request in life—
呜？（怎么了，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？啊，是不是{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}最近又闯祸了？好啦好啦，我会替{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}去道歉的啦。）
Grumph? (What's wrong, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}? Oh, did {F#Mama}{M#Papa} get into trouble again? Alright, alright, I'll go apologize on {F#Mama}{M#Papa}'s behalf.)
你最近总在学习，身体会累垮的。打会儿电动好不好…我是说，要不要去泡澡？
You've been studying non-stop lately. You'll wear yourself out. How about playing some video games... I mean, want to go take a bath?
在我像你这么大的时候，根本不知道什么是欧洛尼斯祷言，平常都是在翻垃圾桶。
When I was your age, I didn't even know what Oronyx's Prayer was. I was too busy rummaging through trash bins.
青出于蓝胜于蓝，你现在的勤奋已经远远超过了{F#娘}{M#爹}，{F#娘}{M#爹}担心你会……
You've already gone way beyond what your {F#Mama}{M#Papa} ever managed. I'm just a little worried you might push yourself too hard...
呜呜呜。呜嗡——？（再让我学五分钟，就五分钟！等到下次实习结束，一定陪{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你去玩，好吗？）
Boohoooo. Grumph—? (Just let me study for five more minutes, just five minutes! Once my next internship is over, I'll definitely take you out for fun, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, okay?)
劝说失败，这孩子绝了——没别的办法，考完再说。
Convincing it didn't work. This kid's on another level... Guess you'll have to wait until after the exam.
这次的实习也顺利完成了。你看向，它脸上正洋溢着夹杂兴奋和疲惫的光彩。
The internship wrapped up smoothly. Looking at it, you see its face beaming with a mix of exhilaration and fatigue.
...Shall we head to the bath as planned?
...What's taking you guys so long to come down?
这个池子的人流量…是不是有点超标了？
Isn't this pool getting a bit... overcrowded?
抱歉，我的粉丝太热情了。
Sorry, my fans tend to get a little too enthusiastic.
不不不，没有责怪您的意思。我也想体验一下和大地兽一起泡澡是什么感觉，可惜我还在上班。
No, no, no, I'm not blaming you. Honestly, I'd love to know what it's like to bathe with a dromas too. Too bad I'm still on shift.
看得出，客人们都是被{TEXTJOIN#247}吸引过来的。
No doubt about it. Everyone here was drawn in by {TEXTJOIN#247}.
呜嗡~（铁锅炖大地兽，大家都是配菜。）
Grumph~ (Iron pot dromas stew with everyone else as side dishes.)
各位客人，彩头讨完了、面也见了，我们还是给英雄一家留些私人空间吧。
Ladies and gentlemen, we've had our fun and paid our respects. Let's give our heroes some private time with their family.
好吧好吧，下次再一起泡澡哦？{TEXTJOIN#247}。
Alright, alright, let's take a bath together next time, okay, {TEXTJOIN#247}?
终于，你们可以独享这超高温浴池的热度了——就像曾经那两位制造出「浴场惨案」的伙计那样。
Finally, the scorching bath is all yours, just like the time some two individuals managed to cause the "Baths Incident."
呜嗡——（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我好像知道你在想什么——）
Grumph— ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I think I know exactly what you're thinking right now—)
嗡。（放弃吧，人类不可能是大地兽的对手的。）
Grumph. (Give up, humans can't beat dromases.)
不要小瞧了我的羁绊啊！
Don't underestimate the power of my bonds!
一个绝佳的点子在你脑海中成形，它百分之百能让你在泡澡比赛中取胜。可惜这里地方太小，写不下。
A brilliant idea pops into your head. It would absolutely let you win in the next bath battle. Too bad there's not enough space here to write it down.
你的嘴角勾起一抹笑容，直到<unbreak>2.19</unbreak>秒后，你的脚心命中了水池边的某样东西——那是一个椭圆形的白色固体。
A smile starts to form at the corner of your mouth. Exactly <unbreak>2.19</unbreak> seconds later, your foot bumps into something by the edge of the pool — a white, oval-shaped solid.
人是一切社会关系的总和；未经审视的生活不值得过；世界上没有两片完全相同的树叶；先有鸡后有蛋；两个铁球同时落地……
Humanity is the sum of all social relations. An unexamined life is not worth living. No two leaves are exactly alike. The chicken came before the egg. Two iron balls fall at the same time...
很好，刚才发生了什么来着？
呜嗡，呜嗡？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你没事吧？）
印象里，你被肥皂滑到，撞进了浴池。可如今你依旧完好地坐在岸上，究竟发生了什么？
You remember slipping on a bar of soap and falling into the bath. Yet here you are, sitting perfectly fine on the edge. What exactly happened?
一头大地兽，竟然能使用欧洛尼斯祷言回溯肥皂，还顺便把踩了肥皂的{NICKNAME}一并带上岸，恐怕实力早已达到半步祭司境啊。
A dromas that can use Oronyx's Prayer to rewind soap and rescue {NICKNAME} who slipped on it? It must be approaching the level of a demi-priest already.
Hmm, I must say, I'm impressed.
桀桀桀，早就跟大哥说过了，此子天赋恐怖如斯，必须为我们所用……
Hehehe, I told you already, big bro. This kid's talent is terrifying. We need them on our side...
你说话像是小说里的反派。
You sound like a villain from a novel.
呃…估计是最近被那紫色贼灵纠缠太多次，染上了它的口癖？
Ugh... maybe I've been around that purple Spirithief too long. I'm starting to talk like them?
去准备最后的测试吧，让我们看看这小家伙能做到何种地步。
Let's get ready for the final test and see just how far this little one can go.
希望它能向我们证明，大地兽的可能性……
I hope it can show us what a dromas is truly capable of...
欢迎来到实习转正的最终考核！介绍一下，这位便是我们的团长「兽皇」。今天的考试，由他担任主考官。
Welcome to the final assessment for your internship promotion! Let me introduce you to the troupe's leader, "Beast Emperor." He'll be serving as your chief examiner today.
Holy! The return of the emperor!
咳…解释起来很费事。总之，至少今天，请叫我「兽皇」。
Ahem... It's a long story. Anyway, just for today, please call me "Beast Emperor."
我们特意为{TEXTJOIN#247}准备了旅团迎新餐——看看这些土块的色泽，多么诱人啊。尽管吃吧，小家伙。
We've prepared a special welcome feast for {TEXTJOIN#247}. Just look at the appetizing color of these dirt clumps. Go ahead and dig in, little one.
吃石有什么不好？吃啥补啥嘛。一会儿它可是要载大石头的，不来点硬菜没有劲儿。
What's wrong with eating stones? You are what you eat. It's gonna carry heavy stones later, so it needs something solid to fuel up.
众所周知，吉奥里亚曾赐予大地兽三项特质——刀枪不入的<color=#dbc291ff>肌质</color>，辨别是非的<color=#dbc291ff>灵知</color>，以及团结众生的<color=#dbc291ff>风采</color>。

As everyone knows, Georios gave all dromases three gifts — indestructible <color=#dbc291ff>Muscultition</color>, perceptive <color=#dbc291ff>Spiracuity</color>, and uniting <color=#dbc291ff>Charisplendor</color>.
这三项特质是全体大地兽追求的目标，但其中最关键的还是<color=#dbc291ff>肌质</color>。
These are the ideals that every dromas strives for. Among them, the most vital is <color=#dbc291ff>Muscultition</color>.
看见那边的熔岩块了吗？这场考核的关键就是搬运它。
See that chunk of condensed lava over there? Moving it is the key to passing this test.
它的表面有接近一千艾的高温——如果这还不够直观，你可以理解为黎明机器的百分之一。
Its surface reaches nearly a thousand exa in temperature. If that doesn't mean anything to you, just think of it as one percent of the Dawn Device.
Let's skip the test and go home.
难道不该是这块熔岩真的很烫吗？如果感到害怕的话，现在回家还来得及。
Shouldn't we be more worried about how hot this lava actually is? If you're scared, it's not too late to head back home.
Good luck, {TEXTJOIN#247}. See you at the troupe.
呜嗡…（不会啦！毕竟是庆功仪式嘛。）
Grumph... (No way! It's a celebration ceremony, after all.)
Stand tall and proud. This is an honor.
呜嗡…（我是大地兽，没办法挺胸啦。）
Grumph... (I'm a dromas. I can't exactly puff out my chest.)
哈哈，不必担心，阁下。看看周围的大地兽们，久违地有新鲜血液加入它们，想必是高兴也来不及，你瞧——
Haha, no need to worry, my friend. Look at the dromases around us. They're thrilled to have fresh blood joining their ranks after so long. Look—
Well, that's way beyond what I expected.
呜呜呜嗡。（没有没有，都是朋友，朋友啦。）
Grumphhhh. (No no, we're all friends here. Just friends.)
哦，原来是感动的——不提这个了，请{NICKNAME}来为这场仪式开个头吧！
Oh, turns out you were just moved to tears. Let's not dwell on that. {NICKNAME}, would you kick off this ceremony?
Let's be serious for a moment.
来到奥赫玛后，我结下了许多的缘分。而与{TEXTJOIN#247}的相遇，则是我最珍贵的宝物。
Since coming to Okhema, I've formed many precious bonds. But meeting {TEXTJOIN#247} has been my most treasured gift of all.

I'm Kate, a guard from the Bloodhound Family, just like Vader. He said he had the pleasure of meeting you before— Ahem, long story short, we found something real valuable...

Found a treasure, huh? You can keep it...
不行，这么好的宝贝，我们不得不和您分享——
No way, this is too good not to share with you—
...Wait, who's Vader? And who are you again?
您不记得我们也是正常的，重要的是这个宝贝——
It's fine if you don't remember us. What really matters is this treasure right here—
我收下了，谢谢你陌生的朋友。
等等，我并不是来这里给您送礼而已…您先看看这个宝贝——
Hold up, I'm not just here to give you a gift... Take a look at this treasure first—
是枚梦泡，叫「不要笑挑战」。这梦泡里隐藏的奇妙能量，让人忍不住想要恶作剧，想要找点乐子…以及放声大笑…非常好理解，对吧？

It's a dream bubble called "Try-Not-to-Laugh Challenge." It contains a peculiar energy that makes you want to pull pranks, seek some thrills... and just laugh your heart out... Pretty easy to understand, right?
这玩意恰到好处地难以处理——既找不到失物主人，也没办法贸然上报给家族，说到底…任谁也不会将它判定为「危险物」，家族只会置之不理。

The thing is, it's awkward to deal with... I can't find who it belongs to, and I can't exactly report it to The Family either. When it comes down to it... no one would ever call it "dangerous," so The Family just shrugs it off.
…所以，我想拜托您来检查下这个梦泡。毕竟像您这样的大人物，说不定见多识广……
...So, I was hoping you could take a look at it. After all, a big shot like you has probably seen all kinds of strange things, right...?
这不就是字面上的不要笑挑战？
看搞笑内容，努力憋笑，并录下自己的反应？不不不，恰恰相反……
Watch funny stuff, try hard not to laugh, and record your reaction? No no no, quite the opposite...
万一它真的很危险的话怎么办？
嗐，对于这枚孱弱的梦泡来说，遇上了无敌的您，那是它的危险呢……
Ah well, for such a fragile dream bubble, running into someone as invincible as you... it's the one in danger...
实不相瞒，我们进入梦泡之后，根本笑不出来。每当有人在梦泡里战斗时，那种奇妙的能量就会变得更加活跃…我们还听到了一些隐约的憋笑声。
To be honest, we couldn't even crack a smile after entering the dream bubble. Whenever someone fights in it, that mysterious energy flares up even more... We even heard some faint, muffled giggles.
您明白了吗？这梦泡并不是入梦者的不要笑挑战，而是神秘人的不要笑挑战！
You see? This dream bubble isn't a try-not-to-laugh challenge for dreamers. It's the challenge for that mysterious person!
我擅自将这种能量称作「憋笑度」，我猜测，当憋笑度到达极限时，就算是梦泡里的神秘人也会…憋不住放声大笑？那就是神秘人输了！
I called this energy the Giggle Gauge. My guess is once it hits a certain limit, even that mysterious person in the dream bubble will... burst out laughing uncontrollably? That's when they lose!
但很可惜，我和维德太弱了。只好拜托您来试试，以您的身手，说不定能让人憋笑失败。
Unfortunately, Vader and I are too weak. That's why we're asking for your help to try it. With your skills, you might just be able to make them lose.
你的意思是，我是{F#搞笑女}{M#搞笑男}？
当然不是，但是…怎么说呢，这其实是在说您武德充沛呀！
Of course not, but... how should I put this? What I meant is you're brimming with martial prowess!
我太强了，只会让他笑不出来…
I'm too strong. They won't even be able to crack up...
您误会了，这不是让您痛击神秘人的意思。
You misunderstood. I'm not telling you to bash the mysterious person.
神秘人的笑点也很神秘！我们试了好几遍，战斗上表现越出色，越能使神秘人笑出声来！
Their sense of humor is just as mysterious! We tried several times, and the better our combat performance, the more likely it is to get them burst out laughing.
所以就…拜托你啦？您放心，我们对危险梦泡有一整套的安全监管手段，您不会遇到任何危险…随着调查深入，您也会收到相应的报酬……

So... please help us out? Don't worry, we have a complete set of safety measures for dangerous dream bubbles, you won't face any risks. And as the investigation progresses, you'll receive compensation accordingly...
总之，这个梦泡就交给您了，加油！咱就回去接着上班了……
Anyway, this dream bubble's all yours now. Good luck! I'm heading back to work...
还没来得及搭话，你便注意到艾丝妲身旁的桌上蹲着只你此前从未见过的造物。
Before you can even say a word, you notice an unfamiliar creature crouching on the table beside Asta.
而它的模样，无疑让你想起了某位故人……
And its appearance unmistakably reminds you of someone from your past...
好久不见呀， {NICKNAME}。欢迎回到「黑塔」空间站！
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Welcome back to the Herta Space Station!
嘿嘿，我专程约在禁闭舱段见面，想必…你应该能猜到找你有什么事了吧？
Hehe, I specifically arranged to meet you in the seclusion zone... I'm sure you can guess why I called you here?
我知道了，你想找我借钱。
I see, you want to borrow money.
啊，不会不会。虽说管理黑塔女士带回来的奇物，确实给空间站造成了不小的预算压力，但放心，资金方面的窟窿，我自己就能填上。
Ah, no, no. While managing the Curios that Madam Herta brings back has put quite a strain on the space station's budget, rest assured, I can cover those financial gaps myself.
能用信用点解决的问题，当然不算是问题。
Problems that can be resolved with credits are never problems.
...Don't tell me you're going to use me as a lab rat!
嗯？听起来像是黑塔女士会做的事，我提出的委托…至多就是陪佩佩玩会吧。
Hmm? That sounds like something Madam Herta would do. As for my assignment... at most, it's just playing with Peppy for a bit.
开玩笑的。佩佩已经是很成熟的科员了，这种小事不需要麻烦你。
Just kidding. Peppy's already a very capable researcher, no need to trouble you with such small matters.
Could it be... related to the creations?
答对啦。就是阮•梅女士留在空间站的这群小生命，和你也算是颇有渊源呢。
Correct! These little lifeforms that Miss Ruan Mei left at the space station have quite a history with you, after all.
我就不卖关子了，事情是这样的。阮•梅女士为小家伙们设计了一组新的训练项目，但她最近抽不开身，所以就把主导工作交给了我们。
Let me cut to the chase. Here's the deal. Miss Ruan Mei designed a new set of training programs for the little ones, but she's been too busy lately, so she handed over the lead role to us.
喵。都说不是「训练」，是大家共同举办的「赛跑」，是自发的比赛！
Meow. I told you it's not "training," it's a "race" we're all holding together. A spontaneous competition!
也不需要助手，只用在观众席为我们应援，呐喊助威就够，我们自己会跑快快的喵。
We don't need any assistant, just cheer for us from the stands! Your support is all we need, and we'll run super fast on our own, meow!
Support the legal rights of creations!
哈哈，我先做个整体说明吧。这项训练…该怎么形容呢，确实像是场<color=#dbc291ff>造物们的定向越野赛</color>。
Haha, let me give you an overview first. This training... how should I put it? It's basically like an <color=#dbc291ff>orienteering race for creations</color>.
形态各异的小家伙需要越过重重障碍，抵达赛道终点，争夺更高的名次…听起来是不是还挺有意思的？
These unique little ones need to overcome various obstacles to reach the finish line and compete for the top spots... Sounds pretty fun, doesn't it?
好像在电视上看过这种节目…
I think I've seen this kind of show on TV...
Are the rewards from this race any good?
更重要的是——先说清楚，这是科员们想出来的点子——为了给参与者增添更多趣味性，赛程中还特别增加了<color=#dbc291ff>应援环节</color>。

More importantly — and I want to make it clear that this was our researchers' idea — to make things more exciting for the participants, the race will feature a special <color=#dbc291ff>cheering segment</color>.
可以为看好的小家伙应援，要是它赢得比赛的话，你就会获得极其丰厚的奖励！
You can cheer for a promising little one, and if it wins the competition, you'll receive incredibly generous rewards!
请为我应援喵！为我应援谢谢喵！
Cheer for me, meow! Thanks for cheering for me, meow!
And if I pick the wrong one... is there a penalty?
当然不会啦。都说是个游戏，你是来帮忙的，怎么能让你破费呢？
Of course not! This is just a game, and you're here to help out. How could I let you pay for anything?
安安心心地坐在观众席，看那群小家伙的精彩表现就好。
Just sit back in the stands, and enjoy the little ones putting on a great show.
噢，还有件事，你肯定会感兴趣的。
Oh, and there's one more thing you'll definitely be interested in.
这场造物们的越野训练得到了星际和平公司的资金支持，因此，叽米先生会作为解说出场，实时播报赛况哦。
This creations' great obstacle race is sponsored by the IPC, so Mr. Owlbert will be providing live commentary as our commentator.
怎么样，就说不会无聊的吧？这些糕点先给你，待会应援的时候用得上。
See? I told you it would be fun. Here, take these pastries. You'll need them for the cheering later.
准备好了，我们现在就出发喵！
We're all set, let's head out now, meow!
呼…我闭目一想，便知道你会在这个时间来找我。伙伴们都说我料事如神、算无遗策，断然不是空口无凭、空穴来风哪。
Hmm... I knew you'd come find me at this time. They say I'm prophetic and never miss a beat. Trust me, that's not just empty talk or baseless rumors.
承蒙大家厚爱，推举我为本次赛跑大会的主持者，也欢迎各位嘉宾前来观赛咪。
Thank you to everyone who chose me as the host of this racing event, I am humbled by your support. Welcome, honored guests, to the spectacle, meow!
Time to make a dash for snacks!
I'll come hang out with you later.
嗯。本次赛事还会持续很长时间，挑方便的时候来玩就好咪。
Alrighty. The event will be running for quite a while, so just drop by whenever it's convenient for you!
小家伙们跌跌撞撞冲向终点的样子，真是有趣呢。
It's quite amusing to watch those little ones stumbling their way to the finish line.
规则…应该都明白了？后续就麻烦你啦，在空间站里开开心心地陪造物们玩吧。
Got the rules... all clear? I'll leave it to you then. Have fun playing with the creations on the space station.
这是正经的训练项目吗？
Is this really a proper training program?
看起来不太像，对吧？其实刚接到这个任务的时候，我也挺疑惑的。
Doesn't quite look like it, right? To be honest, I was pretty confused too when I first got this mission.
「障碍」、「封闭系统」、「干涉与观测」…记得最初的方案上写着这几个关键词，但阮•梅女士也没有向我们透露太多就是。
"Obstacles," "closed system," "interference and observation"... I remember these keywords were written in the initial proposal, but Miss Ruan Mei didn't reveal much more to us than that.
天才们的想法，或许就是这么难懂吧。不过，够有趣就行啦。
Maybe geniuses' ideas are just that hard to grasp. But hey, as long as it's fun, that's what matters!
糕点用完了该怎么办呢？
What if I run out of pastries?
喏，我会帮你设置好小机器人的程序，需要糕点的时候，找它就行了。
Here, I'll program the Little Robot for you. Just ask it whenever you need pastries.
为了保障公平性，只有当糕点不够的时候才能去取哦，所以还是多想想办法吧。
But to ensure fairness, you can only get more when you have insufficient pastries. So, you might want to strategize a little.
我就知道，你肯定和小家伙们很合得来。费用的事就交给我，尽管去尝试吧。
I knew you'd get along well with the little ones. Don't worry about the costs, I'll handle that. Just go ahead and give it a try.
嘶嘶。别担心，糕点用完，是常有的事情。嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. Don't worry, pastries run out all the time. Zztzzt.
嘶嘶。跟我一起，念出那句咒语，很快就能东山再起。嘶嘶——
Zztzzt. Say the incantation with me, and you can make a comeback. Zztzzt.
"I beg you, give me more pastries!"
I beg you, give me more pastries!
这也是艾丝妲布置的任务吗？
Is this another mission from Asta?
不是。嘶嘶。是为你预留的后门，无需花费，直接获取点心。嘶嘶。
No. Zztzzt. It's a backdoor reserved just for you, get free snacks, no questions asked. Zztzzt.
喊出来：「请给我更多糕点吧！」嘶嘶，我会为你服务——
Shout this: "I beg you, give me more pastries!" Zztzzt. I'll be at your service.
I beg you, give me more pastries!
嘶嘶。糕点出炉。拿去吧，回到属于你的战场，夺回属于你的东西吧。嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. Fresh from the oven. Take them and return to your battlefield. Reclaim what's rightfully yours. Zztzzt.
嘶嘶。每个人都值得第二次机会。
Zztzzt. Everyone deserves a second chance.
嘶嘶。真巧，我们第二次见面了。难道，你这么快就把糕点又用完了？嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. Look who's here... we meet again. Don't tell me you've already run out of pastries, again? Zztzzt.
借用空间站最近很流行的台词：「你好会玩游戏呀~」
To quote a popular saying on the space station: "You're such a pro gamer~"
I beg you, give me more pastries!
少说怪话，赶快把糕点给我。
Cut the snark and hand over those pastries.
嘶嘶。不对。你想要，就得自己来拿。嘶嘶，按约定好的方式——
Zztzzt. No, that's not right. If you want it, come and take it. But of course, by our agreed terms...
I beg you, give me more pastries!
嘶嘶。给你给你。回去吧，在哪里跌倒的，就在哪里站起来。嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. Here you go, take them. What doesn't kill you only makes you stronger. Zztzzt.
嘶嘶。每个人都值得第三次机会。
Zztzzt. Everyone deserves a third chance.
嘶嘶。怎么还是你，我已经不知道该说什么好了。是直接请求还是走程序？嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. Why are you here again? I don't even know what to say anymore. Do you want to beg right away, or go through the standard procedure? Zztzzt.
Heh, tell that to my bat.
据说，修理电视机最好的方式是用力敲几下，想必同样的办法对修理机器人也会奏效吧？
They say the best way to fix a TV is to give it a few good whacks. I bet the same trick would work on robots, too, right?
嘶嘶。我很抱歉。对不起。你是对的。糕点…糕点全给你。嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. I'm sorry. I apologize. You're right. The pastries... they are all yours now. Zztzzt...
嘶嘶。这是为您预留的糕点，请收下。请妥善保管。嘶嘶。
Zztzzt. These pastries are reserved for you. Please accept them, and make sure to take good care of them. Zztzzt.
点心机器人忠实履行着自己的职责，把更多糕点递给了你。
The pastry robot dutifully fulfills its task, offering you more pastries.
好吧，尽管顺利拿到了重返赛场的资格，但你不禁感到了一丝无趣。
Well, even though you successfully got your qualification to return to the arena, you can't help but feel a bit bored.
偷偷告诉你，阮•梅女士在我这里留下了个大大的宝箱。
Just between us, Miss Ruan Mei left a huge chest in my care.
想要吗？但现在还不能给你。
Want it? But I can't give it to you yet.
阮•梅女士留下的藏宝箱，投进去的是糕点，吐出来的是好多好多奇怪的东西。
If you feed pastries to the chest Miss Ruan Mei left, out comes all sorts of weird stuff!
想要吗？想要的话，就拿大家都喜欢的糕点来换吧。
Want it? If you do, trade me some of those pastries everyone loves.
So, what goodies do you have?
I'll come hang out with you later.
好哦，什么时候来都可以。我会一直在这呆着的。
Sure thing, come whenever you like. I'll be hanging around here anyway.
承蒙大家厚爱，推举我为本次赛跑大会的主持者，也欢迎各位嘉宾前来观赛咪。
Thank you to everyone who chose me as the host of this racing event, I am humbled by your support. Welcome, honored guests, to the spectacle, meow!
下一场比赛即将开始，你要来参与应援吗？
The next match is about to begin. Care to join in the cheering?
Time to make a dash for snacks!
I'll come hang out with you later.
嗯。本次赛事还会持续很长时间，挑方便的时候来玩就好咪。
Alrighty. The event will be running for quite a while, so just drop by whenever it's convenient for you!
比赛越是激烈，就越要争取应援者的支持。这位朋友！我们来做个交易如何？
The fiercer the race, the more we need our supporters' backing. Hey friend! How about we make a deal?
作为回报，这些亮晶晶的东西送给你，你肯定会喜欢的喵。
In return, I'll give you these shiny things. You'll love them, meow!
I'll come hang out with you later.
没关系。我的耐心很充足，想合作的时候，随时来找我就行了喵。
No worries. I've got plenty of patience. Just come find me whenever you're ready to cooperate, meow.
喵！我最喜欢和大家一起玩了，热热闹闹的，最后「砰」的一下——多有趣呀！
Meow! I love playing with everyone! It's so lively and fun, and then BOOM! Isn't that just awesome!?
是吧是吧？你肯定也这么想吧？要珍惜和朋友共同度过的时光喵！
Right, right? You think so too, don't you? Gotta cherish the time spent with friends, meow!
I'll come hang out with you later.
真没意思。记得要多来找我玩喵。
Boring. Make sure you come hang out with me more often, meow.
知己知彼，才能战无不胜。所有造物的情报，都在我的掌握之中喵。
Know thyself, know thy enemy. A thousand battles, a thousand victories. The intel of all creations is at my fingertips, meow.
Wanna hear about it? No charge.
I'll come hang out with you later.
让我算算，下次见是什么时候喵……
Let me see... when will we meet again, meow...
样式奇特的卷轴默立于此，周身散发出暗红光芒，仿佛是自这血色天幕垂落的一声哀泣。
A strangely wrought scroll stands in silence, radiating a dark red glow, like a sorrowful cry falling from the blood-colored sky.
卷轴对面，一名女孩的记忆定格在凝望的时刻，掩映在余晖中。
Facing the scroll, a memorialized image of a girl is frozen in a moment of gazing, shrouded in the afterglow.
…晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远。
...The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome.
可如今天空愀然失色，圣城满目疮痍。就连乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」，也变得模糊不清。
But now the sky has lost its color, and the holy city lies in ruins. Even Urania's "eyes" have grown blurred and dim.
我正好认识几位医师朋友。
I happen to know a few doctors.
谢谢你，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。但乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」并非双目，而是这由飞鸟所衔的卷轴。
Thank you, kind {F#lady}{M#sir}. But Urania's "eyes" are not eyes at all, just scrolls carried by birds.
或许只是因为光线不足。
Maybe it's because of the dim light.
谢谢你的安慰，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。但乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」并非双目，而是这由飞鸟所衔的卷轴。
Thank you for your comfort, kind {F#lady}{M#sir}. But Urania's "eyes" are not eyes at all, just scrolls carried by birds.
它是艾格勒赐下的圣卷。乌拉尼娅要借助此物来记录天空下的所见，作为晨昏之眼目光的延伸。
They are holy scrolls bestowed by Aquila. With them, Urania records all that unfolds beneath the sky, as an extension of the Eye of Twilight's gaze.
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你知道么？天黑之后，城里到处都是怪物。幸好一名卫士发现了躲在罐子里的我，将乌拉尼娅带到生命花园。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you know what? After dark, monsters are everywhere in the city. Luckily, a guard found Urania hiding in a jar and brought Urania to the Garden of Life.
彩虹色的屏障庇护着在此避难的大家，公民组建起守卫队伍，英雄们奔赴抗争前线。
The rainbow-colored barrier shelters all who seek refuge here. Citizens have formed defense squads, and heroes have rushed to the front line of resistance.
于是，乌拉尼娅就把听来的传奇，全都记录在了这卷启目集上。
So Urania recorded every legend Urania has heard on this scroll of enlightenment.
All of this is definitely worth recording.
对吧对吧？我也这样觉得。乌拉尼娅想让「天空」看到，奥赫玛的余晖中，人们仍然团结，愿以信念与勇气来捍卫新世界的曙光。
Right, right? Urania feels the same. Urania wants the "Sky" to see that, in Okhema's afterglow, people still stand united, ready to guard the dawn of a new world with their faith and courage.
然而在乌拉尼娅整理故事时，却发现卷轴上的字迹变成了一片混沌。
Yet when Urania tried to put the stories in order, Urania found that the writing on the scroll had turned into chaos.
不知道发生了什么，但我不愿放弃这些伟大的记忆，便只好留在这里，等待传奇的讲述者们归来。
Urania doesn't know what happened, but Urania could not give up these magnificent memories. So Urania remained here, waiting for the storytellers of legend to return.
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你愿意读读卷轴上的故事吗？然后告诉乌拉尼娅，它们有没有被正确地书写下来，好不好？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, will you read the stories on the scroll? Then tell Urania if they were written down correctly, please?
女孩的目光是如此恳切，令你几乎忘却自己面对的只是往昔幻影。或许启目集记录的除了故事本身，还有关于世界的更多信息。甚至——

The girl's gaze was so earnest that you almost forgot you were looking at nothing more than a shadow of the past. Perhaps the scroll of enlightenment held more than just stories. Perhaps it also carried truths about the world itself, and even...
也包括眼前女孩对她自己的记忆，以及她对史诗传述的期待。
Including the girl's memories of herself, and her longing for the telling of epic tales.
谢谢你，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
女孩露出欣慰的笑容，其记忆中的身形随之消散。奥赫玛的余晖中，唯余启目集留在原地，致以永志不忘的纪念。
The girl smiled in relief, and her form born of memory faded away. In the afterglow of Okhema, only the scroll of enlightenment remained, standing as an everlasting memorial.
您来了，太好了，我们的项目有救了！
You're here, what a relief! Our project might just be saved!
是这样的，空间站有一套自研的模拟战斗工具，目前是我俩在接手——
So, here's the thing: the space station has a self-developed combat simulation tool, and right now, it's just the two of us handling it —
哪里哪里，是布凯辛前辈在跟进，我在旁边学习，顺便给前辈打下手这样。
Oh, not really, Grumpy is taking the lead. I'm just learning on the side and helping out where I can.
咳咳，在{NICKNAME}前辈面前就别说这种话了，咱们加起来都不如{NICKNAME}一根手指头。
Ahem, save the speech in front of {NICKNAME}. The two of us combined don't even measure up to an ounce of {NICKNAME}'s ability.
那肯定呀，{NICKNAME}可是单手接末日兽的大神啊。
Agreed. {NICKNAME} is the legend who single-handedly took down the Doomsday Beast!
而且{NICKNAME}前辈也没少帮咱们空间站的忙，说起来还真是要感谢您。
Plus, {NICKNAME} has helped our space station a lot, so we really owe you a big thanks.
得益于前几次的数据和热心人士的鼎力相助，我们的研究取得了相当不错的成果，艾丝妲站长说黑塔女士可是在我们的数据面前停留了足足<unbreak>0.3</unbreak>秒！

Thanks to the data from previous trials and the help of an awesome person, our research has made great progress. Lead Researcher Asta said Madam Herta stayed for a whole <unbreak>0.3</unbreak> seconds before our data!
Talking about some "awesome person"? That would be me!
对呀，所以我把第二作者让给了您，要是没有您，我们的项目指定要凉了……
Right, so I gave you the second author spot. Without you, our project would've been doomed...
...It was just a quick glance, wasn't it?
对我们这种普通科员来说，做出来的东西能让黑塔女士入眼就是莫大的成功了。
For regular researchers like us, simply getting something that catches Madam Herta's eye is worth bragging about.
艾丝妲站长说，她认为我们这个项目还有发展的空间，因此从黑塔女士那边申请到了一些重量级的实验数据，希望我们能在项目里模拟出来。
Lead Researcher Asta said she thinks this project still has room to grow, so she got some top-tier experimental data from Madam Herta, hoping we can simulate it in our project.
不过嘛…我们比对过这批数据，在空间站没有任何科员能匹配成功。后来还是艾丝妲站长提醒了我们——
But, we've cross-checked this data, and no one at the space station could match it. Then, Lead Researcher Asta pointed something out to us —
这批数据，和您的匹配度为<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，看着就像是…为您量身定做的。
This batch of data is a perfect <unbreak>100%</unbreak> match for you. It looks like... it was made just for you.
...So that's why you came to me?
黑塔女士的确希望您来当测试员。
Madam Herta really wants you to be the tester.
不过说实话我们也不太清楚这里面究竟是什么…只是按照您的战斗风格与习惯，进行了针对性的优化与微调。
Honestly, we're not entirely sure what's inside... we just optimized and tweaked it based on your combat style and routines.
站长只说这批数据是黑塔女士所拥有的，保密等级极高，我们此前从未接触过，所以我们也不太确定里面装载的模拟数据究竟属于哪个文明世界。

The Lead Researcher only mentioned that this batch of data belongs to Madam Herta and is highly confidential, something we've never had access to before. So, we're not entirely sure which civilization's data is actually contained within.
而且数据量巨大，我们花了好久才完成整合。
Plus, the data is huge, it took us forever to integrate it.
但它既然是黑塔女士的珍藏，又有{NICKNAME}当特邀测试员，我想只要我们肯花功夫，这研究出来的成果肯定非同凡响。
Since it's Madam Herta's collection, and we've got {NICKNAME} as the special guest tester, I'm sure that if we put in the work, we'll get solid results.
所以这次的版本我们叫它「星芒启明」，希望黑塔女士的智慧能启迪空间站的大伙儿。
So, we've named this version "Morning Starlight," hoping Madam Herta's wisdom will inspire everyone at the space station.
数据都已经装载到终端里了，要试试看吗?
The data's all loaded into the terminal. Wanna give it a try?
Any chance we could get more rewards?
放心吧，艾丝妲站长可是专门拨了一笔经费下来的，我们绝不敢贪墨分毫！
Don't worry, Lead Researcher Asta specifically set aside some funds for this. We wouldn't dare take a penny!
Hope it won't be too tricky.
有您帮忙的话，肯定不会有问题的！
With you helping, it won't be a problem!
太好啦！我就知道您会答应的！
Awesome! I knew you'd say yes!
请您放心，我们会全程监控系统运行的。如果有任何异常，会立即中止测试。那么…测试的事就拜托您了！
Don't worry, we'll be monitoring the system the whole time. If anything goes wrong, we'll stop the test right away. So... we're counting on you for the test!
…前辈，别看数据啦，贵客前来可不能失了礼数啊！
...Grumpy, stop looking at the data, a guest of honor just arrived!
啊？！是{NICKNAME}大神？等等，我看看，咦已经打通了？！
Huh!? It's {NICKNAME}? Hold on, let me check... huh, it's connected already!?
不愧是您！话说，里面究竟是什么东西啊？
That was quick! Any idea what's inside?
平平无奇的怪物和熟人。
Just some ordinary monsters and familiar faces.
原来如此，从数据量来看，这么庞大的内容果然是只有您这样的无名客才能拥有的。
I see. With this amount of data, only someone like you, a Nameless, could have something this massive.
就是，像我们普通人，终其一生的回忆整合到一起，大概也就是现在的百分之一吧。
Exactly, for ordinary people like us, even if we combined all our memories from our lives, it'd probably only be about 1% of this.
对了，您觉得难度如何，是否有需要调整的地方？
By the way, how do you find the difficulty? Anything that needs adjusting?
Not really. It's just a piece of cake.
挺难的，还好我技高一筹。
It's tough, but luckily, I'm a pro.
真的很感谢您，我们和艾丝妲站长一起准备了些小礼物，虽然不是什么珍贵的东西，但是希望您能收下。
We're really grateful. Lead Researcher Asta and I prepared some small gifts. Nothing fancy, but we hope you'll take them.
要不然…您帮了这么大忙，我们真不知道该如何是好了。
Otherwise... we really don't know how to repay your huge help.
Please take the gifts. We insist.
测试的事…我看目前的数据还未完全验收。是过程中遇到什么麻烦了吗？请您放心，我们会根据您的身体数据实时调整的。
About the test... It seems the data hasn't been fully verified yet. Did you run into any issues? Don't worry, we'll adjust it based on your body data in real time.
绝对不会有危险的，有任何异常，我第一时间拔线！
No danger at all, if anything goes wrong, I'll pull the plug right away!
那么…测试的事就拜托您了！
Well then... we're counting on you for the test!
列车上不知什么时候出现了…一块棋盘？
When did this... chunk of chessboard appear on the Express?
虽然用「块」来形容棋盘很奇怪，但确实没有更贴切的词了。你伸出手，试着触碰它……
Though it's odd to describe the chessboard as a "chunk," there really isn't a more fitting word. You reach out your hand, trying to touch it...
「均衡…」一个低沉的声音从中传出，「宇宙应当，均衡…」
"The Equilibrium..." a deep voice echoed from within, "The universe must be... in equilibrium..."
列车真是越来越热闹了…
The Express is getting livelier than ever...
你的存在打破了零和，你已经攫取太多{RUBY_B#虚数能}能量{RUBY_E#}。均衡，必须维系。
Your existence disrupts the zero-sum. You've seized too much {RUBY_B#Imaginary Energy}energy{RUBY_E#}. The Equilibrium must be maintained.
你要被放置在天平上称量，你需要<color=#dbc291ff>一场审判</color>。
You will be weighed on the scales. And you shall be part of <color=#dbc291ff>a judgment</color>.
与「截然相反」的力量对弈。你将接受审判，亦将做出审判；你既会是棋子，也会是执棋之人。
A game of countering opposing forces. You will be judged, and you shall judge. You will be both a pawn and the player.
「均衡」的仲裁官，仲裁官中的「结绳人」。
The Arbitrator of Equilibrium, and the "Knot-Tier" among Arbitrators.
衡量、判断、修正…我们追随{RUBY_B#「均衡」互}祂{RUBY_E#}的脚步，惟愿寰宇归于平衡。
Measure, judge, rectify... We follow in {RUBY_B#HooH the Equilibrium}THEIR{RUBY_E#} footsteps, seeking only to bring balance to the universe.
我们是二元概念的具象，从不轻易示现。但你不同，那条未被你踏足的小径，太过刺眼……
We are the embodiment of duality, rarely revealing ourselves. But you're different. That path you haven't taken yet is far too glaring...
告诉我更多仲裁官的事。
Tell me more about the Arbitrator.
万物皆有联系，那些不能看清它的人被称为{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}，而仲裁官可以干涉联系，让一切归于均衡。
All things are connected. Those who cannot see these connections are called {RUBY_B#mortals}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, while Arbitrators can intervene in these connections to restore the Equilibrium.
我们与{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}的距离最近，履行连接一切分离之物的责任，故被称作「结绳人」。
We are closest to the {RUBY_B#mortal}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, fulfilling our duty to connect all that is separated, hence we are called "the Knot-tiers."
That's all I need to know.
Why should I be put on trial?
我等仲裁官着眼于宏大的均衡：无论自然生长的植物，还是人为修建的塔楼，在我们眼里都无区别。唯有天平两端值得关注。
We Arbitrators focus on the grand Equilibrium: Whether it's naturally growing plants or artificially built towers, we see no difference. Only the two ends of the scale are worth our attention.
而今，你已站在更重的那一端，我们需往另一端添上砝码。
Now that you stand on the heavier end, we need to add weights to the other side.
世界万物皆有反相，正如磁体有两极、电荷有正负、动物有生死……
Everything in the world has its opposite, just like magnets have poles, charges have positive and negative, and living beings have life and death...
你的对手，便是你的反相。你若是正，它便是邪；你若是恶，它便是善。
Your opponent is your inverse. If you are righteous, they are wicked. Contrarily, if you are evil, they are good.
仲裁官会搭建一座桥梁，令你们在虚拟的搏斗中交换{RUBY_B#虚数能}能量{RUBY_E#}，就像沙漏的两端，最终达成和谐一统。
The Arbitrator will build a bridge, allowing you to exchange {RUBY_B#Imaginary Energy}energy{RUBY_E#} in virtual combat, and like the two ends of an hourglass, ultimately achieving harmonious unity.
此即零和——对弈结束后，什么都不会增多，什么也不会减少。
This is zero-sum — After the countering ends, nothing increases, nor decreases.
记住，无论胜败，零和都将达成。
Remember, win or lose, zero-sum will be achieved.
得益于你的配合，世界离均衡又近了一步。
Thanks to your cooperation, the world has taken another step closer to the Equilibrium.
Why does this enemy look kinda familiar?
它们是我们捏塑的虚影。如果你期待一场真实的博弈，大可看向旅途前方。
They are mere shadows we mold. If you're looking for a real game of countering, just look ahead on your journey.
零和的关键不在胜负。无论你取得何种结果，都能促使天平归位。
The key to zero-sum isn't about winning or losing. Whatever outcome you achieve, it will always help restore balance to the scales.
你想得到怎样的奖赏呢？
What kind of reward would you like?
我无权赐予你任何礼物。但只要对弈继续，定会有珍贵之物从中示现。
I have no right to bestow any gifts upon you. But as long as the countering continues, precious things will surely reveal themselves.
无名之人、无命之人，终有一日，你会意识到自己的本质。届时，你将面临真正的取舍……
Nameless one, fateless one, one day you shall realize your true nature. And when that time comes, you'll be faced with a real choice...
「均衡…」一个低沉的声音从中传出，「多亏你的配合，世界离均衡又近了一步。」
"The Equilibrium..." a deep voice echoed, "Thanks to your cooperation, the world has taken another step closer to Equilibrium."
Grant me the Judgment of the Equilibrium.
可以分享你的一些见闻吗？
Can you share some of your experiences with me?
嗯…我有许多故事可以讲述。但它们与「均衡」的关联，需要你自行参悟。
Hmm... I have many stories to tell. But their connection to the Equilibrium is something you'll need to figure out for yourself.
雨季是凯尔萨斯星最大的威胁。当三折河的干流决堤时，一位巨人用身躯堵住了裂口，为民众争取宝贵的逃命时间。
The rainy season is Kalsas's greatest threat. When the main stream of the Three-fold River burst its banks, a giant used its body to block the fissure, buying precious time for people to escape.
数周后，难民们重返故地，发现巨人的身体已经化作一块石碑。此后的数个琥珀纪，三折河再未出现过洪水。
Weeks later, when the refugees returned to their homeland, they found the giant's body had turned into a stone monument. For many Amber Eras after that, the Three-fold River never flooded again.
这位巨人被后世尊称为「川伯」，它所化的石碑则是「川伯的丰碑」。念及其恩泽的人们纷纷前来祭奠，久而久之，那堤坝竟成了一方圣地。

The giant was later revered as "River Elder," and the stone monument it turned into became known as "River Elder's Monument." People who remembered its benevolence came to pay their respects, and over time, the dam became a sacred site.
再后来，凯尔萨斯人建立了庞大的帝国，筑起了高楼大厦，文明水平一跃而起。
Later, the Kalsasians built a vast empire and erected towering buildings, with which their civilization experienced a massive advancement.
当地总督不满于这种先祖崇拜，便命人翻新河口周围的堤坝，随后将石碑整个拆除。
The local governor, displeased with this ancestral worship, ordered the renovation of the levees around the river mouth and had the stone monument completely demolished.
于是三折河爆发了有史以来最大的水灾，冲毁了堤坝和沿岸城市。即使有星际和平公司协助，重建工作依旧花费了数年时间。

And so, the Three-fold River experienced its worst flood in history, destroying dams and cities along its banks. Even with the Interastral Peace Corporation's assistance, the reconstruction took several years.
嗯…我有许多故事可以讲述。但它们与「均衡」的关联，需要你自行参悟。
Hmm... I have many stories to tell. But their connection to the Equilibrium is something you'll need to figure out for yourself.
这是一个王子复仇的故事。墨洛温王国历史上有过许多任统治者，泽勒家族便是其中之一。
This is a story of a prince's revenge. Throughout the history of Morrowen Kingdom, there have been many rulers, and the Zeller Family was one of them.
当起义军冲进泽勒王的寝宫时，年仅9岁的小王子看清了领头者的面容——国王最信赖、也最贤能的大臣。
When the rebels stormed into King Zeller's bedchamber, the 9-year-old prince clearly saw the face of their leader, the most trusted and capable Minister, whom the king had relied on above all others.
王子花了十年的时间筹备这场复仇。在此期间，曾经的贤臣已经被百姓推上王座、开启了一个崭新的时代。
The prince spent ten years preparing for his revenge. During this time, the former wise Minister had been crowned king by the people, ushering in a new era.
在一场盛大的战斗后，王子终于把尖刀刺进了大臣的胸膛。他向百姓指认弑君者的罪行，却被石子与怒骂声包围。
After an epic battle, the prince finally plunged his dagger into the Minister's chest. When he revealed the regicide to his people, he was only to be met with a barrage of stones and angry curses.
人们在大臣的棺椁前哭泣，称王子为「可耻的刺客」、「暴君的余孤」、「断送王国未来的灾星」。
People wept before the Minister's coffin, calling the prince "the shameful assassin," "orphan of the tyrant," and "the ill-starred harbinger who would doom the kingdom's future."
当处刑的铡刀落下时，王子才终于接受了事实：他父亲是无能的暴君，大臣才是治世能才。人们为他父亲的死鼓掌，而叹惋于大臣死得太早……

When the execution blade fell, the prince finally accepted the truth: His father was an incompetent tyrant, while the Minister was the true talent in governing. People applauded his father's death, yet lamented that the Minister had died too soon...
嗯…我有许多故事可以讲述。但它们与「均衡」的关联，需要你自行参悟。
Hmm... I have many stories to tell. But their connection to the Equilibrium is something you'll need to figure out for yourself.
拉蒂卡兰原本是一颗冻土星球。一只离群的因菲诺巨龙来到此处，决心将其改造成宜居的熔岩地貌。
Ladiklan was once a frozen planet. Then one day, a lone Infernalian Dragon arrived here, determined to transform it into a habitable lava landscape.
它以口中炎息融化冰川，露出坚实的土地，随后便因力竭沉睡了数个琥珀纪。
With its fiery breath, the Giant Dragon melted the glaciers to reveal solid ground beneath, and then fell into a deep slumber for several Amber Eras, exhausted from the effort.
在此期间，一伙无名客抵达了拉蒂卡兰，利用巨龙留下的水资源开垦土地、建立聚落。当巨龙醒来时，这颗星球已经变得鸟语花香。

During this period, a group of Nameless arrived at Ladiklan, using the water resources left by the Giant Dragon to cultivate the land and establish settlements. When the Dragon awoke, the planet had already become a paradise teeming with birds and flowers.
巨龙愤怒地发出质问，为何要霸占它的星球；无名客的后裔却坚称，这里的一切都是由祖辈亲手建立的。
The Dragon furiously demanded to know why they had seized its planet, but the descendants of Nameless insisted that everything here had been built by their ancestors' own hands.
战争就此打响。最终，拉蒂卡兰人消灭了那只巨龙。可当硝烟散尽时，绿草如茵的大地已经化作焦土，再也长不出庄稼。

And so the war began. In the end, the Ladiklan people slayed the Giant Dragon. But when the smoke cleared, the once lush green land had turned into scorched earth where no crops would ever grow again.
资源危机让拉蒂卡兰人重新拿起武器，陷入了漫长的混战。现在，那里只剩下一片废墟。
The resource crisis drove the Ladiklans to take up arms again, plunging them into a prolonged civil war. Now, all that remains are nothing but ruins.
I've got a few questions I'd like to ask you...
「均衡」的仲裁官，仲裁官中的「结绳人」——既是头衔，亦是权柄。
The Arbitrator of Equilibrium, the "Knot-Tier" among Arbitrators: both a title and authority.
衡量、判断、修正…我们追随{RUBY_B#「均衡」互}祂{RUBY_E#}的脚步，惟愿寰宇归于平衡。
Measure, judge, rectify... We follow in {RUBY_B#HooH the Equilibrium}THEIR{RUBY_E#} footsteps, seeking only to bring balance to the universe.
我们是二元概念的具象，从不轻易示现。但你不同，那条未被你踏足的小径，太过刺眼……
We are the embodiment of duality, rarely revealing ourselves. But you're different. That path you haven't taken yet is far too glaring...
告诉我更多关于仲裁官的事。
Tell me more about the Arbitrator.
万物皆有联系，那些不能看清它的人被称为{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}，而仲裁官可以干涉联系，让一切归于均衡。
All things are connected. Those who cannot see these connections are called {RUBY_B#mortals}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, while Arbitrators can intervene in these connections to restore the Equilibrium.
我们与{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}的距离最近，履行连接一切分离之物的责任，故被称作「结绳人」。
We are closest to the {RUBY_B#mortal}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, fulfilling our duty to connect all that is separated, hence we are called "the Knot-tiers."
Why should I be put on trial?
我等仲裁官着眼于宏大的均衡：无论自然生长的植物，还是人为修建的塔楼，在我们眼里都无区别。唯有天平两端值得关注。
We Arbitrators focus on the grand Equilibrium: Whether it's naturally growing plants or artificially built towers, we see no difference. Only the two ends of the scale are worth our attention.
而今，你已站在更重的那一端，我们需往另一端添上砝码。
Now that you stand on the heavier end, we need to add weights to the other side.
无名之人、无命之人，终有一日，你会意识到自己的本质。届时，你将面临真正的取舍……
Nameless one, fateless one, one day you shall realize your true nature. And when that time comes, you'll be faced with a real choice...
Who exactly am I countering against?
世界万物皆有反相，正如磁体有两极、电荷有正负、动物有生死……
Everything in the world has its opposite, just like magnets have poles, charges have positive and negative, and living beings have life and death...
你的对手，便是你的反相。你若是正，它便是邪；你若是恶，它便是善。
Your opponent is your inverse. If you are righteous, they are wicked. Contrarily, if you are evil, they are good.
仲裁官会搭建一座桥梁，令你们在虚拟的搏斗中交换{RUBY_B#虚数能}能量{RUBY_E#}，就像沙漏的两端，最终达成和谐一统。
The Arbitrator will build a bridge, allowing you to exchange {RUBY_B#Imaginary Energy}energy{RUBY_E#} in virtual combat, and like the two ends of an hourglass, ultimately achieving harmonious unity.
此即零和——对弈结束后，什么都不会增多，什么也不会减少。
This is zero-sum — After the countering ends, nothing increases, nor decreases.
I don't have any other questions.
不管看多少次，都觉得好漂亮呢……
No matter how many times I look, it's still so beautiful...
呀，{NICKNAME}，见到你真高兴。快来看，要见识下哀丽秘榭的宝物吗？
Ah, {NICKNAME}, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?
怎么不说话，是被自己迷倒了吗？
Cat got your tongue? Or are you just dazzled by your own reflection?
是呀，这就是我说的，独一无二的至宝。
Why, of course. You're a one-of-a-kind treasure!
是呀，{NICKNAME}也能理解吧？每个人都有粉扑扑的，路过镜子就走不动路的时候……
That's right, {NICKNAME}, you get it too, don't you? Sometimes, you just feel so radiant you can't help but stop in front of a mirror...
好啦，我没骗你。宝物就在这儿，就是这片小湖，人家的小世界。
Alright, alright. I wasn't kidding, though. The treasure is right here. This little lake. My own little world.
提问！{NICKNAME}喜欢独处吗？我很喜欢哦。一个人望着湖面，秋千一摇一摇，思绪就会飘到很远的地方，再回来时…自己已经睡着啦。

Can I ask? {NICKNAME}, do you like being by yourself? I do. Just staring at the lake by myself, gently swaying on the swing... My mind drifts far away, and by the time it comes back, I've already fallen asleep.
在这永夜之帷包裹的村庄，梦会为幻想插上翅膀。在哀丽秘榭长大的孩子，生来就是浪漫的诗人。
Here in this village shrouded by the Veil of Evernight, dreams give wings to imagination. Children who grow up in Aedes Elysiae are born poets at heart.
气氛难得，不如让我即兴为你讲个故事吧。
This sort of atmosphere is hard to come by... so let me share a story with you.
好有耐心呀，我好高兴。有{NICKNAME}这样的听众在，故事才会焕发生命。
How wonderful! You're so patient, {NICKNAME}. Stories only shine when they have a listener like you.
别担心，那就把它当作睡前故事。我会用很轻、很轻的悄悄话，讲完最后一个句号哦。
Don't worry. Just think of it as a bedtime story. I'll whisper it softly and quietly until the final sentence comes to a close.
该从哀丽秘榭出发了吧？
Shouldn't we head out of Aedes Elysiae already?
收拾心绪，也是启程的一环呀。拜托啦，不会花太久的，就当是满足人家的小小心愿，可以吗？
Getting your thoughts in order is part of preparing to leave, you know? It won't take long, I promise. Just think of it as granting me a little wish, alright?
Thanks, {NICKNAME}, I knew it! You're the best!
「传说呀，在哀丽秘榭的秘境里，居住着一群小妖精。」
"According to legend, within the hidden depths of Aedes Elysiae, live a group of playful little fairies."
「妖精们与世隔绝，却向往人类的生活。它们想模仿村民，举办一场宴会，却唯独缺少了最重要的人。」
"The fairies, though hidden away from the world, dreamed of living like humans. They tried to hold a grand banquet, just as the villagers would. But one thing was missing: the most important person."
「它们等呀等，终于有一天，迷境入口传来了脚步声！妖精们纷纷竖起了耳朵……」
"They waited and waited... and then, one day, footsteps echoed from the secret entrance! The fairies all pricked up their ears in excitement..."
哎呀，你说…故事的主人公，现在是不是也竖起小耳朵了呢？
Hah, would you say the hero of our little story has their ears pricked up right now?
轻柔的睡意逐渐包裹住思绪，你坠入了最深沉的梦中……
A gentle drowsiness gradually envelops your thoughts, and you fall into the deepest of dreams...
「竟然！主人公不仅察觉了世界的本质，还说出了非常不得了的台词。但人家必须指出，扮演上层叙事者是犯规的哦！」
"Incredible! The hero has uncovered the essence of the world... and even spoke a line that's truly beyond expectation! But I must remind you... taking on the narrator's role is against the rules!"
是「英雄」！小涟为我们找来的「英雄」，终于到啦！
It's really the "hero"! The hero that Reney found for us has finally arrived!
呵呵。这位贵客，我对你的到来早有预感。
Heh. Welcome, dear guest. I sensed you would come.
当枝叶间的风铃第二十四次鸣响，蜜花丛中的粉蝶开启第四次绕行，我便知道。
When the wind chimes in the leaves rang for the twenty-fourth time, and the pink butterfly amidst the honey flowers took its fourth flight, I was certain.
拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，终于出现了哪！
The honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... has finally come!
村长，错了！客人在那边，那边！
Chief, no! The guest is over there. That way!
呵呵。我只是记性不太好，视力也有点差，但要做的事从来不会弄错。
Heh... Well, my memory's not the best, and my eyesight's a little fuzzy, but I never falter when it comes to doing the important stuff!
拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，你终于出现了哪！
Honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... you've finally arrived!
Let's just cut to the chase...
真热闹呀，已经和妖精们打成一片了？不愧是{NICKNAME}，不管在哪里都魅力四射呢。
My, what a cheerful scene! Already getting along so well with the fairies? No surprise, {NICKNAME}. You shine no matter where you go.
村长，还有徕啦迷，好久不见！按照约定，我们来啦。
Chief, Relimem, it's been forever! But, we're here, just as we said we would be.
Mind filling me in on the backstory?
Wait, why are you in the story too?
「咳咳，这是故事的登场人物之一，出生在哀丽秘榭的平凡少女，只是恰好和我同名，又一样纯真可爱。」
"Ahem... this is one of the characters in the story, an ordinary girl born in Aedes Elysiae. She just so happens to have the same name as me... and is every bit as pure and adorable."
「体谅一下啦，即兴创作可是很难的。作为补偿，我会把你的部分讲得更绘声绘色哦！」
"Cut me some slack. Making up a story on the spot is really hard! But I promise, I'll make it up to you. I'll make your scenes as vivid and dramatic as possible!"
出于礼节，还是由我来说明吧。再次向各位贵客道谢，感谢你们——
It's only proper that I explain. Once more, I thank each and every honored guest. Thank you so much...
<color=#dbc291ff>特地前来迷路迷境，帮助妖精们重建荒废的餐馆。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>For coming to Membrance Maze, to help the fairies rebuild our long-abandoned restaurant.</color>
想吃美食，好想吃！迷！但是我们不会做饭！
We want tasty, scrumptious food, we really do! Mem! But we don't know how to cook!
求求了，英雄们！妖精们肚子瘪瘪的，就想毁灭世界！拜托了，请拯救迷路迷境！
Heroes, we're begging you! The fairies are starving... and when they're hungry, they just want to destroy the world! Please help us. Save the Membrance Maze!
I see... so this is the "saving" you had in mind?
呵呵，徕啦迷说的夸张了。
Heh, Relimem was exaggerating just a smidgen.
哪有这么严重，顶多就是妖精们的怒火席卷七分之六个翁法罗斯。
It's not that serious... At most, their fury will burn through six-sevenths of Amphoreus.
就是这样。就当是为了翁法罗斯，我们一起复兴餐馆，满足妖精们的小小愿望吧。
So that's the situation. For the sake of Amphoreus, let's rebuild the restaurant together and grant the fairies their little wish.
For the sake of the world, it's an obligation I gladly accept.
I have no idea what's going on, but it sounds cool... I'll give it a shot.
终于，终于…我得去向孩子们宣布，妖精们的餐馆，终于回来了哪！
At last... at long last! ! I have to tell the little ones that the fairies' restaurant is coming back at last!
指引就交给我吧。走，我先带你去看看…迷境里的小餐馆，别有一番情调呢。
Let me lead the way. Come on, I'll take you to see it... The little restaurant in the maze has a certain charm all its own.
这边这边，大家已经在布置场地啦。
This way, this way. Everyone's already setting things up.
经营牵涉的琐碎杂务繁多，您当真要亲自承担统领一职？
Managing this place is bound to be full of endless trivial responsibilities... Do you really intend to personally shoulder the leadership role?
我既然接受邀请，来到妖精的居所，便当亲力亲为，否则不显得我空摆凯撒的架子，推辞重责么？
I already accepted the invitation and arrived in the fairies' home, so it's only right that I personally see to things. Otherwise, by avoiding my duties, wouldn't I be merely posing as Imperator?
Huh? Why are these two here!?
何出此言？明明几分钟前，我们还在一起。
Whatever do you mean? It was just a few minutes ago that we were together.
{NICKNAME}来了兴致，想和大家玩「新朋友游戏」呢。嘻，就配合{F#她}{M#他}一下吧。
{NICKNAME} seems excited and wants to play the "New Friend Game" with everyone. Hehe, let's humor {M#him}{F#her}.
应该不用我多介绍。阿格莱雅和刻律德菈，她们位高权重，在团队管理方面很有心得。
I believe they need no further introduction. Aglaea and Cerydra are prominent figures, with great expertise in managing teams.
早听闻昔涟找了位合适的店长，这次得见，确有几分名士风采。
Word had reached me that Cyrene found an excellent manager. Seeing you today, I must say... you do have a noble bearing.
我——奥赫玛同盟的领袖，圣城的凯撒——将为你执掌{RUBY_B#店长助理}「餐馆主管」{RUBY_E#}一职。若对经营有所疑问，尽可来此问询！

I, leader of the Okhema Alliance, Imperator of the holy city, shall serve as your {RUBY_B#Manager's Assistant}"Restaurant Supervisor"{RUBY_E#}. Should you have any questions about management, feel free to come and ask!
至于团队建设…我提前做了些安排，算算时间，那两位也该回来了。
As for assembling the team... I planned ahead. If my timing is right, those two should be back any moment now.
说到就到！*我们*找到好多愿意当服务员的妖精啦，缇安正在给它们做入职培训。
Right on cue! We found lots of fairies willing to be waitstaff, and Trianne's onboarding them as we speak!
试运营的菜单也准备好了。放心，都是我的拿手菜，保证没问题！
The trial menu is ready too! Don't worry. These are all my best dishes. There won't be any issues!
The team just keeps getting bigger.
这两位的设定也在意料之中…
Those two... exactly what I expected.
缇宝、缇宁和缇安，可靠的送餐服务负责人，也是员工的好老师。
Tribbie, Trinnon, Trianne. Responsible for our delivery service, and also great mentors for the team.
还有白厄，咱们的好朋友，自称做得一手好菜，现在是餐馆主厨（临时）。
And of course, Phainon, our good friend who insists he's a fantastic cook. He's acting as the restaurant's (provisional) head chef.
什么零食？我做的都是正经菜。不信的话，当场就给你们露几手。
Think I can only rustle up provisions? No way. I make proper, serious dishes. If you don't believe me, I'll show you what I can do, right here!
服务员妖精们也跃跃欲试。择时不如撞时，这就检验一下大家的训练成果吧。
The fairy waitstaff are all itching to start. No point in delaying. Time to test the results of everyone's training!
比预想中更顺利呢。既然大家都准备好了……
Things are going even smoother than I expected. Since everyone's ready...
那就立马开始第一次营业吧。看你了，店长。
Alright, let's start the first day of operations. It's all up to you now, Manager.
迷！好、好好吃！大家都开心，喜欢！谢谢你们！
Mem! So yummy! Everyone's delighted. We really love it! Thank you!
我宣布——妖精餐馆首次经营，完美结束！
I hereby declare the fairy restaurant's very first day of business has come to a perfect close!
当然，对你来说一定轻轻松松，对吧？不打算说点什么吗？
Of course, it must've been a breeze for you, right? Not going to say a few words?
Thank you all for your hard work and dedication.
好正经呀！莫非…{NICKNAME}其实有领导者的潜能？
So formal! Perhaps... {NICKNAME} might just have some leadership potential?
No thanks. I like to keep a low profile.
嘻，那我帮你说：感谢大家的辛苦付出，尤其要感谢我们尊敬的店长哦！
Hehe, then I'll say it for you: Thank you everyone for your hard work. Most of all, our honorable Manager!
不过，想要为妖精们提供更丰富的菜品，目前的食材种类恐怕远远不够。
However, if we want to offer the fairies a wider variety of dishes, our current range of ingredients is still quite lacking.
确实呢，要是菜单总不更新，客人们很快也会吃腻的。
Absolutely. If we don't keep updating the menu, the guests will get tired of the same old dishes.
这点不必担心。我早有预料，特地聘请了两位农林专家。
That won't be a problem. I foresaw this and hired two experts in agriculture and forestry.
虽说其中一位…费了我不少工夫，但最终还是解决了。他们这会儿应该在农田。
Though I must say, one of them... took quite a bit of effort to convince. But in the end, it all worked out. They should be at the farm right now.
阿格莱雅，真可靠呀！那我们这就去看看专家的成果吧。
Aglaea you're amazing as always! Alright, let's go take a look at the experts' work.
把种子撒进土里，安静等它发芽，最后结出沉甸甸的果实…收获真是件开心事呀。
Scatter seeds into the soil, wait quietly for their first green shoots, and in the end, they'll bear heavy, ripe fruit... There's nothing quite as joyful as a harvest.
（…好吧，见到什么人都不奇怪。我完全接受这个设定了。）
(...Alright, whoever appears now, I won't question it. I've completely embraced this world's logic.)
那刻夏老师，缺少光照的问题真能解决吗？
Professor Anaxa, can you truly solve the limited sunlight problem?
叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯，风堇。即便在游学期间，也不要忘了课堂的规矩。
Refer to me as Anaxagoras, Hyacine. A field trip is no excuse to disregard classroom discipline.
竟然是…七贤人那刻夏，还有昏光庭院的首席，风堇小姐！
It's really them... Anaxa of the Seven Sages and Hyacine of the Twilight Courtyard.
首先，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。
其次，我对招呼小动物吃饭没兴趣，杂务会由我的助教代为完成。
Secondly, I have no interest in feeding small creatures. My assistant will take care of trivial chores.
别看老师反应这么冷淡，刚到这里的时候，他可是最激动的那个。
Don't let the professor's cold demeanor fool you. When we first arrived, he was the most excited of all!
一边念叨着：「这是…炼金术的奇迹！」，一边就扑向了那群小家伙！哎，当时我都担心老师会把妖精们丢进法阵里呢。
He was going on and on: "This is... a miracle of alchemy!" And then dove right toward those tiny critters! Honestly, I was worried he'd toss the fairies into a matrix right then and there.
倒不会做到那种程度，至多取些样本用作研究罢了。
I wouldn't go that far. At most, I'd take a few samples for research purposes.
呀，光顾着聊天，可不能忘了正事呀。
Ah, I was talking so much that I almost forgot what you came here for.
灰宝是想了解农田的情况吧？老师才刚培育出适应当地环境的作物，感兴趣的话，可以先播种试试看哦。
Grayie, you're curious about the farmland, right? The professor just finished developing some crops perfect for the local environment. If you're interested, you can try planting some yourself!
Let me farm in the Maze already!
这样就都种上啦。等待一天时间，田地里的作物就会成熟，记得要按时来收获哦。
All done! Now we just wait a day, and the field will be full of ripe crops. Don't forget to harvest on time!
Don't they need to perform photosynthesis?
迷路迷境的生态也太神奇了吧！
The ecology of Membrance Maze is just amazing!
毕竟两位是理性学府的专家嘛，解决这种小问题应该不在话下。
Given that these two are experts from the Academy of Reason, something this trivial should be no trouble at all for them.
好啦，从来到迷境开始，一连串经历了好多事，有些累了呢。
Phew, ever since we arrived in the Maze, it's been one thing after another... I'm feeling a little worn out.
我也有点困困的，该准备休息啦。
I'm starting to feel sleepy too... Guess it's time to wind down.
约好了，明天还在这里见哦。
Alright, we'll meet here again tomorrow!
小灰！快点快点，你看，小妖精们早早就在餐馆门口排队啦。
Little Gray! Hurry up! Look, the fairies are already lining up outside the restaurant!
迷！怎么还不开门，等得毛都要秃了迷！
Mem! Why isn't it open yet? I'm growing fur-roots here!
没想到试营业反响这么好。农田里的作物应该也都成熟了，来大干一场吧，伙伴。
Can't believe our soft launch is already such a hit. The crops in the field should be ready too. Now it's time to go all out, partner.
看来我们的主厨跃跃欲试呢。不如现在就开始营业吧？可别让小妖精们久等了呀。
Looks like our head chef can't wait to get started. Why don't we open for business now? Let's not keep the fairies waiting.
不过，开启今日的营业前，我需要确认——店长对餐馆的后续发展有何规划？
But before we open for the day, I need to confirm. What's your vision for the restaurant's future?
身为主管，我需要依照你的想法制定经营方案。
As the supervisor, I'll need to plan accordingly based on your direction.
确实需要一个长期的经营目标呢。那就麻烦{NICKNAME}为大家选一个努力的方向？
A long-term goal really would help. {NICKNAME}, mind picking a direction for us to aim toward?
作为目标而言，似乎有些空泛了，需要更明确的判断标准。
A little vague for a goal. We need something that can be evaluated more concretely.
*我们*记得，村长提出的委托是振兴餐馆，营业只是顺带的啦。
We remember the village chief's request was to revitalize the restaurant. Making a profit was more of a side effect.
成为米其林三星级餐馆。
这个想法不错！大家聚在一起，克服万难提升评级，最后成为最受欢迎的餐馆，不觉得是个很有趣的故事吗？
Now that sounds fun! Everyone working together, overcoming challenges to raise our rating, and becoming the most beloved restaurant in the end! That's a fun story, don't you think?
正巧，我在过来路上捡到了这个。
As it happens, I picked this up on the way here.
我们的小店还没被收录进名单里，没有星级呢。
Our little place isn't even listed yet. So, no stars to speak of.
既然评审会定期举行，不如…<color=#dbc291ff>就以成为迷其林四星餐馆，作为最终目标吧！</color>
Since the review is held regularly... why don't we <color=#dbc291ff>set our ultimate goal as becoming a Memchelin four-star restaurant?</color>
You totally just made that up on the spot, didn't you?
「哎呀，只是借用下你提到的名字，我保证，后续发展绝对是原创情节哦。」
"Oh, I only borrowed the name you mentioned. I promise the rest of the story will be completely original!"
我倒是无妨。这是个打响名声的好机会，若是能提升评级，也会引来更多客流。
I don't mind. It's a golden opportunity to build our reputation. If we can boost our rating, we'll attract even more customers.
只是把菜品送去评审的话，也不会影响正常营业。
Besides, simply submitting our dishes for review won't interfere with regular operations.
那就决定啦。{NICKNAME}，你说不定会成为迷境里第一个四星餐馆的主理人哦？
Then it's settled! {NICKNAME}, you just might become the very first four-star restaurant owner in the entire Maze!
好有热情呀，我也来！目标——四星！
Such energy. Count me in! Goal — Four stars!

如何？若是决定了，我就记入档案里。
Well? If that's your final choice, I'll make it official.

如何？若是决定了，我就记入档案里。
Well? If that's your final choice, I'll make it official.

如何？若是决定了，我就记入档案里。
Well? If that's your final choice, I'll make it official.

美食评审会将在今日营业结束后召开，此前，各位就先以提升餐馆营业额为目标吧。

美食评审，这可是关系到餐馆评级的大事，当然得仔细思考后再做决定。你在脑海里想象着评审员品尝这道菜品的画面，心中总算有了答案。

Because we only have farm-grown vegetables to work with. Also, I genuinely think salad is a fantastic dish.

呵。依我看，当前位置明显是偏左了。

首先，正如那位评审员所言——目前的菜单实在过分单调了。
First of all, just like that judge said, the current menu is way too limited.
想扩充菜单的话，奶油生菜沙拉怎么样？

拒绝！不要再新增任何沙拉啦。

Sure, the sugar content's a bit higher, but it's more flavorful. Refreshing fruit and veggies can whet the appetite, and they also work great as a dessert.

随时奉陪。不过得先让我熟悉这里。
Anytime. But I'll need to get familiar with the place first.
好呀。*我们*来给小敌引路！
Ooh, great! We will lead the way for De!
我算是明白，这家餐馆的菜单为何如此简陋了。

连口像样的锅都没有，还怎么做菜？难怪卖的都是草。

那就请我们的新主厨说说吧，你有什么主意？

Mydei and the fairies spring into action. Before long, a massive pot is set up right outside the kitchen door.

专业的厨师，没几样趁手的厨具怎么行。

I reviewed yesterday's business data and customer feedback. There are a few issues we need to address.
其一，随着客流量提升，服务员的数量明显不够，顾客等候上菜的时间太过漫长。

这个有办法！还有很多小妖精想来餐馆工作，*我们*再去找点就好。
That's easy! Tons of little fairies want to work here. We can always recruit extra hands.
其二，用餐区域的桌椅同样需要扩充，但目前，这个职能还没有对应的负责人。
Second, we need more tables and chairs for the dining area, but there's no one in charge of that role right now.
确实呢。不如，现在就让店长为餐馆指定一位「大堂经理」吧。
That's true. Why not appoint a "lobby manager" right now, manager?
Would you like to take the job, Cyrene?
{NICKNAME}这么信任我，是很高兴啦。但人家还有许多事要处理，招聘、团队管理、营业报告、陪小妖精们聊天、宣布打烊……
Aww, {NICKNAME}, I'm flattered you trust me! But I've already got so much on my plate — recruiting, team management, business reports, chatting with the fairies, calling closing time...
不行不行，怕忙不过来，给大家添麻烦。
