今日就决出胜负。即将召开的美食评选，就由那几位评审员来做出判断。
Let's settle it today. We'll let those judges decide in the upcoming gourmet contest.
Sounds good to me. I'm in.
这次总能分出高低了吧？
Guess we'll finally see who's the better chef, once and for all.
评审员只有三位，不可能出现平票的情况。
With only three judges, there's no chance of a tie.
哈，没想到你考虑得这么细。既然如此，就烦请遐蝶小姐出场吧。
Hah, didn't expect you to think so far ahead. In that case, let's call in Miss Castorice.
好呀。正巧时间快到了，这就动身去参加美食评审吧。
Sure! Just about time. Let's go for the gourmet contest.
我和万敌都做好准备了，随时可以出发。
Mydei and I are all set. We can head out anytime.
走吧，这场比赛该有结果了。
Let's go. It's time we settled this.
Still got a couple of things to wrap up...
没关系。忙完后，来找我就好。
No worries. Just come find me when you're done.
——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，我们永远在你的身后迷！
Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon, we'll always have your back, mem!
——迷迷！迷！干净利落地击败对手吧，万敌主厨！
Mem! Memem! Take them down quick and clean, Chef Mydei!
二位的厨艺对决我有所耳闻。但发展到如此地步，实在始料未及……
I've heard about your culinary rivalry, but I never imagined it would escalate like this...
遐蝶小姐不用拘束，按你心中的想法给出评价即可。
No need to hold back, Miss Castorice. Just speak from your heart.
既然将评判权交给旁人，我和他都已做好了告负的准备。
Since we entrusted the judgment to others, we're both ready to accept the outcome, whatever it may be.
明白了。那么，请将选定的菜品摆放至桌上吧。
Understood. Then please present your selected dishes on the table.
决定了。我选择的送审菜品，是这份「黄金薯条鸡块」。
I've made my decision. The dish I'm submitting is this "Golden Potato Fries and Chicken Nugget."
食材质量是菜品的根本，而我对哀丽秘榭的麦田有信心。我很清楚，这片土地上的作物与肉类有多鲜美，独特的风味能让所有品尝者赞不绝口。

Great dishes start with great ingredients, and I believe in the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae. I know exactly how flavorful this land's crops and meats are. Their unique taste is sure to leave a lasting impression.
说得还不错。我选的是这道，「敦实杂蔬汤」。
Well said. As for me, I'm going with "Hearty Vegetable Potage."
不打算给大家说说理由吗？
Aren't you gonna tell us why?
No need. Let's just get started.
白厄阁下制作的菜品，初看或许觉得简陋，但入口便能感受到极为饱满的谷物与油炸焦香，外酥里嫩，是别处难品尝到的美味。
Lord Phainon's dish may look plain at first glance, but one bite reveals its true depth: rich grain and oil-fried aromas, a crisp crust, and tender center. It's indeed a rare and delightful treat.
而万敌阁下对哀地里亚的传统炖菜做出了改良，增添了用以提鲜的酸味，汤底浓郁却不会感到腻，北地特有的刺激口味被淡化，只留下了温暖的感受。

Meanwhile, Lord Mydei has reimagined Aidonia's traditional stew with a touch of acidity that lifts the flavor. The broth is hearty without being heavy, and the bold northern spices have been mellowed into a warm, comforting finish.
若换作平时，我会为两份菜品都给出满分。
If this were a regular tasting, I'd give both dishes a perfect score.
但似乎…这并非各位想要的结果。
But... I get the feeling that's not the answer everyone's looking for.
——迷！迷迷！继续为白厄主厨应援！
Memem! Mem! Keep cheering for Chef Phainon!
——迷迷！迷！别执迷不悟了，要投敌！投敌！
Memem! Mem! Stop being so stubborn! You need to switch sides and vote for Mydei!
Hard to tell who's gonna win.
Still, every duel must have a winner...
So... what do we do now?
既然这道菜分不出胜负，再追加一道便是了。你不介意多比试几个回合吧？
If these dishes are too evenly matched, let's just go another round. You don't mind, do you?
当然可以。要是你输得太快，反而没意思。
Not at all. It'd be rather boring if you were to lose the game too soon.
这道「二仁月饼」怎么样？咸香可口，色泽金黄酥脆，想必能让遐蝶小姐满意。
How about this one: "Double-Nut Mooncake"? Golden, crunchy, and packed with savory flavor. I bet Miss Castorice will love it.
不如尝尝我特制的「盛宴香汁烤鸡」，口感丰富，鲜嫩多汁，正好用来中和他那过分的咸味。
Try my "Feast-Gravy Roast Chicken." It's juicy, full of flavor, and just the thing to balance out that overly salty taste of his.
这…我来简单品尝。请两位主厨停手，不要再制作新的菜品了。
Well... I'll have a quick taste. But you two, please stop cooking! No more new dishes!
我真正的拿手菜还没端出来呢。这道「云羊肋排」，请各位评审员一并品尝。
Hey now, I haven't even brought out my signature dish! Presenting my "Cloudsheep Ribs." Judges, please enjoy.
Wait, was that even on the menu?
Where the heck did you even find a cloudsheep!?
Freshly made "Sweet & Sour Braised Chicken," coming right up.
还没完。这份「咸制熏肉」是我厨师生涯的集大成之作，绝对不会输给任何人。请品尝！
We're not done yet. This "Salty Smoked Meat" is the pinnacle of my culinary career, my magnum opus that outperforms every other dish. You have to try it!
Mem... can't eat another bite, mem...
我申请暂停这场美食评审…多出来的这些菜品到底该怎么处理啊……
I motion to pause the tasting... What are we even supposed to do with all these extra dishes...
迷！到我们登场的时候了！我们的胃如巨渊似深海，吞得下任何食物迷！
Mem! That's our cue! Our stomachs are like bottomless pits. We can handle anything, mem!
你还有招吗？我才刚进入状态，手感正热呢。
You done already? I'm just getting warmed up!
悬锋城的菜谱比你想的要厚得多，继续吧。
You think you've seen it all? Castrum Kremnos's cookbook is way thicker than you imagine. Let's keep going!
好啊。「盐炙火腿配无花果」，请品尝！
Alright then. "Salt-Seared Ham with Figs," dig in!
And here's "Roasted Hornswine with Lemon-Cream Sauce." Have a taste.
Try this one: "Surf & Turf Deluxe Stew." The name says it all.
迷…我们认输！真的、真的吃不动了。
Mem... We surrender! Seriously, we're full to bursting!
迷迷！老大，快救救我们，救救迷境迷！
Memem! Boss! Help us! Help the Maze, mem!
嗯？只要吃掉所有的饵料就好吧？
Hmm? So I just need to eat every bait, right?
两位主厨还在不停地上菜，但桌面上的菜品却正在以惊人的速度消失……
The two chefs keep bringing out dish after dish, but somehow, the food is vanishing at an alarming rate...
味道很不错，确实是极致的美食盛宴。但是…两位厨师，还有没端出来的菜品么？
Delicious. This really is the ultimate feast. But... chefs, is there anything left you haven't served?
哈哈。多么滑稽，我们两个拼尽了全力，都没能满足海瑟音小姐的胃口。
Haha... Isn't this something? We gave it everything we had, and still couldn't satisfy Miss Hysilens's appetite.
看来此次竞赛的胜者，并非你我中的一人。
Seems the real winner of this culinary duel wasn't either of us.
没想到海瑟音小姐才是隐藏的大胃王。好在危机总算化解了。
Never saw it coming. Turns out Miss Hysilens is a secret competitive eater. But anyway, at least this crisis is finally averted!
{NICKNAME}阁下，两位主厨的菜品都极为优秀。尽管引发了混乱，但也足以证明餐馆拥有通过评审的实力。
{NICKNAME}, both chefs delivered outstanding dishes. Even though things got a little out of hand, it's clear this restaurant has what it takes to pass the review.
作为晋级的证明，我将为店长颁发迷其林星级奖章。请收下吧。
As proof of your success, I now present the Memchelin Star Award to the owner. Please accept it!
迷！我们郑重宣布，从现在起，「{TEXTJOIN#225}」就是三星级餐馆了迷！
Mem! We'd like to officially announce that from this day forth, {TEXTJOIN#225} is a certified 3-star restaurant, mem!
继续加油！朝着四星级的目标前进迷！
Keep it up and shoot for that four-star rating next!
距离终点只有一步之遥了。
We're just one step away from the finish line.
迷！冲冲！成为四星级餐馆后，村长有惊喜要送给各位迷！
Mem! Let's gooo! Once you hit 4 stars, the village chief has a special surprise for you, mem!
There's a reward for hitting four stars?
迷！村长交代过，会有惊喜送给餐馆的各位，但现在还不能说迷！
Mem! The village chief said there'll be a surprise for the whole restaurant team, but we're not allowed to spill the beans yet, mem!
没想到两位主厨的竞赛，最终会由海瑟音小姐划下句号…还挺出乎意料的吧？
Who would've thought that this culinary clash between the chefs would end with Miss Hysilens stealing the spotlight? Pretty wild twist, huh?
至于村长说的惊喜，究竟是什么呢。看来只有等餐馆达到四星级后才能知道了。
So, about that surprise the village chief mentioned... Guess we'll only find out once the restaurant hits four stars.
今天的事情都忙完啦，店长也早点去休息吧。
That's a wrap for today. You should get some rest too, owner.
好呀，祝你做个甜甜的梦。明天见！
You got it. Sweet dreams! See you then!
Still got a couple of things to wrap up...
嗯，我就在这等你，要快点回来哦。
Alright, I'll wait right here. Don't keep me hanging, okay?
两位阁下，知道自己做错了什么吗？
You two, do you realize what you've done wrong?
哎。热衷竞赛没什么问题，但别胡乱使用餐馆的食材呀！
*sigh* I'm all for a little friendly competition, but don't go wasting the restaurant's ingredients like that!
那些农作物都是我和那刻夏老师，还有田管妖精们一起辛辛苦苦种出来的。大家的心血和汗水，就这么白白地全浪费掉了，多不值啊。
Those crops were grown with a lot of care by me, Professor Anaxa, and the farm fairies. You just wasted everyone's hard work. That's a real shame.
You get why that's a problem now?
I'm gonna tell you off too.
店长，对不起。昨天光顾着和万敌的比试，没考虑到食材的问题。
Boss, I'm sorry. I got too caught up in the cook-off with Mydei and didn't think things through.
还有呢，经过这轮意料外的巨量消耗，我们的库存也快见底了。
Also, thanks to that surprise feast, our inventory's nearly wiped out.
即便算上今天的收获，食材储备也远低于警戒线。按目前客流量的上升速度，我们很快就将面临无菜可用的情况。
Even after today's harvest, our food stock is way below the danger line. At this rate, with more and more customers pouring in, we'll be out of ingredients in no time.
恐怕只有农田的产量突然翻上好几倍，才有可能解决这次危机吧。
Unless our farmland output magically multiplies overnight, this could get ugly.
多雇点妖精来种地怎么样？
What if we hire more fairies to work the fields?
不行呀。农田的产出速度有限，不是投入更多人力就能提高的。
That won't do. There's a natural cap on how fast crops can grow. It's not just about manpower.
Couldn't we buy more from Cipher?
唔，我倒是去问过了。肉类和特殊食材可以买到，但蔬菜还是得从地里种才行呢。
I've already asked her. We can stock up on meat and rare ingredients, but when it comes to veggies, well, those still need to be grown in the fields.
不如问问神奇的那刻夏老师吧！
Then maybe we should ask the ever-miraculous Professor Anaxa for help!
哎…事到如今，也只有这个办法了。
*sigh* At this point, that might be our only option.
灰宝，我们去问问看吧，希望老师这次还能拿出什么厉害的炼金秘药来。
Grayie, let's go see what the professor says. Hopefully, he's got another one of his brilliant alchemical fixes up his sleeve.
还请两位阁下去农田里劳作数日，以示惩戒。
You two are going to work the fields for a few days as punishment.
只有亲身体验过种植的艰辛，才能深刻认识到浪费食物是件多么可耻的行为吧。
Only by experiencing how tough farming really is can you understand just how shameful wasting food is.
好。希望那刻夏老师不会因此大发雷霆……
Alright. Just hope Professor Anaxa doesn't get mad at me over this...
但是，得等我先想到答案。
But first, I need to come up with a solution.
我正好烦躁得很。风堇，去把我的那几个学生叫过来。我要给你们再上一课。
It happens that I'm in a bad mood. Hyacine, go round up my students. It's time for another lesson.
不得不说，亲自下地劳作后，感觉我对烹饪的理解又提升了一层啊。
I'm not gonna lie. Working the land really gives me a deeper appreciation for cooking.
哼。剑和菜刀都使得一般，挥起锄头来倒挺厉害。
Tch. You swing a hoe better than a sword or a cleaver. I'd give you that.
那刻夏老师，突然叫我们过来，是有什么急事吗？
Professor Anaxa, you called us so suddenly. What's the emergency?
辩论是灵感的源泉，而我正在思考某个难题。你们若有想法，可以随时打断我。
Debate fuels inspiration, and I'm pondering a rather puzzling question. Feel free to interrupt me anytime if you've got ideas.
本次的研讨课题便是——「大地兽为何如此庞大？」
Today's discussion topic: Why are dromas so enormous?
Wait, weren't we talking about farming?
按常理想，应该是大地泰坦的缘故吧。吉奥里亚的造物大多身形伟岸，山之民同样如此。
Well, if we're being logical, it's probably because of the Earth Titan. Most of Georios's creations are built big, and the Mountain Dwellers are no exception.
要是艾格勒也参与创生的话，说不定大地兽还能长出翅膀呢。
If Aquila had been involved in their creation, imagine — winged dromas roaming about!
标准的回答。正确有余，发散性却不足。及格分。
Textbook answer. Correct but uninspired. You pass, but only just.
Two more to hear from. Thoughts?
正确答案只有一个，那便是……
There's really only one correct answer here...
They wouldn't be called "dromas" if they weren't en-ormous!
哼。名称不过是随手捏造的符号，拘泥于此未免太过表面。不合格。
Hmph. Names are just convenient labels. Such shallow reasoning. Fail.
Because they eat tons and tons of food!
若是如此，那些妖精怕是要膨胀得无边无界了。只注重现象。不合格。
Then our fairy friends would be universe-sized by now. You're confusing symptom with cause. Fail.
老师，{NICKNAME}阁下或许还未想好，由我先作答吧。
Professor, I think {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} might need more time. Might I offer my answer first?
我曾在书中见过这样的说法。起初，大地兽的体型和所有生物无异，但它形单影只，实在太孤独了，于是便走过世界各个角落，吞吃掉了遇见的所有生命。
I read an interesting theory once that dromas started out normal-sized but were desperately lonely, so they roamed the world consuming every creature they found.
随着心灵逐渐满足，它的身躯也变得越发庞大，直到…变成现在的模样。
As their hearts found fulfillment, their bodies expanded proportionally... eventually reaching their current enormous size.
You wrote this story yourself, didn't you?
不是。是偶然间在书店翻阅到的，我还写不出这么…独特的故事，嗯。
No, just found it by chance in a bookstore. I couldn't write something so... peculiar.
啊，抱歉。只是老师的提问，让我无意中想到了这个故事。
Oh! Sorry about that. The question just reminded me of that story.
这个答案，感觉会让老师更生气……
I think that answer's only going to make the professor more upset...
是啊！我怎么就没想到。农作物体型极难突破品种限制，但若是使用炼金技术，将多个作物联结乃至融合起来，或许便能创造不可能之物！
That's it! Why didn't I think of that? Plants rarely exceed their natural size limits, but through alchemy, we could connect or even merge multiple crops to create something extraordinary!
你们，来帮我准备炼金药水。
Come, help me prepare these alchemical concoctions.
…云羊鬃毛，识之花的灵液，黑潮造物的脚爪，正阳狮鹫的蛋清，奇美拉之角……
Cloudsheep wool, Cognos Bloom ichor, Black Tide Creature claws, Noontide Gryphon egg whites, chimera horns...
And the last ingredient... a Fairy's Tail...
Did you say a FAIRY'S tail?
Wait, does the chief know you're doing this?
放心。这是迷境里的一种植物，叫这个名字，只是因为和妖精的大尾巴长得很像啦。
Relax! It's just a plant from the Maze that happens to look like a fairy's bushy tail.
呼…材料齐备，该开始炼制了。
Perfect... ingredients collected. Time to start the alchemical transformation.
炼金术与烹饪自有其共通之处，无非是将指定的材料投进器具中，以恰当的手法进行混合，适时调整反应环境，直至得到想要的结果。
Alchemy shares much with cooking, combining specific ingredients in suitable containers, applying proper techniques, and manipulating environmental conditions until you achieve your intended outcome.
看好了，这便是此世最伟大的——
Observe carefully, for this shall be the most magnificent—
…是温度出了差错么。再试一次。
Must have been a temperature issue. Let's try again.
Waaah! Wh—What's with the sudden earthquake!?
搅拌力度太大了？再来一次。
Too much force in the mixing? Let's go again.
KABOOM CRASH BANG BOOM CRACK — POP!
你已经数不清这场炼金实验究竟重复了多少次，只知道耳旁的爆炸声从未断绝过……
It's impossible to count how many times this experiment has been attempted. The constant explosions have become the soundtrack to your day...
——至是，工程已毕，感到高兴吧，我找到了突破农作物固有限制的方法！
Behold, my work is complete! Rejoice, for I have discovered how to break through crops' natural size limits!
你就是最顶尖的农业专家。
You're absolutely the finest agricultural expert.
来。我带你们见识全新物种的诞生！
Come with me! I'll show you the birth of an entirely new species!
…难得这几天不用做饭，等会去哪逛逛？
...It's a rare break from cooking these days. Where should we go hang out later?
Let's finish the farm work first.
This plot will be perfect for our experiment.
虽说老师对炼金术的钻研极为精深，但用来培育农作物…我还是第一次见。
I'm well aware of the Professor's alchemical expertise, but using it for crop cultivation... that's certainly a first.
别、别紧张，说不定真会有奇迹发生呢。
N—No need to worry. Maybe something amazing will actually happen.
恍惚间，你好像听见了悉悉索索的声响，像是枝叶在尽情舒展，又像是土地的隐秘呼唤。
In your trance-like state, you detect rustling noises, like plants stretching toward the sky, or perhaps the earth whispering its secrets.
And then, what appears before you is...
<size=28>是比妖精的个头还高的巨大南瓜！</size>
<size=28>...an enormous pumpkin that's bigger than a whole fairy!</size>
太厉害了！有了这些巨型蔬菜，餐馆再也不用担心食材短缺的问题了！
That's incredible! With these giant vegetables, food shortages will be a thing of the past for our restaurant!
One pumpkin's all, from spring to fall!
有了炼金术，亩产一万八！
还算符合预期。我再来试试其余作物。
Hmm, not too shabby. Let's see how the other crops will turn out.
既然巨型蔬菜是老师研发出来的，那我有个提案。
Given that the professor created these giant vegetables, I'd like to make a proposal.
灰宝，餐馆不是会定期举办主题经营活动嘛，下个负责人…就由那刻夏老师来担任吧？
Grayie, the restaurant runs themed events periodically, right? Why not let Professor Anaxa take charge of the next one?
正好白厄阁下和万敌阁下会来农田帮忙，这段时间，老师就去热闹的地方转转吧。
Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei will be managing the fields, so professor, wouldn't you prefer spending time somewhere more lively?
只是挂个名的话，倒可以接受。
Being a figurehead is acceptable, I suppose.
但先说清楚，招待小动物吃饭这种琐事，我不想管，以及……
But to be clear, I have no interest in mundane tasks like feeding small animals, and also...
来餐馆上班吧，那刻夏老师！
Join our restaurant staff, Professor Anaxa!
叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯老师。
灰宝，农田里的巨型蔬菜都成熟啦，我感觉很适合作为餐馆的宣传物料，就带了些过来。
Grayie, those giant vegetables from the fields are fully ripe now! They'd make excellent promotional items for the restaurant, so I brought a few.
想想看，到底该怎么使用呢？
I wonder how we should best put them to use...
…不得不说，这些巨大蔬菜还真挺沉的，我和万敌搬得都快累瘫了。
These giant vegetables are remarkably heavy. Hauling them here even exhausted me and Mydei.
That's what happens when you lack proper strength.
好啦，趁现在顾客还没上门，我们快点来装饰餐馆吧！
Come on! Let's get the restaurant decorated before the customers show up!
不错，不错。这正是我预想中的模样。
Very good. This is exactly what I had in mind.
老师，别光顾着观察巨型作物了，来帮忙做开店的准备呀。
Professor, stop admiring the giant crops and help us get ready to open!
看来我们的农林专家对成果很满意呢。妖精们也陆陆续续地到了，快开始营业吧。
Looks like our agricultural expert is pleased with the results. The fairies are starting to arrive now too. Time to open for business!
——迷路迷境的丰收节，今天总算要正式开幕啦。
The Harvest Festival at Membrance Maze is finally opening today.
哈哈哈哈。这便是所谓的乐极生悲吧。
Hahaha. This is what they call "too much of a good thing," I suppose.
我拒绝。明知有最优解的前提下，主动选择错误答案，这是愚蠢的行径。
I refuse. Intentionally choosing the wrong path when the best solution is clear is nothing but stupidity.
灰宝！你来得正好，快帮我们劝劝那刻夏老师吧。
Grayie! Thank goodness you're here. Help us talk some sense into Professor Anaxa!
农田里的巨型蔬菜产量实在太高，多到连厨房都堆不下。餐馆日常营业根本用不完这么多食材，快要放坏掉了，大家正在为此而发愁呢。

The giant vegetables are overproducing drastically. We've run out of storage space in the kitchen. There's no way we can use all these ingredients during regular service, and they're starting to rot. Everyone's totally stressed about it.
但老师，说什么都不愿意减少农作物的产量……
But the professor refuses to reduce crop yields, no matter what we say...
第一，农田产能并非说减就能减、如此方便操作之物。
First, crop productivity isn't something you can just dial down. It's not that simple.
第二，即便有办法，我也不愿施行。好不容易实现突破，却要退回原本的境地，我无法接受如此短视的做法。没有任何商谈余地。
Second, even if possible, I wouldn't do it. After finally achieving this breakthrough, going backward is unacceptable. This short-sighted approach is entirely out of the question.
I agree. More is always better.
我能理解老师的想法，但就这么浪费食材也不行呀。
I see your point, professor, but letting all this food go to waste doesn't make sense either.
哼，浪费我的研究成果难道就值得夸耀么？
Hmph, is wasting my research achievements something to brag about?
既要顾全农田产量，又要消耗掉数目如此庞大的蔬菜，呵，确是难以破解的死局啊。
High farm production AND using up all these veggies? Ha! Sounds like we're stuck between a rock and a hard place.
嗐，这有什么难的，不就是想办法把东西卖出去嘛？不瞒你们，我最擅长这个了。
Pfft, that's nothing! We just gotta sell it all! Trust me, this is right up my alley.
Leave it to me, and I'll make sure everyone's happy!
Help! Our vegetables are piling up!
既然是灰子的请求，以咱俩的交情，我当然没有不帮的道理，对吧？
Since it's Gray Mystery asking, I couldn't possibly say no! With our history, how could I refuse?
你不是这辈子都不会工作吗？
Didn't you say you'd never work another day in your life?
此一时，彼一时嘛。再说，以咱俩的交情，我当然没有不帮的道理，对吧？
Times change, my friend! Besides, with our history, how could I possibly say no?
我说啊，你们想的太复杂了。卖货这种事，最重要的就两点…要么稀缺，要么便宜。
Listen, you're making this too complicated. Selling stuff comes down to two things: either make it rare, or make it cheap.
要是能让那群小动物相信，这是瑟希斯种出来的神奇果实，有着延年益寿、益智健体的功效，那也行，只是实行起来比较麻烦。
I mean, we could tell the critters these are Cerces's magical fruits that'll make them live longer, get smarter, and stay healthy. Though that would be such a pain to actually do...
最简单的，当然就是降价大促销啦。既能清空库存，还能赚波大的，两难自解！
Honestly, the easiest thing would be a big fat discount sale! Clear everything out, make a nice profit, and poof — no more problem!
灰子…不对，是店长。怎么样，就让我来当这个促销负责人吧？
So, Gray Mystery... sorry, I mean Manager. What do you think? Just let me run this sale!
That's because cats like fish! Meow~
别犹豫啦，双重否定就是行！
That sounds like a yes to me!
没人反对的话，我就接手咯？餐馆扭亏为盈，全看我的啦！
No objections? Then I'm in charge now! Just watch me turn this restaurant from loss to profit!
感到迷茫的时候，不妨听听赛飞儿怎么说。
Need some business advice? Listen to my pearls of wisdom!
她说…<size=28>餐馆所有菜品大促销，走过路过不要错过！！！</size>
And it goes... <size=28>"Everything on sale at this restaurant! Come one, come all!"</size>
迷？这家餐馆在办活动，好划算的样子，我们去看看迷！
Mem? This restaurant's having a sale event. Looks like a great deal! Let's check it out!
迷迷！在这里吃饭能省好多钱，我也要尝迷！
Mem mem! We'll save a fortune dining here. I've got to try it too!
——欢迎光临，欢迎呼朋唤友前来就餐！
Welcome! Feel free to bring friends and family to dine with us!
我们不仅准备了力度极大的优惠活动，更是邀请到了某位重量级嘉宾，为到场顾客讲解神奇果实的好处。喜欢的话，记得给餐馆点个赞噢。
We've prepared incredible discounts AND invited a special guest to explain all about these wondrous fruits. If you enjoy your meal, please remember to leave us a 5-star rating!
有请——奥赫玛最最最最最富有的，金织女士！
Please welcome — the absolutely, positively, definitely richest person in Okhema, Lady Goldweaver!
呵。我原本收到的请求，只是帮你编织金线，并不包括所谓的宣传吧？
Hmph. If I recall correctly, my agreement was to weave golden thread for you, not to participate in any sales activities.
哎呀，阿雅，就是回答几个问题，有什么关系嘛。
Oh come on, Agy, it's just answering a few questions. What's the harm?
再说啦，现在的我可是大促销节负责人，餐馆全体员工都任由我差遣。灰子同意的话，我甚至可以派你去厨房烧菜噢。
Plus, I'm now running this entire sale! The entire restaurant staff is at my disposal. If Gray Mystery agrees, I could even assign you kitchen duty!
I'd love to see Aglaea cooking!
若是店长不介意菜单上只有燕麦粥的话，那我也可尝试一番。
If you don't mind with just oatmeal porridge on the menu, I suppose I could make an attempt.
去田里种地好像也不错？
Perhaps field work would suit you better?
若只是劳役之事，我大可派衣匠代为完成，且不收取任何佣金。如何？
For simple physical labor, I could simply send the Garmentmaker in my place, at no cost whatsoever. Would that suffice?
赛飞儿，别太得意忘形了。
Cipher, you're taking this too far.
哪有！这不是正常的给餐馆打广告嘛，阿雅都多久没露面了，该出来玩玩啦。
I'm not! This is standard promotional work! Plus, Agy never gets out enough. She needs to be more social!
罢了。既然是店长选定的主导者，我也不多说什么。你问吧。
Very well. Since the Manager appointed you, I won't argue further. Ask away.
那我开始咯。提问！——在金织女士看来，这些果实的神奇之处在哪儿呢？
Here we go! First question! Lady Goldweaver, in your opinion, what makes these fruits so wondrous?
能生长得比普通作物更为庞大，这本就是受赐福的表现。
The fact they grow larger than regular crops is a sign of blessings.
更何况，果实的外形匀称，味道鲜美，作为餐桌上的佳肴再适合不过。
Not to mention their perfect symmetry and exquisite flavor. They're absolutely ideal as culinary ingredients.
连金织女士吃了都说好！现场的各位，还不赶快下单购买？
Even Lady Goldweaver endorses them! Everyone, hurry up and place your orders!
迷！我、我要买十个！打包带走迷！
Mem! I—I'll take ten! To go, please!
有意购买的顾客，请在这边登记哦。大家排好队，库存绝对足够，不用抢啦。
If you'd like to make a purchase, please sign up here. Everyone form a line, please. Don't worry. We've got plenty in stock for everyone!
*我们*负责送货！很快就会到家门口了！
And *we* take care of all the deliveries! They'll be at your doorstep in no time!
下一个问题！我们收到了部分顾客的来信，据说啊，有妖精担心如此庞大的农作物，是通过技术手段人为培育出来的，对身体有害。
Next question! We've received correspondence from customers worried that these enormous vegetables, possibly technologically modified, might be unsafe to eat.
Lady Goldweaver, how would you address these concerns?
无稽之谈。尽管这位农业专家…呵，理念极为独特，但他的品行倒是不必怀疑。
Preposterous claims. While our agricultural expert admittedly has... peculiar methodologies, his integrity is unimpeachable.
I didn't ask for your endorsement.
金织女士愿意用自身的名誉为神奇果实担保，绝对天然无污染，各位大可放心购买！
Lady Goldweaver personally vouches for these wondrous fruits! <unbreak>100%</unbreak> natural and pollution-free! So go ahead and buy as many as you want!
差不多玩够了吧？再闹下去，要耽误餐馆经营了。
Alright, enough. Keep this up, and you'll interfere with the restaurant's actual business.
嘁。好吧好吧，反正吸引的客流量也够了。促销会就到这里，大家——
Fine, whatever. We've got plenty of customers now anyway. That's the end of our sale, everyone—
迷！最喜欢这种实惠的活动了，要是能永远持续就好了迷……
Mem! I just love these bargain events. Wish they could be permanent...
从结果来看，促销活动为餐馆带来了相当可观的营收，就此常驻也并非不可能。
Based on these results, this sale has brought impressive revenue to the restaurant. Making it permanent is definitely an option.
妖精们也都很开心呢。果然，大家还是对便宜的商品没有抵抗力呀。
All the fairies seem delighted. Everyone really does love a good deal.
当然啦，谁能拒绝口袋里的钱越变越多呢。灰子，我这次干得还不错吧？
Of course! Who doesn't love saving money? Gray Mystery, didn't I do an amazing job this time?
嘿，感谢！我就问心无愧地收下啦。
Aww, thanks! That's what I like to hear!
哎呀，这么严格干嘛。灰子也越来越有店长的样子了，没意思。
Wow, tough crowd! Look who's become all manager-like and boring! Not cool, Gray Mystery!
说起来，为何你会来餐馆主动承担职责？这和我所知的那个赛法利娅可不一样。
But why would you willingly take on work at the restaurant? This isn't like the Cifera I know.
人心中的成见哪，总是比创世涡心里的水还深。就不能是我突发善心，想做点好事吗？
People's prejudices run deeper than the waters in the Vortex of Genesis. Is it so hard to believe I might have a sudden urge to do something nice?
Do you actually believe her, manager?
好吧好吧，也不卖关子了。灰子，我帮了这么大的忙，要点报酬不过分吧？
Okay, okay, no more games. Gray Mystery, after all my help, a little compensation isn't too much to ask, is it?
呵。捷足爵是对我评定的薪资不满么？
Hmph. Is Dux Celeripes unhappy with the compensation I've assigned?
哪敢呀。凯撒大人的裁决当然公正，只不过…想笼络人心，有时得付出点额外代价。
How could I? The Great Imperator's decisions are undoubtedly just, but... earning loyalty sometimes requires a little extra incentive.
要的不多，一枚妖精金币足矣。不至于连这点小钱都舍不得吧？
I'm not asking much, just one fairy coin. You wouldn't deny me such a modest amount, would you?
但你得继续来餐馆打工才行。
Only if you stay on as restaurant staff.
唉。好吧好吧…为了挣一块钱而献出所有的模样，像极了人生啊。
Ugh, fine... sacrificing everything for a single coin. Sounds just like real life.
Consider it a bonus for your good work.
店长大气！我就拿走属于我的那块钱咯。
How magnanimous! I'll just take my well-earned coin then.
好啦，今天的营业结束了，按照日程，大家一起去参加迷其林美食评审吧。
Well, that's the end of today's service! As scheduled, we should all proceed to the Memchelin Food Review now.
呵呵。帮忙经营餐馆的各位贵客，辛苦了哪。
Hehe. My distinguished guests who helped with the restaurant, thank you for your hard work.
啊，评审员和村长居然亲自到访！可惜餐馆打烊了，没法拿出美味的菜品招待……
Oh, the reviewer and the chief are here in person! Unfortunately, we've already closed. We can't offer you any of our delicious meals...
不用客气。我和村长过来，是有好消息要告诉各位。
Please, don't worry about that. The chief and I have come with good news for all of you.
即便有报酬，若是将妖精使用的钱币发给各位，恐怕也没人会想要吧。
Even with compensation, I doubt fairy currency would be of much interest to you.
Why are you looking at me like that?
You don't also have bad news, do you?
即便幸运与厄运从来相伴相生，但说不定，这次只有好事找上门来呢。
While good and bad luck often come together, perhaps this time only good one has arrived.
我还以为会是个秘密，没想到，{NICKNAME}阁下早已听说了。
I assumed this would be kept secret, yet {NICKNAME} seems already informed.
说实话，我将重振餐馆的重任交给各位时，从未想到会有如此繁盛的局面。
Honestly, when I tasked you with revitalizing the restaurant, I never expected such tremendous prosperity.
如今，「{TEXTJOIN#225}」的名号响彻整个迷境，孩子们都为品尝到你们制作的美食而欣喜。餐馆举办的活动，也收获了一致好评。
Now the name of {TEXTJOIN#225} echoes across the entire Maze, with children excitedly enjoying your culinary creations. Your special events have earned unanimous praise.
各位为经营餐馆而付出的努力，我都看在眼里，并由衷地表示感谢。
I've seen your tireless efforts managing this restaurant, and I'm deeply thankful.
作为回报，妖精们特意准备了一份超级大礼。由这位特邀评审员公证，我宣布——
In return, the fairies have prepared a magnificent gift. With our special guest reviewer as witness, I hereby declare...
<size=28>「{TEXTJOIN#225}」的第四次迷其林美食评审，直接通过！</size>
<size=28>{TEXTJOIN#225} has automatically passed its fourth Memchelin Food Review!</size>
太好了！成为四星级餐馆了！
That's wonderful! We're a 4-star restaurant now!
虽说是件值得开心的事，但总感觉…凭伙伴们的实力，通过美食评审还挺轻松的？
It's definitely exciting, but honestly... with everyone's abilities, passing the review wasn't much of a challenge, I suppose?
就这？是不是有点简单了。
That's it? Seems a bit too easy.
村长，这件事不是我们特意过来的重点。
Chief, this isn't really why we're here.
噢，噢！抱歉抱歉，我给弄混了。真正要说的事不是这个。
Oh, oh! My apologies, I got sidetracked. That's not what we came to say.
就是…对！我想起来了，为感谢餐馆对迷境美食文化发展做出的贡献，我们——
Well, it's... ah! That's right! To thank your restaurant for its amazing contributions to the Maze's food culture, we...
<size=28>召集迷境里所有妖精，为各位准备了一场最盛大的晚宴！</size>
<size=28>Calling all fairies in the Maze, we've prepared the most spectacular banquet for you all!</size>
还请店长与各位贵客，务必拨冗参加哪。
We insist that you and all distinguished guests attend.
Sounds great! I love a good banquet!
希望在迷路迷境生活的这段时光，能成为你们珍贵的回忆哪。
May your time in the Membrance Maze become a treasured memory.
迷境最盛大的宴会，究竟是什么样的呢？{NICKNAME}一定也很好奇吧。
What could the Maze's most spectacular banquet be like? You must be wondering too, right?
都忙完了的话，就快出发吧。要是我们迟迟不到，妖精们就只能眼巴巴地等着啦。
If we're all set, we should get going. We don't want to keep all those fairies waiting for us.
嘻，人家也很期待呢。走吧，我们这就去看看！
Hehe, I can't wait either! Let's go check it out!
There's still work to do at the restaurant...
{NICKNAME}还真是有责任心呀。快去吧，可别让妖精们等太久哦。
{NICKNAME}, always so dedicated! Go ahead and finish up. Just try not to keep the fairies waiting too long.
迷路迷境的孩子们，期待已久的宴会——终于要开始了哪！
Children of Membrance Maze, the long-awaited feast... is finally here!
迷！宴会！全都是好吃的，喜欢！
Mem! Feast! So many tasty things. I'm so happy!
来吧，大家都在为宴会做准备，我们也不能闲着。首先，嗯…就来把场地打扮得漂漂亮亮的吧！
Come on, everyone's busy getting ready for the feast. We can't just stand around! First things first... let's get the venue looking nice and pretty!
迷！我们正在把神奇果实，装进大盆里！
Mem! We're gathering these wondrous fruits and piling them into big tubs!
但神奇果实太重了。我们，实在搬不动迷……
But these wondrous fruits are too heavy... We can't lift them, mem...
要搬运这个，是有点太为难妖精们了，我们帮帮忙吧。
Hauling these around is a bit too much for the fairies. Come on, let's help them out.
迷！神奇果实，堆了好高！比所有妖精加起来都要高！
Mem! The wondrous fruits are stacked so high... Taller than all the fairies put together!
迷！空荡荡的，好适合跳舞迷！
Mem! It's so spacious, perfect for dancing memi!
快下来迷！这是用来吃饭的地方，村长发现要生气了迷。
Hurry down, mem! This is the dining area. If Chief sees, they'll be mad, memim!
举办宴会，桌面上都空着可不行，把装过盘的菜品都端出来吧。
We can't have a feast with empty tables. Let's bring out all the dishes that are ready to serve.
迷！味道好香！肚子在迷迷叫了迷……
Memem! It smells so good! My tummy's rumbling, mem...
宴会还没正式开始，得先忍忍迷……
The feast hasn't officially started yet... We have to resist for a bit longer, mem...
锵锵，场地都布置好啦，是不是还挺像模像样的？
Ta-da! The venue's all set up. Not bad, right? Looks pretty official!
偷偷尝一口，应该不会添麻烦吧？
No one will mind if I just have a tiny bite, right?
嘻，我开玩笑的，就想看看你的反应。果然，{NICKNAME}从来不会让人失望。
I was only joking! I just wanted to see your reaction. And sure enough, {NICKNAME}, you never let me down.
但既然你都这么说了，人家就恭敬不如从命咯？
But since you offered... I'd be rude not to accept, wouldn't I?
Heads up! Cyrene's trying to sneak a taste!
哎呀，背叛来得如此决绝，好令人受伤呀……
Oh... such a merciless betrayal... How could you?
嘻，但既然都被揭发了，那人家就不客气咯？
Hehe, but since I've already been caught red-handed... I guess I'll just help myself!
说不定村长会悄悄飘过来，拜托你守好背后……
The chief might sneak up on us at any moment... I'm counting on you to watch my back...
好好吃！虽然是尝过好多遍的菜品，但在宴会上别有一番风味呢！来，你要不要也尝一口……
This is so good! I've had these dishes plenty of times before, but somehow they taste even better at a feast! Come on, have a taste!
Mem! Reney, Chief is looking for you!
嗯…不知村长找我是什么事呢？真遗憾，明明气氛刚刚好……
Hmm... I wonder what the village chief needs me for? What a pity. Things were just getting good...
算啦。趁着宴会还没开始，去和伙伴们聊聊天吧。大家忙活这么久，肯定也有好多话想说。
Ah well. Since the feast hasn't started yet, might as well take the chance to chat with everyone. After working so hard, I bet they've got lots to say.
留下的究竟是快乐的回忆，还是说仍有烦恼，和没能实现的愿望呢？身为店长，了解员工也是你的职责哦。
Are they full of smiles and fond memories? Or left with concerns and unfulfilled wishes? As the manager, it's your responsibility to understand your employees.
所以，去吧——在这场宴会落幕前，别留下遗憾呀。
So before the feast comes to an end, make sure you don't leave with any regrets.
…值得回忆的事？没什么印象深刻的。
...Something worth remembering? Nothing really left a deep impression.
真要说的话，从地里拔几颗菜就开始烹饪的做派，让我回想起四处流亡的时光，简单、高效，追求的是果腹而非口味。

If I had to pick... then the straightforward style of pulling up vegetables and cooking them right away brings back memories of my days wandering in exile: simple, efficient, focused on sustenance over flavor.
不觉得很有意思嘛，万敌身为悬锋的战士，却是黄金裔中最精通烹饪的那个。无论多简单的食材，经由他手都能变成美食。
Funny isn't it? Mydei, a great Kremnoan warrior, is actually the most skilled cook among the Chrysos Heirs. No matter how simple the ingredients, they become a delicacy in his hands.
悬锋城的字典没几个词，菜谱倒是截然相反。
The Kremnoan dictionary may be pretty sparse, but their recipe book? Vast and diverse.
给你一个建议：放弃那不切实际的沙拉吧。优秀的厨师不会挑剔食材，利用手头的材料做好每一道菜，才算是对它们的敬意。
Want my advice? Forget that fancy salad. The mark of a great chef is making the most of what's at hand. They don't nitpick ingredients.
或许我的厨艺比不上你，但沙拉这个选择没有问题。我只为我能负责的食材负责，并且贯彻到底，这同样是厨师应有的品质。

Perhaps my cooking skills aren't on your level, but there's nothing wrong with making a salad. I stand by the ingredients I select and follow through with them. That's also what it means to be a proper chef.
哼。脚踏实地，这点还不错。
Hmph. At least you're practical. I can respect that.
说回原本的话题吧。村长从很早时候就一直念叨着，希望妖精们能美美饱餐一顿。
Back to the main point, the chief has been saying for ages how much they hope the fairies can enjoy a hearty, delicious feast.
所以，看到大家共同经营的餐馆实现了这一愿望，我还挺开心的。
That's why seeing everyone's efforts to turn this dream into reality through our restaurant makes me so happy.
至于遗憾么…在厨艺方面没能赢过万敌，另外就是，还没来得及多学几道拿手菜，餐馆经营就接近尾声了，总觉得快乐的时光有些短暂呀。

As for regrets... Well, one would be that I couldn't best Mydei in the kitchen. The other is, I didn't get the chance to learn more specialty dishes before the restaurant's run came to an end. Time really does fly when you're having fun.
流亡的时候，我也这么想过。若是时间流淌得慢些，他们也不至于如此窘迫地离开。
During those years in exile, I often thought that... if only time could pass more slowly, they wouldn't have to leave me in such horrible ways.
但追忆过往没什么意义。
Still, reminiscing about the past doesn't change anything.
替我照顾族人的人情，我已经还了。另外，给你个忠告，哀丽秘榭的白厄。
The kindness you showed in taking care of my people has been repaid. And here's a piece of advice for you, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.
直说吧，迈德漠斯。在这里没什么需要顾忌的。
Speak your mind, Mydeimos. There's no need for restraint in this place.
趁来得及的时候，多看几眼你的故乡吧。
Cherish your homeland while you still can.
不对不对！*我们*才是前辈，这种时候该由*我们*来提问！
No, no! We are the seniors here. At a time like this, we should be asking the questions!
都集中注意哦，老师的问题是，在迷路迷境的游学旅行很快就要结束啦，大家有什么宝贵的感悟，或者难忘的回忆呢？
Everyone, pay attention! The teacher's question is: With our field trip to Membrance Maze soon coming to an end, what valuable insights or unforgettable memories have you gained?
抢答时间！没人举手的话，*我们*要点名咯！
Alright, answer time! If no one raises their hand, then we are going to start picking people!
我、我！缇宝老师，我想要第一个分享~
Ooh, me, me! Teacher Tribbie, I want to share first!
好呀好呀！小风堇，就由你来给大家做个榜样吧。
Great, Cinny! You can go first and show everyone how it's done!
咳。得听好啦，我有…关于那刻夏老师的、很重要的秘密要公布！
Everyone, listen up. I'm going to reveal... a very important secret about Professor Anaxa!
众所周知，老师待人极其严格，从不轻易夸奖大地兽之外的学生。但是！
As everyone knows, the professor is extremely strict and almost never praises any student other than dromases. But!
我可是听到了哦，老师悄悄向村长打听妖精的教育方式，还盛赞田地的那几位农夫干活非常认真，勤劳乖巧，比树庭的贤人都要强！原话是……

I happened to overhear! The professor quietly asked the chief about the fairies' education methods, and went on to praise those farmers in the fields, calling them hardworking, disciplined, and even better than the Sages of the Grove! His exact words were...
「树庭学者耗尽毕生心血得到的成果，都不及妖精随手播下的种子。」
"The life's work of the Grove's scholars doesn't even compare to a single seed casually sown by a fairy."
有什么问题吗？要论心思纯粹，没有人比得过这些妖精，未经泰坦信仰蒙蔽的眼睛，能看清的事物远超我们想象。
And what indeed is the problem with this? In terms of purity of heart, none can match these fairies. Their vision, untainted by Titan dogma, perceives things far beyond our comprehension.
要求村长多派些妖精去树庭给老师做义工，也是这个原因吗？
So... this was why you asked the chief to send more fairies to volunteer at the Grove?
不许欺负妖精，要照常给它们回报哦！好啦，小风堇的发言结束，下一个会是谁呢？
No taking advantage of the fairies! Make sure they're properly rewarded! Alright, that's Cinny's turn. Who's up next?
没人主动举手了吗？那*我们*要点名了哦。
No hands up? Then we are going to start calling out names!
如此反复逼问，反倒显得有些刻意了。
All this repeated questioning is making things rather exhausting.
我对玩乐并无兴趣，能称得上幸事的，唯有——
I find no joy in games or amusement. The only thing I consider a true blessing is...
果然，那刻夏老师还是对自己亲手栽培的作物念念不忘呀。
I knew it. Professor Anaxa can't help but be attached to the crops he grew all by himself.
我有个提议！要不，在老师的教学内容中新增一门课程吧，名字我都想好了，就叫作——论巨大作物与大地兽的共通之处。怎么样？
I have a suggestion! How about adding a new course to the professor's curriculum? I've even thought of a name: "Common Traits of Giant Crops and Dromases." How does that sound?
不必了。若是将那神奇作物带回树庭，怕不是真要坐实我「毒害」青年的恶名了。
That won't be necessary. Bringing those wondrous crops back to the Grove would only seal my reputation as the one who "corrupts youths."
不对哦，按照顺序，这次该轮到灰宝啦！
Not so fast! If we're sticking to the order of the list, it's Grayie's turn.
唔。本来该是这样，但小灰是店长，这个问题得留到最后再问！
Hmm... that's how it should be, but since Little Gray is the manager, this question should be saved for the end!
想分享的快乐…明明有很多，却不知道从哪说起。
There are so many joyful moments to share... we don't know where to begin.
毕竟*我们*之间根本就用不着分享！
After all, words aren't needed between the three of us!
但是不可以耍赖皮！*我们*开心的事，很简单！就是三个人一起，和大家无忧无虑地生活！
But no excuses! What makes us the happiest is simple: the three of us, living carefree with everyone else!
Also playing with the little fairies.
还有还有！一直都没找到机会说出口的——小小灰，谢谢你！
Oh, oh, and also! We never found the right moment to say this. But thank you, Little Gray!
这是什么？假期结束后的感想小作文？我说灰子，咱们之间还用得着来这套嘛？
What's this? An essay? "How I spent my summer vacation?" Come on, Gray Mystery. Do things really need to be so formal between us?
店开得再好，玩得再开心，也不会变成口袋里沉甸甸的金币，反而还要被那群小动物呼来喊去的，累得我尾巴上的毛都快掉光了……

Sure, the restaurant's running smoothly and it's fun, but it's not like I'm filling my pockets with gold. On top of that, I'm getting bossed around by those little critters so much that the fur on my tail has practically all fallen out.
嗐，千言万语，总结成一句话——白忙活！
Phew... If I had to sum it up in one line I'd say: Whole lotta work for nothing!
即便如此，赛飞儿阁下也没有拒绝店长的邀约呢。
Even so, Lady Cipher, you didn't turn down the manager's invitation, did you?
我、我糊涂啊！听到要开店就兴冲冲地跑过来，本以为能大赚一笔，谁知道…哎！
I—I wasn't thinking straight! The moment I heard there was going to be a restaurant, I rushed over all excited, thinking I'd make a fortune... Who knew...
你不是假扮了妖精评审员嘛？
Weren't you the one who posed as a fairy food critic?
那天，连我也被赛飞儿阁下的诡计骗过，慌忙尝了好多口菜品……
I have to admit, even I was fooled by your little scheme that day. I ended up tasting so many dishes...
噢！我记得！这不是实在没事情干，闲得慌嘛。
Oh, that's right! Okay, I was just bored out of my mind with nothing else to do.
妖精村子不和外面连通，小动物也掏不出什么值钱的东西，就算是那位诡计之神亲自到访，都得感慨自己学的专业不对口啊！
This fairy village is cut off from the outside, and those tiny creatures can't cough up anything worth much. Even the god of trickery would show up and complain that their skills are wasted here!
你不是如愿使唤了阿格莱雅嘛？
Didn't you get your wish to boss Aglaea around?
哈哈哈！对对！就这个，最好玩了！
Hahaha! Yes, yes! That was hands down the most fun!
没想到真有一天，那位高高在上的金织大小姐，也能受我使唤，实在太有意思了！
I never thought the day would come when the lofty Lady Goldweaver would take orders from me. It was just too enjoyable!
…还好阿格莱雅大人只当是玩笑，换作在奥赫玛，恐怕得攥紧金线了。
...Thankfully, Lady Aglaea treated it as good fun. If we were in Okhema, we'd be clutching the golden threads for dear life.
…这么想来，我还真做了不少有意思的事啊。
...Looking back, I guess I really did have my share of interesting moments.
依我看，赛飞儿阁下玩得很开心。
Seems to me like Lady Cipher had plenty of fun.
那你呢，蜗居公主？在餐馆的经营团队之外，你享受到乐趣了吗？
And what about you, Princess Homebody? Aside from being part of the restaurant team, did you have fun?
我的话…能品尝到万敌阁下的拿手菜，和那刻夏老师探讨作物的栽培技巧……
For me... having the chance to savor Lord Mydei's specialties, and exchanging thoughts on crop cultivation with Professor Anaxa...
以及，亲手为{NICKNAME}阁下颁发奖章。
As well as personally awarding {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} a medal.
点点滴滴，都值得铭记在心。
All these small moments are treasures to be remembered.
但赛飞儿阁下，有件事…我仍旧想不明白。你明知妖精的钱币与外界并不流通，为何还要执意取走一枚呢？
There's just one thing that I still can't figure out, Lady Cipher. You know fairy coins hold no value outside the fairy world, so why did you insist on taking one?
真想知道？其实也没那么复杂。
Really wanna know? It's actually not that complicated.
就是这儿的生活太清闲了，没有使命，也没有忧患，教人好不适应，就像做梦一样。
Life here is just too peaceful... no duties, no worries. It feels so strange, almost like a dream.
但梦总会结束的。要是不带着点特别的标记，出去以后……
But dreams always come to an end. And if I leave without a special memento...
我又该怎么分辨，自己是不是还在梦里呢？
Then how will I know... if I'm still dreaming or not?
不必担心，赛飞儿阁下。我们…会编织出新的美梦的。
Don't worry, Lady Cipher. We... will weave new dreams together.
若是将密林中的妖精居所比作深海，此番盛宴便是那水面洒落的光亮。
If the fairies' home hidden in the thick woods is a deep ocean, then this feast is the glimmering light upon its surface.
驱散长久的黑暗，也为沉积在厚重泥沙堆里的鱼儿们带来希望。
It scatters the darkness that has lingered for so long and brings hope to the fish lying hidden beneath heavy layers of silt.
Hold on... why are you suddenly composing poetry?
呵。不过是一朵浪花的余音罢了，小灰鱼儿无须太过记挂。
Heh. It's nothing but the echo of a passing wave, Little Gray Fry. No need to think too much about it.
宴会的意义就是请客吃饭。
A feast is all about treating your guests to good food.
呵。若是能助你尽情享受这片刻沉醉，作如此定性又有何妨呢？
Ha... If that philosophy helps you indulge in a moment of delight, so be it.
哦？难得见剑旗爵如此有雅兴，看来这次谋划之外的行军，让你颇有感触啊？
Oh? It's unusual to see such poetic spirit from the Dux Gladiorum. Seems this unplanned venture left quite the impression on you, didn't it?
凯撒言笑了。作为部属，我理应坦诚回答店长的疑问。
You jest, Imperator, but as a subordinate it's my place to respond truthfully to the manager's question.
贵为掌管宴会的「海洋」半神，剑旗爵的开场白未免过分沉重。
As the Ocean demigod who presides over feasts, Dux Gladiorum, opening with such weighty words does seem a touch too serious.
依我看，这盛宴倒更像是团纠缠不清的纺纱，我们各执金线的一端，最终交织于此。
The way I see it, this grand feast is more like a tangled ball of yarn, each of us grasping a golden thread, and all of them converging and intertwining here.
但若继续沉湎过往，就太浪费这丰盛的晚宴了。
But if we keep clinging to the past, we'll miss the chance to savor this magnificent feast.
至于发问，我在初次结识时便已回答过——凯撒的高位既是荣耀，亦是禁锢；君王若是入席，只会让臣民难得酣畅。
I gave my answer the moment we first met. The title of Imperator is as much an honor as it is a chain. If a ruler sits among her people, her subjects will never truly relax.
因此，能短暂离开那王座，与诸位爱臣无拘束地畅谈言欢，便是我此行最大的收获。
So, to leave the throne for a time and talk, laugh, and share warmth with everyone without formality... That alone has made this journey worthwhile.
倒确实许久，没有见凯撒笑得如此开怀了。
It's true... it has been a long time since I've seen the Imperator smile so genuinely.
呵。剑旗爵，店长的任务就交由你去完成了。
Heh. Dux Gladiorum, I'll leave the manager's task in your hands.
You should smile more, too, Hysilens.
关于店长的提问，我要说，我…很庆幸。
To answer the store manager's question... I have to say I feel truly fortunate.
若非此次奇遇，恐怕我再难有机会拾起针线，以一介改衣师的身份与各位攀谈。「浪漫」的神权，总算是适得其所了。

Were it not for this strange twist of fate, I doubt I would've ever had the chance to pick up the needle and thread again, and chat with you all as a simple dressmaster. The divine authority of Romance has finally been put to fitting use.
是啊。正如金织爵所言，我们途经数不清的年月，各执金线一端，最终交织于此。
Yes... just as Dux Goldweaver said, we've each traveled through countless years, grasping a golden thread, and in the end, all our threads are intertwining here.
举杯吧。敬店长，与来之不易的重逢——
Raise your glass. To the manager, and to the rare gift of reunion.
敬店长，与循环往复的洋流——
To the manager, and to the endless, flowing tides...
To... this precious moment of reunion...
迷！都准备好啦，宴会可以开始啦！
Mem! We're all ready. Let the feast begin!
呵呵。那就请妖精餐馆的店长，向整个迷境宣布这一消息吧！
Heh... well then... the fairy restaurant's manager has something to say.
声音得足够大，要让所有客人都能听见哦。
Be loud and clear. All the guests need to hear you!
I hereby declare — the feast has officially begun!
Mem! The feast has started! Everyone, dig in!
All Fairies of the Membrance Maze
怎么了？充满心事的样子。明明是宴会的高潮，却一个人走到安静的角落……
What's wrong? It's the best part of the feast, and yet here you are, standing alone in a quiet corner...
莫非，是因为快乐的时光临近结束，会让你觉得有些感伤？
Could it be... the thought of these joyful moments coming to an end has made you a little wistful?
也许我们在想同一件事。
Perhaps you and I are thinking the same thing.
是呀，所以我们才会在这里相遇。
That's right. It's why fate brought us together here.
I just like being on my own.
那，可以待在你身边吗？我也喜欢独处，就这样静静的，应该不会打扰你？
So... would it be alright if I stayed with you? I also like peaceful moments to myself... I won't disturb you.
What did the village chief want with you?
代替你去接受了村长的感谢。还记得吗？它视力不好，把我们俩认错啦。
I went and accepted the chief's thanks on your behalf. Remember? With their poor eyesight, they mistook me for you!
从这里望去，能把整场宴会尽收眼底呢。
From here, you can take in the entire feast at once.
也许不想加入其中，只是害怕愉快的时光转瞬即逝，不知不觉就会戛然而止。
Maybe it's not that you don't want to be part of it, but that you're afraid the good times will vanish before you know it, ending all too soon.
像这样躲在一旁，远远地看着，时间反而会慢下来，甚至停下来。
When you stand quietly at a distance like this and just watch, time seems to slow... Sometimes it feels like it stops altogether.
嘻，我想到了…「木盆里堆满了蔬菜，到处都是笑声。大家围成大大的圈，唱呀跳呀，仿佛这一刻永远不会结束。」

Hehe... I've just thought of an ending: "Wooden tubs stacked high with fresh vegetables, laughter all around. Everyone held hands in a big circle, singing and dancing, like this moment would never end."
就这样为故事收尾，应该还不错吧？
Bringing the story to a close like this... I'd say it's not bad, wouldn't you?
Is the story coming to an end?
该结束啦。毕竟宴会过后，妖精们就该回去睡觉了。它们可都是早睡早起的好宝宝。
It's a good time to end it~ After all, once the feast is over, the fairies need to go to bed. They're all such well-behaved little early birds.
I wish it didn't have to end.
不能继续啦，否则，徕啦迷的肚皮要比黎明机器更大了。小妖精不消化可怎么办呀？
We really can't keep going... or Relimem's belly will outgrow the Dawn Device! What will we do if the little fairies end up with bellyaches?
在漫长的等待过后，与世隔绝的迷境终于迎来了客人。现在，妖精们有比我还高的作物、吃不完的美食、还有人类伙伴们……
At long last, after ages of waiting, Membrance Maze has guests again. The fairies now have towering crops, more food than they can finish, and human companions...
没有什么比这一幕更值得被铭记，不是吗？更何况，是我们共同见证了它。
There's nothing more worth remembering than this moment, is there? And best of all... we witnessed it together.
就像飘落在湖面的思绪，荡起阵阵涟漪，回过神来，只留下一张现实的脸庞。
It's just like a drifting thought landing on a calm lake, stirring up gentle ripples... and when you snap out of your daze, there's only reality, staring back at you.
但我相信，在每一个随涟漪散去的故事里，都有着同样幸福的守候。
Yet I'm certain that within every story carried away by the ripples, the same joyful anticipation remains.
而在那一成不变的守候中，一定会有奇迹发生……
And in that constant anticipation, a miracle is sure to happen...
就像最后，我们等来了你呀♪
Just like how after all that waiting, you finally arrived♪
<size=28>信使们还在为甜饼的烹饪方法而争论，悬锋的主厨笑着给出认可。\n无论何时，大家共同制作的菜品才最为美味。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>

最盛大的宴会正式开场。\n\n妖精们大快朵颐，所有人都沉浸在热烈的氛围中……
The grandest feast officially begins.\n\nThe fairies feast to their heart's content as everyone is immersed in the festive atmosphere...
宴会仍在继续。你悄悄地离开人群，从远处望着这一切……
The party continues. You quietly slip away from the crowd, watching everything from afar...
恭喜贵餐馆顺利通过评审，收录进迷其林美食名单中。
Congratulations. Your restaurant has officially passed the review and is now featured in The Memchelin Gourmet Guide.
尽管菜品种类有些单调，白厄阁下制作的沙拉却意外地相当美味呢。
While the dish selection may be a bit simple, Lord Phainon's salad turned out surprisingly tasty.
想了解迷其林美食评审…
I want to know about the Memchelin Food Review...
具体情况，我也不是很清楚。迷境似乎很早便有举办美食评选的传统，获得认可的菜品和店铺会收录进那本指南中。
Well. I'm not totally sure, either. From what I hear, the Maze has held food selections since long ago. Any dish or restaurant that wins recognition gets listed in the guide.
但妖精们并不懂得烹饪，在各位的餐馆开张前，收录的菜品其实寥寥无几。
But back then, fairies didn't know how to cook. Before your restaurants opened, there were hardly any dishes in the book at all.
都是些譬如「生拌刺刺果」、「腌渍蜜蜜花」之类极为简单的食物…妖精虽然热爱美食，花了很多心思在料理研究上，实则连最基本的烹饪方式都不会呢。

Just a few super simple things, like Raw Quillorb Salad or Pickled Honey Blossom... They adore good food and put a lot of heart into studying it, but when it comes to actual cooking, they can't grasp even the basics.
How did you become a culinary judge?
我…正如评审会上所说，我原本应聘了餐馆的厨师，却未能通过考核，好在对美食品鉴还有些心得，便接受邀请，成为了评审嘉宾。
I... well, like I said at the review, I originally applied to be a chef, but I failed the cooking test. Luckily, I've still got a decent palate. So they invited me to join as a guest judge instead.
没能实现主厨梦想虽有些遗憾，但能成为迷其林评审员，也算是紧密相关了吧。
It's a bit of a shame, not realizing my dream of becoming a chef. But I guess being a Memchelin judge still counts as staying close to the craft.
谢谢，我们会继续努力的！
Thank you! We'll keep doing our best!
嗯。我也很期待在后续的美食评审会上，品尝各位准备的菜品。
I'll be looking forward to tasting your dishes in future reviews too.
星级提升固然值得庆祝，但后续需处理的事务也会增加。机遇同样是考验。
Increasing our star rank is worth celebrating, sure, but our responsibilities will also increase. Opportunity is also a test.
店长若是空闲，不妨提前做好规划。
If you've got time, best start planning ahead.
餐馆获得迷其林认证后，来用餐的顾客也会变多。得着手研发些新菜品了。
With the "Memchelin" seal of approval, we'll see more customers flowing in. Time to whip up some new dishes.
…试试在沙拉里加入煎肉排怎么样？
...How about pan-seared steak in a salad?
第一次迷其林美食评审，顺利通过！小灰做得很棒哦，要表扬。
We passed our first Memchelin Food Review! Little Gray, you did awesome, seriously! Praise time~
*我们*也会想办法，努力帮上更多忙的！
We'll try our best too, and help out even more!
「甜蜜蜜节」就要结束啦。究竟谁做的菜更甜，还是没能得出结论呢。
The Sweetie Festival is almost over. And we still haven't figured out whose dish was the sweetest.
But Little Cas loved every bite!
缇宁会把菜谱都记录下来，留给其余厨师去研究。
Trinnon will make sure to record all the recipes, and leave them for other chefs to study.
I've even thought of the perfect title for the book.
既然是缇宝、缇宁和缇安提出的难题，干脆就叫做「三缇问题」吧！
Since it was Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne who proposed the challenge, why not call it "The TTT Conundrum?"
小灰！*我们*完成了布置的任务，把「甜蜜蜜节」办得很出色！
Little Gray! We did it! We nailed the mission and made the Sweetie Festival a big success!
考试，通过了。小妖精，也很喜欢！
Test passed. The fairies are very pleased!
*我们*很期待，下个主题活动会是什么呢？
We can't wait to see what the next theme event will be!
三位老师准备的菜品都很优秀，通过美食评审也是理所应当。
All three teachers prepared excellent dishes. It's only natural that your restaurant passed the food review.
餐馆星级提升，在迷境的关注度也将大幅增加，期待各位后续能拿出更令人惊喜的菜品。
Now that the restaurant's rating has gone up, its popularity in the Maze is bound to skyrocket. I look forward to seeing what delicious surprises you all come up with next.
老大，你可算出现了！差点…迷境差点就要被那些菜淹没了迷！
Boss, finally! We almost... almost got buried in an avalanche of food, mem!
无须担心。店长和两位主厨自然会有分寸。
No need to panic. The manager and two chefs know what they're doing.
没想到你就是「第五天王」！
嗯…似乎确有这个称呼。但我所做的，无非是帮妖精们解决了些积攒的果物。
Hmm... That title does ring a bell. All I did was help the fairies clear their backlog of fruits. Nothing more than that.
不是普通的刺刺果！而是究极盐味爆酸蜜渍椒椒果迷！
Not just a Quillorb or two, either! It was the Ultimate Salted Sour-Honey Chili Fruit, mem!
顺便告诉你，老大的美食理念就是：食物，总会找到自己的出路迷！
By the way, Boss's gourmet philosophy is: "Food will always find a way."
There's always someone who'll like it, huh?
该写进剑旗爵的名言里了。
That one's worthy of being added to Dux Gladiorum's collection of quotes.
纠正下，我没有说过这句话。原话应该是：深海能包容所有事物。
Correction, I never said that. What I actually said was: "The deep sea accepts all goods."
食物…事物…在我们看来根本没区别迷！
Food... Goods... honestly, we don't see the difference, mem!
好在海瑟音阁下解决了危机，否则我和另外两位评审员恐怕真要被困在此处了。
Good thing Lady Hysilens stepped in and resolved the crisis. Otherwise, the other two judges and I might still be trapped in there.
希望两位主厨注意，竞赛不要再波及到无辜的旁人了……
I hope both chefs will be more mindful next time. Try not to drag innocent bystanders into your little competitions...
哈哈。我倒是许久没有这么尽情地做过菜了，烹饪还是要有对手才有意思啊！
Haha. It's been ages since I cooked with this much passion. Cooking's way more fun when there's a worthy rival!
哼。别忘了，我们是餐馆主厨，要迎合顾客的口味。
Hmph. Don't forget, we're the chefs. We cook for the guests, not for ourselves.
不用担心，我记得。好了，角斗结束，该帮忙去收拾空盘子了。
No worries. I haven't forgotten. Well then, duel's over. Let's clean up those empty plates.
…看不出来，海瑟音小姐原来胃口这么大啊。
...Who would've thought Lady Hysilens had such an appetite?
经营餐馆如同治理城邦，须思虑周全后再行事。店长做好开店的准备了么？
Running a restaurant is no different from governing a city-state. Every move must be cautiously considered. Manager, are you ready to open for business?
想和你聊聊团队里的员工。
I want to talk about the team.
呵。此处能汇聚如此多位英雄，共同为经营之事出谋献策，我很满意。
Heh. Honestly, I'm quite pleased to have gathered so many capable heroes, all lending their talents to this venture.
What would you like to discuss?
「餐馆主管」一职目前归在我名下。此外，金织爵也会做些辅助工作。
The role of the Restaurant Supervisor currently falls under my purview. Dux Goldweaver assists me from time to time as well.
好在团队中的各位都极为尽职，无须我多费心神。我也得以将精力集中在经营发展之事上，思虑未来的规划。
Thankfully, everyone on the team is dedicated and capable. It spares me from having to micromanage, allowing me to focus on business development and long-term growth.
呵。听起来似乎清闲，每日要面对的却是极为冗杂的数据报表，与无尽的客诉，实在是恼人啊。
Sounds idle, doesn't it? In reality, it's all endless stacks of data reports, and a never-ending flood of customer complaints. Utterly annoying.
听说这位主厨自小便与妖精相识，想必也极为了解此地顾客的口味吧。
I heard this chef's been close with the fairies since childhood. I assume that means he has a strong grasp of the local clientele's tastes.
只是…我也不理解，为何他会如此钟情沙拉呢？
Still... I don't understand why he's so obsessed with salads.
身为悬锋王储，厨艺却如此精湛，传出去想必许多人也不会信吧。
The crown prince of Kremnos, yet blessed with such remarkable culinary talent. Most people wouldn't believe it if you told them.
如今餐馆有两位主厨坐镇，倒是免去了菜品方面的担忧。但…呵，争斗之事怕是难以避免了。
Now that we've got two chefs holding the fort, there's no longer any need to worry about menu variety. Though... heh, I suppose some conflict is inevitable.
命运爵步履轻快，擅长传递联结之事，这份职务由她们担任再合适不过。
Dux Fatorum move with light feet and excel in delivering items and connecting people, so they are perfectly suited for this role.
仅有的忧虑，便是她们与此处的妖精过从甚密，难以严厉管控手下员工。不过，这或许也是优势。

My only concern is their overly close relationship with the local fairies, which makes it difficult for them to impose strict discipline on the delivery crew. Still, that might not be a flaw but rather an asset.
还有…咳，刻意提及凯撒的身高乃是僭越，在此地我就不多追究了。
Oh, and... ahem. Openly commenting on the Imperator's height is a breach of etiquette. I'll let it slide this time.
我与这两位树庭学者并不熟识，但从农田情况来看，才能无疑极为出色。
I'm not particularly familiar with the two Grove scholars, but judging by the state of the farmland, their talents are beyond question.
其中某位乖张的行事风格，我也略有耳闻。但有何妨？只要能为餐馆所用，保证农作物的丰收便已足够。
I've heard whispers about one of them having a rather eccentric disposition, but does it matter? So long as they serve the restaurant well and ensure a bountiful harvest, that's all we need.
No trouble at all. I'll be here.
近期客流量有显著提升，以甜食为主题的决议很正确。只是，经营压力增加，命运爵要忙的事就很多了。
Customer numbers have been on a sugar high lately, proving our sweet-themed strategy was exactly the right flavor. Of course, now Dux Fatorum has to juggle many more items on their daily menu.
「主厨角斗」引来了许多关注，那位白发的主厨也在认真磨砺厨艺。看来，这将会是场激烈的争锋。
The "Chef Showdown" has really stirred the pot of public interest, and that white-haired chef has been cooking up a storm in practice. Looks like we're in for quite the culinary battle.
悬锋主厨看似自信满满，手头的操练却从未放松。究竟谁胜谁负，连我都不禁有些好奇了。
Despite the Kremnoan Chef's obvious confidence, he never turns down the heat on his training. I must admit, even I'm hungry to see who will win.
如此神奇的巨型果实，我也是初次见到。那位学者似乎对自己的成果很满意，正在加紧培育新品种。只希望别再闹出那么大的动静了。
I've never seen such extraordinary giant fruits before. The scholar appears satisfied with the current results and is working faster on new varieties. Hopefully without another fruitful disaster.
促销确实是迅速消耗库存的办法，但该如何招徕更多顾客，就得看捷足爵的本事了。
Promotions may help burn through stock fast, but how do we attract more customers? That is up to Dux Celeripes' talent.
想和你复盘餐馆办的活动。
I'd like to review our restaurant event with you.
呵，不得不说，举办经营活动确实是步好棋，既能吸引客流，也足以展现各位负责人的才能。店长的决策相当出色。
Heh. I'll admit, launching a restaurant event is indeed a good move. It brings in traffic and gives each department head a chance to shine. Smart decision, manager.
What exactly do you want to talk about?
命运爵的身高还不及厨房那口大锅，却深谙待客之道，倒是令人赞叹。
Dux Fatorum can barely reach the top of the kitchen pot, yet she's a natural at hospitality. Truly impressive.
餐馆经营本就众口难调，选择甜食作为最初的主题无疑很明智，符合食材储备状况，也能最大限度地满足顾客要求。

Running a restaurant means you can't please everyone, so choosing sweets as the first theme is definitely a smart call. It works perfectly with our current ingredient stock while delivering maximum customer satisfaction.
至于最甜的菜…呵，想来她们心中其实早有答案。
As for the sweetest dish... Heh, I'm pretty sure they already know the answer in their hearts.
哈哈哈，谁能想到两位主厨间的争斗，竟引发了整个妖精居所的轰动。
Hahaha! Who'd have thought a duel between our two chefs would stir up such a commotion in the fairies' domain?
好在剑旗爵及时出现，这才避免了动乱扩大。两位主厨的技艺固然高超，想要满足「海洋」半神的胃口又谈何容易，我是从未见过。

Good thing Dux Gladiorum showed up just in time to stop things from spiraling further. The two chefs' skills are truly top-tier, no doubt. But pleasing the demigod of Ocean is no easy feat. At least, I've never seen it done myself.
但餐馆藉此机会打响了在迷境的知名度，确是好事。
Still, the restaurant made quite a splash in the Maze. That's worth celebrating.
没想到那位学者真能培育出如此巨大的作物，后厨再不用为食材发愁了。
Who would've thought that scholar could actually grow crops that massive? The kitchen won't have to worry about running out of ingredients anytime soon.
至于堆积浪费…想消耗掉这些蔬菜多的是办法，总比无米之炊要好。
As for the surplus... plenty of ways to put it to use. Better that than starving with empty pots.
性价比永远是最终的追求，人性本来如此，妖精自然也不例外。
Value for money is always the ultimate pursuit. It's human nature, and fairies are no exception.
捷足爵的眼光很准，知道顾客在乎什么。同时，呵…取走那枚金币说明，她也清楚自己真正在乎的是什么。
Dux Celeripes sure has an eye for what customers really want. And... heh, by pocketing that coin, she showed she knows exactly what she values too.
餐馆的经营事务繁忙，有劳店长费心了。
Managing a restaurant is no easy feat. You have my thanks, Manager.
What have you been working on lately?
受凯撒所托，我在迷境内布设了金线。往后，各位可自由使用万帷网了。
At the Imperator's request, I've been setting up golden threads across the Maze. You'll now be able to access the World Wound Web freely.
说来奇怪，此处妖精数量繁多，金线却没有感受到丝毫颤动，实在有些反常。
Strange... despite the dense fairy population here, the golden threads haven't picked up a single tremor. Quite odd.
不过…呵，店长似乎知晓其中的缘由，我也便不多追究了。
But... heh, I suspect you already know why that is. So I won't pry.
那是自然。我的剑技便是由剑旗爵所授，所有黄金裔中，唯有她最为熟悉宴会之事。餐馆管理方面，有不少知识需要向她请教。

Naturally. My swordsmanship was taught to me by none other than Dux Gladiorum herself. Among all the Chrysos Heirs, she's by far the most versed in hosting banquets. When it comes to running a restaurant, there's much I still need to learn from her.
呵…说起来，还未去问她中意的新衣款式呢。
Heh... come to think of it, I still haven't asked which dress style she prefers lately.
万帷网还需专人维护，店长若有事，可随时来此处寻我。
The World Wound Web still needs ongoing maintenance anyway. If anything comes up, you know where to find me.
不会挥剑的鉴宝师不是好主厨！哈哈，有段时间没做菜了，没想到重新上手意外地轻松。
A treasure appraiser who can't swing a sword is no real chef! Haha, it's been a while since I last cooked, but getting back into it was surprisingly easy.
一切顺利。农田送来的食材很充足，餐馆的主推菜品也相当受顾客欢迎，就是人手有点不够，每天都忙得手忙脚乱的。

Things are going smoothly. The farmland's supplying plenty of ingredients, and our signature dishes are a big hit with the customers. We're just a bit short on hands... the kitchen's absolute chaos every day.
等厨师妖精熟悉手头的工作后，情况会有所改善吧，现在就只能靠我先顶着了。
Once the fairy chef gets more used to the workflow, it should ease up. For now, I'll just have to shoulder the load.
不过，这就是主厨的职责啊。我还挺乐在其中的。
But hey, that's what being a head chef is all about. I'm honestly enjoying it.
没问题！店长可以随时来察看厨房的情况。
Sure thing! You're always welcome to swing by the kitchen anytime, Manager.
瞧瞧，比拳头还大的土黄豆，我还是第一次见。你那边的收获如何？
Look here, soybeans bigger than my fist... Never seen anything like it before. How's the harvest going on your end?
Ever seen a radish the size of a clay pot?
…记下来。经过重新栽培，实验组的单位产量相较对照组，增加了约三成。
...Note this down. After replanting, the experimental batch yielded approximately <unbreak>30%</unbreak> more than the control group.
是受到炼金药的影响吗，还是纯粹的偶然现象呢？
Could it be due to the alchemical solution? Or perhaps just a fluke?
现在还不清楚。按我测定的土壤数据，多设置几组实验，这次注意控制光照变量。
Too early to tell. Based on my soil data, we should run a few more trials, this time with better control over light exposure.
两位农林专家，好认真啊！
You two agricultural specialists are taking this really seriously!
呀，是灰宝！妖精们这么喜欢美食，我们当然要拿出全部本事来啦。
Ah, hey there, Grayie! Fairies love good food, so of course we're going all out.
只是做些基础研究罢了。风堇，刚才说的都记好了么？
This is just basic research. Hyacine, did you note down everything I just said?
记好啦。另外，老师刚才还说过：「自己种的胡萝卜，味道果然很不错啊！」…这句话也要记吗？
Yup, all recorded. Oh, and you also said, "Carrots I grow myself really do taste better!" Should I write that down too?
I better leave you alone then...
两位农林专家还在讨论着诸如「显性与隐性」、「分离与融合」之类的学术词汇，暂时别去打扰了吧。
The two agricultural experts are still deep in conversation, tossing around academic terms like "dominant vs. recessive" and "segregation and recombination." Best not interrupt for now.
缇宝，在思考加快上菜速度的方法~
Tribbie's thinking of ways to speed up food delivery~
缇宁，可以改造*我们*的小火箭。
服务员的培训还顺利吗？
很顺利哦，小灰不用担心。小妖精们的动作很快，对工作也很有热情！
All smooth sailing, no worries, Little Gray! The fairies work at lightning speed, and they're super motivated to boot!
The only problem is that they keep sneaking bites of the food.
缇宁提醒过好几次，但收效甚微。
Trinnon's warned them several times, but it hasn't really helped much.
*我们*知道该怎么做，下次，就让小凯撒来当监督，绝对能管住小妖精们！
We know what to do! Next time, we'll ask the little Imperator to be the supervisor. She'll definitely keep little fairies in line!
小灰去忙自己的事情吧，*我们*会努力的！
Go handle your business, Little Gray! We'll do our best!
我不习惯做饭的时候有人看着。什么事？
I'm not used to cooking with someone watching. What is it?
I just want to see you cook.
烹饪与作战类似，需要持久的恒心与一击必杀的决断。
Cooking, like combat, demands both relentless persistence and decisive verdict.
若是求快，容易过了火候。但反复炖煮也会破坏菜品的口感。
Rush it, and you'll overcook. But simmer too long, and the texture falls apart.
说再多也没用，本事是练出来的。这口锅就留在这里，想试的时候随便用。
Words mean little, for skill comes from practice. I'll leave this pot here. Use it whenever you feel like trying your hand.
就是检查下你们的工作。
Just checking in on your work.
嘿，灰子，闲着没事，到处视察工作呢？
Hey there, Gray Mystery! Making the rounds, huh?
别那么卷嘛，这儿的日子可轻松了，喝喝茶，吹吹风，享受难得的假期，多好呀。
Don't overdo it. Life's easy here. Sip some tea, feel the breeze, and enjoy the rare vacation. Isn't it awesome?
退休后过上慢生活，这可是我的人生理想，真心的，不骗你。
It is! This is my dream for retirement, slow and peaceful. I swear I'm not lying.
哎，和那群小动物相处久了，感觉自己的整个节奏都慢了下来，手脚没那么利索了，连说话都染上了「迷」的口癖。
Well, spending time with all those little critters... I think they're slowing me down! My reflexes aren't what they used to be, and I've even picked up their little "mem" speech quirk.
用进废退，用进废退啊！你说，以后我还能重拾起老本行吗？…迷？
Use it or lose it, huh? Think I'll ever get back into my old groove... Mem?
真没意思。行吧，知道你是店长，有好多事情要忙。都忙，忙点好啊！
Boring! But fine, fine. I get it. You're the manager. You've got lots on your plate. Busy's good!
小灰鱼儿有空在此逡巡，不如多花些时间，与同伴享受难得的欢宴时光。
Little Gray Fry, if you have time to wander around, you should spend more of it enjoying this rare celebration with your companions.
凯撒似乎很享受这场宴会，作为剑旗，我只需站在暗处，随时待命即可。
The Imperator seems to be enjoying the feast quite a bit. As the Gladius, it is my duty to remain in the shadows and stay always ready.
并且…餐馆好似熙攘的浅滩，于我而言有些喧嚣了。
Besides... the restaurant feels like a bustling shallows, leaving my senses stranded in its noise.
你和阿格莱雅很熟悉吧？
You and Aglaea are close, right?
我与金织爵都曾随凯撒作战，彼此早已熟识。初到妖精居所时，她还戏称要为我缝制适合此次盛宴的华服…不，或许她是真有打算吧。

Dux Goldweaver and I fought alongside the Imperator. We go way back. When I first arrived in the fairies' domain, she even joked about making me a fancy outfit suitable for this feast... Actually, she might not have been joking.
自从接过「浪漫」的神权后，倒是许久未见她露出如此轻快的神情了。
Ever since she took up the divine authority of "Romance," I haven't seen her look so relaxed in a long, long time.
洋流终将汇聚，小灰鱼儿不必太过介怀。
Currents always converge in the end. Don't let it weigh on you, Little Gray Fry.
听着人家讲的故事，就这么睡过去了。瞧你迷糊的表情，是不是也做了个甜甜的梦呢？
You dozed off while listening to the story. Seeing how dazed you are, am I right to presume you had a sweet dream, too?
I saw so many familiar faces...
和伙伴们共同度过的时光确实很愉快，所以，就把这份回忆牢牢记在心间吧。
The times spent with companions are indeed truly delightful, so keep these memories close to your heart.
Had some delicious food in my dream...
是呀。木盆堆满了蔬菜，桌上到处都是好吃的菜品，现在仿佛都还能闻到香气呢。
Did you, now? The wooden basins were filled with vegetables, and delicious dishes covered every inch of the table. I can almost still smell that mouthwatering aroma.
和小妖精们玩得很开心…
I had a blast with the fairies...
我就知道，你肯定会受小妖精欢迎。它们也期盼着认识新朋友，一起开心地玩呀。
I knew you'd be popular with the little fairies. They've been looking forward to making new friends and having fun together.
所以…这一切都只是故事吗？
So... was this all just a story?
故事就是这样，有着无限的可能性，总是出乎意料，却也令人着迷。
That's the beauty of stories. They hold endless possibilities, always surprising, yet utterly captivating.
好啦，既然故事的发生地是在迷路迷境，还有兴致的话，不妨再去看看吧。
Alright then. Since this story takes place in the Membrance Maze, why not go check it out if you're still interested?
说不定，会有什么意想不到的事呢？
Who knows? Something unexpected might happen!
呵呵，店长总算回来了。餐馆再不开门的话，妖精们可都要饿坏了哪。
Heh, the manager's finally back. The fairies would've starved if we kept the restaurant closed any longer.
呵，店长，我在此等候你许久了。餐馆工作不容怠慢，要认真对待每次经营迷。
Heh, manager, I've been waiting here for you for quite a while. Restaurant work isn't something to slack off on. You've got to take every business day seriously, mem.
Why are you all calling me "manager"?
店长在说什么，外面的世界再怎么好玩，也别忘了妖精们还在这里等你回来迷！
What are you saying, manager? No matter how fun the outside world is, don't forget that we fairies are still here waiting for you to come back, mem!
等你回来，给我们做好多好吃的迷！
We'll wait for you to come back and make us lots of yummy food, mem!
呵。经营餐馆是迷路迷境的大事，需要认真对待。店长做好开店的准备了迷？
Heh. Running a restaurant is a big deal in the Membrance Maze. We need to take it seriously. Are you ready to open for business, mem?
迷…店长难道忘了吗，虽然餐馆很早就建好了，但妖精根本不知道怎么用……
Uh... Manager, did you forget? Even though the restaurant was built a long time ago, the fairies had no idea how to use it...
是你突然出现在迷路迷境，帮我们复兴了荒废的餐馆迷！
But you suddenly appeared in the Membrance Maze and helped us revive the abandoned restaurant, mem!
还教会了妖精种地和做饭的方法，让我们尝到了好多美食！大家都很感谢你！
You even taught the fairies how to farm and cook, letting us taste so many delicious food! You have no idea how grateful we are to you!
I had no idea I was this awesome...
迷！店长就是很厉害，是迷路迷境的贵客。
Mem! You're incredible, a VIP of the Membrance Maze.
你有见过我的伙伴们吗？
Have you seen my friends around?
…迷？店长的伙伴？不太清楚，我只见过小涟，她也帮了不少忙。
...Mem? Your friends? Not sure. I've only met Reney. She's been quite helpful, too.
好像忘了什么事…但不重要！总之，店长想开店的时候，就随时找我迷！
Feels like I forgot something... but whatever! Just hit me up whenever you wanna open up for business, mem!
能不能别学别人说话了…
Can you maybe stop copying how others talk...
迷！可是，我觉得这样的说话方式好威风，好有气势，好多妖精都会听我的。
Mem! But I think this way of talking makes me sound so cool and powerful. All the other fairies will totally listen to me.
至于是从哪学来的，我也记不清了迷…或许，是在某个梦里？
As for where I learned it from, I can't quite remember... Maybe in some dream?
不重要！总之，店长想开店的时候，就随时找我迷！
Doesn't matter! Anyway, hit me up whenever you want to open up shop, mem!
无妨。我会一直在这里等店长迷！
No worries. I'll wait right here for you, mem!
对不起，「青春岁月」，我们的复仇之路到此为止了。「魔古拉帮」实在是太强了。
I'm sorry, Golden Youth, but this is where our path of vengeance ends. The Mogura Gang is just too powerful.
…不死途大哥，我知道你已经尽力了。呜呜呜，难道我的青春，注定要留下遗憾了吗？
...Mr. Ashveil, I know you've done your best. *sobs* Is my youth destined to leave me regrets?
糟糕，是{NICKNAME}！「青春岁月」快起来，咱不能给二相乐园丢人。
Oh cripes, it's {NICKNAME}! Get it together, Golden Youth. We can't bring shame to Planarcadia!
站住！这可不能装作没有看见啊。
Hold it right there! You can't just pretend you didn't see that.
我们俩…只是在这里推杯换盏时不小心滑倒了而已。
We just... accidentally slipped while having a few drinks, that's all.
没错！绝对不是在残酷的帮派战争中落败了！如果想看笑话的话，请你另寻他处吧！
That's right! We absolutely did NOT get our butts kicked in a brutal gang war! If you're here to laugh at us, go somewhere else!
可恶，到底还是让你给发现了。「青春岁月」，不必再逞强了，男儿也有低头的时候。
Darn it, you caught on after all. Golden Youth, no need to keep up the tough act. Everyone has to bow their head sometimes.
I wasn't actually going to laugh...
哼，想笑就笑吧，只是…我希望你不是来可怜我们的，而是助我们一臂之力的。
Hmph, laugh if you want... I just hope you're not here to pity us, but to lend us a helping hand.
明白，我也不再逞强了。我需要追求纯粹的强大为我的兄弟们争一口气！
I understand. I won't push myself too hard anymore. I need to pursue true power and earn respect for my brothers!
{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，这是我一生一次的请求，请你务必接受！事成之后，让我当牛做马也在所不辞，唯独这件事…唯独…这件事……

{F#Boss Lady}{M#Boss} {NICKNAME}, this is the only request of my life. Please, you must accept it! When it's done, I'll be your loyal servant. I'll do anything to serve you... but this... this one thing...
I can't rest... in... peace... ugh...
…可恶的「魔古拉帮」！{NICKNAME}，你一定得替「青春岁月」报仇啊。
...Curse that Mogura Gang! {NICKNAME}, you must avenge the Golden Youth!
有没有谁能帮我解释一下呢？
Can someone explain what's going on here?
Golden Youth, are you done already?
它只是没吃饭饿晕过去了而已。别担心，一会指定能醒过来。
They just passed out from hunger, that's all. Don't worry, they'll definitely come around soon.
我好像有一种被碰瓷的感觉？
Why do I feel like I'm being set up here?
不，这绝不是街头无赖的伎俩。
No, this is definitely not some cheap street trick.
这是高傲的男儿将青春回忆托付给了你。
This proud man has entrusted his youthful memories to you.
这位「青春岁月」小朋友，是人们对青春年华的追忆凝结而成的小小尘灵——理想主义、幼稚、且激情澎湃，最大的爱好是和好朋友们打牌。
The kid, Golden Youth, is a little wispae formed from the condensed memories of youth. It's idealistic, childish, and passionate, with the greatest hobby of playing cards with friends.
这小家伙有样学样，在二维市北部建立起了名为「牌佬汇」的帮派…说是「帮派」，实际上日常活动就是聚在一起打银河战力党，是个人畜无害的兴趣社团。

Following suit, this little fella went on to set up a gang of his own called Cardway in northern Duomension City... Though they call themselves a gang, their daily activities just involve getting together to play Cosmicon Collective. In truth, they're basically just a harmless hobby club.
在那以后，它们一直过着「啊！这就是青春」的平凡生活……
Since then, they've been living a normal life of "Ah! You only live once"...
直到最近，突然出现了一个名为「魔古拉帮」的外国帮派。这伙人的银河战力党水平极为高超，很快就打得牌佬汇溃不成军。

Until recently, when a foreign gang called the Mogura Gang suddenly appeared. These guys were incredibly skilled in Cosmicon Collective combat, and they quickly crushed the Cardway into total disarray.
惨败之后，「青春岁月」开始四处寻找救兵。可惜，这位大侦探的牌技之臭，只能用「蜣螂抱粪」来形容…所以，就有了刚才向你乞援的一幕。

After that crushing defeat, Golden Youth went everywhere looking for reinforcements. Unfortunately, this great detective's so bad at cards, it's like watching "a dung beetle hugging its ball of muck"... And that's how you ended up with that pitiful plea for help just now.
仙舟将军爻老板？！何时来的？
Madam Yao, General of the Xianzhou!? When did you get here?
爻老板？不，你一定是认错人了。我既没有做过老板，也不是什么仙舟将军。
Madam Yao? No, you must have the wrong person. I've never been of high rank, and I'm certainly no Xianzhou General.
我乃是寄宿于「银河战力党」骰子中的「骰魂」，已在骰中沉睡一千七百年。
I am the "Dice Soul" bound within the dice of the Cosmicon Collective. I've slumbered inside these dice for seventeen hundred years.
我刚起了一卦，坤上乾下——拔茅征吉，志在外也。{NICKNAME}，你恐怕是战胜「魔古拉帮」，光复「牌佬汇」的最大助力——

I just cast a divination: "Earth above, Heaven below." Pulling up the reeds brings good fortune, and one's ambition lies afar. {NICKNAME}, you might just be our greatest hope to defeat the Mogura Gang and restore the Cardway to its former glory...
或许…也是让我等待一千七百年，见识到「玄玄妙手」的契机！
Perhaps... this is the moment I've waited <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years for: To witness the Hand of Mystique!
事不宜迟，现在就让我来替「牌佬汇」试试你的本事！
Let us dawdle no longer. Let me test your skills on behalf of the Cardway!
气势不错，有点我当年的风采！
Not bad at all. Reminds me of my old days!
I need a moment to get ready.
不死途大哥！刚冒出来的这个仙舟大姐头是谁啊？是你搬来的救兵吗？
Yo, brother Ashveil! Who's this Xianzhou boss lady that just showed up? Did you bring her in as backup?
…什么仙舟大姐头？我怎么什么都看不见？
...What Xianzhou lady? I don't see anyone.
如何，准备好一展身手了吗？
So, ready to show us what you've got?
气势不错，有点我当年的风采！
Not bad at all. Reminds me of my old days!
I need a moment to get ready.
水平的确不错，可惜…距离我想见到的「玄玄妙手」，还差了些火候。不过{F#她}{M#他}这身本事用来战胜「魔古拉帮」还是绰绰有余。大侦探，你们找对人了。

Impressive skills... but still not quite at the level of the Hand of Mystique that I want to see. Still, {F#she}{M#he}'s more than capable enough to take down the Mogura Gang. Great detective, you've found the right person.
你在和谁说话，又在和谁打牌？我怎么什么都看不见？难道这世上真的存在灵异现象？
Who are you talking to, and who are you playing cards with? I can't see anything! Don't tell me there's actually something supernatural going on here?
这么大一只爻老板你真看不见？
How could you not see Madam Yao when she's right there in front of you?
难道说，只有我能看见爻老板？
Wait, am I the only one who can see her?
都说了，我不是什么老板，我是在骰中沉睡一千七百年的「骰魂」。
I told you, I'm not some "madam." I'm a Dice Soul who's been slumbering inside these dice for seventeen hundred years.
你看，「骰魂」自己都说了，自己不是什么「爻老板」。
See? Dice Soul just said she's not "Madam Yao" or anything.
...Huh? I thought you couldn't see me?
哈哈，我这人啊，一上了岁数就喜欢自言自语。
Haha, well, you know how it is. The older I get, the more I talk to myself.
咳咳…{NICKNAME}，你要学的还有很多。不去看到那些我不该看到的人物，正是名侦探的生存之道。
Ahem...{NICKNAME}, you still have much to learn. Not seeing things I'm not supposed to see... that's the way of a true detective.
总之，光复「牌佬汇」一事就只能交给你和我了。如果是你{NICKNAME}，也许真的能战胜虎克的左右护法，甚至能战胜虎克本人，彻底瓦解「{RUBY_B#鼹鼠}魔古拉{RUBY_E#}帮」。

Anyway, restoring the Cardway is now up to just you and me. {NICKNAME}, you might actually be able to defeat Hook's left and right lieutenants, and maybe even Hook herself, bringing down the {RUBY_B#Mole}Mogura{RUBY_E#} Gang once and for all.
什么乱七八糟的剧情展开？
What kind of ridiculous plot twist is this?
虎者，岳岭之威；克者，制敌之要。此人的名字威烈无双，定是一位残暴的对手。
Hook, a name forged from strength and conquest, a name that carries unmatched ferocity... she must be a formidable foe.
「魔古拉帮」虽是初来乍到，却势不可挡，接连攻城拔寨，改变了鸽川区的势力分布。
Despite being newcomers, the Mogura Gang rose with unstoppable force, conquering territory after territory and reshaping the power dynamics of Dovebrook District.
三天，她只用了三天。「魔古拉帮」就已经吞并了七个打牌交流会，击溃了三个战力党沙龙。骰巷，梭哈兄弟会，比比大小联盟…已经悉数解散。

Three days. That's all it took her. In just three days, the Mogura Gang had already absorbed seven card clubs and crushed three Collective salons. The Dice Alley, the Show-Hand Brotherhood, the Betsizing Alliance... all disbanded.
尽管鸽川区的风向变了，但牌佬汇还没有被彻底打败，它的命运现在就在你的手上。
The tides may have turned in Dovebrook District, but the Cardway hasn't fallen yet. Its fate now lies in your hands.
虎克，你怎么变成了这样？
你或许曾经认识她，但她已经不是你认识的那个人了。
You might have known her once, but she's not the same person anymore.
这魔古拉帮到底能有多强？
Just how strong can this Mogura Gang be?
据说，她迄今为止未尝败绩，有着「万夫莫敌之勇」。
They say she's undefeated to this day, truly a one-woman army.
哼，倒也不必害怕，正所谓「玄之又玄，众妙之门」…你还有着「玄玄妙手」！
Hmph, no need to be scared. "The most mysterious one among all mysteries, the Gate of Wonders," remember? You still have the Hand of Mystique!
所谓「玄玄妙手」，便是在对局之时，突然领悟的骰子变幻纷繁的奥秘，由此做出了改变局势的决断。越是万般策略皆徒然的时刻，越是可能出现妙手。

The Hand of Mystique is a moment of sudden enlightenment. When you grasp the mysteries of the ever-changing dice during a match, and make a move that turns the tide. The more hopeless the situation, the more likely that divine play will appear.
身为「骰魂」，我会随时在你身侧进行指导，协助你抵达「银河战力党」的巅峰。
As a Dice Soul, I'll be by your side to guide you and help you reach the pinnacle of the Cosmicon Collective.
I see. Leave it to me.
我就知道你是能探索「银河战力党」之究极的同行者。
I knew it. You are the perfect companion to explore the ultimate secrets of the Cosmicon Collective with.
好吧…谁叫我喜欢助人为乐呢？
Well... guess that's what I get for being a helpful person.
太好了。自古以来，唯有古道热肠的良善之人，方能领悟「玄玄妙手」的奥秘。
Excellent! Since ancient times, only those with kind and benevolent hearts have been able to comprehend the mysteries of the Hand of Mystique.
事已至此，是不是没法拒绝了？
Looks like there's no backing out now, huh?
我沉睡了一千七百年，此番再度复苏，就是为了见证你使出「玄玄妙手」的瞬间。你可不许临阵脱逃。
I have slumbered for seventeen hundred years, and I've awakened just to witness the moment you unleash the Hand of Mystique. Don't even think about backing out now.
想要挑战「魔古拉帮」的首领虎克，就需要先战胜她的左右护法——「梆梆•克拉拉」和「音律琴魔•希露瓦」。
To challenge Hook, the leader of the Mogura Gang, you must first defeat her left and right lieutenants: Help-Me Clara and Melodic Demon Serval.
要是你准备好了，就在这里叫上我们牌佬汇残党，我们会向魔古拉帮下战书的。
When you're ready, call on the remaining Cardway members, and we'll send the Mogura Gang a challenge letter.
和我们一起踏上无间之道吧。
Join us and walk the path of retaliation together.
I need a moment to get ready.
我要给魔古拉帮下战书。
I'm gonna send a challenge letter to the Mogura Gang.
{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，要回到「银河战力党」的残酷世界了吗？下战书的事就请交给我吧！
{NICKNAME}{F#Boss Lady}{M#Boss}, ready to dive back into the brutal world of the "Cosmicon Collective"? Leave the challenge letters to me!
Boss Svarog, long time no see.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}。从效率上判断，我们应该立刻开始「银河战力党」对决。
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. For optimal efficiency, we should begin our Cosmicon Collective duel immediately.
请直接告诉我，虎克在哪里？
Just tell me straight, where's Hook?
我只是「梆梆•克拉拉」的小弟。结论：我没有帮会头目•虎克的信息权限。
I am merely a subordinate of Help-Me Clara. Conclusion: I do not possess the clearance to access information on gang leader Hook.
这位铁人往这里一站，我刚才还以为这就是最终决战了，你却告诉我这只是…小弟？
This iron man shows up here, and I thought we were in for the final boss fight. But you're telling me he's just... a minion?
听人说，虎克身高约六尺二寸，肩宽程度足以让所有门框显得狭窄，看来所言非虚。
They say Hook stands at six feet two, with shoulders broad enough to make any doorframe look narrow... and it seems they weren't exaggerating at all.
Bro, stop, please, you're scaring me.
呵，我也怕。但是…硬汉可不能任由双腿颤抖，毕竟，我必须前进。
Heh, I'm scared too. But... a real tough guy doesn't let his knees shake. After all, I've got to keep moving forward.
Pfft, Hook's just a little brat.
呵，我很喜欢你自信的样子，但是…如果我是你，我绝对不会轻敌。
Heh, I like your confidence, but... if I were you, I definitely wouldn't underestimate your opponent.
逻辑：阻止「鼹鼠党的暴行」，在我看来的确是有必要的。但是现如今，克拉拉已经加入了虎克的帮派游戏之中，她的立场便是我的立场。
Logic: Stopping the Moles's atrocities is indeed a necessary course of action in my analysis. However, Clara has now joined Hook's gang game, and her position is my position.
我会在*任何冲突*中保护好克拉拉。
I will protect Clara in any conflict.
结论：{NICKNAME}，如果你想和克拉拉对决，那就在「银河战力党」中先战胜我。
Conclusion: {NICKNAME}, if you wish to challenge Clara, you must first defeat me in the Cosmicon Collective.
期望你是位够格的对手，能让克拉拉玩得尽兴。
I expect you to be a worthy opponent who can keep Clara entertained.
克拉拉平时很少有机会沉醉于一场游戏。我会确保她玩得尽兴。
Clara rarely gets the chance to lose herself in a game. So I will ensure she enjoys it to the fullest.
喔，算是个有趣的长辈。真不错。
Oh, quite an interesting elder. Not bad at all.
评估结果：{NICKNAME}「银河战力党」游戏水平优秀，可以带给克拉拉充分的挑战与乐趣。接下来是属于她的战斗，我不会给她施加压力。

Evaluation result: {NICKNAME}'s performance in Cosmicon Collective is excellent, capable of providing Clara with sufficient challenge and enjoyment. The upcoming battle belongs to her, and I will not put pressure on her.
另外，我想告诉你实情——克拉拉其实是想阻止虎克挑战本地帮派的，毕竟虎克她…破坏了「银河战力党」的平衡性。
Also, there's a fact you should know: Clara actually wanted to stop Hook from challenging the local gangs. After all, Hook... disrupted the balance of the Cosmicon Collective.
…若是能有如此牌力，着实令人期待。
...With such card skills, it's hard not to get excited.

Clara tries to comfort the displaced gang members, having stayed behind to look after her newly found "family."

好孩子克拉拉，虎克在哪里？

不必再逞强了小姑娘，这座城市的风已经告诉我了——你一直都在做好事。

不对，克拉拉现在很坏很坏，无论面对怎样的对手，梆梆就是两拳。

我好喜欢你桀骜不驯的样子～
嘿嘿～就问问{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，梆梆我啊，梆梆不梆梆！

请{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}与我对战的时候，千万别客气，千万不要手下留情！
{F#Big Sis}{M#Big Brother}, please don't hold back when you face me. Give it everything you've got!

就在这里做个了断吧，虎克——！

接下来就是你们与漆黑的虎克大人的大决战了，我在这里渲染一下悲壮的气氛……

终于到这一刻了…{NICKNAME}，你准备好面对与虎克的最终决战了吗？

无辜？在银河战力党的世界里，胜者即是正义！

抱歉虎克，今天我是冷硬派。

阻止你？我是来跟你打牌的…

你以为虎克还是个天真的小孩吗？时代变了，荣誉队员！
You think Hook is still a naive little kid? Times have changed, honorary member!
虎克跟随布洛妮娅大人来到这里之后，第一次接触到了银河战力党。那时，就有*好心人*告诉虎克「嘿，银河战力党是个好东西」。
After I came here with Lady Bronya, I got to play Cosmicon Collective for the first time. Back then, some kind soul told me, "Hey, Cosmicon Collective is some good stuff."
虎克只是想用好东西去做点好事而已。

Boiled eggs get hard. That's why they're called "Hard-Boiled."
经历社会熬炼的人也会变硬，为了目的而变得冷酷无情、不择手段，这就是你，虎克！

可惜，就算是荣誉队员，也完全不可能胜过漆黑的虎克大人，哇咔咔！
Too bad, even the honorary member doesn't stand a chance against Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Wahahaha!
…艮上兑下。「君子以征忿窒欲」，原来如此。
...Mountain above, marsh below. "The noble one curbs anger and reins in desire." So that's what it means.

Don't mind me, just a force of habit.

As the boss of The Moles, Hook accepts your challenge. Honorary member, let's begin our final battle!
这{NICKNAME}要是能翻盘，别说叫「玄玄妙手」了…叫「玄玄玄玄玄手」都没问题。

{NICKNAME}，虽然虎克已经给你添了不少麻烦，但这小小的教训，还得麻烦你——
{NICKNAME}, though Hook has already caused you enough trouble, I must trouble you for this small lesson...
漆黑的虎克大人，换一张公平的卡牌，再和{NICKNAME}堂堂正正地打一场吧。

你听到虎克最后的悲鸣了吗？我很熟悉那样的声音——唯有被诓骗而被迫踏上无间之道的无辜者，才会发出那样的悲鸣。

Thank you all for your hard work these past few days. With the Mogura Gang driven out, I, Golden Youth, am truly moved to tears!

...Now that we're on the case, all that's left is to investigate, gather intel, and uncover the truth.
{NICKNAME}，我们要调查清楚，究竟是哪位「天王」教坏了那样纯真的小孩子。

Allow me to challenge you all to a duel of Cosmicon Collective. Let me test your resolve in seeking the truth!
人心会掩饰、会撒谎、会回避，而骰子不会。因此，骰子是人心的明镜。

…这又是谁啊？你们忍侠有点太多了。

…桑博吗？彷徨了一千七百年，我还没见过这位「银河战力党」的运营负责人呢。玩家社区确实天天骂他…但他是会教坏小孩子的那种人吗？

...Sampo? After wandering around for <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years, I have yet to meet this operations manager of the "Cosmicon Collective." Sure, players trash-talk him every day on the forums... but is he really the type who'd be a bad influence on kids?

真相究竟如何，恐怕要等我们当面问问了。多谢了，乱破！

哼，可惜啊！我恐怕没机会见到桑博了！一千七百年的彷徨，即将走向终局，我这一缕残魂…也即将…归于空寂……

Hmph, what a pity! I'm afraid I won't get the chance to meet Sampo! After <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years of wandering, everything's coming to its finale, and this lingering fragment of my soul... will soon... fade into nothingness...
啊？怎么突然开始演这出戏？

面具那件事，应该给你添了不少麻烦吧？实在抱歉。

没事的，面具的事已经不重要了，别放在心上。
